source: On the " Cyrano " set , Rappeneau recalled , most of his cast was stymied by the challenge of reciting the lush alexandrine quartets of the script , and simultaneously executing complicated physical action . source: Background : No one wants to bury a son or daughter , so I wo n't pretend to understand Dean Hancock 's pain . That 's why the Cincinnati Reds released him in spring training two years ago , citing his poor conditioning .

source: Ba Vo is the dressed-up little sister of Pho 84 , a downtown Oakland mainstay for more than 20 years . Ambience aside , you 'll find the same menu and efficient service at both . Some old favorites like the black pepper prawns have disappeared , but the fare goes beyond the usual Vietnamese . Squid stuffed with chicken and mushrooms come in a rich spicy shrimp sauce ; tofu with black mushrooms and clear noodles are covered with a coconut curry cream . Ba Vo is open weekdays only .
domestication: 巴沃是福84的精致小妹，福84在奥克兰市中心经营了二十多年，名声在外。抛开氛围不谈，两家店的菜单和服务效率都差不多。有些老菜，比如黑胡椒虾仁，已经不见了，但菜品远远不止传统的越南菜。比如，鸡和蘑菇塞的鱿鱼配上浓郁的辣虾酱，还有黑蘑菇和透明粉丝盖上椰奶咖喱酱的豆腐。巴沃只在工作日营业。

source: No single group has cornered the market on caring ; nevertheless , many people would never call it " volunteering " -- they might say they are just " helping out . source: " We are seeing a far more aggressive use of the alternative sources of political funding , " former FEC commissioner Trevor Potter says . "

source: The companies have also banded together to support the idea of a " trusted traveler " card . Adm . James M. Loy , head of the federal security agency , said yesterday at a Senate hearing that he backed the concept . But such a program should be put in place slowly , some security experts say , and it could be costly for the taxpayer . Moreover , any watering down of current procedures -- including removing random checks -- could have dire consequences .
domestication: 这些公司还联合起来支持“可信旅客卡”的想法。联邦安全局局长洛伊上将在参议院听证会上表示支持这一概念。不过，一些安全专家认为，这样的项目应该逐步实施，而且可能会让纳税人付出高昂代价。此外，任何对现行程序的放松，比如取消随机检查，都可能带来严重的后果。

source: When Tucson drivers first got a taste of the novel intersections , which are intended to improve traffic flow and safety , many took a dim view of them . However , while 80 percent of respondents to a 2013 Star poll said they disliked the traffic innovation , that number fell to 50 in a similar poll conducted last year .

When Tucson drivers first got a taste of the novel intersections , which are intended to improve traffic flow and safety , many took a dim view of them . 当图森的司机第一次尝试点新型交叉路口时，这些交叉路口旨在改善交通流量和安全，许多人对此持否定态度。然而，尽管2013年《星报》的一项民意调查显示，80%的受访者表示他们不喜欢这项交通创新，但在去年进行的类似民调中，这一数字下降到了50%。

source: " The people at the top have changed , but not the system , " agrees Esther Prieto , director of Paraguay 's Center for Humanitarian Studies , a human rights group . " The new clique has got hold of the possessions of the old one . " GUSTAVO SABA , who is married to Rodriguez 's second daughter , Mirtha , is now owner of Channel 9 , the country 's largest television chain , formerly owned by Stroessner 's elder son , Gustavo . And the talk on the streets and in Western embassies is that Gen. Humberto Gacete , the current head of the Army , has the new lease on the luxury Hotel Guarani in downtown Asuncion - which was also Gustavo Stroessner 's .
domestication: “上面的人换了一批，但制度还是老样子。”巴拉圭人权组织——人道研究中心的主任埃斯特尔·普里埃托表示，“新的团伙占了旧团伙的便宜。”古斯塔沃·萨巴，娶了罗德里格斯的二女儿米尔塔，现在成了全国最大的电视台第九频道的新主人，这个频道以前是斯特罗埃斯纳的大儿子古斯塔沃的产业。街上的闲话和西方使馆的消息都传，目前的陆军司令胡姆贝尔托·加塞特将军也拿到了位于首都亚松森市中心的豪华瓜拉尼酒店的租约，这酒店原先也是古斯塔沃·斯特罗埃斯纳的。
foreignization: “上面的人变了，但制度没有变，”帕拉圭人权组织——人道主义研究中心主任埃斯特·普里埃托（Esther Prieto）同意这一观点。“新的集团已经掌握了旧集团的财产。”古斯塔沃·萨巴（Gustavo Saba），罗德里格斯的二女儿米尔塔（Mirtha）的丈夫，现在是该国最大的电视网第九频道的所有者，这个频道以前由斯特罗瑟纳的大儿子古斯塔沃拥有。而在街头和西方大使馆的传言是，现任陆军总司令胡姆贝尔托·加塞特（Humberto Gacete）获得了位于亚松森市中心的豪华瓜拉尼酒店的新租约——这个酒店也是古斯塔沃·斯特罗瑟纳的。

source: He said he expected that the police would be replaced by an Iraq Army unit , a move he hoped would be more acceptable to residents . But Iraqi soldiers were in short supply . He was informed that the new force would be another unit of the National Police . That posed a huge challenge , since the National Police had lost the trust of the Sunnis in the Baya area .
domestication: 他说，他原指望警察能被一支伊拉克陆军部队接替，这样或许更能获得当地居民的接受。可伊拉克士兵数量不足，他被告知新来的将是另一支国民警察部队。这可难办了，因为国民警察在拜亚地区的逊尼派心中已经失去了信任。
foreignization: 他说，他希望警察会被一支伊拉克军队单位取代，这一举动他希望会更受居民欢迎。但伊拉克士兵短缺。他被告知新部队将是国民警卫队的另一个单位。这构成了巨大的挑战，因为国民警卫队已经失去了拜亚地区逊尼派的信任。

source: That 's where Ms. Behm and her seven burly tree-climbing experts - smoke jumpers from the western US - come in . Usually these self-professed " thrill seekers " parachute into forest fires in parched western forests . But since 1999 , some smoke-jumper volunteers have been enlisting in their off season to battle the ALB interloper .
domestication: 贝姆女士和她的七位魁梧的树攀专家——来自美国西部的跳伞消防员——这时就派上用场了。这些自称“寻求刺激”的人通常会空降到干旱的西部森林扑灭大火。但自1999年起，一些跳伞消防员志愿者在闲暇季节加入到对抗亚洲长角 beetle 的战斗中来。
foreignization: 那就是贝姆女士和她的七位健壮的攀树专家——来自美国西部的烟跳队员——发挥作用的地方。通常这些自称的“寻求刺激者”会伞降到干旱的西部森林中的森林火灾现场。但自1999年以来，一些烟跳队员志愿者在非赛季期间加入了对抗亚洲长角 beetle（注：原文中ALB应指Asian Longhorned Beetle，即亚洲长角 beetle）入侵者的行列。

source: Boxing helped Hopkins get through 56 months of incarceration . He won four national middleweight penitentiary titles and used his time behind bars to earn his general equivalency diploma . He was 17 when he was locked up and 22 when he walked out , facing nine years of probation but determined to never go back .
domestication: 拳击帮助霍普金斯度过了56个月的铁窗生涯。他在监狱里赢得了四个全国中量级冠军，还利用这段日子拿到了高中同等学力证书。他17岁进去，22岁出来，虽然面临着九年的缓刑，但他下定决心再也不回那个地方了。

source: The Opening Ceremonies are in Atlanta , but Columbus is bringing its Olympic sport to town with a bash of its own . Columbus ' welcome ceremony will be July 20 , the night before the first-ever pitch of Olympic softball competition . The ceremony , to be held at the city 's Memorial Stadium , includes fireworks , the showing of a film called " Faces of Columbus " and appearances by the Columbus Symphony Orchestra , Up With People and singer Peabo Bryson . Games begin July 21 at Golden Park .
domestication: 开幕式在亚特兰大举行，但哥伦布市也举办了自己的派对，迎接奥运赛事的到来。哥伦布的欢迎仪式定在7月20日，就在奥运会垒球比赛首战前夜。仪式将在市立纪念体育场举行，活动内容丰富多彩，包括烟花表演、放映《哥伦布面孔》这部短片，还有哥伦布交响乐团、Up With People团体和歌手皮波·布莱森的精彩演出。比赛则从7月21日在黄金公园正式开打。
foreignization: 开幕式在亚特兰大举行，但哥伦布市将带着自己的奥运项目来到 town，并举办一场派对。哥伦布市的欢迎仪式将在7月20日，即奥运垒球比赛首次投球的前一晚。仪式将在该市的纪念体育场举行，包括烟花表演、放映名为“哥伦布的面孔”的电影以及哥伦布交响乐团、Up With People 和歌手皮博·布莱森的亮相。比赛将于7月21日在金公园开始。

source: This physical proximity was accentuated by the fact that so many Enron employees had once worked at Andersen ; at Mr. Skilling 's old firm , McKinsey ; and to a lesser degree at Vinson &; Elkins . Enron 's general counsel , James Derrick , had once been a Vinson &; Elkins partner . The company 's chief accounting officer , Richard A. Causey , had started at Andersen .
domestication: 这种物理上的接近性更加突显了安然公司和安达信、斯金林先生的老东家麦肯锡，以及在一定程度上与文森·艾利金律师事务所之间的关系。安然的总法律顾问詹姆斯·德里克曾是文森·艾利金的合伙人，公司的首席会计官理查德·A·考齐也是从安达信起家的。可以说，这些公司之间的人脉关系紧密得就像一家子。
foreignization: 这种物理上的接近性由于许多安然员工曾经在安达信工作过这一事实而得到了加强；在斯基林先生的老东家麦肯锡公司；以及在文森特&埃尔金斯律师事务所工作的程度较小。安然的总法律顾问詹姆斯·德里克曾是文森特&埃尔金斯律师事务所的合伙人。该公司的首席会计官理查德·A·考西曾在安达信开始其职业生涯。

source: Then there is the constant carrying of building supplies -- drywall and framing lumber -- being brought into the house to divide the family room or living room into more bedrooms or divide a master bedroom to provide at least one more sleeping area . I have been inside of these houses and seen this for myself .
domestication: 接着就是不断地往房子里搬运建筑材料，比如石膏板和框架木材，用来把客厅或起居室隔成更多的卧室，或者把主卧分成至少再多一个睡觉的地方。我亲眼见过这种房子，里面就是这样。
foreignization: 然后是不断搬运建筑材料——干墙和框架木材——被带进房子，以将家庭房或起居室分隔成更多的卧室，或将主卧室分隔开来，至少再提供一个睡眠区域。我亲自进入过这些房子，并亲眼看到了这一点。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Then there is the constant carrying of building supplies -- drywall and framing lumber -- being brought into the house to divide the family room or living room into more bedrooms or divide a master bedroom to provide at least one more sleeping area . I have been inside of these houses and seen this for myself .
接着就是不断地往房子里搬运建筑材料，比如石膏板和框架木材，用来把客厅或起居室隔成更多的卧室，或者把主卧分成至少再多一个睡觉的地方。我亲眼见过这种房子，里面就是这样。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Then there is the constant carrying of building supplies -- drywall and framing lumber -- being brought into the house to divide the family room or living room into more bedrooms or divide a master bedroom to provide at least one more sleeping area . I have been inside of these houses and seen this for myself .
然后是不断搬运建筑材料——干墙和框架木材——被带进房子，以将家庭房或起居室分隔成更多的卧室，或将主卧室分隔开来，至少再提供一个睡眠区域。我亲自进入过这些房子，并亲眼看到了这一点。

source: Marshall is the only team that has captured more than one Class AA state title . The Patriots open defense of their state championship Nov. 22 in the Maine West Tournament against the host Warriors . Then they face Public League powers Young and Washington . Also on the schedule are games against nationally ranked powers Trinity from Garfield Heights , Ohio , and Milwaukee 's Pius XI .

source: These are transitional times at the Fairfax-based Omega World Travel Inc. , one of the country 's largest travel agencies with about $ 500 million in revenue last year and 200 offices . In the new world of travel , a business that has always had low a turn in the road , " said Gloria Bohan , 56 , president and chief executive of the company she founded in Fredericksburg , Va. , in 1972 . " We want to find ways to survive in an industry that 's changing . "
domestication: 位于费尔法克斯的欧米茄世界旅行社正处在转型期。这可是全美数一数二的旅行社，去年营收约5亿美元，拥有200家分店。在新的旅游行业形势下，公司创始人、现年56岁的总裁兼首席执行官格洛丽亚·博汉说：“我们这个行当一直都在摸着石头过河，现在更是到了一个转折点。”她接着说道：“我们要找到办法，在不断变化的行业中生存下去。”

source: Under family and fun , for instance , the study looked at the number of playgrounds per 100,000 residents and the number of families with children younger than 18 . Under education , health and safety , the study weighed such items as high school graduation rate , air quality , number of pediatricians per 100,000 residents , percentage of children lacking health insurance , and the violent and property crime rates per 100,000 residents .
domestication: 比如，在家庭和娱乐方面，研究关注的是每十万居民拥有的游乐场数量，以及有18岁以下孩子的家庭数量。在教育、健康和安全方面，研究则考虑了高中毕业率、空气质量、每十万居民中儿科医生的数量、缺乏健康保险的儿童比例，还有每十万居民中的暴力犯罪和财产犯罪率。
foreignization: 在家庭和娱乐方面，例如，该研究考察了每10万居民拥有的游乐场数量和拥有18岁以下儿童的家庭数量。在教育、健康和安全方面，该研究考虑了诸如高中毕业率、空气质量、每10万居民拥有的儿科医生数量、缺乏健康保险的儿童比例以及每10万居民的暴力犯罪和财产犯罪率等因素。

source: A lot of people turn to the internet to look for a new pet . However , experts say if you try to purchase a pet online , there 's a good chance you 'll get scammed . A new report by the Better Business Bureau ( BBB ) says that online pet sale scams are on the rise . Keep in mind , there are some legitimate breeders , but a majority of the websites appear to be scams . In fact , the BBB warns that when you search online , 80 percent of sponsored links may be fraudulent .
domestication: 很多人上网找新宠物。不过，专家提醒，网上买宠物很可能会上当受骗。美国商业促进局（BBB）发布的新报告显示，网上宠物销售诈骗正在增加。要知道，虽然有些正规的繁殖者，但大多数网站看起来都是骗局。事实上，BBB警告说，网上一搜，八成的赞助链接都可能是假的。
foreignization: 很多人转向互联网寻找新的宠物。然而，专家表示，如果你试图在线购买宠物，有很大可能会被骗。更好的商业局（BBB）的一份新报告称，在线宠物销售骗局正在增加。请注意，虽然有一些合法的繁殖者，但大多数网站似乎都是骗局。事实上，BBB警告说，当你在线搜索时，80%的赞助链接可能是欺诈性的。

source: " The singers do n't have to grab hands and stand side-by-side facing the conductor , " Merrill said . source: The story of the region 's top 100 publicly traded firms emerges from such distinct , different rhythms of companies within clusters of core industries . The sectors reflect the region 's past and future : biotechnology , communications , defense and government contracting , finance and insurance , health , manufacturing , media , real estate and construction , retailing , technology , and transportation and energy .
domestication: 这个地区百强上市企业的故事，出自于各核心产业群内公司不同的发展节奏。这些行业既反映了地区的过去，也预示着它的未来：生物科技、通信、国防与政府合同、金融保险、健康、制造、媒体、房地产和建筑、零售、科技，还有交通和能源。

source: Ford Excursion ( $ 33,460 ) : This is the world 's largest sport-utility . It drives so well that it feels smaller than it is -- although it can haul nine people and plenty of cargo . The Excursion is based on the rugged Ford Super Duty F-series pickup truck , but its size makes parking and fitting it into a garage awkward .
domestication: 福特探险者（33,460美元）：这可是全球最大的SUV。开起来特别顺手，感觉比实际要小得多——尽管它能装下九个人和大堆货物。探险者基于坚固的福特Super Duty F系列皮卡打造，但因为体积庞大，停车和停进车库都挺费劲。
foreignization: 福特远足者 (33,460 美元) ：这是世界上最大的运动型多用途车。它的驾驶感受非常好，以至于感觉比实际要小——尽管它可以搭载九人和大量货物。远足者基于坚固的福特 Super Duty F 系列皮卡，但其尺寸使得停车和将其停进车库变得不方便。

source: Some of his players called him " Nick Satan " because he could be so demanding , but that was a characteristic that impressed then-general manager Mike Holovak . At times , Holovak would sit in the back of the room during position meetings to see how the assistants communicated and interacted with the players .

source: Atlanta Journal editorial columnist Dick Williams spoke with President Bush by telephone Monday afternoon . The president admitted that his 1990 agreement to raise taxes was a mistake and commented on his political strength in the South , defense cuts , family issues and the 1988 Willie Horton television commercials . An edited transcript of that conversation follows .

source: Years ago , I was sent out to a " man with a gun " call at Hyatt Rickeys in Palo Alto . Those are the times you wish you had a regular job , in an office . source: Julie Langhorne , who 's lived through two kitchen renovations in different homes , says having the right equipment and surroundings helps her cook more often . She picked her east Cobb home partly for its outdated kitchen , one that she knew there would be no question of keeping . The white tile countertops had cracked as the house settled . The cabinets were white , most appliances black , the refrigerator almond . One oven did n't work , and pots slid around on the uneven cooktop .
domestication: 朱莉·兰霍恩经历过两次厨房翻新，她说有合适的设备和环境能让她更频繁地下厨。她选中位于东科布的这套房子，部分原因就是看中了它那老旧的厨房，她知道这个厨房肯定得改。白色的瓷砖台面随着房子下沉已经开裂，橱柜是白色的，大多数电器是黑色的，冰箱则是杏仁色。一个烤箱根本就不能用，锅子在不平的炉灶上四处滑动。
foreignization: 朱莉·兰霍恩经历了两次在不同住宅的厨房翻新，她说拥有合适的设备和环境有助于她更频繁地烹饪。她选择她的东科布住宅部分原因是其过时的厨房，她知道这个厨房肯定不会保留。白色的瓷砖台面因房屋沉降而开裂。橱柜是白色的，大多数电器是黑色的，冰箱是杏仁色的。一个烤箱不能工作，平底锅在不平整的炉灶上滑动。

source: To discourage manipulation of wholesale purchases , FERC has proposed new rules , including making suppliers disclose their bids to other bidders after a brief lag . Bids are now kept secret for six months . " We 're trying to increase the transparency , " says FERC Chairman Joseph Kelliher . He says FERC is closely monitoring power markets and , with a 2005 law , can now impose hefty fines for manipulation .
domestication: 为了遏制大宗采购的操纵行为，联邦能源监管委员会（FERC）提出了新规定，包括让供应商在短暂延迟后向其他投标者披露他们的报价。目前，这些报价保密六个月。FERC主席约瑟夫·凯利赫说：“我们正在努力提高透明度。”他表示，FERC正密切关注电力市场，并且根据2005年的一项法律，现在可以对操纵行为处以重罚。
foreignization: 为了遏制批发购买的操纵行为，FERC提出了新的规则，包括在短暂延迟后让供应商向其他投标者披露他们的报价。目前，这些报价在六个月内保密。“我们正在努力提高透明度，”FERC主席Joseph Kelliher说。他表示，FERC正在密切关注电力市场，并且根据2005年的法律，现在可以对操纵行为处以巨额罚款。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

To discourage manipulation of wholesale purchases , FERC has proposed new rules , including making suppliers disclose their bids to other bidders after a brief lag . Bids are now kept secret for six months . " We 're trying to increase the transparency , " says FERC Chairman Joseph Kelliher . He says FERC is closely monitoring power markets and , with a 2005 law , can now impose hefty fines for manipulation .

source: The muscular young men laboring on the riverbed are in the minority , though . Most of the 3,000 GAM fighters who surrendered their weapons last year to peace monitors are unemployed , and donor-backed reintegration has bogged down in squabbles over who gets priority , and how money is disbursed . Mahfud says he pooled money from relatives to start his business instead of waiting for payouts .
domestication: 在河床上辛勤劳作的壮年男子毕竟是少数。去年向和平监督员交出武器的3000名GAM战斗人员中，大多数都失业了。靠捐赠者支持的重新融入社会计划因优先权和资金分配问题陷入了争吵。马福德说，他没有等着拿补助金，而是凑了亲戚的钱开始了自己的生意。
foreignization: 在河床上劳作的年轻力壮的男人是少数。大多数去年向和平监督员交出武器的3000名GAM战斗人员都失业了，而捐助者支持的重新融入计划因谁优先和如何分配资金的问题陷入了争执。Mahfud说，他汇集了亲戚们的钱来启动他的生意，而不是等待付款。

在河床上劳作的年轻力壮的男人是少数。大多数去年向和平监督员交出武器的3000名GAM战斗人员都失业了，而捐助者支持的重新融入计划因谁优先和如何分配资金的问题陷入了争执。Mahfud说，他汇集了亲戚们的钱来启动他的生意，而不是等待付款。

source: A rider for the last seven years -- he said he took it up to get over a love affair -- Mr. Srybnik is one of a legion of bikers who can be spotted ( and heard , certainly ) with their motorcycles outside the trendier places in SoHo each weekend , or in the Hamptons in summer . Soldiers in a volunteer army , they carry the Harley-Davidson banner not only on the roadways , but also to the ramparts of fashion and style .
domestication: 斯里布尼克先生骑摩托车已经七年了，他说这是为了走出一段恋爱的阴影。他是众多骑士中的一员，每到周末，你总能在苏活区那些时髦的地方看到（或者说听到）他们的摩托车。夏天的时候，这些人会去汉普顿。他们像志愿军一样，不仅在公路上高举哈雷戴维森的大旗，还把它带进了时尚和潮流的殿堂。
foreignization: 一位骑手已有七年——他说他是为了摆脱一段恋情而开始骑摩托车的——斯里布尼克先生是成群结队的摩托车手中的一员，每个周末都可以在苏霍区较时髦的地方外看到（和听到，当然）他们，或者在夏季的汉普顿斯。作为一支志愿者军队的士兵，他们不仅在道路上举着哈雷戴维森的旗帜，还将其带到了时尚和风格的前沿阵地。

source: The competitors spike the water with banned substances to keep their farmed fish alive . Batches of seafood traded at the Shanghai fish market this week , for example , carried the tell-tale greenish tinge of malachite green , a disinfectant powder that has been banned in China for five years because it is a suspected carcinogen but is still commonly used .

source: Today 's volunteers are software engineers who cap 10-hour work days by tutoring children in math . People living in shelters stock shelves at food banks . Immigrants serve as mental health counselors for newer arrivals in their neighborhoods . Middle school students help elderly people with art therapy projects . And pilots give free air transportation to medical patients .

source: But I have often seen a quiet smile in his eye , as if the world contains private jokes at which he is much amused . That smile was rare in his performance as " Gandhi " ( 1982 ) , but it was one of the reasons he won the Academy Award as best actor : It took the edge off the character 's nobility , and made him human in his greatness .

source: Parents , politicians and religious leaders will continue to argue about whether all this sex affects the nation 's moral fiber . But what about the nation 's need for laughs ? In the last several decades , television 's depiction of life has taken a 180-degree turn toward the prurient , but virtually no one -- including the writers and producers responsible for today 's shows -- says that all this sex makes sitcoms inherently funnier .
domestication: 家长、政客和宗教领袖还会继续争论这些性内容是否影响了国家的道德风气。但是，咱们国家的笑料需求呢？最近几十年，电视对生活的描绘来了个大转弯，越来越倾向于色情，但几乎没人认为，包括那些编剧和制作人自己，这些性内容能让情景喜剧变得更搞笑。
foreignization: 父母、政客和宗教领袖将继续争论所有这些性内容是否影响了国家的道德风气。但国家对笑的需求又如何呢？在过去的几十年里，电视对生活的描绘已经发生了180度的转变，变得更加淫秽，但几乎没有人——包括今天节目的编剧和制作人——认为所有这些性内容使情景喜剧本质上更有趣。

source: To hear the best sources tell it , Selig led the fight to unseat commissioner Fay Vincent , who knew the game could n't logically be controlled by its least successful teams . Selig opened the negotiations a year early , back in December of ' 92 , then failed to put forth a salary-cap proposal until this June . He was behind the owners ' withholding a $ 7.8 million pension payment due the union from receipts of the All-Star game , setting an irrevocable tone of acrimony . Then he helped talk the union into playing that game , not striking , so the new television contract could kick in .
domestication: 听那些可靠的消息来源说，塞利格带头发起了反对委员菲·文森特的行动，文森特深知这个游戏不能由最不成功的球队来掌控。塞利格提前一年，早在1992年12月就开启了谈判，但直到今年6月才提出工资帽的建议。他还唆使老板们扣留了本应从全明星赛收入中支付给工会的780万美元养老金，这无疑让双方的关系变得剑拔弩张。接着，他又说服工会参加了那场比赛，避免了罢工，好让新的电视转播合同顺利生效。
foreignization: 据最好的消息来源说，塞利格领导了罢免委员费伊·文森特的斗争，后者知道比赛不能由其最不成功的球队来掌控。塞利格提前一年，即在1992年12月就开始了谈判，然后直到今年6月才提出工资帽方案。他支持老板们扣留本应从全明星赛收入中支付给工会的780万美元养老金，从而定下了不可逆转的敌对基调。然后他又帮助说服工会参加了那场比赛，而不是罢工，以便新的电视合同能够生效。

He was behind the owners ' withholding a $ 7.8 million pension payment due the union from receipts of the All-Star game , setting an irrevocable tone of acrimony . Then he helped talk the union into playing that game , not striking , so the new television contract could kick in .

source: Like many sitcom writers , Mr. Charles makes a distinction between good sex and bad on television . The sex on NBC 's " Seinfeld , " for example , is handled with great sophistication , he says . Even the famous episode in which the four main characters compete to see who can refrain longest from masturbating -- Mr. Charles did n't write it -- was executed with remarkable subtlety . " Most important , " he says , " it was very , very funny . "
domestication: 查尔斯先生和很多情景喜剧的编剧一样，把电视上的性分为好的和坏的。比如，NBC的《宋飞正传》里的性描写就处理得非常老练。即使是在那集著名的四个主角比赛谁能最久不自慰的剧集中——尽管这集不是查尔斯先生写的——也展现出了非凡的细腻。最重要的是，他说，这集“特别特别搞笑”。
foreignization: 像许多情景喜剧编剧一样，查尔斯先生在电视上的好性和坏性之间做了区分。他说，《宋飞正传》中的性爱处理得非常 sophisticated。即使是在那集著名的四个主要角色竞争看谁能最长不自慰的剧集中——查尔斯先生没有写这一集——也是以惊人的微妙手法执行的。“最重要的是，”他说，“它非常，非常有趣。”

佩蒂特在投球时表现出冷静和专注的样子，却对着他正在观看的监视器上的重播大喊大叫，质疑某一个球的位置或另一个球的选择。今晚，他将与圣路易斯红雀队的克里斯·卡彭特在布什球场展开国家联盟冠军系列赛的首场比赛。

source: Lookout Mountain , Ga . - Bob and Carol Webber have just taken a quantum leap backward in the history of American tourism . source: Eighteen alleged cases of sexual harassment , including sharing of pornographic photos and a staff member accused of grabbing a woman 's buttocks and genitals , were publicly disclosed by the California Legislature on Friday , detailed through investigation records that had been shielded in some cases for more than a decade .

source: A toughly worded HUD audit in 2000 had found that the agency , with an annual budget of $200 million , had wasted hundreds of thousands of dollars of public funds through poor hiring and contracting practices and inflated executive salaries . Davis , then the director , was paid $188,000 , plus bonuses and other benefits .

source: However , further Japanese stock market drops - say a 5,000-point dive in the Nikkei - could be damaging to U.S. markets long-term . Such a vast evaporation of wealth and liquidity could cripple Japanese investors ' ability to buy U.S. bonds . " If Japan fails to show up at our Treasury auctions because of a lack of new money , we 'd have to raise interest rates here substantially to attract buyers , " says Gavin Dobson , president of investment firm Murray Johnstone International . " That 's the greatest danger . " Contributing : Mark Schilling in Tokyo
domestication: 不过，如果日本股市进一步下跌，比如说日经指数暴跌5000点，可能会对美国市场造成长期的负面影响。财富和流动性的大幅蒸发会让日本投资者购买美国债券的能力大打折扣。投资公司Murray Johnstone International的总裁Gavin Dobson说：“如果日本因为缺钱而不出席我们的国债拍卖，我们得大幅提高利率来吸引买家，这是最大的风险。”东京的Mark Schilling对此也有贡献。
foreignization: 然而，进一步的日本股市下跌——比如日经指数下跌5000点——可能对美国市场造成长期损害。如此大量的财富和流动性的蒸发可能会削弱日本投资者购买美国债券的能力。“如果日本由于缺乏新资金而未能出现在我们的国债拍卖会上，我们不得不大幅提高利率以吸引买家，”投资公司Murray Johnstone International的总裁Gavin Dobson说，“这是最大的危险。”撰稿人：东京的Mark Schilling

source: The mobilization of international support for Aceh after the tsunami was a catalyst in the peace talks , as donors quickly realized that the conflict was harming recovery efforts . The scale of the devastation also sapped the fighting spirit of the two sides . In contrast , Sri Lanka slid back into civil war despite efforts to use tsunami aid as a bridge between the government and ethnic Tamil rebels .
domestication: 海啸后国际社会对亚齐的援助成为和平谈判的催化剂，捐赠方很快意识到，冲突阻碍了灾后重建。灾难的规模也打击了双方继续战斗的士气。相比之下，尽管斯里兰卡试图利用海啸援助作为政府与泰米尔族反叛者之间的桥梁，但还是重陷内战。

source: It was a symbol and a sacrifice . source: Sure , there was always a better-than-decent chance 2016 would yield a historic result : Hillary Clinton becoming the first woman to be president . It 's easy to forget now that Mrs. Clinton might have been the most admired political figure of either party until a few months before she started running again ; before Bernie Sanders , before Donald J. Trump , before the " damn emails . " She appeared , at the outset , to have a nuisance-free path to the Democratic nomination and entered the race as a clear favorite over the demographically hobbled G.O.P. , whose default manifesto entering this election was called an " autopsy . " Even as young voters declared themselves uninspired by Mrs. Clinton , the " historic nature of her candidacy , " as her campaign put it so clinically , made for a momentous backdrop to all the disruption that followed .
domestication: 当然，2016年有可能成为历史性的一年：希拉里·克林顿可能成为美国第一位女总统。现在回想起来，直到希拉里再次竞选前的几个月，她可能是两党中最受敬重的政治人物；那时候还没有伯尼·桑德斯，没有唐纳德·特朗普，也没有“该死的邮件”事件。一开始，希拉里似乎一路畅通无阻，有望拿下民主党提名，并且在种族和性别多样性方面处于劣势的共和党面前，希拉里成了大热门。共和党当时对这次选举的默认战略还被称为“尸检报告”。即便年轻选民表示对希拉里并不感冒，但她的竞选团队冷冰冰地称之为“候选人身份的历史意义”，这为后来的一切动荡提供了一个令人瞩目的背景。
foreignization: 当然，2016年有很大可能会产生一个历史性结果：希拉里·克林顿成为第一位女性总统。现在很容易忘记，直到她在再次参选前的几个月，克林顿夫人可能是两党中最受尊敬的政治人物；在伯尼·桑德斯、唐纳德·J·特朗普和“该死的邮件”之前。最初，她似乎有一条没有障碍的道路获得民主党提名，并作为明显的热门人选参加竞选，而共和党的竞选形势因人口统计学上的劣势而显得困难重重，他们进入此次选举的默认纲领被称为“尸检报告”。即使年轻选民表示对克林顿夫人不感兴趣，她的竞选活动以一种冷静的方式所描述的“她的候选人资格的历史性质”，也为随之而来的所有颠覆提供了一个具有重要意义的背景。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Sure , there was always a better-than-decent chance 2016 would yield a historic result : Hillary Clinton becoming the first woman to be president . It 's easy to forget now that Mrs. Clinton might have been the most admired political figure of either party until a few months before she started running again ; before Bernie Sanders , before Donald J. Trump , before the " damn emails . " She appeared , at the outset , to have a nuisance-free path to the Democratic nomination and entered the race as a clear favorite over the demographically hobbled G.O.P. , whose default manifesto entering this election was called an " autopsy . " Even as young voters declared themselves uninspired by Mrs. Clinton , the " historic nature of her candidacy , " as her campaign put it so clinically , made for a momentous backdrop to all the disruption that followed .

source: Thank you , Kathy Hixson , for pointing out that , when you came to live in Colorado 30 years ago , it was a perfect state . We had no trash on our streets and highways ; no aggressive , rude , impatient drivers ; no drug or violent crimes ; no horrible acts of animal cruelty ; no one taking our jobs ; and no one completely disrespecting the environment . I jumped for joy to find that out our problems were caused solely by our ' million new residents . '
domestication: 谢谢凯西·希克斯指出，当你30年前搬到科罗拉多州时，这里是个完美的地方。街上和高速路上没有垃圾，司机们也不粗鲁、不急躁，没有毒品犯罪和暴力事件，没有人虐待动物，也没有人抢工作，更没人破坏环境。我一听这情况，高兴得跳了起来，原来我们的问题都是“新来的百万居民”造成的。

source: And then Dr. Holland was taking a history from a mother of a 4-year-old boy . He got to the section about relatives . The mother said the boy 's sister had been shot to death two days ago . Dr. Holland went numb . He looked at his sheet . The next part dealt with form of payment . He could not bring himself to ask . He left it blank . The hospital would have to figure that out . A Style of One 's Own

And then Dr. Holland was taking a history from a mother of a 4-year-old boy . He got to the section about relatives . The mother said the boy 's sister had been shot to death two days ago . Dr. Holland went numb . He looked at his sheet . The next part dealt with form of payment . He could not bring himself to ask . He left it blank . The hospital would have to figure that out . A Style of One 's Own

source: California wants to know if it gained six Congressional seats or seven ; Pennsylvania wants to know if it lost two or three . New Jersey towns want to know local population figures so they can determine how many liquor licenses to issue . Oklahoma City and Rochester want to know if they have lost their places among the top 50 metropolitan markets , meaning millions of advertising dollars would go elsewhere .
domestication: 加利福尼亚州想知道它是不是增加了六个还是七个国会席位；宾夕法尼亚州想知道它是不是失去了两个还是三个席位。新泽西的小镇们想知道当地的人口数，好决定发多少张酒牌。俄克拉荷马市和罗切斯特市想知道它们是不是从前五十大城市圈的名单上掉了下来，这意味着数百万的广告费可能会流向别处。
foreignization: 加利福尼亚州想知道它是否获得了六个国会席位还是七个；宾夕法尼亚州想知道它是否失去了两个还是三个。新泽西州的城镇希望知道当地人口数据，以便确定发放多少酒类执照。俄克拉荷马市和罗切斯特想知道它们是否失去了在前50大都市市场中的位置，这意味着数百万广告资金将流向其他地方。

source: " It is a silent revolution that has taken place in our country , " said Morshed Khan , the foreign minister of Bangladesh , one of the few democracies in the Muslim world . " For the first time in a Muslim country , hundreds of thousands of women in their late teens and early 20 's are wearing cosmetics , carrying handbags and walking to work every day .

source: The outcome was all the more remarkable when you consider Mr. Trump had 16 opponents to contend with in the Republican primaries and faced a Democratic nominee who 's been one of the biggest political celebrities in the world for nearly a quarter-century . Mr. Trump 's complete command of the coliseum is the prime reason 2016 will go down as a line-of-demarcation campaign in which every presidential election that came before it will seem quaint , tame and antiquated by comparison .
domestication: 考虑到特朗普先生在共和党初选中要对抗16个对手，而他的民主党对手则是近四分之一个世纪以来全球最炙手可热的政治明星之一，这个结果就显得更加了不起了。特朗普先生对竞技场的完全掌控，使得2016年的竞选成为了一个划时代的竞选，与之相比，之前的每一次总统选举都显得那么古板、温和、过时。
foreignization: 当考虑到特朗普先生在共和党初选中有16位对手，并且面对的是一位几乎是过去四分之一个世纪以来世界上最大的政治名人之一的民主党提名人时，这一结果就更加引人注目了。特朗普先生对角斗场的完全掌控是2016年将成为一条分界线的原因，与之相比，此前的每一次总统选举都会显得古朴、温和和过时。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The outcome was all the more remarkable when you consider Mr. Trump had 16 opponents to contend with in the Republican primaries and faced a Democratic nominee who 's been one of the biggest political celebrities in the world for nearly a quarter-century . Mr. Trump 's complete command of the coliseum is the prime reason 2016 will go down as a line-of-demarcation campaign in which every presidential election that came before it will seem quaint , tame and antiquated by comparison .

source: That evening , Kennedy zeroed in on the Mafia . He phoned Julius Draznin in Chicago , an expert on union corruption for the National Labor Relations Board , asking him to look into a possible mob angle on Dallas . More important , the attorney general activated Walter Sheridan , his ace Justice Department investigator , locating him in Nashville , where Sheridan was awaiting the trial of their longtime nemesis , Teamster leader Jimmy Hoffa .
domestication: 那天晚上，肯尼迪就把目标锁定在了黑手党上。他给芝加哥的朱利叶斯·德雷兹尼打了电话，这家伙是全国劳资关系委员会专门研究工会腐败的高手，让德雷兹尼调查一下达拉斯事件里有没有黑帮的影子。更重要的是，司法部长还启动了他的得力干将沃尔特·谢尔登，当时谢尔登正在纳什维尔，等着对付他们的老对手——卡车司机工会头目吉米·霍法的审判。
foreignization: 那天晚上，肯尼迪把焦点放在了黑手党上。他给位于芝加哥的朱利叶斯·德拉兹宁打了电话，德拉兹宁是全国劳资关系委员会的工会腐败问题专家，请他调查达拉斯事件中可能存在的黑帮因素。更重要的是，司法部长启动了他的王牌司法部调查员沃尔特·谢尔丹，在纳什维尔找到了谢尔丹，当时谢尔丹正在等待他们长期的对手、卡车司机工会领袖吉米·霍法的审判。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

That evening , Kennedy zeroed in on the Mafia . He phoned Julius Draznin in Chicago , an expert on union corruption for the National Labor Relations Board , asking him to look into a possible mob angle on Dallas . More important , the attorney general activated Walter Sheridan , his ace Justice Department investigator , locating him in Nashville , where Sheridan was awaiting the trial of their longtime nemesis , Teamster leader Jimmy Hoffa .

He phoned Julius Draznin in Chicago , an expert on union corruption for the National Labor Relations Board , asking him to look into a possible mob angle on Dallas . More important , the attorney general activated Walter Sheridan , his ace Justice Department investigator , locating him in Nashville , where Sheridan was awaiting the trial of their longtime nemesis , Teamster leader Jimmy Hoffa .
那天晚上，肯尼迪把焦点放在了黑手党上。他给位于芝加哥的朱利叶斯·德拉兹宁打了电话，德拉兹宁是全国劳资关系委员会的工会腐败问题专家，请他调查达拉斯事件中可能存在的黑帮因素。更重要的是，司法部长启动了他的王牌司法部调查员沃尔特·谢尔丹，在纳什维尔找到了谢尔丹，当时谢尔丹正在等待他们长期的对手、卡车司机工会领袖吉米·霍法的审判。

source: When nudged to say something about the first 30 years of her life , she proceeds carefully : " " I was born into a middle-class Jewish family . Our Judaism was a part of everyday life in an ethnic sense , and I was taught a very Jewish approach to life . Jews tend to wear their passions on their sleeves . Jews tend to care . Jews tend to go out and get it done , whatever it is . " Williamson was the baby of the family . She has a brother , Peter , an immigration lawyer , and a sister , Jane , who teaches fifth-grade history at St. John 's School .
domestication: 当被问及她前30年的生活时，她小心翼翼地说：“我出生在一个中产阶级的犹太家庭。我们的犹太身份在日常生活中处处体现，从民族的角度来说，我接受的是犹太人特有的生活方式教育。犹太人往往是情感外露的，关心他人，而且无论做什么事情，都会积极主动地去完成。” 威廉森是家里最小的孩子，她有一个哥哥彼得，是一名移民律师，还有一个姐姐简，在圣约翰学校教五年级的历史。

source: But it 's better than good : a gorgeously produced stab at self-examination ( it runs less than the length of a standard therapy session ) that suggests a new direction for rap 's elder statesmen . It also demonstrates a way that certain black artists can reckon with middle age -- by accepting the emotionalism , humor and self-criticism that come naturally to a current generation of younger rappers .

But it 's better than good : a gorgeously produced stab at self-examination ( it runs less than the length of a standard therapy session ) that suggests a new direction for rap 's elder statesmen . It also demonstrates a way that certain black artists can reckon with middle age -- by accepting the emotionalism , humor and self-criticism that come naturally to a current generation of younger rappers .
但它比好还要好：这是一次自我反省的精美制作（其时长不到标准治疗时间），它为说唱界的元老们指明了一个新的方向。这也展示了一种方式，即某些黑人艺术家可以通过接受当前一代年轻说唱者自然流露出的情感、幽默和自我批评来面对中年。

source: The two custom-built kitchens in her restaurant feature three-gallon blenders and food processors so big they have to sit on the floor . Convection dehydrators at 110-115 degrees turn flax seed paste into crisp crackers and dates , cocoa powder and ground cashews into a reasonable facsimile of a brownie .

source: Baez began promoting Amnesty 's mission in her concerts , and gave Amnesty a year of full-time work . Inspired by Ginetta , Baez became a willing menial in the Sagan home , addressing envelopes , taking phone calls , running errands and caring for the overflowing files of documents , case sheets and Amnesty literature .

source: Earth Girls is one of three films - along with Transylvania 6-5000 and The Fly - she did with ex-husband Jeff Goldblum before their three-year marriage broke up last fall . " It 's something we 're both sad about , " she says . " We went into it with high hopes , but it 's just the way things go . " They 're still friends , and yes , there is a new man , but she 's not naming names .
domestication: 《地球女孩》是她和前夫杰夫·高布伦在三年婚姻破裂前合作的三部电影之一，另外两部是《特兰西瓦尼亚6-5000》和《苍蝇》。“这件事我们都很难过，”她说，“我们当初满怀希望，但事情就是这么发展的。”两人现在还是朋友，而且她也有了新男友，不过她没透露是谁。
foreignization: 《地球女孩》是她与前夫杰夫·戈德布卢姆在他们三年的婚姻去年秋天破裂之前合作的三部电影之一，另外两部是《特兰西瓦尼亚6-5000》和《苍蝇》。“这是我们两人都感到难过的事，”她说。“我们带着很高的期望进入这段婚姻，但事情就是这样发展的。”他们仍然是朋友，而且，是的，有了新的男人，但她不会透露姓名。

source: According to the Regional Plan Association , 98 percent of the work force in the New York metropolitan region commutes to work each day ; on any given day in the year 2010 , 10 percent will " commute " by wire . Nationwide , 30 million of us are expected to be working at home by the year 2000 , more than a fifth of the labor force . Welcome to the Staples economy .
domestication: 根据区域规划协会的数据，纽约大都会区有98%的劳动力每天都要通勤上班；到了2010年，每年的任何一天，都有10%的人会通过网络“通勤”。全国范围内，预计到2000年，将有3000万人在家工作，占劳动力的五分之一以上。欢迎来到史泰博经济时代。

source: Like any NASCAR driver , Schrader yearns to win the Daytona 500 or Brickyard 400 and end the season as Winston Cup champion . But his dreams do n't begin , or end , there . Asked what he still wants to accomplish in a career that shows four Winston Cup wins and more than $ 11 million in prize money , he grins and reaches for his briefcase .
domestication: 像任何一位纳斯卡赛车手一样，斯克雷德也渴望赢得戴通纳500或砖厂400，最终以温斯顿杯冠军的身份结束赛季。但他的梦想可不止于此。当被问及在他的职业生涯中还有哪些目标未达成时——他已经拿下了四次温斯顿杯冠军，奖金超过1100万美元——他笑了笑，伸手去拿手提箱。
foreignization: 像任何一位纳斯卡赛车手一样，斯克雷德渴望赢得代托纳500或砖厂400，并以温斯顿杯冠军的身份结束赛季。但他的梦想并不从这里开始，也不在这里结束。当被问及在他已经取得四次温斯顿杯胜利和超过1100万美元奖金的职业生涯中，他还想完成什么时，他微笑着伸手去拿他的公文包。

source: Dottie Lamm asks " Whose kids are they anyway ? " ( Jan. 21 ) . The answer is that they are their parents kids . Why is that people like Lamm always want the government to protect our children ? When I was growing up there was no pornography on TV , but there were programs my parents considered worthless and I was n't allowed to watch . I was n't allowed to read " Mad " magazine unless I also read something " good . "
domestication: 多蒂·拉姆问道：“孩子到底是谁的？”（1月21日）。答案很简单，孩子当然是父母的。为什么像拉姆这样的人总是希望政府来保护我们的孩子呢？我小的时候，电视上没有色情内容，但有些节目我父母觉得没什么价值，就不让我看。我不被允许读《疯狂》杂志，除非我也读点“好东西”。
foreignization: 多蒂·拉姆问：“这些孩子到底是谁的孩子？”（1月21日）。答案是他们是他们父母的孩子。为什么像拉姆这样的人总是希望政府来保护我们的孩子？当我长大的时候，电视上没有色情内容，但有一些我父母认为毫无价值的节目，我是不允许看的。我不被允许读《疯狂》杂志，除非我也读一些“好的”东西。

source: New Salem 's living-history village of two dozen log homes and shops , staffed in season by interpreters in period dress , is the most youngster-friendly of the Lincoln sites . There 's a spanking-new visitor center , where this summer 's productions by the Great American People Show troupe are scheduled for June 19-Aug. 16 on an indoor stage .
domestication: 新塞勒姆的活历史村庄里有二十多座木屋和商铺，一到旺季就有身着古装的解说员驻守，是林肯遗址中最受孩子们欢迎的地方。这里新建了一个游客中心，今年夏天，伟大的美国人民剧团将于6月19日至8月16日在室内舞台上表演。
foreignization: New Salem 的二打原木房屋和商店组成的生活历史村落，在季节期间由穿着时期服装的解说员担任工作人员，是林肯遗址中最适合年轻人的。这里有一个全新的游客中心，今年夏天由 Great American People Show 演出团在室内舞台上的演出安排在 6 月 19 日至 8 月 16 日。

source: In the last two decades , the census has also recorded more and more minority groups who clamored for statistical recognition - and policy benefits . But the groups often felt shortchanged . The minority groups ' desires for recognition in the census mingled with a distrust of motive and method was most recently shown by the leaders of the Gay and Lesbian Task Force , which wants gay couples to identify themselves as unmarried partners , a new category .
domestication: 过去二十年里，越来越多的少数群体要求在统计中得到承认，进而享受政策优惠，但这些群体往往觉得吃了亏。少数群体渴望在人口普查中获得认可，这种愿望夹杂着对动机和方法的不信任，最近就体现在同性恋权利组织的领导者们身上，他们希望同性伴侣能以“非婚伴侣”这一新类别来登记自己。
foreignization: 在过去的二十年中，人口普查还记录了越来越多要求统计认可——以及政策福利的少数群体。但这些群体常常感到被亏待了。少数群体在人口普查中寻求认可的愿望与对动机和方法的不信任交织在一起，最近这一点由同性恋任务组的领导人表现出来，他们希望同性伴侣能将自己认定为未婚伴侣，这是一个新的类别。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the last two decades , the census has also recorded more and more minority groups who clamored for statistical recognition - and policy benefits . But the groups often felt shortchanged . The minority groups ' desires for recognition in the census mingled with a distrust of motive and method was most recently shown by the leaders of the Gay and Lesbian Task Force , which wants gay couples to identify themselves as unmarried partners , a new category .
过去二十年里，越来越多的少数群体要求在统计中得到承认，进而享受政策优惠，但这些群体往往觉得吃了亏。少数群体渴望在人口普查中获得认可，这种愿望夹杂着对动机和方法的不信任，最近就体现在同性恋权利组织的领导者们身上，他们希望同性伴侣能以“非婚伴侣”这一新类别来登记自己。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the last two decades , the census has also recorded more and more minority groups who clamored for statistical recognition - and policy benefits . But the groups often felt shortchanged . The minority groups ' desires for recognition in the census mingled with a distrust of motive and method was most recently shown by the leaders of the Gay and Lesbian Task Force , which wants gay couples to identify themselves as unmarried partners , a new category .
在过去的二十年中，人口普查还记录了越来越多要求统计认可——以及政策福利的少数群体。但这些群体常常感到被亏待了。少数群体在人口普查中寻求认可的愿望与对动机和方法的不信任交织在一起，最近这一点由同性恋任务组的领导人表现出来，他们希望同性伴侣能将自己认定为未婚伴侣，这是一个新的类别。

source: Hundreds of major hospitals -- including Virginia Commonwealth University in Richmond and Children 's in Philadelphia -- do not plan to immunize any workers unless circumstances change . Several statewide nurses ' associations have advised against vaccination , while the AFL-CIO , the Service Employees International Union and the American Federation of State , County and Municipal Employees have urged the Bush administration to postpone the program .

source: While the Blue Chips ' results do n't indicate much about how the Washington area economy did last year , there are plenty of clues in the performance of companies whose businesses are heavily concentrated in the region . Atop that list are retailers Giant Food Inc. and Hechinger Co. in Landover ; the Potomac Electric Power Co. and The Washington Post Co. in the District ; Rockville 's Mid Atlantic Medical Services Inc. , the metro area 's largest health maintenance organization ; and NVR Inc. in McLean , the holding company for Ryan Homes and NVHomes , the region 's largest home builder .
domestication: 蓝筹股的表现或许没能直接反映出华盛顿地区去年的经济状况，但从那些业务集中在这一区域的公司表现中，我们可以找到不少线索。排在首位的是兰多弗的两家零售商：巨人食品公司和赫辛格公司；还有哥伦比亚特区的波托马克电力公司和《华盛顿邮报》公司；罗克维尔的中大西洋医疗服务中心，这是大都会地区最大的健康管理组织；以及麦克莱恩的NVR公司，旗下有瑞安家园和NV家园，是该地区最大的房屋建筑商。
foreignization: 虽然蓝筹股的结果并不能说明华盛顿地区经济去年的表现如何，但从那些业务集中在该地区的公司表现中可以找到许多线索。在这份名单上名列前茅的是兰多弗的零售商Giant Food Inc.和Hechinger Co.；哥伦比亚特区的Potomac Electric Power Co.和The Washington Post Co.；洛克维尔的Mid Atlantic Medical Services Inc.，这是大都会地区最大的健康维护组织；以及麦克莱恩的NVR Inc.，后者是Ryan Homes和NVHomes的控股公司，是该地区最大的房屋建筑商。

source: There is n't one impressive thing about the owners sticking together . It is sad , embarrassing , inexcusable . The only way they could have saved baseball would be to find some common sense from a Peter O'Malley , Peter Magowan , or anyone else with a shred of integrity . Except , our main man Bud Selig did n't allow any contrary thought . He orchestrated this thing from the beginning . The owners are unified , all right . Unified in hell .
domestication: 这些老板们团结一致，真是没什么值得夸的。这事儿真是让人沮丧、尴尬，简直无法原谅。要是能有像彼得·奥马利、彼得·马戈万这样有点儿良心的人出来说两句，可能还能救救棒球。可是，咱们的大佬布德·塞利格才不让任何不同的声音出现呢。他从头到尾都是这么策划的。这些老板们倒是挺团结，不过是在地狱里团结。
foreignization: 没有一件关于老板们团结一致的事情令人印象深刻。这很可悲，令人尴尬，无可原谅。他们唯一能拯救棒球的方法就是从彼得·奥马利、彼得·马戈万或任何一个有丝毫正直感的人那里找到一些常识。但是，我们的大人物巴德·塞利格不允许有任何不同的想法。他从一开始就策划了这一切。老板们确实团结一致。团结在地狱里。

source: The culture in which Enron flourished blends politics , business and social relationships so thoroughly that the distinctions sometimes lose their meaning . The internal pressure applied to employees at Enron , at Vinson &; Elkins and at Arthur Andersen to contribute to the companies ' political action committees was heavy , according to interviews and documents . Each of the companies ranked among the Bush presidential campaign 's 10 largest contributors .
domestication: 恩隆公司得以繁荣的文化里，政治、商业和社会关系交织得如此紧密，以至于这些界限有时都变得模糊不清了。据访谈和文件透露，在恩隆、温森·艾尔金斯和亚瑟·安达信，内部对员工向公司政治行动委员会捐款的压力非常大。这三家公司都是布什总统竞选活动最大的十位捐助者之一。
foreignization: 恩ron繁荣的文化将政治、商业和社会关系如此彻底地融合在一起，以至于这些区别有时失去了意义。根据采访和文件，恩ron、Vinson & Elkins 和 Arthur Andersen 的员工在向这些公司的政治行动委员会捐款方面承受了巨大的内部压力。这三家公司都名列布什总统竞选活动最大捐助者前十名。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Each of the companies ranked among the Bush presidential campaign 's 10 largest contributors .

source: As his Stryker command vehicle drove along a crowded avenue Colonel Norris spied several Shiite women in black abayas wailing over a body sprawled near a mosque as distraught relatives smeared the dead man 's blood on their faces . The American officer tried to wave down an Iraqi National Police truck for help , but the driver gave him an icy stare and kept going .
domestication: 诺里斯上校的斯特赖克指挥车沿着一条拥挤的大街行驶时，他看到几个身穿黑色长袍的什叶派妇女在清真寺附近一个倒地的尸体旁哀号，心碎的亲属们把死者的鲜血抹在自己的脸上。这名美国军官试图招停一辆伊拉克国民警车求助，但司机冷冷地看了他一眼，扬长而去。

source: Oil industry sources in Yemen said the 36,330-ton Ain Zalah unloaded at Aden but that the nature of the cargo was not immediately known . They said two more Iraqi tankers were waiting offshore , including the Baba Karkar , which U.S. warships had been shadowing through the Persian Gulf after firing warning shots Saturday in an unsuccessful attempt to halt it .
domestication: 也门的石油业消息人士称，36330吨的艾因扎拉赫号在亚丁港卸货，但货物的具体情况还不清楚。他们还说，另有两艘伊拉克油轮正在海上等候，其中包括巴巴卡尔卡尔号。这艘船此前在美国军舰的跟踪下穿过波斯湾，美军周六还曾朝它开过警告炮，试图让它停下，但没有成功。
foreignization: 也门石油业消息人士称，36,330吨的艾因扎拉赫号在亚丁卸货，但货物的性质尚未立即得知。他们说，还有两艘伊拉克油轮正在海上等待，其中包括巴巴卡尔卡号，美国军舰在周六发射警告炮弹未能阻止该船后，一直在波斯湾对其进行跟踪。

source: The payments have proved to be a huge success among consumers across Europe since they were introduced in late 2008 . In Germany , they have helped increase sales by about 40 percent from a year ago . But for car companies , living without them will not be easy , said Carlos Ghosn , the chief executive of Renault and Nissan and chairman of the European Automobile Manufacturers Association .
domestication: 自从2008年底推出以来，这项支付方式在欧洲消费者中大受欢迎。在德国，它帮助汽车销量比去年同期增长了大约40%。不过，对于汽车制造商来说，没有这种支付方式的日子可不好过，雷诺和日产的首席执行官、欧洲汽车制造商协会主席卡洛斯·戈恩如是说。
foreignization: 支付方式自2008年底推出以来，在欧洲各地的消费者中取得了巨大成功。在德国，它们帮助销售额同比增长了约40%。但对汽车公司来说，没有这些支付方式将难以生存，雷诺和日产的首席执行官、欧洲汽车制造商协会主席卡洛斯·戈恩如是说。

source: We consume and experience films ( and music , and , for that matter , sports ) for many reasons . To be enlightened , to be entertained , to experience beauty and grapple with ugliness . As human beings , we need this , emotionally and intellectually . And while the artists who offer this to us are linked to their work -- it 's their work , after all -- they are n't the work , themselves . And their pasts , however repellent they are , do n't negate the value in what they create .
domestication: 我们看电影、听音乐、看体育比赛，原因多种多样。为了开阔眼界，为了娱乐放松，为了感受美好，也为了直面丑陋。人嘛，情感上和智力上都离不开这些。艺术家们创作了这些作品，作品确实是他们的劳动成果，但他们本人并不是作品。就算他们过去有些不堪，这也不能抹杀他们作品的价值。
foreignization: 我们消费和体验电影（以及音乐，还有体育）有许多原因。为了得到启发，为了娱乐，为了体验美并面对丑陋。作为人类，我们在情感上和智力上都需要这些。虽然向我们提供这些作品的艺术家与他们的作品有关联——毕竟这是他们的作品——但他们本身并不是作品。而他们过去的行为，无论多么令人反感，都不会否定他们所创造的作品的价值。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

We consume and experience films ( and music , and , for that matter , sports ) for many reasons . To be enlightened , to be entertained , to experience beauty and grapple with ugliness . As human beings , we need this , emotionally and intellectually . And while the artists who offer this to us are linked to their work -- it 's their work , after all -- they are n't the work , themselves . And their pasts , however repellent they are , do n't negate the value in what they create .
我们看电影、听音乐、看体育比赛，原因多种多样。为了开阔眼界，为了娱乐放松，为了感受美好，也为了直面丑陋。人嘛，情感上和智力上都离不开这些。艺术家们创作了这些作品，作品确实是他们的劳动成果，但他们本人并不是作品。就算他们过去有些不堪，这也不能抹杀他们作品的价值。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

We consume and experience films ( and music , and , for that matter , sports ) for many reasons . To be enlightened , to be entertained , to experience beauty and grapple with ugliness . As human beings , we need this , emotionally and intellectually . And while the artists who offer this to us are linked to their work -- it 's their work , after all -- they are n't the work , themselves . And their pasts , however repellent they are , do n't negate the value in what they create .
我们消费和体验电影（以及音乐，还有体育）有许多原因。为了得到启发，为了娱乐，为了体验美并面对丑陋。作为人类，我们在情感上和智力上都需要这些。虽然向我们提供这些作品的艺术家与他们的作品有关联——毕竟这是他们的作品——但他们本身并不是作品。而他们过去的行为，无论多么令人反感，都不会否定他们所创造的作品的价值。

source: Instead of using antibiotics , Zhu regularly gives his fish Gandankang , a Tibetan blend that people take for liver and gall bladder problems . He also sometimes uses a " magic grass pill " made from a root used to treat diarrhea or dysentery and help stop miscarriages in humans . The claim that giving fish traditional Chinese medicine is safe is backed up by China Catfish Institute , a research group affiliated with the Ministry of Agriculture .
domestication: 朱先生不常用抗生素给鱼治病，而是经常给它们喂一种叫甘胆康的藏药，这种药原本是给人治疗肝胆疾病的。有时候，他还会用一种“神草丸”，这药是用一种能治腹泻、痢疾和保胎的草根制成的。中国鲶鱼研究所，一个隶属于农业部的研究机构，支持说给鱼喂中药是安全的。
foreignization: 朱经常给他的鱼服用甘胆康，这是一种藏药混合物，人们用于治疗肝胆问题。他有时还使用一种“神奇草药丸”，这种药丸由一种根制成，用于治疗腹泻或痢疾，并帮助防止人类流产。给鱼服用传统中药是安全的说法得到了与中国农业部有关的中国鲶鱼研究所的支持。

messages_domestication.content:

Instead of using antibiotics , Zhu regularly gives his fish Gandankang , a Tibetan blend that people take for liver and gall bladder problems . He also sometimes uses a " magic grass pill " made from a root used to treat diarrhea or dysentery and help stop miscarriages in humans . The claim that giving fish traditional Chinese medicine is safe is backed up by China Catfish Institute , a research group affiliated with the Ministry of Agriculture .

source: The deficit spending traces back to the 1980s and , in fact , I put into effect a deficit-reduction plan in 1995 . Had it been carefully followed , the district 's finances might be in better shape today . It was not , and changes are under way . To be sure , spending cuts and job reductions will be made as needed . But a work force of 1,150 , responsible for managing 67,790 acres of land , falls short of your characterization as a bloated payroll .
domestication: 赤字开支的问题要追溯到上世纪80年代，实际上我在1995年就实施了一项减少赤字的计划。如果当时严格执行，现在区里的财务状况可能会好很多。可惜没有做到，现在正在作出改变。当然，必要时会削减开支和裁员。但拥有1150名员工来管理67790英亩的土地，说这是个臃肿的人员编制，可就有点冤枉了。
foreignization: 赤字支出可以追溯到20世纪80年代，事实上，我在1995年实施了一个赤字削减计划。如果该计划得到认真执行，该地区的财政状况今天可能会更好。但事实并非如此，变革正在进行中。当然，将根据需要进行开支削减和裁员。但是，负责管理67,790英亩土地的1,150名员工，并不能算是你所说的冗员。

The deficit spending traces back to the 1980s and , in fact , I put into effect a deficit-reduction plan in 1995 . Had it been carefully followed , the district 's finances might be in better shape today . It was not , and changes are under way . To be sure , spending cuts and job reductions will be made as needed . But a work force of 1,150 , responsible for managing 67,790 acres of land , falls short of your characterization as a bloated payroll .
赤字支出可以追溯到20世纪80年代，事实上，我在1995年实施了一个赤字削减计划。如果该计划得到认真执行，该地区的财政状况今天可能会更好。但事实并非如此，变革正在进行中。当然，将根据需要进行开支削减和裁员。但是，负责管理67,790英亩土地的1,150名员工，并不能算是你所说的冗员。

source: The raid appeared to be a complete surprise to the Tupac Amaru Revolutionary Movement after months of inconclusive international globe-trotting by Japanese and Peruvian leaders seeking a peaceful settlement . In the end , the rebels reportedly refused offers of safe passage to Cuba or the Dominican Republic unless they achieved their principal goal : the release of hundreds of their comrades held in Peruvian prisons .
domestication: 这次突袭显然让图帕克·阿马鲁革命运动措手不及。在此之前，日本和秘鲁的领导人为了寻求和平解决方案，已经进行了数月的国际奔走，但都没有结果。到了最后，据报道，叛军拒绝了前往古巴或多米尼加的安全通道提议，除非他们能达到主要目标：释放被关押在秘鲁监狱里的数百名同伙。
foreignization: 这次突袭似乎让图帕克·阿马鲁革命运动感到完全意外，此前日本和秘鲁领导人为了寻求和平解决，进行了数月的国际奔波但未取得成果。最终，据报道，叛乱分子拒绝了前往古巴或多米尼加共和国的安全通道提议，除非他们实现其主要目标：释放被关押在秘鲁监狱中的数百名同伙。

source: I always suspected Chuck Green was the Church Lady out of drag , but his July 5 column on banning fireworks sales proves it . source: " I think they ( transition team ) have to be mindful of what they do n't know . source: So I say : Close up the liquor stores ; put a piece of rope in every jail cell ; hang or shoot the drug pushers 24 hours after convicted ; shoot the taggers who deface walls ; close up gun shops ; outlaw guns ; if someone needs to be in prison over 20 years , hang them ; send unruly kids with guns and knives to a desert boot camp for six months .

source: Somali-born and London-based writer and poet Warsan Shire remarks , " No one leaves home unless home is the mouth of a shark . source: Here are some suggestions for talking with your parents about incidents that have hurt or angered you . Be aware that expressing your feelings , even in the most expert manner , is not a guarantee of a positive outcome and should only be attempted when you feel emotionally ready . Communicating in this manner , however , may help you discover whether a relationship is ready to move toward reconciliation .
domestication: 这里有几点建议，帮助你和父母谈论那些让你受伤或生气的事情。要知道，即使再高明地表达自己的感受，也不能保证一定会得到好的结果，所以只有当你觉得自己情绪上准备好了，才去做这件事。不过，这样交流可能会帮你发现，你们的关系是否准备好向和解迈进了。
foreignization: 这里有一些建议，可以帮助你与父母谈论那些令你受伤或愤怒的事情。请注意，即使以最专业的方式表达你的感受，也不能保证会有积极的结果，只有当你觉得自己情感上准备好了才应该尝试这样做。然而，以这种方式沟通可能会帮助你发现关系是否准备好走向和解。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Here are some suggestions for talking with your parents about incidents that have hurt or angered you . Be aware that expressing your feelings , even in the most expert manner , is not a guarantee of a positive outcome and should only be attempted when you feel emotionally ready . Communicating in this manner , however , may help you discover whether a relationship is ready to move toward reconciliation .
这里有几点建议，帮助你和父母谈论那些让你受伤或生气的事情。要知道，即使再高明地表达自己的感受，也不能保证一定会得到好的结果，所以只有当你觉得自己情绪上准备好了，才去做这件事。不过，这样交流可能会帮你发现，你们的关系是否准备好向和解迈进了。

source: Commissioner Safir met yesterday with Haitian community leaders , some of whom do not endorse Mr. Sharpton 's involvement in the planned protest rally . " We want everyone to keep calm heads , " she said .

source: This week brought some insight into the sect 's rituals . A hidden meeting room and chapel at the farmhouse in Cheiry was decorated with symbols variously inspired by Catholicism , astrology , Spiritualism , Templarism and Rosicrucianism . A golden chalice was used to burn incense . Members wore white , red or black capes , depending on their rank . A painting of a bearded Christ-like figure , with a rose above his head , presided over the area .
domestication: 这周我们了解到了这个教派的一些仪式。在谢里农场的一间秘密会议室和礼拜堂里，装饰着各种符号，这些符号灵感来源于天主教、占星术、灵学、圣殿骑士团和玫瑰十字会。他们用一个金色的圣杯来烧香。成员们根据地位不同，穿着白色、红色或黑色的斗篷。墙上挂着一幅有胡子的基督像，头顶上还有一朵玫瑰花，显得十分庄重。

source: Coast Guard helicopters and boats returned for several hours Sunday to search for two men still missing since the accident at the mouth of Tillamook Bay a day earlier . On shore , federal investigators walked the beach , collecting the remaining soaked life jackets that had washed up from the wreck of the Taki Tooo .

source: The stark black-and-white drawings depict the suffering of the prisoners : a teacupful of rice for dinner . Hard labor for 16 to 18 hours at a time at a camp in Woo Sung , China , their first destination before being moved to Japan four months later . The bitter winters , where the POWs marched up and down inside their flimsy cabins to keep warm . Beatings with bamboo sticks that caused running sores .
domestication: 那些鲜明的黑白画描绘了囚犯们的苦难：晚餐只有一杯米。在中国伍宋的劳改营里，他们每天要劳作16到18个小时，四个月后又被转移到日本。寒冬腊月，战俘们在简陋的棚屋里来回走动以取暖。竹棍的毒打让他们的身上长满了流脓的伤口。
foreignization: 鲜明的黑白画描绘了囚犯们的苦难：晚餐只有一杯米饭。在中国伍宋的营地里，他们一次要从事16到18小时的重体力劳动，这是他们在四个月后被转移到日本之前的第一个目的地。严酷的冬季，战俘们在简陋的小屋里来回走动以保持温暖。用竹棍殴打导致流脓的伤口。

source: Mr. Fujimori shared his plans with only a handful of advisers during the crisis . But a break in Government planning that led to a violent resolution appeared to occur last weekend , when the President shuffled the leadership of his security forces . The Interior Minister and police commander were forced to resign , and after they took responsibility for the hostage-taking five months before , they were replaced by two hard-line generals .
domestication: 藤森先生在危机期间只和少数顾问分享了他的计划。但政府的决策出现了转折，最终导致了暴力解决的局面。上周，总统重组了安全力量的领导层，这一变化似乎成为了导火索。内政部长和警察总长被迫辞职，他们为五个月前的人质事件负责。结果，两位强硬派将军取而代之。
foreignization: 藤森先生在危机期间只与少数顾问分享了他的计划。但政府规划的破裂导致了暴力解决的局面似乎发生在上周末，当时总统调整了安全部队的领导层。内政部长和警察指挥官被迫辞职，他们在承担五个月前人质事件的责任后，被两名强硬派将军取代。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Mr. Fujimori shared his plans with only a handful of advisers during the crisis . But a break in Government planning that led to a violent resolution appeared to occur last weekend , when the President shuffled the leadership of his security forces . The Interior Minister and police commander were forced to resign , and after they took responsibility for the hostage-taking five months before , they were replaced by two hard-line generals .

source: The V.A . hospital estimates that the work done by hundreds of volunteers like Mrs. Brown is worth at least $350,000 a year . But none of it registers on the gauge most widely used to assess the nation 's well-being -- the gross domestic product -- which represents the estimated total of goods and services produced in the American marketplace .
domestication: VA医院估计，像布朗夫人这样的几百名志愿者的工作每年价值至少35万美元。但这些贡献在衡量国家福祉最常用的指标——国内生产总值（GDP）中却一点也体现不出来。GDP代表的是美国市场上商品和服务的总估计值。

source: In the airy sitting room of the ranch house where he has lived for 48 years , Byron Nelson holds a picture in his gnarled hands and peers back through time . In the frame , a lean young man is in the perfect golf position , his arms extended and the shaft of his club bowed , head behind the ball , body in absolute balance .
domestication: 在牧场房子里的客厅里，拜伦·尼尔森住了48年，他手里拿着一张照片，目光穿越时光。照片里，一个瘦削的年轻人摆出了完美的高尔夫姿势，双臂伸展，球杆微微弯曲，头在球后，身体保持绝对平衡。

source: FDA says Schein failed to follow regulations Washington -- Schein Pharmaceutical Inc. , a maker of generic drugs , distributed drugs after they had failed quality control tests , the Food and Drug Administration said in a warning letter . The problems at Schein 's Marsam Pharmaceuticals Inc. manufacturing facility in Cherry Hill , N.J. , were serious enough that the FDA said it is suspending all of the company 's applications for new drug approvals until the facility is found to be in compliance with the agency 's regulations .
domestication: 食品药品监督管理局（FDA）说，施恩制药公司没有遵守规定。华盛顿消息——生产仿制药的施恩制药公司，在药品未通过质量控制测试后仍予以分发。FDA在警告信中指出，施恩旗下的马萨姆制药公司在新泽西州切里希尔的制造厂问题严重，以至于FDA决定暂停该公司的所有新药申请审批，直到该工厂符合相关规定为止。
foreignization: FDA称Schein未遵守法规 华盛顿--Schein制药公司，一家仿制药制造商，在药品未能通过质量控制测试后仍进行分发，食品和药物管理局在一封警告信中表示。Schein的Marsam制药公司在新泽西州樱桃山的制造设施的问题严重到FDA表示将暂停该公司所有新药批准申请，直到该设施被发现符合机构的法规为止。

FDA says Schein failed to follow regulations Washington -- Schein Pharmaceutical Inc. , a maker of generic drugs , distributed drugs after they had failed quality control tests , the Food and Drug Administration said in a warning letter . The problems at Schein 's Marsam Pharmaceuticals Inc. manufacturing facility in Cherry Hill , N.J. , were serious enough that the FDA said it is suspending all of the company 's applications for new drug approvals until the facility is found to be in compliance with the agency 's regulations .

source: A second group of high-tech companies is unique to the Washington region -- Beltway contractors with the alphabet soup names who furnish federal and state governments with information technology services , specialized software and systems management expertise . BDM International Inc. in McLean , American Management Systems Inc . ( AMS ) in Fairfax , CACI International Inc. in Arlington , Rockville 's Computer Data Systems Inc. and two Vienna neighbors , GRC International Inc. and BTG Inc. , top this list .
domestication: 华盛顿地区还有一群独特的高科技公司——那些给联邦和州政府提供信息技术服务、专业软件和系统管理 expertise 的“字母汤”承包商。麦克莱恩的 BDM 国际公司、费尔法克斯的美国管理系统公司（AMS）、阿灵顿的 CACI 国际公司、罗克维尔的计算机数据系统公司，还有维也纳的两家邻居公司——GRC 国际公司和 BTG 公司，都排在这份名单的前列。这些公司的名字听起来就像是用字母随机拼凑起来的，但它们可都是政府背后的技术大拿。

source: Critics worry that the ministry may have lost its way at a moment when leaders in the United States and other industrial nations are demanding that it take more steps to help prevent an Asian tailspin . Economists say that by trying to tighten the country 's belt even during hard times , the ministry risks throwing Japan into recession .
domestication: 批评人士担心，正当美国和其他工业国家的领导人要求日本采取更多措施防止亚洲经济下滑的时候，日本政府可能已经迷失了方向。经济学家指出，日本在困难时期仍试图勒紧裤腰带，这种做法可能会把日本推入衰退的深渊。

source: Nor is it apparent what " violent productions " have to contribute to these operas . The world of " Cavalleria " is in fact one of extreme order . It certainly contains violence , but you would hardly know it from most of what happens in the opera , and even the act of violence in which it culminates is specific and contained -- Turiddu knows the inevitable outcome of his involvement with Alfio 's wife . The world of " Pagliacci , " apart from the demons lurking in Canio 's mind , is n't noticeably violent at all .
domestication: 这些“暴力场面”对歌剧有何贡献，也不明显。《乡村骑士》的世界其实是极其有序的。虽然其中确实有暴力，但从歌剧中大部分情节来看，你几乎感觉不到。即使是最后那场暴力事件也是具体而有限的——图里杜知道与阿尔菲奥妻子纠缠的必然结果。至于《丑角》，除了卡尼奥心中潜藏的恶魔，这个世界并不显得特别暴力。
foreignization: 也不明显“暴力作品”对这些歌剧有什么贡献。“卡瓦列里亚”的世界实际上是一个极其有序的世界。它当然包含暴力，但你从歌剧中发生的大多数事情中几乎看不出来，即使是在其高潮中发生的暴力行为也是具体和有限的——图里杜知道他与阿尔菲奥的妻子牵扯的不可避免的结果。“佩利亚奇”的世界，除了卡尼奥心中潜伏的恶魔之外，并不是明显的暴力世界。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nor is it apparent what " violent productions " have to contribute to these operas . The world of " Cavalleria " is in fact one of extreme order . It certainly contains violence , but you would hardly know it from most of what happens in the opera , and even the act of violence in which it culminates is specific and contained -- Turiddu knows the inevitable outcome of his involvement with Alfio 's wife . The world of " Pagliacci , " apart from the demons lurking in Canio 's mind , is n't noticeably violent at all .
这些“暴力场面”对歌剧有何贡献，也不明显。《乡村骑士》的世界其实是极其有序的。虽然其中确实有暴力，但从歌剧中大部分情节来看，你几乎感觉不到。即使是最后那场暴力事件也是具体而有限的——图里杜知道与阿尔菲奥妻子纠缠的必然结果。至于《丑角》，除了卡尼奥心中潜藏的恶魔，这个世界并不显得特别暴力。

source: Now , the pharmaceutical industry finds itself under siege from insurers , hospitals , Congress and the Clinton Administration , which calls the containment of health-care costs a major priority in its fight to reduce the Federal deficit . On Friday , the President singled out the industry for criticism , calling its prices " shocking " and saying drug companies are spending too much on advertising and lobbying .
domestication: 现在，制药行业四面楚歌，保险公司、医院、国会和克林顿政府纷纷向其发难。政府把控制医疗成本当作减少联邦赤字的关键一环。上周五，总统更是直接点名批评制药行业，说药价“惊人”，指责药企在广告和游说上花钱太多。
foreignization: 现在，制药行业发现自己受到了保险公司、医院、国会和克林顿政府的围攻，后者将控制医疗保健成本作为减少联邦赤字的主要优先事项。周五，总统对该行业进行了批评，称其价格“令人震惊”，并表示制药公司花在广告和游说上的钱太多。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Now , the pharmaceutical industry finds itself under siege from insurers , hospitals , Congress and the Clinton Administration , which calls the containment of health-care costs a major priority in its fight to reduce the Federal deficit . On Friday , the President singled out the industry for criticism , calling its prices " shocking " and saying drug companies are spending too much on advertising and lobbying .

On Friday , the President singled out the industry for criticism , calling its prices " shocking " and saying drug companies are spending too much on advertising and lobbying .
现在，制药行业发现自己受到了保险公司、医院、国会和克林顿政府的围攻，后者将控制医疗保健成本作为减少联邦赤字的主要优先事项。周五，总统对该行业进行了批评，称其价格“令人震惊”，并表示制药公司花在广告和游说上的钱太多。

source: We as a society are moving closer to a time when the life of an unborn child is paramount to the health and welfare of its mother . Yet the number of children born into poverty , drug addiction and abuse rises daily . The nutrition-supplementing WIC program that has proved to save the lives and health of pregnant women , infants and toddlers is being cut back. ##How can anyone be surprised at our rate of crime , violence and obvious signs of hopelessness in our society under these circumstances ?
domestication: 我们社会越来越看重未出生孩子的生命，甚至超过了母亲的健康和福祉。然而，每天都有更多的孩子出生在贫困、毒品成瘾和虐待的家庭中。已经证明能挽救孕妇、婴儿和幼儿生命的营养补充计划WIC却在被削减。在这种情况下，谁还能对我们的犯罪率、暴力事件和明显的社会绝望感到惊讶呢？
foreignization: 我们作为社会正在接近一个时代，那时未出生孩子的生命比其母亲的健康和福利更为重要。然而，每天都有更多的孩子出生在贫困、吸毒和虐待之中。已经证明可以拯救孕妇、婴儿和学步儿童的生命和健康的营养补充WIC计划正在被削减。##在这些情况下，任何人对我们社会中的犯罪率、暴力和明显的绝望迹象感到惊讶吗？

source: " I ca n't say the Shot made Allan Houston , because he was a player prior to that , but it really , to me , took him to another level in terms of superstardom , " Chaney said . " I think now Allan believes he can score on anyone in the league . And I think , late in a game , he knows he can make any basket . "
domestication: 钱尼说：“我不能说这一球成就了阿兰·休斯顿，因为他在这之前就已经是球员了，但这一球确实让他在超级球星的行列里更上了一层楼。”“现在阿兰肯定觉得自己能单挑联盟里的任何人得分。而且我觉得，在比赛的关键时刻，他有信心投进任何一球。”
foreignization: “我不能说那记投篮造就了 Allan Houston，因为在他之前就已经是球员了，但这真的，对我来说，让他在超级明星的层面上更上了一层楼，”Chaney 说。“现在我认为 Allan 相信自己可以得分超过联盟中的任何人。而且我认为，在比赛的最后时刻，他知道他可以投进任何一球。”

source: How much longer that tradition will thrive remains to be seen . Fire escapes are gradually becoming obsolete because new buildings must typically have fireproof interior stairs . Fire escapes are also rarely used anymore as outdoor sleeping spaces in the stifling heat , because of air-conditioning and other comforts .
domestication: 这个传统还能延续多久，谁也说不准。随着新建筑通常必须配备防火的内部楼梯，消防逃生梯逐渐被淘汰了。再加上空调和其他舒适设施的普及，闷热的夏夜人们也不再像过去那样在消防逃生梯上乘凉睡觉了。
foreignization: 那个传统还能持续多久还有待观察。由于新建筑通常必须有防火的内部楼梯，消防逃生梯正在逐渐变得过时。由于空调和其他便利设施，消防逃生梯也很少再被用作在闷热天气下的户外睡眠空间。

source: The Clinton administration 's original proposal would have meant that children such as DeWalt 's would not have left their doctor without proper shots . It would have reached out to all families by making free vaccinations available to doctors and limiting physicians ' fees for administering them .
domestication: 克林顿政府最初的提议本可以让像德沃尔特这样的孩子不会因为没有打该打的预防针就离开医生。这个计划打算通过向所有家庭提供免费疫苗，并限制医生注射疫苗的费用，来惠及每一个家庭。
foreignization: 克林顿政府的原始提案意味着像德沃尔特这样的孩子不会在没有适当接种疫苗的情况下离开医生。它将通过向所有家庭提供免费疫苗并向医生提供这些疫苗以及限制医生的管理费用来实现这一目标。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The Clinton administration 's original proposal would have meant that children such as DeWalt 's would not have left their doctor without proper shots . It would have reached out to all families by making free vaccinations available to doctors and limiting physicians ' fees for administering them .
克林顿政府最初的提议本可以让像德沃尔特这样的孩子不会因为没有打该打的预防针就离开医生。这个计划打算通过向所有家庭提供免费疫苗，并限制医生注射疫苗的费用，来惠及每一个家庭。

克林顿政府的原始提案意味着像德沃尔特这样的孩子不会在没有适当接种疫苗的情况下离开医生。它将通过向所有家庭提供免费疫苗并向医生提供这些疫苗以及限制医生的管理费用来实现这一目标。

source: Because the audience completely surrounds the stage , the singers must turn to each side of the house during the course of every scene and song . Television monitors around the house project the conductor 's image , cuing the singers . Sometimes movements seem forced , but usually the singers are afforded a freedom of movement that adds to the production 's theatricality .
domestication: 因为观众席是环绕着舞台的，歌手在每个场景和歌曲中都要转向不同的方向面对观众。场内四周装有电视屏幕，播放指挥家的画面，给歌手提示。有时候动作显得有点生硬，但大多数时候，歌手们能自由地移动，这增加了演出的戏剧效果。
foreignization: 因为观众完全围绕着舞台，歌手们在每一幕和每首歌的过程中必须转向房屋的每一侧。房屋周围的电视监视器播放指挥家的形象，提示歌手们。有时动作显得有些勉强，但通常歌手们获得了增加演出戏剧性的自由度。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Because the audience completely surrounds the stage , the singers must turn to each side of the house during the course of every scene and song . Television monitors around the house project the conductor 's image , cuing the singers . Sometimes movements seem forced , but usually the singers are afforded a freedom of movement that adds to the production 's theatricality .
因为观众席是环绕着舞台的，歌手在每个场景和歌曲中都要转向不同的方向面对观众。场内四周装有电视屏幕，播放指挥家的画面，给歌手提示。有时候动作显得有点生硬，但大多数时候，歌手们能自由地移动，这增加了演出的戏剧效果。

messages_foreignization.content:

Because the audience completely surrounds the stage , the singers must turn to each side of the house during the course of every scene and song . Television monitors around the house project the conductor 's image , cuing the singers . Sometimes movements seem forced , but usually the singers are afforded a freedom of movement that adds to the production 's theatricality .
因为观众完全围绕着舞台，歌手们在每一幕和每首歌的过程中必须转向房屋的每一侧。房屋周围的电视监视器播放指挥家的形象，提示歌手们。有时动作显得有些勉强，但通常歌手们获得了增加演出戏剧性的自由度。

source: " Competition is coming from so many different angles that any company sitting fat and happy will get killed in this economy , " says Joe Wilke , executive vice president of The Bases Group , a marketing consultant . " The rallying cry of American industry is to drive unnecessary costs out of the system and return them to the consumers . "

source: It may also reflect the impact of the inflationary surge of the 1970s on people of different ages . The oldest boomers would have finished college in the late 1960s or early ' 70s , before the big run-up in college costs . They would thus have emerged with less debt than younger graduates , would more easily have bought a house , and , having done so , could have ridden the real estate inflation wave of the ' 70s and early ' 80s .
domestication: 这可能也反映了20世纪70年代通货膨胀对不同年龄段人的影响。年纪较大的婴儿潮一代在大学费用大幅上涨之前，也就是60年代末或70年代初就完成了学业，因此背负的债务较少。他们更容易买到房子，而且一旦买房，就能搭上70年代和80年代初房地产通胀的顺风车。
foreignization: 它也可能反映了20世纪70年代的通货膨胀激增对不同年龄人群的影响。最年长的婴儿潮一代可能在20世纪60年代末或70年代初完成了大学学业，在大学费用大幅上涨之前。因此，他们毕业时的债务比年轻毕业生少，更容易购买房屋，并且在购买后，可以乘上20世纪70年代和80年代初期的房地产通胀浪潮。

source: Jackson -- Catcher Scott Mackarewicz , first baseman Roberto Petagine , outfielder Brian Hunter , utility player Frank Kellner and pitchers Jim Bruske , Alvin Morman and Jim Dougherty were named to play in the Texas League All-Star Game July 19 at Wichita . Morman who has been sidelined with a strained rotator cuff , will be unable to play . Outfielder Lance Madsen has six homers in his last 14 games , giving him 15 for the season . After a rough start , outfielder Chris Hatcher is settling into his designated-hitter 's role . Hatcher , who missed a month after shoulder surgery , is hitting 5-for-28 ( .174 ) in that role . Thanks to the bullpen , which has converted 29 of 32 saves , the Generals are 35-1 when they lead after seven innings .
domestication: 杰克逊 -- 捕手斯科特·马卡雷维茨、一垒手罗伯托·彼得吉尼、外野手布莱恩·亨特、多功能球员弗兰克·凯勒纳，以及投手吉姆·布鲁斯克、阿尔文·莫曼和吉姆·道格蒂都被选中参加7月19日在威奇托举行的得州联盟全明星赛。莫曼因为肩袖拉伤，将无法上场。外野手兰斯·马德森最近14场比赛打出了6个本垒打，本赛季已累计15个。经历了艰难的开局后，外野手克里斯·哈彻正在适应指定打击的角色。哈彻在肩部手术后缺席了一个月，现在以5打28（0.174）的成绩担任这个角色。多亏了牛棚的出色表现，他们已经成功守住了32次中的29次救援机会，使得球队在七局过后领先的情况下，取得了35胜1负的佳绩。

source: Jean Brown is an energetic widow who works nine hours a day , four days a week doing clerical work and sometimes pushing the toiletries-laden " comfort cart " at the veterans hospital in downtown Baltimore . Her pay ? Nothing , unless you count a parking space , a $4 lunch chit or the offer of a free flu shot .
domestication: 琼·布朗是个精力充沛的寡妇，每周四天，每天工作九个小时，在巴尔的摩市中心的退伍军人医院做文书工作，有时还得推着装满洗漱用品的“舒适车”。她的报酬？哎，除了一个停车位、一张4美元的午餐券，或者偶尔打个免费的流感疫苗，别无他物。

source: Even hospitals can be dangerous places these days because militias know they are gathering places for relatives . So Captain Albertus formed a convoy around the car and then drove through Baghdad so the grieving relatives could make their way through the city streets and checkpoints . Nobody could stop the men who took Mr. Janabi 's life , but the Americans provided the final escort .
domestication: 如今，就连医院都成了危险之地，因为民兵知道那里是亲人们聚集的地方。所以，阿尔贝图斯上尉组织了一支车队，围绕着那辆车，然后开进了巴格达，让悲伤的亲人们能够安全穿过城市的街道和检查站。虽然没人能阻止夺走贾纳比先生生命的人，但美国人还是提供了最后的护送。

source: Mike Tanier , Bleacher Report : " Every time Tabor took the field this offseason , his 40 results got slower . He followed a 4.62-second 40 at the combine with an unofficial 4.75-second result at his pro day . Tabor was banned by the international scientific community from running during private team workouts for fear that he would create a temporal anomaly that would stop the Earth from rotating on its axis , plunging one half of the globe into eternal darkness while the other half burned to a cinder .
domestication: 迈克·塔尼尔，Bleacher Report：每次塔博在休赛期上场，他的40码冲刺成绩就变得更慢。他在联合试训时跑出了4.62秒的成绩，到了个人展示日又非正式地跑出了4.75秒。塔博因为怕自己在私人球队训练中跑步会引发时间异常，导致地球停止自转，让地球一半陷入永久黑暗，另一半化为焦土，所以被国际科学界禁止参加跑步测试。

source: Campbell tied for fourth in the PGA Tour 's season-opening Mercedes Championships . But then he was ousted in the first round of the WGC Accenture Match Play Championship and was gone by the weekend in the Bay Hill Invitational , The Players Championship and The Masters . His best finish on the European Tour was a tie for fifth in the British Masters in May .

source: Under the agreement , The Globe 's current management is to remain in place for at least five years . After that , Mr. Taylor said last night , he had received a " moral commitment " from The Times that members of the Taylor family could have the chance to run the newspaper . Mr. Taylor , 60 , also said he had won a promise to select his successor when he retires .
domestication: 根据协议，《环球报》现有的管理层至少会留任五年。昨晚，泰勒先生说，他已经从《泰晤士报》那里得到了一个“道德承诺”，即五年后泰勒家族的成员有机会接掌报纸。60岁的泰勒先生还表示，他已经争取到了在他退休时挑选接班人的承诺。
foreignization: 根据协议，《环球报》的现任管理层至少在五年内保持不变。昨晚，泰勒先生说，他已经从《时代报》那里得到了一个“道德承诺”，即泰勒家族的成员有机会在那之后经营这家报纸。现年60岁的泰勒先生还表示，他已经赢得了在退休时选择继任者的承诺。

After that , Mr. Taylor said last night , he had received a " moral commitment " from The Times that members of the Taylor family could have the chance to run the newspaper . Mr. Taylor , 60 , also said he had won a promise to select his successor when he retires .
根据协议，《环球报》现有的管理层至少会留任五年。昨晚，泰勒先生说，他已经从《泰晤士报》那里得到了一个“道德承诺”，即五年后泰勒家族的成员有机会接掌报纸。60岁的泰勒先生还表示，他已经争取到了在他退休时挑选接班人的承诺。

source: But hey , try Dusty 's Southern Style . A printed sign at the desk warns customers that they do not provide a no-smoking section . Some servers conspicuously suck sick-making ciggies back at the service bay by the kitchen door . ( " Like some ashes on your sandwich , honey ? " ) The place feels like a lunchroom in Winston-Salem , N.C.

source: March 23 - Luis Donaldo Colosio , Mexico 's leading presidential candidate , assassinated during campaign stop in Tijuana ; at least 20 soldiers killed and 85 injured when F-16D fighter and C-130 Hercules transport collide over Pope Air Force Base in North Carolina , and the F-16 then skids across a runway and collides with a C-141 transport plane preparing to take off ; Wayne Gretzky breaks Gordie Howe 's National Hockey League career record with his 802nd goal .

source: Sixty years ago , the coming jolts and smashes in the social life of humanity eventually produced one leader who offered his country only blood , sweat , toil and tears . But Winston Churchill had it easy in one way , since the external threats had become so clear and the need for sacrifices so obvious that he offered the only real alternative .
domestication: 六十年前，社会生活中即将发生的动荡和冲击最终造就了一位领导人，他向自己的国家承诺的只有热血、汗水、辛劳与泪水。不过，温斯顿·丘吉尔在这方面还算幸运，因为外部威胁已经如此明显，牺牲的必要性也一目了然，他提出的实际上成了唯一的出路。
foreignization: 六十年前，人类社会生活中即将发生的震动和冲击最终产生了一位只向他的国家提供鲜血、汗水、辛劳和泪水的领袖。但温斯顿·丘吉尔在某个方面是轻松的，因为外部威胁已经变得如此明显，牺牲的必要性也如此显而易见，以至于他提供了唯一真正的选择。

source: Mallory said he was berated by Pamela Patenaude , an aide to Jackson , for sending her an e-mail regarding a Freedom of Information Act request filed by local television station KRON , which was researching a broadcast on alleged improprieties in the sale of Federal Housing Administration property . KRON was exploring any role that another HUD executive in the San Francisco office , Lily Lee , may have played , Mallory wrote .
domestication: 莫莉说，他因为给杰克逊的助手帕梅拉·帕特诺发送了一封邮件而遭到斥责。这封邮件是关于当地电视台KRON提出的信息自由法请求的。KRON正在调查联邦住房管理局财产出售中的不当行为，尤其是旧金山办公室的另一位住房与城市发展部高管李莉可能涉及的角色。

source: Looking more like a space shuttle than a jetliner , it rocketed celebrities and tycoons across the Atlantic with supersonic speed and style . It lifted air travel to high art , made New York and Paris almost neighbors , and compressed time and space in a way that suggested anything was possible . Concorde prototypes flew the same year the United States reached the moon .
domestication: 看起来更像航天飞机而不是喷气式客机，它以超音速和豪华风格将名人和大亨们送往大西洋彼岸。协和号把航空旅行提升到了高雅艺术的境界，让纽约和巴黎几乎变成了邻居，压缩了时间和空间，仿佛一切皆有可能。协和号原型机飞上蓝天的那一年，正是美国登月成功之时。

看起来更像航天飞机而不是喷气式客机，它以超音速和风格将名人和大亨们送往大西洋彼岸。它将航空旅行提升到了高雅艺术的层面，使纽约和巴黎几乎成为邻居，并以一种暗示一切皆有可能的方式压缩了时间和空间。协和号原型机在美国登月的同一年飞行。

source: EyesOn Design is in its 29th year in Metro Detroit . Proceeds benefit the Detroit Institute of Ophthalmology . Over the last decade , on even years , the institute has hosted The Eye and the Chip , a research congress on artificial vision that brings global leaders in the field to Detroit for workshops . On odd years , it has hosted a research congress called The Eye , The Brain & The Auto .

source: Corporate boards get fair marks for meeting more often and paying more attention to the work of auditors . Last year , longtime directors at insurer American International Group Inc. overthrew Maurice R. " Hank " Greenberg as chairman after nearly 40 years at the helm after regulators stepped up an accounting probe at the company . And Hewlett-Packard Co. ' s board fired star chief executive Carly Fiorina because of dissatisfaction with the way she handled a merger . She was not accused of any wrongdoing at the company .
domestication: 公司董事会因为更频繁地开会和更加关注审计工作而得到了不错的评价。去年，保险巨头美国国际集团的长期董事们在监管机构对公司会计问题的调查升级后，把执掌近40年的毛里斯·R·“汉克”·格林伯格从董事长的位置上拉了下来。惠普公司的董事会也因为对首席执行官卡莉·菲奥莉娜处理合并事宜的方式不满，将其解雇。她本人并没有被指控有任何不当行为。

" Hank " Greenberg as chairman after nearly 40 years at the helm after regulators stepped up an accounting probe at the company . And Hewlett-Packard Co. ' s board fired star chief executive Carly Fiorina because of dissatisfaction with the way she handled a merger . She was not accused of any wrongdoing at the company .
公司董事会因为更频繁地开会和更加关注审计工作而得到了不错的评价。去年，保险巨头美国国际集团的长期董事们在监管机构对公司会计问题的调查升级后，把执掌近40年的毛里斯·R·“汉克”·格林伯格从董事长的位置上拉了下来。惠普公司的董事会也因为对首席执行官卡莉·菲奥莉娜处理合并事宜的方式不满，将其解雇。她本人并没有被指控有任何不当行为。

' s board fired star chief executive Carly Fiorina because of dissatisfaction with the way she handled a merger . She was not accused of any wrongdoing at the company .
公司董事会因更频繁地开会和更加关注审计师的工作而得到了公正的评价。去年，保险商美国国际集团公司的长期董事们在监管机构加强了对该公司的会计调查后，推翻了担任近40年主席的莫里斯·R·“汉克”·格林伯格。惠普公司董事会也因对首席执行官卡莉·菲奥莉娜处理合并方式的不满而将其解雇。她未被指控在公司有任何不当行为。

source: With such genre-blurring comes marketing problems . The audience crosses many age , economic and geographic boundaries ; finding it can require advertising budgets that devour profits . That 's why Hetherwick has become leery of one-off projects by label-hopping artists ; those who create a body of work can create long-term momentum .
domestication: 这种跨界融合带来了营销难题。观众跨越了不同的年龄、经济和地域界限；找到他们可能需要巨额的广告预算，这会吞噬利润。所以，希瑟威克对那些四处跳槽的艺术家的单次项目越来越谨慎；那些能持续创作的艺术家才能形成持久的影响力。

source: There was a struggle to keep a near-runaway performance by comedian Robin Williams , who is the voice of the Genie , from overshadowing other elements ; it took three major script revisions to strengthen Aladdin 's story enough to counterbalance his performance . And in what proved to be a deeply emotional as well as an artistic blow to the project , lyricist Howard Ashman , who had been so fundamental to the success of three previous Disney animated films -- " Oliver and Company , " " The Little Mermaid " and " Beauty and the Beast " -- died last year .
domestication: 为了不让喜剧演员罗宾·威廉姆斯饰演的神灯精灵抢尽风头，剧组费了好大一番劲儿。光是剧本就改了三次，才让阿拉丁的故事足够吸引人，和威廉姆斯的表演达到平衡。更让人痛心的是，对项目来说，这不仅是艺术上的打击，更是情感上的重创——词作者霍华德·阿什曼去年去世了。他可是迪士尼之前三部动画电影《奥利弗与公司》、《小美人鱼》和《美女与野兽》成功的关键人物啊。
foreignization: 有一场努力试图防止喜剧演员罗宾·威廉姆斯的近乎失控的表演——他是神灯精灵的声音——掩盖其他元素；经过三次主要的剧本修订，才使阿拉丁的故事足够强大，以抗衡他的表演。而对于项目来说，这不仅是情感上的沉重打击，也是艺术上的损失，词作者霍华德·阿什曼——他曾对前三部迪士尼动画电影《奥利弗与公司》、《小美人鱼》和《美女与野兽》的成功至关重要——于去年去世。

There was a struggle to keep a near-runaway performance by comedian Robin Williams , who is the voice of the Genie , from overshadowing other elements ; it took three major script revisions to strengthen Aladdin 's story enough to counterbalance his performance . source: Strangely , it made me feel sicker . I cried , got a terrible headache , but eventually started calling friends in New York , who thankfully are all OK . Just that day I had been planning to write an open letter to Colin Powell , after hearing him speak on TV of wartime issues , about the death toll in the Japanese war of aggression and the peace treaty of 1951 . I was so angry .
domestication: 奇怪的是，这反而让我觉得更难受了。我哭了起来，头痛得要命，但最后还是开始给纽约的朋友们打电话，万幸他们都平安无事。那天我原计划要写一封公开信给科林·鲍威尔，听了他在电视上讲战争问题后，想谈谈日本侵华战争中的死难者和1951年的和平条约。我当时气得不行。
foreignization: 奇怪的是，这让我感觉更糟了。我哭了，头痛得厉害，但最终开始给在纽约的朋友打电话，谢天谢地他们都没事。就在那天，我原计划在听到他在电视上谈论战争问题后，给科林·鲍威尔写一封公开信，内容关于日本侵华战争的死亡人数和1951年的和平条约。我非常生气。

source: Think of the quarterlife crisis -- popularized a few years ago by a New York Times best-selling book of the same title -- in the same terms as a midlife crisis . source: Quartino , 626 N. State ; ( 312 ) 698-5000 . Quartino has taken hold of the small plate , large plate trend and pushed it beyond " Italian tapas . domestication: 夸蒂诺，位于北州街626号；电话 (312) 698-5000。夸蒂诺抓住了小盘大盘的潮流，还把它玩出了新花样，远远超过了“意大利小吃”的概念。主厨约翰·科莱塔倾尽全力，打造了一份令人愉悦的意大利菜菜单，既让人惊喜，又让人赞叹。你可以尝尝这里的腊肉拼盘、玛格丽塔披萨、小牛肉丸子、烤章鱼、阿马特里西亚纳风味的意面、煮鳕鱼、小牛肩肉排和马斯卡彭冰激凌。评分：4分中的3分。

source: Each year since 1890 ( excluding the period between 1910-1929 ) , Guthrie folks have staged this annual celebration . During the festivities , townspeople dress in Victorian dress or cowboy attire , put on a rousing rodeo and carnival , hold a contest for the longest beard , present a performance at a historic vaudeville theatre , and stage the state 's largest parade .
domestication: 自1890年起，除了1910到1929年这段时间，古瑟里的居民每年都会举办这个盛大的庆典。节日期间，镇上的人们穿着维多利亚时期的服饰或是牛仔装扮，热热闹闹地举办斗牛表演和嘉年华，还会有最长胡须比赛，历史上的杂耍剧院里也会有精彩演出，最后还有全州规模最大的游行。

source: In the first partial Pentagon disclosure of the amount of DU used in Iraq , a US Central Command spokesman told the Monitor that A-10 Warthog aircraft - the same planes that shot at the Iraqi planning ministry - fired 300,000 bullets . The normal combat mix for these 30-mm rounds is five DU bullets to 1 - a mix that would have left about 75 tons of DU in Iraq .
domestication: 五角大楼首次部分披露在伊拉克使用的贫铀弹数量，美国中央司令部的一位发言人告诉《监视者》杂志，A-10“疣猪”战机——也就是那些袭击过伊拉克规划部大楼的飞机——发射了30万发子弹。这种30毫米口径的弹药通常按5比1的比例混装贫铀弹，这意味着大约有75吨贫铀弹留在了伊拉克。
foreignization: 在五角大楼首次部分披露在伊拉克使用的贫铀弹数量时，美国中央司令部的一位发言人告诉《监测者》杂志，A-10“疣猪”攻击机——也就是那些向伊拉克计划部大楼开火的飞机——发射了300,000发子弹。这些30毫米弹药的标准战斗配比是五发贫铀弹对一发其他类型弹药——这样的配比将导致约75吨贫铀留在伊拉克。
