source: U.S. mariners have relied on paper nautical charts -- displaying water depth , coastlines , obstacles and other navigational information -- produced by the government since President Thomas Jefferson in 1807 ordered the charting of U.S. coastal waters to allow the nascent country 's shipping industry to grow and thrive .
domestication: 自打1807年，美国总统托马斯·杰斐逊下令绘制美国沿海水域的海图以来，美国的航海者就一直依赖政府制作的纸质海图。这些海图上标有水深、海岸线、障碍物和其他航行信息，帮助年轻的美国航运业蓬勃发展。

source: The new Delta program , for travelers 62 and older , is an alternative to the coupon booklets now marketed to seniors by most major U.S. airlines , including Delta . Coupons generally offer the best savings when used for coast-to-coast or other long-distance domestic flights . Senior Select Savings Plus provides solid discounts on shorter flights , and first-class tickets also can be purchased at a big discount .
domestication: 新的达美航空计划，面向62岁及以上的旅客，成为了一种选择，替代了目前大多数美国主要航空公司（包括达美）向老年人销售的优惠券手册。这些优惠券通常在购买横跨东西海岸或国内其他长途航班时最划算。而“老年精选超值”计划则在短途航班上提供稳定的折扣，头等舱机票也能以大幅优惠的价格买到。
foreignization: 新的Delta计划，面向62岁及以上的旅客，是大多数美国主要航空公司（包括Delta）目前向老年人推销的优惠券手册的替代选择。优惠券通常在用于海岸到海岸或其他长途国内航班时提供最佳节省。Senior Select Savings Plus在较短航程上提供坚实的折扣，头等舱机票也可以大幅折扣购买。

source: The opening period of the season was filled with big plays and massive momentum swings . NAU hit a 45-yard pass on the first play from scrimmage and drove inside the 10-yard line . source: Germany 's pension system is under stress , for instance , in part because it was extended at reunification 10 years ago to cover all the people from East Germany . source: " Navigating this fine line , " he went on , " reveals a truth that makes people scream ' reverse racism . ' Having white friends , as a person of color , can be exhausting . As Erin White argues , ' in one way or another , White friends , largely , just are n't safe to have ' because of ' their unconscious but blatant biases against and misunderstandings of Black People . ' "

source: The 2014 book recounts in detail all of the drama and action that happened on and off the court . It chronicles " one of the most successful yet dysfunctional franchises in the history of sports , " Times columnist Chris Erskine wrote . " Pat Riley 's Showtime was pure jazz , based on the adolescent gusto of Magic Johnson , his often overindulgent teammates and the ringmaster instincts of owner Jerry Buss at the top of his game . Honestly , did the Ming Dynasty have this many moving parts ? Certainly not this much cocaine . "
domestication: 2014年的这本书详细讲述了场上场下的各种戏剧性和精彩瞬间。时报专栏作家克里斯·厄斯金写道：“这支球队堪称体育史上最成功却也最混乱的队伍之一。”“帕特·莱利的‘表演时刻’就像纯正的爵士乐，充满了魔术师约翰逊的青春活力，队友们常常过度放纵，再加上老板杰里·巴斯如马戏团团长般的直觉，在他的鼎盛时期，这一切都达到了顶峰。老实说，明朝有这么多的纷繁复杂吗？肯定没有这么多可卡因吧。”

source: Only now is the horror of the hostages ' captivity becoming known . American Alann Steen has permanent brain damage from being kicked in the head . Another American , Joseph Cicippio , suffered permanent effects from frostbite after being chained on a balcony . All the men have dental problems from lack of decent food and dental care .
domestication: 人质的恐怖经历现在才逐渐浮出水面。美国人大卫·斯滕头部被踢，造成了永久性脑损伤。另一位美国人约瑟夫·奇西皮奥被锁在阳台上，遭受冻伤，留下了永久性的后遗症。这些人都因为食物和牙科护理不足，牙齿出了问题。
foreignization: 只有现在，人质被囚禁的恐怖才逐渐为人所知。美国人阿兰·斯滕因头部被踢而遭受永久性脑损伤。另一名美国人约瑟夫·奇奇皮奥在被锁在阳台上后因冻伤而遭受永久性影响。所有这些人都因缺乏适当的食物和牙科护理而有牙科问题。

source: On April 6 , Lance Cpl . Deshon Otey , 24 , of Hardin , Ky. , was the sole survivor of an attack on his Humvee that killed seven of his comrades in Echo Company . His only wounds were nightmares , Otey said later . " I always see these guys with turbans . They come up and just start slaughtering all of us , " he said .
domestication: 4月6日，来自肯塔基州哈丁的24岁一等兵德肖恩·奥蒂是埃科连队中唯一幸存者，那次针对他所乘悍马车的袭击夺去了他的七位战友的生命。奥蒂后来表示，他唯一的伤痛就是噩梦。“我总能看到那些戴头巾的家伙，他们上来就开始大开杀戒。”他说。
foreignization: 4月6日，来自肯塔基州哈丁的24岁的二等兵德尚·奥蒂是对其所在悍马车发动袭击的唯一幸存者，这次袭击导致了他的七名战友丧生。奥蒂后来表示，他唯一的伤是噩梦。“我总是看到这些戴头巾的人。他们上来就开始屠杀我们所有人，”他说。

source: I wonder whether whoever decided to take me from my mother considered her pain . Maybe they only saw her alienness and her lack of education , which happened because she was born poor and a girl . Perhaps they never saw that in Vietnam she had been a successful businesswoman . But even if she had n't , what difference should that have made ? Are people who are less successful not human or deserving of the right to hold on to their children ? Our answer to that question says everything about us .
domestication: 不知那些决定把我从妈妈身边带走的人有没有想过她的痛苦。或许他们只看到她是个外国人，没受过什么教育，这都是因为她生来贫穷，又是女孩。也许他们根本不知道，在越南她曾是个成功的生意人。就算她不是，那又怎样呢？难道不成功的人就不是人，就没有权利跟自己的孩子在一起吗？我们对这个问题的回答，足以说明我们的为人。
foreignization: 我想知道，那些决定把我从我母亲身边带走的人是否考虑过她的痛苦。也许他们只看到了她的异国情调和她缺乏教育，而这只是因为她出生贫穷且是女孩。也许他们从未看到在越南她曾是一位成功的企业家。但即使她不是，这又有什么关系呢？那些不太成功的人就不是人，就不配拥有抚养自己孩子的权利吗？我们对这个问题的回答说明了一切关于我们自己的事情。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

I wonder whether whoever decided to take me from my mother considered her pain . Maybe they only saw her alienness and her lack of education , which happened because she was born poor and a girl . Perhaps they never saw that in Vietnam she had been a successful businesswoman . But even if she had n't , what difference should that have made ? Are people who are less successful not human or deserving of the right to hold on to their children ? Our answer to that question says everything about us .

source: In 2013 , Social Security is projected to begin paying out more than it 's taking in . And unless the system is changed , it may run out of money in 2030 . The Cato Institute , a libertarian think tank , says Congress must privatize the retirement program to avoid insolvency . Critics say start-up costs would be too high . ( Story , Page 1 . )
domestication: 2013年，据预测社会保障的支出将超过收入。如果制度不变，到2030年可能会没钱了。自由主义智库卡托研究所表示，国会必须将退休计划私有化以避免破产。批评者则认为启动成本太高。详情见第1页。
foreignization: 2013年，社会保障预计开始支付的金额将超过其收入。除非对该系统进行改革，否则它可能在2030年耗尽资金。卡托研究所，一个自由意志主义智库，表示国会必须将退休计划私有化以避免破产。批评者说启动成本将过高。（故事，第1页。）

source: DirecTV faces a different kind of challenge from satellite rival Echostar , which is growing even faster than DirecTV . It 's suing DirecTV , claiming that it has a monopoly stranglehold over the business . The lawsuit alleges , for example , that DirecTV pays retailers such as Circuit City for exclusive access to their customers .
domestication: DirecTV 面临的挑战与卫星电视竞争对手 EchoStar 截然不同，后者的发展速度甚至超过了 DirecTV。EchoStar 把 DirecTV 告上了法庭，指责 DirecTV 在业务上垄断，掐住了行业的脖子。起诉书中提到，DirecTV 据称向 Circuit City 这样的零售商支付费用，换取对客户的独家接触权。
foreignization: DirecTV 面临着与卫星竞争对手 Echostar 不同的挑战，Echostar 的增长速度甚至超过了 DirecTV。它起诉 DirecTV，声称其对业务具有垄断性控制。诉讼指控例如，DirecTV 向 Circuit City 等零售商支付费用以获得对其客户的独家访问权。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: A : It could be . There again I see problems because of communication . I have discussed this with ( U.S. Housing Secretary ) Henry Cisneros . I said to him that this is a very difficult position for me to be in , to have a mayor that I ran against and defeated and then have him as the regional head of HUD . I 'm talking about all the housing and homeless programs and all the grants that we 're dealing with that have to go through him to get to Henry Cisneros .
domestication: 这事儿有可能。不过沟通上又是个难题。我跟（美国住房部长）亨利·西斯内罗斯也聊过这事。我对他说，这对我真是个棘手的问题，毕竟我是打败了这位市长才当选的，现在他又成了HUD的区域主管。咱们谈的都是住房、无家可归者项目还有各种拨款，这些都得先过他这一关才能到亨利·西斯内罗斯那儿。
foreignization: A：可能是这样。不过，我看到了由于沟通而产生的问题。我已经和（美国住房部长）亨利·西斯内罗斯讨论过这个问题。我对他说，我处在一个非常困难的境地，因为我曾与一位市长竞选并击败了他，然后他却成为了HUD的区域主管。我指的是所有住房和无家可归者项目以及我们正在处理的所有需要通过他才能到达亨利·西斯内罗斯的拨款。

source: In response , FEMA officials say the agency 's earthquake relief efforts were hampered at first by a lack of personnel needed to process claims and evaluate damage . The Loma Prieta quake occurred during changes in FEMA regulations that caused confusion in processing requests . They say the continuing delay in completing many projects stems in many cases from disagreement over how much FEMA should be asked to pay for earthquake safety work . In some instances , delays have been compounded by the fact that the buildings involved have special historical status that limits the ways in which they can be rebuilt , they say .
domestication: 对此，联邦紧急事务管理署（FEMA）的官员表示，最初地震救援工作因为缺乏处理索赔和评估损失的人手而受阻。洛马普里塔地震发生时，FEMA的规章制度正在调整，导致处理请求时出现混乱。他们说，许多项目迟迟未能完成，很多时候是因为对FEMA应该支付多少地震安全工作的费用存在分歧。有些情况下，拖延还因为涉及的建筑有特殊的历史地位，限制了重建的方式。
foreignization: 作为回应，FEMA官员表示，该机构的地震救援努力最初因缺乏处理索赔和评估损失所需的人手而受阻。洛马普里塔地震发生时，FEMA规定的变化导致处理请求时出现混乱。他们说，许多项目迟迟未能完成，在很多情况下是因为对要求FEMA支付多少地震安全工作的费用存在分歧。在某些情况下，延误还因为所涉及的建筑物具有特殊的历史地位，限制了它们可以被重建的方式，他们说。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In response , FEMA officials say the agency 's earthquake relief efforts were hampered at first by a lack of personnel needed to process claims and evaluate damage . The Loma Prieta quake occurred during changes in FEMA regulations that caused confusion in processing requests . They say the continuing delay in completing many projects stems in many cases from disagreement over how much FEMA should be asked to pay for earthquake safety work . In some instances , delays have been compounded by the fact that the buildings involved have special historical status that limits the ways in which they can be rebuilt , they say .
对此，联邦紧急事务管理署（FEMA）的官员表示，最初地震救援工作因为缺乏处理索赔和评估损失的人手而受阻。洛马普里塔地震发生时，FEMA的规章制度正在调整，导致处理请求时出现混乱。他们说，许多项目迟迟未能完成，很多时候是因为对FEMA应该支付多少地震安全工作的费用存在分歧。有些情况下，拖延还因为涉及的建筑有特殊的历史地位，限制了重建的方式。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In response , FEMA officials say the agency 's earthquake relief efforts were hampered at first by a lack of personnel needed to process claims and evaluate damage . The Loma Prieta quake occurred during changes in FEMA regulations that caused confusion in processing requests . They say the continuing delay in completing many projects stems in many cases from disagreement over how much FEMA should be asked to pay for earthquake safety work . In some instances , delays have been compounded by the fact that the buildings involved have special historical status that limits the ways in which they can be rebuilt , they say .
作为回应，FEMA官员表示，该机构的地震救援努力最初因缺乏处理索赔和评估损失所需的人手而受阻。洛马普里塔地震发生时，FEMA规定的变化导致处理请求时出现混乱。他们说，许多项目迟迟未能完成，在很多情况下是因为对要求FEMA支付多少地震安全工作的费用存在分歧。在某些情况下，延误还因为所涉及的建筑物具有特殊的历史地位，限制了它们可以被重建的方式，他们说。

source: This book 's pristine white cover conceals a compendium of 600 recipes designed to put the lucky owner on the culinary cutting edge . Four years in the making , it is divided straightforwardly into chapters on salads , soups , sandwiches , pizza and pasta , vegetables , rice , beans and grains , fish and shellfish , meats , and condiments and sauces , with a rich variety of recipes for each .
domestication: 这本书雪白的封面下藏着一本汇集了600道菜谱的宝典，能让幸运的主人站在烹饪的最前沿。这本耗时四年才完成的书，内容简明扼要，分为沙拉、汤、三明治、比萨和意大利面、蔬菜、米饭、豆类和谷物、鱼和海鲜、肉类，以及调味品和酱料等章节，每章都有丰富多样的菜谱。

这本书的 pristine white 封面隐藏着一本包含 600 道食谱的汇编，旨在让幸运的拥有者处于烹饪的前沿。这本书历时四年完成， straightforwardly 分为沙拉、汤、三明治、比萨和意大利面、蔬菜、米饭、豆类和谷物、鱼和海鲜、肉类以及调味品和酱料等章节，每个章节都包含丰富多样的食谱。

source: I-75 north through Cobb County is the worst I 've seen beginning with the signs over the wrong lanes for the I-285 exits and the Windy Hill exit . Then there 's the contradicting signs beginning at the Canton Road overpass that states , " No trucks over 6 wheels allowed in left lane . " A half-mile up is a sign on the right shoulder stating , " No trucks over six wheels allowed in 2 left lanes . " Finally the third sign at the I-575/I-75 split states , " No trucks over six wheels allowed in left lane . " Trucks are bouncing all over the place . Makes it scary when I 'm on my motorcycle .
domestication: 走I-75北线穿过科布县，我真是见怪了。从一开始就乱七八糟，出口标志都挂在错的车道上，比如I-285和温迪山出口。接着是康顿路高架桥那儿，立了个牌子说“六轮以上的货车不准在最左边车道行驶”。往前开半英里，右边又冒出个牌子，写着“六轮以上的货车不准在最左边两条车道行驶”。最后到I-575和I-75分叉口，又有个牌子，说“六轮以上的货车不准在最左边车道行驶”。这些货车东窜西跑的，弄得人心慌慌。我骑摩托车的时候，真是提心吊胆。

source: The lingering problems were on display late last fall , when commodities-trading firm Refco Inc. collapsed in an accounting scandal just two months after an initial public offering , led by blue-chip investment bank Goldman Sachs and Co . Investors snapped up Refco shares even though the company admitted in its prospectus that there were serious problems with accounting controls . " Could Enron happen again ? Sure it could . Just look at Refco , " said Henry T.C. Hu , a law professor at the University of Texas at Austin .
domestication: 去年秋天的问题再次浮出水面，商品交易公司瑞福集团因会计丑闻轰然倒塌，而这距离由高盛等大牌投资银行牵头的首次公开募股仅仅过去了两个月。尽管公司在招股说明书中承认其会计控制存在严重问题，投资者还是蜂拥抢购瑞福的股票。“安然事件还会重演吗？当然可能。看看瑞福就知道了。”得克萨斯大学奥斯汀分校的法学教授胡亨利如是说。
foreignization: 悬而未决的问题在去年秋天晚些时候显现出来，当时商品交易公司Refco Inc.在由蓝筹投资银行高盛公司牵头的首次公开募股仅两个月后，因会计丑闻而崩溃。即使该公司在其招股说明书中承认其会计控制存在严重问题，投资者还是抢购了Refco的股票。“安然事件会再次发生吗？当然有可能。看看Refco就知道了，”德克萨斯大学奥斯汀分校的法律教授亨利·T·C·胡说。

source: 1 . STEVENSON : The return of Christy Miller will be a big help in the ball-handling department . source: * Central Gwinnett 35 , Shiloh 27 : Junior Diante Drake ran for 198 yards and three touchdowns on 34 carries for the Black Knights , getting all three scores in the second half . Trokon Gaye intercepted a Shiloh pass on the first play of the second half , and Drake chewed up 27 yards on three carries to give Central a 21-7 lead .

source: If this same older single boomer were to live to age 90 and achieve an investment return of 2 percent ( instead of the 3.9 percent , net of administrative fees and inflation , assumed in the earlier examples ) , he or she would need to save a staggering 28.8 percent of income to retire and have 80 percent of pre-retirement income .

source: Dy Phon , a French-educated dentist , had fled Phnom Penh in 1971 to join the Khmer Rouge in their fight against Cambodia 's U.S.-backed government and had disappeared . Now Irene suddenly knew his fate . His unfinished " confession , " recovered from Pol Pot 's infamous Tuol Sleng prison , showed that he had been sent there in December 1978 , just before the Vietnamese invasion , making him among the last of its estimated 20,000 inmates to be tortured and killed .
domestication: 迪方，一个在法国受过教育的牙医，1971年逃离了金边，加入了红色高棉，反抗美国支持的柬埔寨政府，从此消失无踪。现在，伊蕾突然知道了他命运的真相。从波尔布特臭名昭著的S-21监狱中找回的那份未完成的“自白书”显示，他在1978年12月，也就是越南入侵前夕，被送进了那里，成为了这座监狱最后一批受尽酷刑、惨遭杀害的约2万名囚犯之一。
foreignization: 迪·冯，一位受过法国教育的牙医，于1971年逃离金边，加入红色高棉，参与对抗柬埔寨的美国支持的政府，并从此消失。现在，伊蕾突然知道了他命运的真相。从波尔布特臭名昭著的吐斯廉监狱找回的他未完成的“供词”显示，他在1978年12月，即越南入侵前不久，被送到了那里，这使他成为了大约20,000名在那里遭受酷刑并被杀害的囚犯中的最后一批之一。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Dy Phon , a French-educated dentist , had fled Phnom Penh in 1971 to join the Khmer Rouge in their fight against Cambodia 's U.S.-backed government and had disappeared . Now Irene suddenly knew his fate . His unfinished " confession , " recovered from Pol Pot 's infamous Tuol Sleng prison , showed that he had been sent there in December 1978 , just before the Vietnamese invasion , making him among the last of its estimated 20,000 inmates to be tortured and killed .
迪方，一个在法国受过教育的牙医，1971年逃离了金边，加入了红色高棉，反抗美国支持的柬埔寨政府，从此消失无踪。现在，伊蕾突然知道了他命运的真相。从波尔布特臭名昭著的S-21监狱中找回的那份未完成的“自白书”显示，他在1978年12月，也就是越南入侵前夕，被送进了那里，成为了这座监狱最后一批受尽酷刑、惨遭杀害的约2万名囚犯之一。

Dy Phon , a French-educated dentist , had fled Phnom Penh in 1971 to join the Khmer Rouge in their fight against Cambodia 's U.S.-backed government and had disappeared . Now Irene suddenly knew his fate . His unfinished " confession , " recovered from Pol Pot 's infamous Tuol Sleng prison , showed that he had been sent there in December 1978 , just before the Vietnamese invasion , making him among the last of its estimated 20,000 inmates to be tortured and killed .
迪·冯，一位受过法国教育的牙医，于1971年逃离金边，加入红色高棉，参与对抗柬埔寨的美国支持的政府，并从此消失。现在，伊蕾突然知道了他命运的真相。从波尔布特臭名昭著的吐斯廉监狱找回的他未完成的“供词”显示，他在1978年12月，即越南入侵前不久，被送到了那里，这使他成为了大约20,000名在那里遭受酷刑并被杀害的囚犯中的最后一批之一。

source: On this score , I have to admit , Miami does n't do so well . For openers , Miami does not have a visitor-friendly airport . In other major tourist destinations - I 'm thinking particularly of Orlando and Las Vegas - the airports are spacious , inviting , brightly lit , almost theme-parklike ; the message you get , from the moment you get off your plane is : " Welcome ! Let 's Have FUN ! " At Miami International , a cramped and dingy labyrinth , the message is : " Just TRY to Find Our Baggage Claim Area ! "
domestication: 在这方面，我得承认，迈阿密表现得不太理想。首先，迈阿密的机场对游客一点都不友好。想想其他主要的旅游目的地吧，特别是奥兰多和拉斯维加斯，那里的机场宽敞、温馨、明亮，几乎像主题公园一样；你刚下飞机，就感受到一股热情：“欢迎光临！咱们一起来玩个痛快！”而迈阿密国际机场呢，狭窄又昏暗，像是迷宫一般，给你的感觉是：“试试看，能不能找到行李领取处吧！”

source: The $10 million he earned last September when he defended his title with a ninth-round knockout of Oscar De La Hoya was his biggest purse , but it meant much more . Largely on the basis of making that fight happen , Hopkins was named 2004 Manager of the Year . He was just the second active fighter ( George Foreman the other ) to be so honored by the Boxing Writers Association of America .

source: When she died last Thursday at age 96 in Portland , Ore. , Anderson had been known as one of the world 's greatest singers of opera music . But her life was about still greater things , such as self-determination , resilience and the struggle for perfection . Her successes breathed new life into black America at a time when it desperately needed resurrecting .
domestication: 安德森上周四在俄勒冈州的波特兰市去世，享年96岁。她被誉为世界上 greatest 的歌剧演唱家之一。但她的生命意义远不止于此，更是关于自强不息、坚韧不拔和追求完美的斗争。在黑人美国亟需复兴的年代，她的成功给人们带来了新的希望和活力。

source: Rep. Dan Burton took to the House floor to defend his embattled probe of campaign-finance abuses . Democrats repeated their calls for the Indi- ana Republican to step aside as chairman of the House inquiry , saying they would seek today to have another Republican take his place . Democrats on the panel were expected to vote a second time against granting immunity to four potential witnesses . They initially blocked granting immunity , which requires a two-thirds vote , two weeks ago .
domestication: 丹·伯顿议员走上众议院讲台，为他备受争议的竞选财务滥用调查辩护。民主党人再次呼吁这位来自印第安纳州的共和党人让出众议院调查委员会主席的位置，声称今天将寻求另一位共和党人接替他。预计委员会中的民主党成员将第二次投票反对给予四位潜在证人豁免权。两周前，他们首次以需要三分之二多数票为由，阻止了豁免权的授予。

source: The message was from someone who actually does know about tough losses : former Navy coach Paul Evans . Eighteen games into his first season at Navy , Lange decided to take him up on his offer . He called . He wanted to talk . As frustrating as his team 's shooting had been , the fact that the Midshipmen had given up 63 points to a team averaging fewer than 40 a game in the Patriot League was even more disturbing .

source: Manager Gary Pilgrim 's earnings-driven stock picking has driven this fund to the top spot among mid-cap funds for five and 10 years . Pilgrim will pay high prices for growth . And he tends to hold winners , trading only about 45% of his portfolio a year --low for a growth fund . Last year was a rare off year . The fund has about 36% of assets in technology , 20% services .
domestication: 经理加里·皮尔格姆靠追求收益的选股策略，把这只基金推上了中盘股基金五年和十年业绩榜首。皮尔格姆愿意为成长股付出高价，而且他倾向于长期持有优质股，每年只更换大约45%的投资组合，这在成长型基金里算是很低的换手率了。去年算是个例外，基金表现不尽如人意。目前，该基金约36%的资金投向科技行业，20%投向服务业。

source: One result of all the variations has been public confusion . And despite the keep-it-simple proclamation Jan. 12 by Tommy Thompson , Health and Human Services secretary - " You lower your calorie intake , you lower your fats , your carbs , you eat more fruits and vegetables , more whole grain , and you exercise , " he said in a press conference - some confusion is likely to remain .

source: Displaying as much backbone as a snail , the U.S. House of Representatives has again shown its disdain for the country 's well-being ( " House leaders drop Arctic drilling proposal from budget , " News , Nov. 10 ) . Caving in to radical environmentalists , the House removed from the budget bill the provision to open the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge to oil exploration , leaving this country still dependent on foreign sources for crude oil .

source: New York - It will come as no surprise - except perhaps to someone who believes that real life is a Rodgers &; Hammerstein musical - that the just-concluded Broadway season had a far less fairy-tale ending than the previous one . With a paltry 28 new productions and an audience of just 7.2 million , the season could be subtitled " Back to Reality - The Broadway Tragedy Continues . "
domestication: 纽约——这事儿恐怕不会让任何人感到意外——除非有人真以为现实生活就像罗杰斯和哈默斯坦的音乐剧一样美好——刚刚结束的百老汇演出季远没有上一季那么梦幻。今年只有可怜巴巴的28部新剧，观众人数也仅有720万，这个季节可以被戏称为“回归现实——百老汇的悲剧还在继续”。

source: The United States has hired a Washington-based communications company , the Rendon Group , to bolster Mr. Karzai 's communications office . And in a brief huddle at the palace , Mr. Khalilzad and the head of intelligence , Amrullah Saleh , discussed how the Afghan people regarded the government -- and , as Mr. Khalilzad put it , " things we could do to help the standing of the government without working through the government . "
domestication: 美国请了一家位于华盛顿的公关公司——伦顿集团，来加强卡尔扎伊先生的通讯办公室。在皇宫里，哈利勒扎德和情报局长阿姆鲁拉·萨利赫简单碰了个头，讨论了阿富汗民众对政府的看法，用哈利勒扎德的话说，就是“不通过政府，我们能做些什么来提升政府的形象”。

source: " It can be dangerous just crossing the street , " said Tom Kruse , who has been the town mayor for 22 years . " We have not had a police department for a very long time . The Ashland County sheriff 's department covers us , but often they only have two cars out on patrol and they seldom make it out here . Fortunately , no one has ever been killed crossing the street . "

source: While it is true that local policemen in Japan visit the homes in their jurisdiction on an annual basis , these visits are not , as the letter implied , for the purpose of inspections . Rather , the visits give residents a much-desired chance to air concerns and ask questions and give the police valuable , personal insight into the particular needs of the communities they serve .
domestication: 日本的警察确实每年都会走访辖区内的住户，但这些走访并不是像信中说的那样为了检查。其实，这样的走访给居民们提供了一个很好的机会，可以倾诉自己的担忧，提出问题，同时也能让警察更贴近社区，了解居民的具体需求。这可真是双赢的局面。
foreignization: 虽然日本的当地警察确实每年都会访问其管辖范围内的家庭，但这些访问的目的并非如信中所暗示的那样是为了检查。相反，这些访问给居民提供了一个非常期待的机会来表达关切和提问，并让警察对其服务社区的特定需求获得宝贵而直观的了解。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

While it is true that local policemen in Japan visit the homes in their jurisdiction on an annual basis , these visits are not , as the letter implied , for the purpose of inspections . Rather , the visits give residents a much-desired chance to air concerns and ask questions and give the police valuable , personal insight into the particular needs of the communities they serve .
日本的警察确实每年都会走访辖区内的住户，但这些走访并不是像信中说的那样为了检查。其实，这样的走访给居民们提供了一个很好的机会，可以倾诉自己的担忧，提出问题，同时也能让警察更贴近社区，了解居民的具体需求。这可真是双赢的局面。

source: Immunization protects children from polio , whooping cough , measles and other diseases that afflicted earlier generations . It is one of few preventive health strategies proven to be cost-saving . Even so , one-third of U.S. children have not received the traditional shots recommended by age 2 , including as many as 70 percent of children in some poor , urban neighborhoods , according to federal figures .
domestication: 疫苗接种能保护孩子们免受小儿麻痹症、百日咳、麻疹等过去几代人饱受折磨的疾病之苦。这是一项被证实既省钱又有效的预防性健康策略。即便如此，据统计，美国三分之一的孩子在两岁前没有完成传统的疫苗接种，其中一些贫困城市地区的儿童比例高达70%。
foreignization: 免疫保护儿童免受脊髓灰质炎、百日咳、麻疹以及其他曾困扰前几代人的疾病的侵害。它是少数被证明能够节省成本的预防保健策略之一。即便如此，根据联邦数据，三分之一的美国儿童在2岁前没有接种传统的疫苗，包括一些贫困城市社区中多达70%的儿童。

source: Indian art is not simply a phenomenon of the past . It continues - vibrant , innovative , and new . Contemporary artists sometimes use traditional materials in traditional ways . But others are deeply involved with nontraditional materials or with traditional materials reinterpreted in a new way . There is much more emphasis on personal expression today , but tribal symbolism and religious stories continually surface . " The realities of native American life today , " as artist and curator Bently Spang points out , include all the artifacts of United-States culture right along with the individual Indian artist 's own tribal values , symbols , and material culture .
domestication: 印度艺术不仅仅是一种历史现象，它至今依然充满活力，不断创新，不断焕发出新的光彩。当代艺术家有时会用传统材料进行传统的创作，但也有许多人热衷于使用非传统的材料，或是以全新的视角重新解读传统材料。如今，个人表达变得更加重要，但部落的象征和宗教故事仍然时有出现。正如艺术家兼策展人本利·斯潘所说，“当代美国原住民的生活现实”中，美国文化的各类元素与个体原住民艺术家自身的部落价值观、符号和物质文化并存。
foreignization: 印度艺术不仅仅是一种过去的现象。它仍在继续——充满活力、创新且新颖。当代艺术家有时会以传统方式使用传统材料。但也有其他艺术家深入参与非传统材料的使用，或是以新的方式重新解读传统材料。如今更加注重个人表达，但部落符号和宗教故事不断浮现。“当今美国原住民生活的现实，”正如艺术家兼策展人本利·斯潘所指出的，“包括了美国文化的全部物品，同时也包括个别印第安艺术家自身的部落价值观、符号和物质文化。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Indian art is not simply a phenomenon of the past . It continues - vibrant , innovative , and new . Contemporary artists sometimes use traditional materials in traditional ways . But others are deeply involved with nontraditional materials or with traditional materials reinterpreted in a new way . There is much more emphasis on personal expression today , but tribal symbolism and religious stories continually surface . " The realities of native American life today , " as artist and curator Bently Spang points out , include all the artifacts of United-States culture right along with the individual Indian artist 's own tribal values , symbols , and material culture .
印度艺术不仅仅是一种历史现象，它至今依然充满活力，不断创新，不断焕发出新的光彩。当代艺术家有时会用传统材料进行传统的创作，但也有许多人热衷于使用非传统的材料，或是以全新的视角重新解读传统材料。如今，个人表达变得更加重要，但部落的象征和宗教故事仍然时有出现。正如艺术家兼策展人本利·斯潘所说，“当代美国原住民的生活现实”中，美国文化的各类元素与个体原住民艺术家自身的部落价值观、符号和物质文化并存。

source: Ahavath Torah Congregation , a Conservative synagogue founded in 1919 , is hosting a dinner and discussion Wednesday evening titled " National Security Chaos : Are We Passing the Tipping Point ? " The program features Frank Gaffney Jr. , founder and president of the Center for Security Policy , who argues " creeping Sharia " law is a serious threat to the American government ; Tom Trento , founder of the Florida-based group The United West ; and William G. " Jerry " Boykin , a retired US lieutenant general and former deputy undersecretary of defense , who has called Islam unworthy of First Amendment protection .
domestication: 托拉之爱犹太教堂，这所成立于1919年的保守派犹太会堂，将在周三晚上举办一场名为“国家安全混乱：我们是否已经到了临界点？”的晚宴和讨论会。会上邀请了安全政策中心的创始人兼主席弗兰克·加夫尼二世，他认为“潜行的伊斯兰教法”对美国政府构成了严重威胁；还有佛罗里达州团体“联合西部”的创始人汤姆·特伦托；以及已退役的美国陆军中将威廉·G·“杰里”·博伊金，他曾任国防部副次长，认为伊斯兰教不配享有第一修正案的保护。

source: The exodus crossed 180 miles of Texas through Shamrock , Amarillo , Glenrio under the dangling stars of the vast sky ; then 350 miles across New Mexico through Tucumcari , Santa Rosa , Gallup , and on to the Arizona deserts . They journeyed in fragile , faltering cars , some of which died on the road .
domestication: 这股迁徙大潮穿越了得克萨斯州的180英里，途径沙姆洛克、阿马里洛、格伦里奥，头顶上是广阔天空中摇曳的星辰；接着又在新墨西哥州跋涉了350英里，穿过图库姆卡里、圣罗莎、加兰德，一直进入了亚利桑那的沙漠。他们驾着摇摇欲坠的破车，有的半路就抛锚了。

source: Two years after the foundations of Aceh were shaken to the core by an undersea earthquake , then pummeled by an unforgiving wave , the province is confronting dual demands : to rebuild homes and roads while delivering on the promise of a peace accord signed last year after three decades of separatist fighting .
domestication: 亚齐在海底地震中地动山摇，接着又遭受无情海啸的重创，两年后，这个省份面临着双重挑战：既要重建家园和道路，又要兑现去年签订和平协议的承诺，结束长达三十年的分离主义冲突。
foreignization: 在亚齐的基础被海底地震彻底动摇，随后又被无情的海浪重创两年后，该省正面临双重需求：重建家园和道路，同时履行去年在长达三十年的分离主义斗争后签署的和平协议的承诺。

source: Representative Thomas C. Sawyer , an Ohio Democrat who is the chairman of the House subcommitee that oversees the Census Bureau , said the pressure from this scrutiny might alter the way the census counts people . " We 're undergoing a simultaneous economic , demographic and technological change that is shaping issues more directly than at any time in the past 100 years , " he said . " As a result , the character of the census may not change . But the methodology may change radically . " More Than People Are Being Counted
domestication: 俄亥俄州的民主党众议员托马斯·C·索耶，作为监督人口普查局的众议院小组委员会主席，表示这种审查的压力可能会改变人口普查的方式。“我们正经历着经济、人口和科技的同步变化，这种变化比过去100年任何时候都更直接地影响着问题的形成，”他说，“因此，虽然人口普查的本质可能不会变，但方法可能会有根本性的改变。”不仅仅是人数在被统计。

source: " There is too a Santa Claus ! " shouted one of the frustrated 5-year- olds . " Then , I 'd like to see you catch him ! " " If you say he 's not real , then how do we catch him ? " asked a 5-year-old . " Fine then , we 'll set up a trap . If it catches him , we lose and we give you a dollar . But , if we do n't catch him , you 'll give us a dollar . That means a dollar for each of us , " replied one of the 10-year-olds . The 5-year-olds agreed and the two groups walked away . That 's how it all started .
domestication: “世界上真的有圣诞老人！”一个五岁的小朋友生气地喊道。“那你就等着看你怎么抓到他吧！”“你说他不存在，那我们怎么抓得到呢？”另一个五岁的孩子问道。“好吧，我们就设个陷阱，要是真的抓到了，算我们输，给你们一人一元钱。要是没抓到，你们得给我们一人一元钱。”一个十岁的孩子回答。五岁的孩子们答应了，两拨人就这么分头行动去了。事情就是这样开始的。

That means a dollar for each of us , " replied one of the 10-year-olds . The 5-year-olds agreed and the two groups walked away . That 's how it all started .
“世界上真的有圣诞老人！”一个五岁的小朋友生气地喊道。“那你就等着看你怎么抓到他吧！”“你说他不存在，那我们怎么抓得到呢？”另一个五岁的孩子问道。“好吧，我们就设个陷阱，要是真的抓到了，算我们输，给你们一人一元钱。要是没抓到，你们得给我们一人一元钱。”一个十岁的孩子回答。五岁的孩子们答应了，两拨人就这么分头行动去了。事情就是这样开始的。

" There is too a Santa Claus ! " shouted one of the frustrated 5-year- olds . " Then , I 'd like to see you catch him ! " " If you say he 's not real , then how do we catch him ? " asked a 5-year-old . " Fine then , we 'll set up a trap . If it catches him , we lose and we give you a dollar . But , if we do n't catch him , you 'll give us a dollar . That means a dollar for each of us , " replied one of the 10-year-olds . The 5-year-olds agreed and the two groups walked away . That 's how it all started .
“也有一个圣诞老人！”一个沮丧的5岁孩子喊道。“那，我就想看看你能不能抓住他！”“如果你说他不是真的，那我们怎么抓住他？”一个5岁孩子问道。“好吧，我们就设个陷阱。如果抓到他，我们就输了，给你一美元。但如果我们没抓到他，你就给我们一美元。那就意味着每人一美元，”一个10岁孩子回答。5岁孩子们同意了，两组人就走开了。这一切就是这样开始的。

source: I have a few memories of the day in question . I went into the kitchen , took out the appropriate volume of the Woman 's Day Encyclopedia of Cookery and looked it up . We had all the ingredients , so I started .

source: The beauty of Barry Jenkins 's romance " Moonlight " -- some of it , anyway -- is the way it did n't have to work half as hard to let you see deep inside a character who over time graduates from impressionable child to impenetrable adult thug . You never lose sight of the emotional void that he winds up driving half the night to fill .
domestication: 巴里·詹金斯的浪漫之作《月光男孩》的魅力之一就在于，它无需费尽心思就能让你深入角色内心，看着他从一个天真无邪的孩子成长为一个难以捉摸的成年硬汉。不管怎样，你始终能感受到他内心深处的空虚，这种空虚驱使他在深夜里漫无目的地游荡，试图填补心灵的缺口。
foreignization: 巴里·詹金斯的浪漫之作《月光男孩》——至少有部分是这样——它的美在于它不必费半力就能让你深入看到一个角色，他随着时间的推移从一个易受影响的孩子成长为一个难以穿透的成年恶棍。你从未失去对他最终驱车半宿试图填补的情感空虚的视线。

source: A : Analog technology was more profitable and generated more cash because it required less development and investment . It 's difficult to say when it 's too early , but I 'd rather make an error on the side of being too early than being too late . Our analog business funded our digital transition . You have to make sure that your funding business is healthy and alive and has a long runway so it can fund the transition to the next technology .
domestication: 模拟技术更赚钱，现金流也更充足，因为它所需的开发和投资较少。说什么时候太早了很难定论，但我宁愿犯早不犯晚。我们的模拟业务支撑了数字转型。你得确保你的主营业务健康有活力，有长远的发展空间，这样才能支持向新技术的转型。
foreignization: A: 模拟技术更 profitable 并且生成了更多的现金，因为它需要较少的开发和投资。很难说什么时候太早，但我宁愿在过早方面犯错也不愿过晚。我们的模拟业务资助了我们的数字转型。你必须确保你的资助业务是健康的并且有活力的，并且有一个很长的跑道，这样它就可以资助向下一个技术的转型。

source: And yes , there is a lunch menu , in which a number of dinner entrees - at dinner prices - share the bill with less expensive main-course salads and ingenious tapas-like plates , even a pressed sandwich . Noon is a good time to partake of Goncalves ' smooth avocado soup , which is bright-tasting and cool against its garnish of brittle plantain chips , or a robustly seasoned salad of lentils and tender pork shank , with beautifully dressed arugula leaves and lime-spiked red onion rings for contrast . It 's a dish I can easily imagine eating in a Left Bank bistro .
domestication: 没错，这里还有午餐菜单，里面不仅有晚餐的主菜，价格也和晚餐一样，还有一系列价格更实惠的沙拉和创意十足的小菜，甚至还有压榨三明治。中午时分，最适合品尝贡卡维斯家那碗顺滑的牛油果汤了，汤味清新，与脆脆的香蕉片相得益彰；或者来一份调味浓郁的扁豆和嫩猪蹄沙拉，搭配美味的芝麻菜叶和酸爽的红洋葱圈，口感层次分明。这道菜让我仿佛置身于左岸的某家小酒馆中。
foreignization: 是的，有一份午餐菜单，其中一些晚餐主菜——以晚餐价格——与较便宜的主菜沙拉和富有创意的类似tapas的小盘菜肴，甚至还有压制三明治共同列在菜单上。中午是享用贡卡尔维斯顺滑牛油果汤的好时机，这道汤味道清新，搭配脆炸芭蕉片更显清凉；或者是一道调味浓郁的扁豆和嫩猪小腿沙拉，佐以精心调制的火箭叶和酸橙味红洋葱圈作为对比。这是一道我很容易想象在左岸小酒馆里享用的菜肴。

source: Some mothers receive emotional or financial support from their parents . Others credit mentors and sympathetic employers . Slowly , success has come , one day , one feeding , one diaper change , one paycheck , one college course at a time . In the process , recrimination and doubt gradually give way to growing confidence .
domestication: 有的妈妈从自己的父母那里得到了情感或经济上的支持。有的则感谢导师和善解人意的雇主。成功是一点一滴积累起来的，一天一天，一次喂奶，一次换尿布，一份工资，一门大学课程，慢慢地就看到了成果。在这个过程中，抱怨和怀疑逐渐被日益增长的自信所取代。

source: Editor -- Get a grip , California legislators ! Life is dangerous . It ca n't be made completely safe no matter how many silly statutes you enact . Even if you could wrap all of us citizens in cotton batting , and prevent us from doing anything that might be remotely harmful to us , there must be some balance between the quantity of life and its quality .
domestication: 编辑 -- 加州的立法者们，你们可得清醒点！生活本身就是充满危险的，无论你们通过多少荒唐的法律，也不可能让它变得完全安全。就算把我们这些市民都包在棉花里，不让我们做任何可能对自己有丁点危害的事，生活的质量和数量之间也得有个平衡啊。
foreignization: 编辑 -- 控制一下吧，加利福尼亚的立法者们！生活是危险的。无论你们颁布多少愚蠢的法律，都无法使其完全安全。即使你们能把我们所有公民都包裹在棉花里，阻止我们做任何可能对我们有丝毫危害的事情，生命的数量和质量之间也必须有所平衡。

source: In the 1990s , deregulation was pushed by commercial customers rankled by utilities that built too many power plants and saddled customers with the tab . Deregulation was supposed to let customers buy electricity from more-efficient , competing suppliers . To prevent utilities from favoring their own plants , many had to sell the generators to unregulated affiliates or to independent power wholesalers .
domestication: 上世纪90年代，商业用户对电力公司建了太多发电厂，却让客户买单的做法十分不满，因此推动了电力行业的去管制化。去管制化的初衷是让客户能从更高效、更具竞争力的供应商那里购买电力。为了防止电力公司偏袒自家的发电厂，许多公司不得不将这些发电厂卖给不受监管的附属公司或独立的电力批发商。
foreignization: 在20世纪90年代，商业客户对公用事业公司建造过多发电厂并将费用转嫁给客户的行为感到不满，推动了放松管制。放松管制本应让客户能够从更高效的竞争供应商那里购买电力。为了防止公用事业公司偏袒自己的发电厂，许多公司不得不将发电机出售给不受监管的关联公司或独立的电力批发商。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the 1990s , deregulation was pushed by commercial customers rankled by utilities that built too many power plants and saddled customers with the tab . Deregulation was supposed to let customers buy electricity from more-efficient , competing suppliers . To prevent utilities from favoring their own plants , many had to sell the generators to unregulated affiliates or to independent power wholesalers .

source: I hope people who oppose war know that they are not alone in their frustration with what appears to be a human addiction to war . This violence no doubt stems from a hunger for power and from each faction , religion and country viewing itself as separate and better than the others . If we wholeheartedly followed the teachings and example of Christ , we would truly be a compassionate , peacemaking society .
domestication: 希望反对战争的人知道，他们并不孤单，对人类似乎对战争上瘾感到沮丧的不只是他们。这种暴力无疑源自对权力的渴望，以及每个派系、宗教和国家都认为自己比别人更优越。如果我们真心实意地遵循基督的教诲和榜样，我们就会成为一个真正有同情心、爱好和平的社会。

source: Celeste Waddell did n't know whether Hunter Reeves felt her presence . A respiratory therapist at Charity Hospital for nearly 22 years , she refused to leave her patient 's side as he struggled for his life . Hunter , unconscious , had come to Charity the week before Hurricane Katrina , in critical condition . Waddell , 46 , did n't want him to die alone .

source: The election that Lee won Saturday with 54 percent of the vote poses a vexing problem for Communist leaders in Beijing . They can continue to vilify Lee , thus heightening confrontation and delaying progress toward reunification with Taiwan . Or they can swallow some pride and reach out to Lee , realizing that he has Taiwan 's destiny in his hands for the next four years .
domestication: 李在周六以54%的选票赢得选举，这对北京的共产党领导人来说是个头疼的问题。他们可以继续抨击李，这样只会加剧对抗，推迟与台湾的统一进程。或者，他们也可以放下面子，向李伸出橄榄枝，毕竟台湾接下来四年的命运掌握在他手里。
foreignization: 李在星期六以54%的选票赢得的选举对北京的共产党领导人提出了一个令人烦恼的问题。他们可以继续诋毁李，从而加剧对抗，延缓与台湾统一的进程。或者，他们可以放下一些自尊，向李伸出橄榄枝，认识到他掌握了台湾未来四年的命运。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The election that Lee won Saturday with 54 percent of the vote poses a vexing problem for Communist leaders in Beijing . They can continue to vilify Lee , thus heightening confrontation and delaying progress toward reunification with Taiwan . Or they can swallow some pride and reach out to Lee , realizing that he has Taiwan 's destiny in his hands for the next four years .

source: The scandal in which he found himself enmeshed is still unfolding , with critics pointing fingers at prominent officials day after day . Just last Wednesday , prosecutors entered the central bank , traditionally a dominion of the ministry , to seize a high-level official . Private bankers have been detained as well , top executives have resigned at major financial institutions and one Parliament member , another finance ministry official and numerous businessmen have committed suicide to escape disgrace .
domestication: 他卷入的这桩丑闻还在持续发酵，批评的矛头几乎每天都在指向一些高官。就在上周三，检察官闯进了央行，这个一向由财政部掌控的地盘，抓走了一位高层官员。私人银行家也被拘留了，大金融机构的高管纷纷辞职，还有国会议员、另一位财政部官员和许多商人为逃避羞辱选择了自杀。

source: Not long ago , Amnesty began a new initiative , the Ginetta Sagan Fund . The goal is to build a $ 2 million endowment -- $ 150,000 has already come in -- to help women and children jailed or tortured as political prisoners . " In a world racked by violence , " the 1995 Amnesty report states , " women face rape , mutilation and death at the hands of armed men . Yet all too often these women remain invisible . Their tales are not heard . Their plight is hidden by the sheer scale of the tragedies . "
domestication: 前不久，大赦国际启动了一项新计划——吉内塔·萨根基金。目标是建立一个200万美元的基金，现在已经收到了15万美元，用于帮助那些因政治原因被关押或遭受酷刑的妇女和孩子。大赦国际1995年的报告中说：“在这个暴力肆虐的世界里，妇女们面临着武装分子的强暴、残害甚至死亡。然而，这些妇女常常被忽视，她们的故事无人倾听，她们的苦难被大规模的悲剧所掩盖。”
foreignization: 不久前，大赦国际启动了一项新的倡议，吉内塔·萨根基金。其目标是建立一个200万美元的基金——已有15万美元到账——以帮助作为政治犯被监禁或酷刑折磨的妇女和儿童。“在一个暴力肆虐的世界里，”1995年的大赦国际报告指出，“妇女面临着武装男子的强奸、残害和死亡。然而，这些妇女往往仍然隐形。她们的故事没有被听到。她们的困境因悲剧的规模而被掩盖。”

source: Technically , push technology ranges from the simple to the sophisticated . Internet browsers , for instance , merely simulate push . What they actually do is pull information from Web sites at regular intervals . A subscriber to a browser sports channel , for instance , can see sports scores updated automatically , giving the illusion that the information is being broadcast to the desktop . Yet behind the scenes , the browser is polling the sports channel 's Web site , and pulling new information when it becomes available .
domestication: 从技术上讲，推送技术五花八门，有的简单，有的复杂。比如互联网浏览器，其实只是模拟了推送的效果。它们实际上是定期从网站上拉取信息。比如说，你订阅了浏览器里的体育频道，就能看到体育比分自动更新，给人感觉这些信息是直接推送到桌面上的。但实际上，背后的操作是浏览器在不断访问体育频道的网站，一旦有新信息就拉取过来。
foreignization: 技术上，推送技术从简单到复杂不等。例如，互联网浏览器仅仅模拟推送。它们实际上是在定期从网站拉取信息。例如，订阅了浏览器体育频道的用户可以看到体育比分自动更新，给人一种信息被广播到桌面的错觉。然而在幕后，浏览器正在轮询体育频道的网站，并在新信息可用时拉取这些信息。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Technically , push technology ranges from the simple to the sophisticated . Internet browsers , for instance , merely simulate push . What they actually do is pull information from Web sites at regular intervals . A subscriber to a browser sports channel , for instance , can see sports scores updated automatically , giving the illusion that the information is being broadcast to the desktop . Yet behind the scenes , the browser is polling the sports channel 's Web site , and pulling new information when it becomes available .
从技术上讲，推送技术五花八门，有的简单，有的复杂。比如互联网浏览器，其实只是模拟了推送的效果。它们实际上是定期从网站上拉取信息。比如说，你订阅了浏览器里的体育频道，就能看到体育比分自动更新，给人感觉这些信息是直接推送到桌面上的。但实际上，背后的操作是浏览器在不断访问体育频道的网站，一旦有新信息就拉取过来。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: As I kept my Windows Live Mail account open , it did n't seem to be checking email as rapidly as my old Outlook Express program did ; this was the case on my XP desktop and on my Vista laptop . This occurred less the more I used Windows Live Mail , but it was irksome at first .

source: A University of Nebraska at Omaha professor designed a prosthetic hand three years ago that can be made for as little as $50 with a 3-D printer . The professor , Jorge Zuniga , said he heard a National Public Radio story about South African inventors dabbling with 3-D printing for prosthetics and went to work on a hand for kids who ca n't afford conventional prosthetic devices .

source: I was hurt . I 've lived in Miami since 1986 , and I love it . I love the climate ; I love the beaches ; I love the water ; I love the skyline ; I love the nightlife . Above all I love the ever-changing kaleidoscope of people . Miami is no melting pot : Miami is a steaming cultural stew , constantly being spiced by new arrivals from all over the Caribbean , Central and South America , Europe , and occasionally even the actual United States .
domestication: 我受伤了。自1986年起，我就住在迈阿密，我爱这里。爱这里的气候，爱这里的海滩，爱这里的海水，爱这里的天际线，爱这里的夜生活。最让我着迷的是这里形形色色的人。迈阿密不是大熔炉，而是个热气腾腾的文化大杂烩，不断被来自加勒比海、中美洲、南美洲、欧洲，甚至偶尔还有美国本土的新移民调味着。
foreignization: 我受伤了。自1986年以来，我一直住在迈阿密，我爱这里。我喜欢这里的气候；我喜欢这里的海滩；我喜欢这里的水域；我喜欢这里的天际线；我喜欢这里的夜生活。最重要的是，我喜欢这里不断变化的人群万花筒。迈阿密不是熔炉：迈阿密是一锅不断被来自加勒比海、中美洲和南美洲、欧洲，甚至偶尔来自美国本土的新移民调味的文化浓汤。

And you see how cramped it must have been with its handful of short pews and jury box so close to the witness stand you could reach out and pat the shoulder of the person testifying . In the days of the trial , Teletype machines from the outside press were set up in the lobby .
这里的职员一点也不介意你上二楼看看，所以你就去了。你会看到，这里空间多么局促，几排短长椅和紧挨着证人席的陪审团席位近到你可以伸出手拍打正在作证的人的肩膀。在审判的日子里，外面新闻界的电传打字机被安置在门厅里。

source: Todd Donnan , the ' 94 Southern Conference player of the year : " There 's nobody in America who 's had the balance we had . You never knew if we were going to throw for 400 yards or run for 250 . We 'd do what we had to do to win . If teams were going to bring eight men up to stop the run , we would spread you out like the 49ers . If they were going to play the pass , we 'd run the toss sweep . We had 18,000 formations and basic stuff , too . A lot of stuff was done at the line of scrimmage . The routes are very similar to what Florida does . "
domestication: 托德·唐纳，94年的南方联盟年度最佳球员说：“全美国没有哪支球队能像我们这样攻守兼备。你永远猜不透我们会是扔出400码的传球，还是会跑出250码。为了赢球，我们什么都能干。如果对方派八个队员来防我们的地面进攻，我们就像49人队那样分散开。如果他们防传球，我们就用边锋递送战术。我们有18000种阵型，还有一些基本的打法。很多战术都是在开球线上定的。我们的路线和佛罗里达大学的很像。”

source: Gretzky 's greatest moment with Los Angeles was in 1993 , when the Kings played the Toronto Maple Leafs in the Western Conference finals . source: FILM Environmental Films at Joe 's Movement Emporium The arts hub in Prince George 's County has been hosting all sorts of green-themed events lately ( a clothing swap , exhibits ) . Tonight it kicks off two days of screenings of about 10 short films on such subjects as consumption habits ( " The Story of Stuff , " " Trashed " ) and the effect of U.S. tests conducted at the island of Vieques in Puerto Rico . Suggested donation : $5 for one film , $10 for all films . 6-10 p.m. today ; noon-9 p.m. tomorrow . Joe 's Movement Emporium , 3309 Bunker Hill Rd. , Mount Rainier. 301-699-1819 .
domestication:
电影《环境影片》在乔的运动仓库上演

位于乔治王子县的艺术中心最近举办了一系列环保主题的活动（如衣物交换、展览等）。今晚，这里将开启为期两天的短片展映，大约有10部影片，内容涉及消费习惯（比如《物品的故事》、《垃圾》）以及美国在波多黎各的维克岛进行的试验对当地的影响。建议捐款：单部电影5美元，全部电影10美元。今天下午6点到晚上10点；明天中午12点到晚上9点。地址：乔的运动仓库，马里兰州雷尼尔山巴克希尔路3309号。联系电话：301-699-1819。

source: But some things have changed since December 2001 , when Enron 's sudden descent into bankruptcy protection rocked investor confidence and left the markets reeling . Accountants face independent oversight for the first time in 70 years . Most corporate board members take their jobs far more seriously . Wall Street is somewhat less willing to accommodate clients ' interests .
domestication: 但自2001年12月起，情况发生了变化。当时，安然公司突然申请破产保护，令投资者信心大受打击，市场也陷入了一片混乱。会计师行业70年来首次迎来了独立监管。大多数公司董事会成员如今对自己的职责更加认真负责。华尔街对客户利益的迎合也不那么热心了。
foreignization: 但自2001年12月以来，一些事情已经发生了变化，当时安然公司突然申请破产保护，动摇了投资者的信心，使市场受到了冲击。会计师在70年来首次面临独立监督。大多数公司董事会成员对自己的工作更加认真。华尔街对客户利益的迎合程度也有所降低。

Wall Street is somewhat less willing to accommodate clients ' interests .

But some things have changed since December 2001 , when Enron 's sudden descent into bankruptcy protection rocked investor confidence and left the markets reeling . Accountants face independent oversight for the first time in 70 years . Most corporate board members take their jobs far more seriously . Wall Street is somewhat less willing to accommodate clients ' interests .
但自2001年12月以来，一些事情已经发生了变化，当时安然公司突然申请破产保护，动摇了投资者的信心，使市场受到了冲击。会计师在70年来首次面临独立监督。大多数公司董事会成员对自己的工作更加认真。华尔街对客户利益的迎合程度也有所降低。

source: " For the strong , the intelligent , the healthy , the successful , those on whom , just because they are so , falls the duty of understanding weakness , stupidity , disease and failure in order that they may cure them , Wagner 's operas are essential , a constant source of delight . They must listen to him . But who should never be allowed to listen to Wagner ? The unhappy , the disappointed , the politically ambitious , the self-pitying , those who imagine themselves misunderstood , the Wagnerians . "
domestication: 对于那些强者、聪明人、健康者、成功人士来说，他们因为自身的优越，就有责任去理解弱小、愚钝、病痛和失败，以便帮助他们摆脱困境。瓦格纳的歌剧对他们来说是必不可少的，是他们持续的快乐源泉。他们必须聆听瓦格纳。但谁绝对不能听瓦格纳呢？那些不开心的人、失意的人、政治野心家、自怨自艾的人、自认为被误解的人——这些所谓的“瓦格纳迷”。
foreignization: 对于强者、智者、健康者、成功者，那些因为自身如此而肩负着理解弱小、愚昧、疾病和失败之责任的人，为了治愈他们，瓦格纳的歌剧是必不可少的，是持续的愉悦之源。他们必须倾听他。但是，谁不应该被允许听瓦格纳？不幸者、失意者、政治野心家、自怜者、自认为被误解的人，瓦格纳主义者。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" For the strong , the intelligent , the healthy , the successful , those on whom , just because they are so , falls the duty of understanding weakness , stupidity , disease and failure in order that they may cure them , Wagner 's operas are essential , a constant source of delight . They must listen to him . But who should never be allowed to listen to Wagner ? The unhappy , the disappointed , the politically ambitious , the self-pitying , those who imagine themselves misunderstood , the Wagnerians . "
对于那些强者、聪明人、健康者、成功人士来说，他们因为自身的优越，就有责任去理解弱小、愚钝、病痛和失败，以便帮助他们摆脱困境。瓦格纳的歌剧对他们来说是必不可少的，是他们持续的快乐源泉。他们必须聆听瓦格纳。但谁绝对不能听瓦格纳呢？那些不开心的人、失意的人、政治野心家、自怨自艾的人、自认为被误解的人——这些所谓的“瓦格纳迷”。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" For the strong , the intelligent , the healthy , the successful , those on whom , just because they are so , falls the duty of understanding weakness , stupidity , disease and failure in order that they may cure them , Wagner 's operas are essential , a constant source of delight . They must listen to him . But who should never be allowed to listen to Wagner ? The unhappy , the disappointed , the politically ambitious , the self-pitying , those who imagine themselves misunderstood , the Wagnerians . "
对于强者、智者、健康者、成功者，那些因为自身如此而肩负着理解弱小、愚昧、疾病和失败之责任的人，为了治愈他们，瓦格纳的歌剧是必不可少的，是持续的愉悦之源。他们必须倾听他。但是，谁不应该被允许听瓦格纳？不幸者、失意者、政治野心家、自怜者、自认为被误解的人，瓦格纳主义者。

source: Mezes , skewers , falafel and burgers all come with a handful of fresh organic mesclun greens in this small cafe at the top of Solano Avenue . Everything is as organic as owner Auny Abay can make it , meaning the chicken and vegetables are organic , the lamb and beef are grass-fed and the salmon is wild . Flavors sparkle along with the ingredients at this busy neighborhood spot .
domestication: mezze、烤串、炸鹰嘴豆球和汉堡，在这家位于索拉诺大道顶端的小咖啡馆里，都搭配了一把新鲜的有机混合生菜。老板Auny Abay尽量让所有食材都保持有机，鸡和蔬菜是有机的，羊肉和牛肉是放牧饲养的，三文鱼是野生的。这间人气满满的社区小店，食材和口味一样闪闪发光。

source: Mr. Khalilzad wants to speed the training of the Afghan National Army , which after some $500 million in American investment has fewer than 8,000 soldiers . In the evening , he led a meeting on the subject with military planners . They discussed how big an army the country needed , the likely threats Afghanistan would face , the money Washington might provide in coming years .
domestication: 哈利勒扎德先生想加快阿富汗国民军的培训进度，美国已经投入了5亿美元，但目前士兵人数还不到8000人。晚上，他主持了一个与军事规划人员的会议，大家讨论了国家需要多大规模的军队，阿富汗可能会面临哪些威胁，以及华盛顿未来几年可能提供的资金。
foreignization: 哈利勒扎德先生希望加快阿富汗国民军的培训，尽管美国已经投资了约5亿美元，这支军队的士兵人数却不足8000人。晚上，他主持了一次与军事规划者的会议。他们讨论了这个国家需要多大的军队，阿富汗可能面临的威胁，以及华盛顿在未来几年可能提供的资金。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Mr. Khalilzad wants to speed the training of the Afghan National Army , which after some $500 million in American investment has fewer than 8,000 soldiers . In the evening , he led a meeting on the subject with military planners . They discussed how big an army the country needed , the likely threats Afghanistan would face , the money Washington might provide in coming years .

库里万先生，52岁，是Atos-Euronext的副总裁，出生在爱尔兰，大约十年前从巴黎搬到了马萨诸塞州的温彻斯特。他在11号航班上。他的朋友约翰·亚当森回忆说，库里万先生是一个才华横溢的演讲者。“他会巧妙地在谈话中插入一个恰当的短语或单词，然后退后一步，带着狡黠的眼神观察效果。”

source: Chili can made with beef , pork , vegetables , chicken or turkey . And many different kinds of pepper can be used . Everyone has a favorite rendition . Heat , in the form of chili peppers , chili powders or hot pepper sauces , can always be added , but is hard to take away . Know your crowd .

source: Cut the bacon strips into half-inch cross sections . Place in a medium skillet , sprinkle with thyme and granulated garlic , and fry over a medium-high flame , stirring frequently with a wooden spoon . When the bacon begins to color and stick to the bottom , add a tablespoon or so of tap water to deglaze the bottom . Continue frying , stirring frequently , until the bacon pieces are crispy and have turned an appealing brown . Remove with a slotted spoon and drain over paper towels on a plate .
domestication: 把培根切成半英寸的小段。放入中号平底锅，撒上一些百里香和颗粒蒜，用大火炒，经常用木勺搅动。等培根开始变色，粘在锅底时，加一小勺自来水，让锅底的残渣溶解下来。继续炒，频繁翻动，直到培根块变得酥脆，颜色诱人地变棕。用漏勺捞出，放在铺了纸巾的盘子里沥干。

source: Although " neither side made any substantive changes in its position , " Yugoslav President Milosevic and Albanian-separatism leader Ibrahim Rugova have agreed to open talks on the future of Kosovo , US envoy Richard Holbrooke said . But he warned that the talks , scheduled for tomorrow , may not result " in an immediate de-escalation of violence . " Rugova demands independence for the 90-percent-Albanian province ; Milosevic has offered only to restore the autonomy he withdrew in 1989 .
domestication: 虽然“双方都没有在立场上做出实质性改变”，但南斯拉夫总统米洛舍维奇和阿尔巴尼亚分离主义领导人鲁戈瓦同意就科索沃的未来开启对话，美国特使理查德·霍尔布鲁克说。不过他警告说，定于明天举行的会谈可能不会“立即缓解暴力冲突”。鲁戈瓦要求这个90%人口为阿尔巴尼亚人的省份独立；而米洛舍维奇只同意恢复他在1989年撤销的自治权。

source: One of the biggest annual events is the Bank of America Winter WonderFest , running Dec. 5 through Jan. 4 at Navy Pier . Now in its eighth year , the fest is preceded by Santa 's arrival by boat on Dock Street at 5 p.m . Nov. 29 . Following a welcoming fireworks display and the lighting of Dock Street , Santa will proceed to the Family Pavilion Stage , where he 'll be in residence granting wishes and posing for photos through Dec. 24 .

One of the biggest annual events is the Bank of America Winter WonderFest , running Dec. 5 through Jan. 4 at Navy Pier . Now in its eighth year , the fest is preceded by Santa 's arrival by boat on Dock Street at 5 p.m . Nov. 29 . Following a welcoming fireworks display and the lighting of Dock Street , Santa will proceed to the Family Pavilion Stage , where he 'll be in residence granting wishes and posing for photos through Dec. 24 .
一年中最大的活动之一就是美国银行冬季奇趣节，从12月5日持续到1月4日，在海军码头举行。这个活动今年已经是第八届了。11月29日下午5点，圣诞老人会乘船抵达码头街，随后会有欢迎的焰火表演和码头街的亮灯仪式。之后，圣诞老人会前往家庭馆舞台，从12月5日到12月24日，他会在这里驻扎，接受孩子们的愿望，还会跟大家合影留念。

source: The winners are likely to be those who raised the most money , and raised it before the first caucuses are held in Iowa . There will be no time for a candidate to score a surprise win in one state , then capitalize on it to raise money and build momentum as Jimmy Carter did in 1976 and Bill Clinton in 1992 .
domestication: 赢家很可能是在爱荷华州首次党团会议前筹得最多资金的人。到时候候选人不会有时间在某个州意外胜出，然后借机筹款、积累势头，就像吉米·卡特在1976年和比尔·克林顿在1992年那样。
foreignization: 获胜者很可能是那些筹集了最多资金，并且在爱荷华州首次举行党团会议之前就筹集到的人。候选人将没有时间在一个州取得意外胜利，然后借此筹集资金并建立势头，就像吉米·卡特在1976年和比尔·克林顿在1992年所做的那样。

source: But the parenting that was so burdensome and smothering to my brother had a different effect on me . I took on the role of " the good son " -- appreciative of my father 's advice and diligent in avoiding behaviors that would worry my mother . I also became the family consigliere , defending my parents ' behavior to my brother , much to his disgust , while studiously ignoring their faults .
domestication: 但那种让人喘不过气来的家庭教育对我哥哥来说是种负担，对我却产生了不同的影响。我成了“乖儿子”——感激父亲的教导，小心翼翼地不做出让母亲担心的事。我还当起了家里的和事佬，总是站在父母这边替他们辩护，尽管这让我哥哥十分不满，但我对他们的缺点却视而不见。
foreignization: 但是，对我哥哥来说如此沉重和压抑的育儿方式对我却产生了不同的影响。我承担起了“好儿子”的角色——感激父亲的建议，并努力避免会让母亲担心的行为。我还成为了家庭的顾问，为父母的行为向哥哥辩护，这让他非常反感，同时刻意忽略他们的缺点。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But the parenting that was so burdensome and smothering to my brother had a different effect on me . I took on the role of " the good son " -- appreciative of my father 's advice and diligent in avoiding behaviors that would worry my mother . I also became the family consigliere , defending my parents ' behavior to my brother , much to his disgust , while studiously ignoring their faults .
但那种让人喘不过气来的家庭教育对我哥哥来说是种负担，对我却产生了不同的影响。我成了“乖儿子”——感激父亲的教导，小心翼翼地不做出让母亲担心的事。我还当起了家里的和事佬，总是站在父母这边替他们辩护，尽管这让我哥哥十分不满，但我对他们的缺点却视而不见。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But the parenting that was so burdensome and smothering to my brother had a different effect on me . I took on the role of " the good son " -- appreciative of my father 's advice and diligent in avoiding behaviors that would worry my mother . I also became the family consigliere , defending my parents ' behavior to my brother , much to his disgust , while studiously ignoring their faults .
但是，对我哥哥来说如此沉重和压抑的育儿方式对我却产生了不同的影响。我承担起了“好儿子”的角色——感激父亲的建议，并努力避免会让母亲担心的行为。我还成为了家庭的顾问，为父母的行为向哥哥辩护，这让他非常反感，同时刻意忽略他们的缺点。

source: In its conclusions of law entered on April 3 , 2000 , the court nevertheless decided that Microsoft violated Section 1 of the Sherman Act by unlawfully tying Internet Explorer to Windows . The court , however , rejected plaintiffs ' exclusive dealing claim , holding that the challenged agreements with various third parties " did not foreclose enough of the relevant market to constitute a violation . " The court also determined that Microsoft had violated Section 2 by maintaining a monopoly in operating systems and by attempting to monopolize Web browsing software , despite the fact that distribution foreclosure is a central premise of both violations in this case . . . . The Final Judgment
domestication: 2000年4月3日，法院在法律结论中认定，微软因非法将互联网浏览器与Windows操作系统捆绑，违反了《谢尔曼法》第一条。不过，法院驳回了原告关于独家交易的主张，认为与各方签订的争议协议“并未封锁足够的相关市场，不足以构成违法”。法院还裁定，尽管分销封锁是本案两项违规行为的核心前提，微软仍因维持操作系统垄断地位和试图垄断网页浏览软件，违反了《谢尔曼法》第二条。……最终判决书
foreignization: 在2000年4月3日作出的法律结论中，法院仍然认定微软通过非法捆绑Internet Explorer和Windows违反了《谢尔曼法》第1条。然而，法院驳回了原告的独家交易索赔，认为与各种第三方的争议协议“并未排挤足够相关的市场以构成违法。”法院还确定微软违反了《谢尔曼法》第2条，通过维持操作系统垄断和企图垄断网络浏览器软件，尽管分销排挤是本案中两项违规行为的核心前提。……最终判决

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In its conclusions of law entered on April 3 , 2000 , the court nevertheless decided that Microsoft violated Section 1 of the Sherman Act by unlawfully tying Internet Explorer to Windows . The court , however , rejected plaintiffs ' exclusive dealing claim , holding that the challenged agreements with various third parties " did not foreclose enough of the relevant market to constitute a violation . " The court also determined that Microsoft had violated Section 2 by maintaining a monopoly in operating systems and by attempting to monopolize Web browsing software , despite the fact that distribution foreclosure is a central premise of both violations in this case . . . . The Final Judgment
2000年4月3日，法院在法律结论中认定，微软因非法将互联网浏览器与Windows操作系统捆绑，违反了《谢尔曼法》第一条。不过，法院驳回了原告关于独家交易的主张，认为与各方签订的争议协议“并未封锁足够的相关市场，不足以构成违法”。法院还裁定，尽管分销封锁是本案两项违规行为的核心前提，微软仍因维持操作系统垄断地位和试图垄断网页浏览软件，违反了《谢尔曼法》第二条。……最终判决书

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In its conclusions of law entered on April 3 , 2000 , the court nevertheless decided that Microsoft violated Section 1 of the Sherman Act by unlawfully tying Internet Explorer to Windows . The court , however , rejected plaintiffs ' exclusive dealing claim , holding that the challenged agreements with various third parties " did not foreclose enough of the relevant market to constitute a violation . " The court also determined that Microsoft had violated Section 2 by maintaining a monopoly in operating systems and by attempting to monopolize Web browsing software , despite the fact that distribution foreclosure is a central premise of both violations in this case . . . . The Final Judgment
在2000年4月3日作出的法律结论中，法院仍然认定微软通过非法捆绑Internet Explorer和Windows违反了《谢尔曼法》第1条。然而，法院驳回了原告的独家交易索赔，认为与各种第三方的争议协议“并未排挤足够相关的市场以构成违法。”法院还确定微软违反了《谢尔曼法》第2条，通过维持操作系统垄断和企图垄断网络浏览器软件，尽管分销排挤是本案中两项违规行为的核心前提。……最终判决

source: Its consortium of producers says a lot about the new alliances being forged for shows that must creatively reach new audiences . The group represents some of the best talent in the commercial theater ( Dodger Productions , the baby-boomer types that produced the hip " Jelly 's Last Jam " and the dynamite " Guys and Dolls " ) and the nonprofit theater ( director Des McAnuff and his La Jolla Playhouse , winner of the ' 93 regional Tony ) .
domestication: 这个制作联盟说明了为了创意地吸引新观众，新的合作关系正在形成。这个团队汇聚了商业剧场和非营利剧场的顶尖人才。商业剧场方面有Dodger Productions，这是由婴儿潮一代创立的，他们曾制作过超酷的《杰利的最后一场狂欢》和火爆的《绅士爱美人》；非营利剧场方面则有导演Des McAnuff和他的拉霍亚剧场，后者在1993年还拿下了区域托尼奖。
foreignization: 它的制作人联盟说明了为了创意性地吸引新观众而形成的新联盟。这个团体代表了一些商业剧场（如Dodger Productions，这些婴儿潮时期的人制作了前卫的《Jelly's Last Jam》和精彩的《Guys and Dolls》）和非盈利剧场（如导演Des McAnuff和他的La Jolla Playhouse，获得了1993年的地区托尼奖）中最优秀的人才。

source: Then there was the Johnson family . They had a big house and a dog and a lot of love to give . They were the perfect family for Michael . Santa wrote a secret letter to the Johnson family sending Michael 's date of birth , a picture and what Michael liked the Johnson family were going to make this little boy 's dreams come true ! The day before Christmas the Johnsons went out and bought presents for Michael . Then they went 911 picked Michael up from the Orphanage . He had tears in his eyes . He was both happy and sad . Happy because he was finally getting a family but , sad because he did not think he deserved it .
domestication: 接着是约翰逊一家。他们有座大房子，还养了条狗，最重要的是，他们满怀爱心。对迈克尔来说，这是个完美的家庭。圣诞老人给约翰逊一家写了一封密信，寄去了迈克尔的生日、照片，还有他喜欢的东西。约翰逊一家准备要让这个小男孩的梦想成真！平安夜前一天，约翰逊一家出门给迈克尔买了礼物。然后他们打了911，从孤儿院接回了迈克尔。迈克尔眼里含着泪，既开心又难过。开心的是终于有了一个家，但又难过，觉得自己不配拥有这一切。

然后是约翰逊一家。他们有一个大房子，一条狗，还有很多爱可以给予。他们对迈克尔来说是一个完美的家庭。圣诞老人给约翰逊一家写了一封密信，寄去了迈克尔的出生日期、一张照片以及迈克尔喜欢的东西。约翰逊一家将要实现这个小男孩的梦想！圣诞节前一天，约翰逊一家出去为迈克尔买了礼物。然后他们拨打了911从孤儿院接走了迈克尔。他的眼里含着泪水。他既高兴又难过。高兴是因为他终于有了一个家，但难过的是他认为自己不配得到这一切。

source: independent grocer . Fulton Valley chickens eat a diet of 75 percent corn , 25 percent soybeans , sorghum or other grains , with no additives , appetite stimulants or antibiotics . The range chickens are raised in open-sided houses with dirt and sawdust floors , not cages . But we 're not talking about open-field grazing here . A 22,000-square-foot chicken house holds 22,000 chickens with an adjoining 22,000 square feet of outdoor area . The chickens do get to peck around outdoors for bugs and rocks , but each one does n't exactly have beachfront property . Fulton Valley chickens are shipped on ice , which means they are delivered fresh .
domestication: 独立杂货店。富尔顿谷的鸡吃的饲料七成是玉米，三成是大豆、高粱或其他谷物，不加任何添加剂、食欲刺激剂或抗生素。散养鸡住在四面通风的房子里，地上铺着泥土和木屑，没有笼子。但这里可不是放养的意思。一个2.2万平方英尺的鸡舍里养着2.2万只鸡，旁边还有一个同样大小的户外区域。鸡确实可以到外面去啄食虫子和小石头，但每只鸡也不是都有海滨别墅。富尔顿谷的鸡在运输时用冰保鲜，所以送到顾客手里时还是新鲜的。

source: Some of the wording and references to the tax forms may overwhelm people filling out financial aid documents for the first time , but in a previous effort to simplify FAFSA , some of the directions that explained things were simply removed to make it look less intimidating , says Sean Smith , financial aid director at Scripps College in Claremont , Calif . " I suspect there is some value to clearing up some of the language . The challenge is when you do that , you expand the length of the thing and make it look more confusing . "
domestication: 有些词和税表上的术语可能会让第一次填写助学金申请表的人感到不知所措。但是，斯克利普斯学院的助学金主任肖恩·史密斯说，之前为了简化FAFSA（联邦学生援助免费申请表），一些解释性的说明被直接删掉了，这样做表面上是让表格看起来不那么吓人了。“我觉得清理一下语言确实有好处，但问题在于，你这么一做，表格就会变长，反而显得更复杂。”
foreignization: 一些措辞和对税表的引用可能会令首次填写经济援助文件的人感到不知所措，但在之前简化FAFSA（联邦学生援助免费申请表）的努力中，一些解释性的说明被简单地删除了，以使其看起来不那么令人望而生畏，加州克莱蒙特斯克里普斯学院的财务援助主任肖恩·史密斯说。“我怀疑澄清一些语言是有价值的。挑战在于，当你这样做时，会扩展文件的长度，使其看起来更加令人困惑。”

messages_domestication.content:

" I suspect there is some value to clearing up some of the language . The challenge is when you do that , you expand the length of the thing and make it look more confusing . "

source: Wit Capital hires J.P . Morgan banker New York -- Wit Capital Group Inc. , an Internet upstart evolving into a Wall Street boutique filled with industry veterans , hired media banker Mack Rossoff from J.P . Morgan &; Co. to run a newly formed mergers and acquisitions unit . Hiring Rossoff is the latest expansion move by the 3-year-old firm , which is partly owned by Goldman Sachs Group Inc . source: Try as hard as she might -- from 4 in the morning till 8 at night -- to whip herself and the place into shape , she never really succeeds . The loneliness , endless work , and primitive living conditions -- you name an amenity , and they did n't have it -- prove all but overwhelming . Only two things unreservedly leave her awestruck : the beauty of nature and its bounty .
domestication: 她再怎么努力，从早上四点忙到晚上八点，想把自己和这个地方整理得井井有条，却始终没能如愿。孤独、无尽的工作，还有原始的生活条件——你想要的便利，这里都没有——几乎把她压垮了。只有两样东西能让她由衷地感到震撼：大自然的美丽和它的丰富馈赠。
foreignization: 她再怎么努力——从早上4点到晚上8点——试图把自己和这个地方整顿好，也从未真正成功。孤独、无尽的工作和简陋的生活条件——你想到的任何便利设施，他们都没有——几乎令她难以承受。只有两件事让她毫无保留地感到惊叹：自然的美丽及其丰富的物产。

source: And he listened to his cousin Michael Moran tell the story about how , one day 73 years before , Martin had shut that door . About how he 'd struck off north through the heather , rucksack on his back ( " and he 's whistlin ' , says his wee sister Annie , who was runnin ' behind " ) , to the rail line on the low ridge ( " and the tracks that carried dead men to their graves and live men to their futures , the tracks are gone long since now " ) .
domestication: 他听表弟迈克尔·莫兰讲了个故事，说的是73年前的某天，马丁关上了那扇门。接着，他背着包，穿过石楠花地向北走去（“他还在吹口哨呢，”他的小妹妹安妮跟在后面跑着说），一直走到低岭上的铁路边（“那条铁轨以前载过死人去坟墓，也载过活人去未来，不过现在早就没有了”）。
foreignization: 他听表弟迈克尔·莫兰讲述了一个故事，关于73年前的某一天，马丁是如何关上了那扇门的。讲述了他是如何背着背包，穿过石南花向北走去（“他还吹着口哨，”他的小妹妹安妮说，她跟在后面跑）到低山脊上的铁路线（“那些轨道曾载着死者前往他们的坟墓，也载着活人前往他们的未来，但那些轨道早就已经不见了”）。

source: Renewing the deal makes no sense , because the push would only add to urban sprawl . There are other places that factories and offices can locate in metro Denver . But there are n't many places left along the Front Range where natural habitats thrive largely undisturbed . Paradoxically , the vast buffer area around Rocky Flat 's industrial core harbors some of the most pristine tracts remaining in the burgeoning north metro area . To put the opportunity into perspective , the 5,000 acres of potential open space at Rocky Flats is bigger than the old Stapleton Airport 's 4,700 acres .
domestication: 续约这笔交易没啥意思，因为这只会加剧城市扩张。丹佛大都会区里，工厂和办公楼有的是地方可建。但是，沿着前山脉，几乎已经没有多少地方能让自然栖息地保持相对未受干扰的状态了。说来也怪，落基平原工业区周围的大片缓冲地带，反而成了这片日益繁华的北郊地区里仅存的几块最原始的地方之一。要理解这个机会有多大，落基平原那5000英亩的潜在开放空间，比老斯台普顿机场的4700英亩还要大呢。
foreignization: 续签该协议没有意义，因为此举只会加剧城市扩张。丹佛都会区有其他地方可以建设工厂和办公室。但在前沿山脉沿线，几乎已经没有多少地方能让自然栖息地在很大程度上保持未受干扰了。具有讽刺意味的是，落基平原工业核心周围的广大缓冲区，容纳了一些蓬勃发展的北都会区剩余的最原始地块。为了让大家了解这一机会的重要性，落基平原潜在的5000英亩开放空间比旧斯台普尔顿机场的4700英亩还要大。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Renewing the deal makes no sense , because the push would only add to urban sprawl . There are other places that factories and offices can locate in metro Denver . But there are n't many places left along the Front Range where natural habitats thrive largely undisturbed . Paradoxically , the vast buffer area around Rocky Flat 's industrial core harbors some of the most pristine tracts remaining in the burgeoning north metro area . To put the opportunity into perspective , the 5,000 acres of potential open space at Rocky Flats is bigger than the old Stapleton Airport 's 4,700 acres .

source: Such tensions -- between military and civilian perspectives , short and long-term interests -- perpetually bedevil this enterprise . Mr. Khalilzad , for example , worries that the Americans are cultivating dependence by coming 10,000 miles to build concrete schools for Afghans who once built stunning palaces and mosques . But he concedes that he is pushing the school-building , because the Americans and Mr. Karzai need the good will now .
domestication: 这些矛盾——军事和民用的视角、短期与长期的利益——一直困扰着这项事业。比如，哈利勒扎德先生担心，美国人不远万里来到这里为阿富汗人建混凝土学校，反而养成了他们的依赖性，要知道阿富汗人曾经能建造出令人惊叹的宫殿和清真寺。但他也承认自己在推动建学校的事，因为美国人和卡尔扎伊现在需要这些好意。
foreignization: 这样的紧张关系——军事与民用视角、短期与长期利益之间的矛盾——始终困扰着这一事业。例如，哈利勒扎德先生担心，美国人跋涉10000英里来为阿富汗人建造混凝土学校，而这些阿富汗人曾经建造过令人惊叹的宫殿和清真寺，这会培养出依赖性。但他承认，他正在推动学校建设，因为美国人和卡尔扎伊先生现在需要这种善意。

But he concedes that he is pushing the school-building , because the Americans and Mr. Karzai need the good will now .

source: Washington entered the crisp afternoon at Husky Stadium with the best passing defense in the Pac-12 . Only one offense has thrown for more than 200 yards against the Huskies and it was Idaho in the midst of a 59-14 blowout on Sept. 10 . source: The Washington Nationals ( 66-45 ) are peaking . After posting their worst month of the season in July -- a 13-12 mark -- they 've gone 5-1 in August and are up to a season-high 21 games over .500 with a season-high 7 1/2-game lead in the National League East . Their eight-game homestand , which began by taking two of three from the Giants over the weekend , continues Tuesday with a brief two-game series against the first-place Indians ( 62-47 ) , two weeks removed from the teams splitting a pair of meetings in Cleveland .
domestication: 华盛顿国民队（66胜45负）现在状态正佳。七月份他们经历了本赛季最糟糕的一个月，战绩仅为13胜12负，但进入八月以来，他们已经取得了5胜1负的佳绩，目前胜率比五成高出21场，领先国联东区第二名7.5个胜场，都是赛季新高。这个八场主场系列赛刚刚在周末拿下巨人队两场中的两场后开启，周二将迎战分区头名的印第安人队（62胜47负），双方两周前在克利夫兰交手过两次，各取一胜。
foreignization: 华盛顿国民队（66-45）正处于巅峰状态。在经历了赛季最糟糕的一个月——7月份的13胜12负之后，他们在8月份取得了5胜1负的战绩，并且本赛季首次领先50%胜率21场，同时在国家联盟东区的领先优势也达到了创赛季新高的7.5场。他们在主场进行的八场比赛系列赛，在上周末从巨人队手中拿下三场中的两场后，将于周二继续进行，对手是目前排名第一的印第安人队（62-47），两队两周前曾在克利夫兰的两次交锋中各胜一场。

source: As for the homeless , a high-profile issue here where panhandlers aggressively pursue resident and tourist alike , Jordan has retreated from a controversial campaign promise advocating warrant checks , work camps , and other tough measures . He now speaks of hiring the homeless to retrofit quake-damaged buildings and creating a special bank to provide loans for those seeking permanent housing .
domestication: 说到流浪汉问题，这里可是个棘手的难题，乞丐们对居民和游客都是穷追不舍。乔丹之前曾提出过一些有争议的竞选承诺，比如查无证人员、设立劳动营等强硬手段。现在他改口说要雇佣流浪汉来修复地震损坏的建筑，还要成立一个专门的银行，给想要永久住房的人提供贷款。
foreignization: 至于无家可归者问题，这里是乞讨者积极追求居民和游客的高调问题，乔丹已经从他之前有争议的竞选承诺中退缩，该承诺主张进行通缉令检查、劳动营和其他严厉措施。他现在谈论的是雇佣无家可归者改造地震受损建筑，并创建一个特别银行为那些寻求永久住房的人提供贷款。

source: Whether the guidelines will resonate with a culture awash in flavor-of-the-month diets is unclear . But this time , the government appears eager to alter old habits . source: To begin with , native American cultures never separated art from life arbitrarily . It was simply part and parcel of everything else in daily experience - of religion , oral and written histories , education , clothing , household utensils , weapons , and military paraphernalia . When Indian art is displayed in a museum , it seems to be set apart from life as " aesthetic " experience , the way Western cultures set art apart .
domestication: 首先，美洲原住民的文化中，艺术和生活从来不分家。艺术就是日常生活中的一部分，宗教、口头和书面历史、教育、服饰、家居用品、武器和军事装备都离不开它。现在，当印第安人的艺术品被放在博物馆里展示时，仿佛被从生活中剥离出来，成了“美学”体验，这和西方文化中将艺术单独拿出来的方式如出一辙。
foreignization: 首先，美洲原住民文化从未随意将艺术与生活分开。它仅仅是日常经验中其他一切的一部分——宗教、口述和书面历史、教育、服装、家用器具、武器和军事装备。当印第安艺术在博物馆中展出时，它似乎被作为“美学”体验与生活分离开来，就像西方文化将艺术分离出来一样。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

To begin with , native American cultures never separated art from life arbitrarily . It was simply part and parcel of everything else in daily experience - of religion , oral and written histories , education , clothing , household utensils , weapons , and military paraphernalia . When Indian art is displayed in a museum , it seems to be set apart from life as " aesthetic " experience , the way Western cultures set art apart .

source: Cross-border barter has also been curtailed , as Russia tries to bring its foreign trade in compliance with requirements set by the World Trade Organization . According to the Trade Ministry , if in the early 1990 's , half of Russian-Chinese trade was conducted in barter , now -- officially -- the proportion is only 4 percent .

source: The Giants will take on the Cubs in the best-of-five division series beginning Friday night at Wrigley Field , and considering they have now won nine consecutive elimination games , and nine consecutive postseason series plus two wild-card games - tying the 1998-2001 New York Yankees for the longest streak in history - how can anyone shake their confidence ?

source: Alvarado 's former chief of staff , James Rodriguez , announced his intentions to run for the District I seat late last year , as many expected - making it clear to others who may be interested that they 'll face a long and expensive race . source: In the end , it was a film that never got made that gave Rappeneau courage to mount his own interpretation . In 1948 , Orson Welles had planned his own version of " Cyrano , " and in fact spent a year in Paris writing the screenplay . Although it was never made , Rappeneau said , " It reassured me . If someone of Welles ' caliber had entertained such a scheme , and even dreamed of taking on the title role , then it was certainly possible to give the play action and amplitude . "
domestication: 说来也巧，正是那部从未开拍的电影给了拉佩瑙勇气，让他决定自己来演绎这个故事。1948年，奥逊·威尔斯曾打算拍摄他自己的《大鼻子情圣》，还为此在巴黎花了一年时间写剧本。虽然这部电影最终没能实现，但拉佩瑙说：“这让我安心了不少。像威尔斯这样的人物都曾有过这样的想法，甚至梦想过亲自出演男主角，那么给这部戏剧增加一些动作和宏大场景，肯定也是可行的。”
foreignization: 最终，是一部从未被拍摄的电影给了拉佩诺勇气去制作他自己的版本。1948年，奥森·威尔斯计划过他自己的《西哈诺》版本，并且实际上在巴黎花了整整一年时间来撰写剧本。虽然这部电影从未被拍摄，但拉佩诺说，“这让我感到安心。如果像威尔斯这样的人曾有过这样的构想，甚至梦想过扮演主角，那么给这部剧以动作和宏伟场面当然是可能的。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the end , it was a film that never got made that gave Rappeneau courage to mount his own interpretation . In 1948 , Orson Welles had planned his own version of " Cyrano , " and in fact spent a year in Paris writing the screenplay . Although it was never made , Rappeneau said , " It reassured me . If someone of Welles ' caliber had entertained such a scheme , and even dreamed of taking on the title role , then it was certainly possible to give the play action and amplitude . "

source: Officials at Solectron , the pacesetter of contract manufacturing , say that , in the early 1980s , employees helped out by taking work home but that it 's now against company policy . Nevertheless , an inquiry from the Mercury News triggered an internal audit in which Solectron discovered one of its subcontractors paying workers by the piece . The company said it has suspended business with the subcontractor .
domestication: 索尔特龙公司的官员说，这家合同制造的领头羊在80年代初的时候，员工们还会把活儿带回家干，但现在公司政策明令禁止了。不过，《水星报》的一则询问还是引起了公司内部调查，结果发现有一家分包商在按件计酬。索尔特龙表示已经暂停了与这家分包商的合作。

source: Often Malcolm 's message fell on deaf ears , she recalls . " We must also understand that a lot of black people had bought into a white agenda . Here this man is coming along talking about an agenda for the African diaspora . Black people who had already bought into the white agenda said this is nonsense , " she says . She slips from the personal to the political easily . " But actually during that era anyone who talked about security , safety , solidarity , liberation , equality and parity , they were bad . It is always a good thing for society when ethnic groups are allowed to enter the family of human-rights advocates and know that they can investigate their history and not be considered hate , that they can love their people and not be considered hate . "
domestication: 回想起来，马尔科姆的话常常是白费口舌。“我们必须理解，很多黑人已经接受了白人的议程。这时来了个男人，提出了一个非洲 Diaspora（散居各地的非洲人）的议程。那些已经接受了白人议程的黑人就说这是胡说八道。”她从个人经历轻松地过渡到政治话题。“其实那时候，谁要是谈论安全、保护、团结、解放、平等和公正，都会被认为是坏人。一个社会如果能让不同的族裔群体加入人权倡导者的行列，让他们可以探究自己的历史而不被视作仇恨，能够爱自己的人民而不被当作有恨意，这对整个社会都是好事。”
foreignization: 常常马尔科姆的信息落到了聋子的耳朵里，她回忆说。“我们必须理解，很多黑人已经接受了白人的议程。这里这个人在谈论非洲裔的议程。那些已经接受了白人议程的黑人说这是胡说八道，”她说。她很容易地从个人话题转向政治话题。“但实际上在那个时代，任何谈论安全、保障、团结、解放、平等和对等的人都被认为是坏人。当允许族裔群体加入人权倡导者的大家庭，并知道他们可以探究自己的历史而不被视为仇恨，可以爱自己的人民而不被视为仇恨时，这对社会总是好事。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Often Malcolm 's message fell on deaf ears , she recalls . " We must also understand that a lot of black people had bought into a white agenda . Here this man is coming along talking about an agenda for the African diaspora . Black people who had already bought into the white agenda said this is nonsense , " she says . She slips from the personal to the political easily . " But actually during that era anyone who talked about security , safety , solidarity , liberation , equality and parity , they were bad . It is always a good thing for society when ethnic groups are allowed to enter the family of human-rights advocates and know that they can investigate their history and not be considered hate , that they can love their people and not be considered hate . "

回想起来，马尔科姆的话常常是白费口舌。“我们必须理解，很多黑人已经接受了白人的议程。这时来了个男人，提出了一个非洲 Diaspora（散居各地的非洲人）的议程。那些已经接受了白人议程的黑人就说这是胡说八道。”她从个人经历轻松地过渡到政治话题。“其实那时候，谁要是谈论安全、保护、团结、解放、平等和公正，都会被认为是坏人。一个社会如果能让不同的族裔群体加入人权倡导者的行列，让他们可以探究自己的历史而不被视作仇恨，能够爱自己的人民而不被当作有恨意，这对整个社会都是好事。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Often Malcolm 's message fell on deaf ears , she recalls . " We must also understand that a lot of black people had bought into a white agenda . Here this man is coming along talking about an agenda for the African diaspora . Black people who had already bought into the white agenda said this is nonsense , " she says . She slips from the personal to the political easily . " But actually during that era anyone who talked about security , safety , solidarity , liberation , equality and parity , they were bad . It is always a good thing for society when ethnic groups are allowed to enter the family of human-rights advocates and know that they can investigate their history and not be considered hate , that they can love their people and not be considered hate . "

常常马尔科姆的信息落到了聋子的耳朵里，她回忆说。“我们必须理解，很多黑人已经接受了白人的议程。这里这个人在谈论非洲裔的议程。那些已经接受了白人议程的黑人说这是胡说八道，”她说。她很容易地从个人话题转向政治话题。“但实际上在那个时代，任何谈论安全、保障、团结、解放、平等和对等的人都被认为是坏人。当允许族裔群体加入人权倡导者的大家庭，并知道他们可以探究自己的历史而不被视为仇恨，可以爱自己的人民而不被视为仇恨时，这对社会总是好事。”

source: The depleted-uranium bullets are made of low-level radioactive nuclear-waste material , left over from the making of nuclear fuel and weapons . It is 1.7 times as dense as lead , and burns its way easily through armor . But it is controversial because it leaves a trail of contamination that has half-life of 4.5 billion years - the age of our solar system .
domestication: 贫铀弹是用低放射性的核废料制成的，这种材料是从制造核燃料和武器的过程中剩下的。它的密度比铅还要大1.7倍，能轻松穿透装甲。但争议很大，因为它留下的污染有45亿年的半衰期，这可是我们太阳系的年龄啊。
foreignization: 贫化铀弹是由低放射性核废料材料制成的，这种材料是从制造核燃料和武器过程中剩余下来的。它的密度是铅的1.7倍，可以轻易地穿透装甲。但由于它留下了一条半衰期为45亿年的污染痕迹——相当于我们太阳系的年龄——因此存在争议。

source: The real-life model for Felix is his brother Danny Simon , his writing partner during the golden age of TV comedy , who hatched the idea for the play while living with a sub-sanitary sportswriter . But it was the Simon boys ' mother , Mamie , who was organizer of the rowdy Oscar-style poker parties in their New York apartment , charging admission to help support the family when father Irving disappeared for months at a time .

source: Among the available stereo versions , tread carefully . Herbert von Karajan 's 1965 Scala coupling ( Deutsche Grammophon 419 257-2 ) , while somewhat overrefined , is beautifully played and well enough sung . London 's 1960 recordings ( 421 870-2 ) offer slightly stodgy but idiomatic performances with forceful singing by Mario del Monaco and Cornell MacNeil , plus capable colleagues . London 's presentable 1967 " Pagliacci " ( uncut ) with James McCracken , Pilar Lorengar , Robert Merrill ( now Tonio ) and Tom Krause has been reissued by Innovative Music Productions ( IMPX 9017 ) .
domestication: 在现有的立体声版本中，要慎重选择。赫伯特·冯·卡拉扬1965年的斯卡拉配乐（德意志留声机419 257-2）虽然略显精致过度，但演奏非常出色，演唱也相当不错。伦敦1960年的录音（421 870-2）虽然有些沉闷，但表演地道，马里奥·德尔·莫纳科和科尔内尔·麦克尼尔的演唱充满力量，同事们的演出也很到位。伦敦1967年的《丑角》（未删节版），詹姆斯·麦考雷、皮拉尔·洛伦加、罗伯特·梅里尔（现扮演托尼奥）和汤姆·克劳斯的表演都可圈可点，这张唱片已由创新音乐制作公司（IMPX 9017）重新发行。

source: Analysts say the figure , while still probably the best single gauge of the overall pulse of the economy , no longer accurately reflects the changing dynamics of an increasingly service-oriented society . Its conceptual deficiencies , they say , are grounded in the statistic 's roots as a World War II-era tool for judging military-industrial potential .
domestication: 分析师说，这个数字虽然仍然是衡量经济总体状况的最佳单一指标，但已不能准确反映日益服务化的社会的动态变化。他们认为，这个指标的概念缺陷源自其二战时期的背景，当时它主要是用来评估军事工业潜力的。
foreignization: 分析师表示，这一数字虽然仍然是衡量经济整体脉搏的最佳单一指标，但已不再准确反映日益服务导向型社会的变化动态。他们说，其概念上的缺陷源于该统计数据作为二战时期评估军事工业潜力的工具的背景。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Analysts say the figure , while still probably the best single gauge of the overall pulse of the economy , no longer accurately reflects the changing dynamics of an increasingly service-oriented society . Its conceptual deficiencies , they say , are grounded in the statistic 's roots as a World War II-era tool for judging military-industrial potential .

source: Georgia judges rarely order drunk drivers into alcohol treatment programs . An analysis of the 752 sentences given to Georgia 's worst drunk drivers showed that judges mandated some form of treatment for alcoholism only 13 times , even when the defendants ' records had grown to 15 or more convictions .
domestication: 在佐治亚州，法官很少会命令酒驾者参加酒精治疗项目。有人分析了752名最严重的酒驾者的判决，发现即使被告的酒驾记录累积到15次或更多，法官也只在13次判决中要求他们接受某种形式的酒精治疗。这真是让人不解，酒驾害人又害己，怎么就不能狠下心来治一治呢？
foreignization: 乔治亚州的法官很少命令酒驾者参加酒精治疗计划。对乔治亚州最严重的752名酒驾者所判处的刑罚进行分析后发现，即使被告的记录已累积到15次或更多次定罪，法官也仅13次要求其接受某种形式的酗酒治疗。

source: Two miles north of New Salem , the village of Petersburg was surveyed by Lincoln in 1836 . Oakland Cemetery , on the southwest edge of Petersburg , contains the grave of Ann Rutledge , Lincoln 's legendary sweetheart . Her tombstone bears an inscription by Spoon River Anthology poet Edgar Lee Masters , who is buried nearby .
domestication: 新塞勒姆以北两里地的地方，有个叫彼得斯堡的村子，是林肯在1836年规划的。彼得斯堡西南角的奥克兰公墓里，安葬着林肯的传奇恋人安·鲁特奇。她的墓碑上刻着《汤匙河诗集》作者埃德加·李·马斯特斯的诗句，而这位诗人就埋在附近。

source: TMZ obtained video of the incident , which shows Hunt being restrained by a security guard as a crowd is gathered around . TMZ reports these are the moments following the alleged fight , in which a 37-year-old man says he had to be hospitalized with a broken rib and broken nose . He filed a police report , but cops reportedly said the victim eventually stopped cooperating . No charges were filed .

source: Today , there are nearly 100 regional airlines operating small turboprops and jets to connect smaller cities with larger cities and airline hubs . The regionals carried 85 million people last year , 50% more than in 1995 and double 1990 's number . Before the strike , Comair was carrying 25,000 passengers daily between 95 cities in the USA , Mexico , Canada and the Bahamas .
domestication: 如今，差不多有100家地区航空公司运营着小型涡轮螺旋桨飞机和喷气式飞机，连接小城市与大城市和航空枢纽。去年，这些地区航空公司运送了8500万乘客，比1995年多了50%，是1990年的两倍。罢工前，康迈尔航空每天在95个城市之间运送25000名乘客，这些城市遍布美国、墨西哥、加拿大和巴哈马。

source: The saving data collected by the government are really meant to answer other questions , and the most widely used savings measures do not include capital gains . Without capital gains , notes Brookings Institution economist William G. Gale , savings rates are at the lowest since the Depression ; if capital gains are included , wealth accumulation is at its highest level in 50 years .
domestication: 政府收集的储蓄数据其实是为了回答其他问题，常用的储蓄指标也不包括资本利得。布鲁金斯学会经济学家威廉·G·盖尔指出，如果不算资本利得，现在的储蓄率是大萧条以来最低的；但如果算上资本利得，财富积累达到了近50年来的最高水平。
