source: If peace efforts faltered , radicals in both camps would be strengthened . Israel would cling to occupied lands more tightly than ever , extending Jewish settlements to anchor legal or religious claims . Irredentism among Palestinians , Syrians , and Palestinians would grow . Across the Arab world the unresolved Palestinian issue would nourish political , and especially Muslim , extremism .

source: Saturday 's Iowa Athletic Conference tournament championship had all that as Nebraska Wesleyan rallied from an 18-point deficit with 11 minutes to go to beat Central 82-78 . The win guarantees the Prairie Wolves ( 24-3 ) a spot in the Division III NCAA tournament . The 64-team field will be announced at 11:30 a.m . Monday .

source: Maryland and Wisconsin are the latest states to require welfare recipients to work . On Monday , the Clinton administration approved the two states ' new welfare plans . The administration has now approved 36 state welfare programs . In addition to requiring work , Maryland will no longer increase a family 's cash benefits for children conceived while parents are on welfare . Wisconsin will also require applicants to talk to a financial planner about alternatives to welfare .
domestication: 马里兰和威斯康星州成了最新要求福利领取者必须工作的两个州。这周一，克林顿政府批准了这两个州的新福利计划。到现在为止，政府已经批准了36个州的福利项目。除了要求工作之外，马里兰还规定，如果孩子是在父母领取福利期间怀上的，家庭的现金福利将不再增加。威斯康星则要求申请者得跟财务规划师谈谈，看看有没有不用依赖福利的其他出路。

source: Here is how internship ends . With the dawning of July 1 , a date of ultimate significance only inside a teaching hospital , the three interns , as if chameleons , automatically changed identities : They officially became PGY-II 's ( postgraduate year 2 ) , entrusted with supervising the latest batch of interns , lording over the people they were only yesterday .
domestication: 实习生涯就这么结束了。7月1日这天，对教学医院来说是个大日子，三个实习生好像变色龙一样，身份一下子变了：他们正式成为PGY-II（住院医师第二年），担起了监督新一批实习生的责任，昨天的他们今天就成了上级。
foreignization: 这是实习期的结束方式。随着7月1日的到来，这个在教学医院内具有终极意义的日子，三位实习生仿佛变色龙一般，自动改变了身份：他们正式成为了PGY-II（第二年住院医师），被赋予监督最新一批实习生的职责，统治着昨天还是他们自己的那些人。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Here is how internship ends . source: Bolen traced the " Ring " divinities and their psychological significance through the story . Along the way she made connections with their Greek equivalents . Wotan and Zeus are dominant males with wives ( Fricka and Hera ) and " archetypal father 's daughters " ( Bruennhilde and Athena ) and helpers ( Loge and Hermes ) .

source: Kerry Wood , who signed a one-year , $1.75 million deal to stay with the club and attempt a comeback in the bullpen , eventually pulled it off and looked strong the final two months . The questions now are whether he wants to start again ( he 'll have to do it elsewhere ) , how much the Cubs are willing to commit in years and dollars to keep him , how much he is willing to accept and , most intriguing , does he or anyone else envision him in a closer role ?

foreignization: 凯里·伍德，签署了一份为期一年、价值175万美元的合同以留在球队并尝试在牛棚中复出，最终实现了这一目标，并在最后两个月表现出色。现在的问题是，他是否想要再次成为先发投手（他必须在其他地方做到这一点），小熊队愿意在多年和金额上投入多少来留住他，他愿意接受多少，以及最引人关注的是，他或任何人是否能设想他在终结者角色中的表现？

source: Illinois officials cite a more sinister explanation for rate increases triggered by last year 's wholesale auction . In a complaint to the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission , state Attorney General Lisa Madigan accused 15 wholesale suppliers of manipulating prices . One way that could have happened , the complaint says , is by prospective bidders withdrawing from the auction to drive up prices in exchange for winning bidders agreeing to buy their power in separate contracts .
domestication: 伊利诺伊州的官员对去年批发拍卖引发的费率上涨给出了一个更加阴暗的解释。州总检察长丽莎·马迪根向联邦能源管理委员会提交了一份投诉，指责15家批发供应商操纵价格。投诉中提到，可能的一种手法是，潜在竞标者退出拍卖，以换取中标者同意在单独的合同中购买他们的电力，从而推高价格。这招真是够狠的，背后交易让电价飙升，老百姓只能买单。
foreignization: 伊利诺伊州官员对去年批发拍卖引发的费率上涨提出了更为险恶的解释。在向联邦能源监管委员会提交的投诉中，州总检察长丽莎·马迪根指控15家批发供应商操纵价格。投诉称，其中一种可能的方式是潜在投标人在拍卖中退出，以换取中标者同意在单独的合同中购买他们的电力，从而推高价格。

source: In May , women showed they had the power to propel Mohammad Khatami into the presidency . But he might not have enough power to deliver the changes they seek . So Iranian women wait and hope . They face lives filled with contradictions , like the kind a 37-year-old secretary named Golrokh recently described , with tears in her eyes , outside a Tehran sandwich shop . In her child custody case , court documents recited the religious maxim , " Heaven belongs to the mothers . "
domestication: 五月里，女性展现了她们有能力把穆罕默德·哈塔米送入总统宝座。但他未必有足够的力量带来她们渴望的变革。所以伊朗的女性们只能等着，盼着。她们的生活充满了矛盾，就像37岁的秘书戈尔罗赫最近在德黑兰一家三明治店外含泪讲述的那样。在她的孩子监护权官司中，法院文件上写着一句宗教格言：“天堂属于母亲。”
foreignization: 在五月，女性展示了她们有能力将穆罕默德·哈塔米推上总统宝座。但他可能没有足够的权力来实现她们所寻求的变革。因此，伊朗女性等待并抱有希望。她们面对着充满矛盾的生活，就像一位名叫戈尔罗赫的37岁秘书最近在德黑兰一家三明治店外含泪描述的那样。在她的子女监护权案件中，法院文件引用了一条宗教格言：“天堂属于母亲们。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In May , women showed they had the power to propel Mohammad Khatami into the presidency . But he might not have enough power to deliver the changes they seek . So Iranian women wait and hope . They face lives filled with contradictions , like the kind a 37-year-old secretary named Golrokh recently described , with tears in her eyes , outside a Tehran sandwich shop . In her child custody case , court documents recited the religious maxim , " Heaven belongs to the mothers . "
五月里，女性展现了她们有能力把穆罕默德·哈塔米送入总统宝座。但他未必有足够的力量带来她们渴望的变革。所以伊朗的女性们只能等着，盼着。她们的生活充满了矛盾，就像37岁的秘书戈尔罗赫最近在德黑兰一家三明治店外含泪讲述的那样。在她的孩子监护权官司中，法院文件上写着一句宗教格言：“天堂属于母亲。”

In May , women showed they had the power to propel Mohammad Khatami into the presidency . But he might not have enough power to deliver the changes they seek . So Iranian women wait and hope . In her child custody case , court documents recited the religious maxim , " Heaven belongs to the mothers . "
在五月，女性展示了她们有能力将穆罕默德·哈塔米推上总统宝座。但他可能没有足够的权力来实现她们所寻求的变革。因此，伊朗女性等待并抱有希望。她们面对着充满矛盾的生活，就像一位名叫戈尔罗赫的37岁秘书最近在德黑兰一家三明治店外含泪描述的那样。在她的子女监护权案件中，法院文件引用了一条宗教格言：“天堂属于母亲们。”

source: The world 's population in the future depends on the ability of girls and women to have access to education , employment opportunities , reproductive rights and voluntary motherhood . The primary barriers to these rights are those of any age , including Mr. Hayes , who might impregnate any woman . Until we acknowledge that reproduction involves two sexes , as well as the systematic exploitation of women ( keeping the vast majority of us poor and imprisoned by our different societies ' low opinion of our sex , which includes the notion that our worth is our womb ) , we can not seriously address questions of planetary overpopulation .
domestication: 未来世界的人口状况取决于女孩和妇女能否接受教育、获得就业机会、享有生育权利和自愿成为母亲。阻碍这些权利的不仅包括像海耶斯先生这样可能使女性怀孕的人，还有社会对女性的系统性剥削。这种剥削让大多数女性陷入贫困，被不同社会的低人一等观念所束缚，认为女性的价值在于她们的子宫。若不正视生育涉及两性，不解决对女性的系统性压迫问题，我们就无法认真对待地球人口过剩的问题。
foreignization: 世界未来的人口取决于女孩和妇女能否获得教育、就业机会、生殖权利和自愿为人母的权利。这些权利的主要障碍包括任何年龄的人，包括海耶斯先生，他们可能会使任何女性怀孕。在我们承认繁殖涉及两性，以及系统性剥削女性（使我们中的绝大多数人贫困，并被不同社会对我们性别的低评价所囚禁，这包括认为我们的价值在于我们的子宫的观念）之前，我们无法认真对待地球人口过剩的问题。

source: It appears that the man charged in connection with the murders of three teenage boys in Hammond , Ind. , is a convicted murderer out on parole . The murder conviction is for the murder of a 15-year-old boy . Someone has to explain to me how a convicted murderer -- let alone a convicted murderer of a child -- gets out on parole .
domestication: 看来，因涉嫌在印第安纳州哈蒙德谋杀三名青少年而被捕的男子，竟是一名正在假释中的杀人犯。他之前被判罪的杀人案中，受害者是一名15岁的少年。真得有人给我解释一下，一个杀人犯，尤其是杀害了孩子的杀人犯，怎么就能被放出来假释了？这事儿实在让人想不通。
foreignization: 看起来，因涉嫌在印第安纳州哈蒙德杀害三名青少年而被起诉的男子是一名正在假释中的已定罪杀人犯。他的谋杀罪定罪是因为杀害了一名15岁的男孩。有人得给我解释一下，一名已定罪的杀人犯——更不用说是一名杀害儿童的已定罪杀人犯——是如何获得假释的。

source: The Government itself has long recognized that the statistic is flawed . Starting with the newest figures for the third quarter , which were scheduled to be released today and now will be available as soon as the partial Government shutdown ends , the Commerce Department will switch primary emphasis to a calculation method known as the chain-weighted system from the traditional fixed-weight system . The new method , which has been used as a backup measure for several years , will lead to calculations showing a slower pace of economic growth .
domestication: 政府早就意识到这个统计数据有问题。原定今天公布的第三季度最新数据，现在要等到部分政府停摆结束后才能发布了。商务部将把主要精力转向一种新的计算方法——链式权重法，而不再使用传统的固定权重法。这种方法其实已经作为备选手段用了好几年了，新方法会让经济增长显得更慢一些。
foreignization: 政府本身早就认识到这一统计数据存在缺陷。从最新的第三季度数据开始，这些数据原定于今天发布，现在将在部分政府停摆结束后尽快提供，商务部将把主要重点从传统的固定权重系统转向称为链式权重系统的计算方法。这种新的方法作为备用措施已经使用了几年，将导致显示经济增长速度放缓的计算结果。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The Government itself has long recognized that the statistic is flawed . Starting with the newest figures for the third quarter , which were scheduled to be released today and now will be available as soon as the partial Government shutdown ends , the Commerce Department will switch primary emphasis to a calculation method known as the chain-weighted system from the traditional fixed-weight system . The new method , which has been used as a backup measure for several years , will lead to calculations showing a slower pace of economic growth .

source: Managers Larry Auriana and Hans Utsch do n't come cheap : Kaufmann 's 2.17% expense ratio is high even by the fund industry 's lofty standards . But Kaufmann is the top small-company growth fund the past 10 years . Now , the fund has about 15% of its assets in money market securities , or cash . And the managers are looking for " fallen angels " -- growth stocks that have seen their share prices tumble .
domestication: 基金经理拉里·奥里亚纳和汉斯·乌施可不是便宜货：考夫曼基金的管理费高达2.17%，即使在基金行业这个高收费领域也算是个头。但考夫曼基金过去十年一直是小型成长股的领头羊。如今，该基金大约15%的资产放在了货币市场证券，也就是现金里。基金经理们正在寻找“落难天使”——那些股价大跌的成长股。

source: " The experience of the Cold War suggested that deterrence works , " said Andrew Bacevich , a professor of history and international relations at Boston University . "

source: As a result , the burden of the retiring baby boom generation , which will hit in earnest in about 10 years , will weigh upon working , taxpaying Europeans far more than their American counterparts . In the United States , there will be one person older than 65 for every three of working age in 2030 , according to International Monetary Fund estimates . In Italy and Germany , by contrast , the ratio will be one to two .
domestication: 因此，婴儿潮一代退休带来的负担将在大约10年后真正压到欧洲工作者和纳税人的肩上，远比美国同行要沉重得多。根据国际货币基金组织的估计，到2030年，美国每三个劳动年龄人口将对应一个65岁以上的老人。而在意大利和德国，这个比例则是两个劳动年龄人口对应一个老人。
foreignization: 因此，婴儿潮一代即将在大约10年后退休所带来的负担，将比美国同行更沉重地压在工作和纳税的欧洲人身上。根据国际货币基金组织的估计，到2030年，美国每三个工作年龄的人将对应一个65岁以上的人。相比之下，在意大利和德国，这一比例将是二比一。

As a result , the burden of the retiring baby boom generation , which will hit in earnest in about 10 years , will weigh upon working , taxpaying Europeans far more than their American counterparts . In the United States , there will be one person older than 65 for every three of working age in 2030 , according to International Monetary Fund estimates . In Italy and Germany , by contrast , the ratio will be one to two .
因此，婴儿潮一代退休带来的负担将在大约10年后真正压到欧洲工作者和纳税人的肩上，远比美国同行要沉重得多。根据国际货币基金组织的估计，到2030年，美国每三个劳动年龄人口将对应一个65岁以上的老人。而在意大利和德国，这个比例则是两个劳动年龄人口对应一个老人。

In Italy and Germany , by contrast , the ratio will be one to two .

source: On the small screen , shows such as CBS The Big Bang Theory and CSI : Crime Scene Investigation are undoing the legacy of Star Trek 's pointy-eared Mr. Spock by making scientists look almost cool , says media scholar David Kirby of the United Kingdom 's University of Manchester . " We are in a golden age of science on television , " he says .

source: 8th District : Arkansas , southern Illinois , southern Indiana , western Kentucky , northern Mississippi , eastern Missouri , western Tennessee . The region 's economy " expanded modestly . " Half of the retailers contacted said sales were up from a year ago while 42% reported decreases . Strong sellers included lawn and garden items and men 's clothing ; home decor and furniture were not selling as well . Manufacturing activity was mixed . Firms in the oil field machinery , food , packaging and chemical manufacturing industries announced plans to open new facilities or expand existing plants . Firms in the electrical equipment , toys and games and textile-manufacturing industries , however , announced plans to lay off workers and close factories . Year-to-date home sales were up in Louisville and Little Rock , but were down in St. Louis and Memphis .
domestication: 第八区：阿肯色州、伊利诺伊州南部、印第安纳州南部、肯塔基州西部、密西西比州北部、密苏里州东部、田纳西州西部。这一地区的经济“温和增长”。联系的零售商中，有一半表示销售额比去年同期有所增长，而42%的零售商则报告了销售额下降。畅销产品包括园艺用品和男装；家居装饰和家具的销售情况则不太理想。制造业活动参差不齐。油田机械、食品、包装和化工行业的企业宣布将开设新工厂或扩大现有工厂。然而，电气设备、玩具和游戏以及纺织制造行业的企业却计划裁员并关闭工厂。到目前为止，路易斯维尔和小石城的房屋销售量有所增加，但圣路易斯和孟菲斯的销售量却出现了下滑。

source: In the state-of-the-art baseball stadium 's most exclusive section , behind home plate , there were the George Bushes -- a former president and a president to be -- along with the younger Mr. Bush 's running mate , Dick Cheney , and his successor as governor , Rick Perry . Nearby was Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison , whose husband , Ray , is a lawyer with Enron 's chief law firm , Vinson &; Elkins . And then came the executives of Houston 's biggest companies , who had vied to become the younger Bush 's most prominent fund-raisers , just as they had jockeyed to buy the prized luxury seats .
domestication: 在最先进的棒球场最尊贵的区域，就在本垒后方，坐着老布什和小布什，一位是前总统，另一位则是候任总统。与他们同行的还有小布什的竞选搭档迪克·切尼，以及接替他担任州长的里克·佩里。不远处，还有参议员凯·贝莉·哈奇森，她的丈夫雷是一名律师，效力于安隆公司的首席律师事务所——文森与艾金斯。此外，休斯顿各大公司的高管们也齐聚一堂，他们争相成为小布什最重要的筹款人，就像之前争夺这些珍贵的豪华座位一样。

source: After she had returned from the recent global climate summit in Japan , Ebtekar sat in her office in a pinstriped version of the tent-like chador robe -- similar to a nun 's habit -- common for women here . She called her appointment another step in a pattern of progress for Iranian women , not a " superficial " change . But she continues to seek more change , speaking out for improvements in the divorce and custody laws and " women 's rights in the role of the family , to preserve her dignity . "
domestication: 艾卜泰卡尔从日本的全球气候峰会归来后，坐在她的办公室里，身着条纹版的帐篷式长袍，这长袍和修女的服饰有些相似，在这里很常见。她说，自己的任命是伊朗女性进步的又一步，不是什么“表面功夫”。但她还在追求更多的改变，为改善离婚和抚养权法律发声，争取“女性在家庭中的权利，以维护她们的尊严”。
foreignization: 在从日本最近的全球气候峰会回来之后，埃卜泰卡尔坐在她办公室里，穿着条纹版本的帐篷状查多尔长袍——类似于这里女性常见的修女的服饰。她称自己的任命是伊朗女性进步模式的又一步，而不是“表面的”变化。但她仍在寻求更多的改变，为改善离婚和监护权法律以及“女性在家庭角色中的权利，以维护她的尊严”发声。

After she had returned from the recent global climate summit in Japan , Ebtekar sat in her office in a pinstriped version of the tent-like chador robe -- similar to a nun 's habit -- common for women here . She called her appointment another step in a pattern of progress for Iranian women , not a " superficial " change . But she continues to seek more change , speaking out for improvements in the divorce and custody laws and " women 's rights in the role of the family , to preserve her dignity . "

source: " " Even then , " her mom remembered , " " she was so levelheaded , so composed . source: When California 's Central Valley was hit by a freeze last winter that cost $ 500 million in damage to crops and left thousands of agricultural workers jobless , FEMA was a major source of emergency assistance , particularly for unemployed families who could not afford housing . source: She thought of it as " graduating . " Her little-girl legs were too short at first to get up onto the tractor-drawn tobacco-planting machine , known as a " setter , " so her dad made her the " pigtail . " She walked behind the tractor with an armful of tobacco plants , filling in the gaps on " Daddy 's farm " whenever the grown-ups on the setter left too much space between plantings .
domestication: 她把这个过程称为“毕业”。小时候，她的腿太短，上不了拖拉机后面的那个烟草种植机，这机器大伙儿叫它“定植器”。于是她爸就让她当起了“小辫子”。她跟在拖拉机后面，抱着一捆烟草苗，随时填补“爸爸的地”里那些大人操作定植器时留下的空隙。
foreignization: 她把它称为“毕业”。她的小女孩的腿太短，一开始无法爬到烟草种植机上，这种机器被称为“定位器”，所以她爸爸让她当“小辫子”。她跟在拖拉机后面，手里抱着烟苗，在“爸爸的农场”上填补空缺，每当定位器上的大人在种植时留下的间距过大时。

" Her little-girl legs were too short at first to get up onto the tractor-drawn tobacco-planting machine , known as a " setter , " so her dad made her the " pigtail . " She walked behind the tractor with an armful of tobacco plants , filling in the gaps on " Daddy 's farm " whenever the grown-ups on the setter left too much space between plantings .
她把这个过程称为“毕业”。小时候，她的腿太短，上不了拖拉机后面的那个烟草种植机，这机器大伙儿叫它“定植器”。于是她爸就让她当起了“小辫子”。她跟在拖拉机后面，抱着一捆烟草苗，随时填补“爸爸的地”里那些大人操作定植器时留下的空隙。

她把它称为“毕业”。她的小女孩的腿太短，一开始无法爬到烟草种植机上，这种机器被称为“定位器”，所以她爸爸让她当“小辫子”。她跟在拖拉机后面，手里抱着烟苗，在“爸爸的农场”上填补空缺，每当定位器上的大人在种植时留下的间距过大时。

source: Americans may be inured to celebrity sex tapes and former teen queens flashing the paparazzi , but when it comes to sex and political figures , our tripwires are as touchy as they were 30 years ago , in the day of Rep. Wilbur Mills and his stripper paramour , Fanne " The Argentine Firecracker " Foxe . We not only expect lurid details , we demand professional ruin . Even perfectly legal erotic intrigues , a la Jack Ryan -- the Illinois Republican who abandoned his 2004 Senate campaign after divorce papers filed by his wife , actress Jeri Ryan , alleged that he had pressured her to accompany him to sex clubs -- can torpedo a political career .
domestication: 美国人可能对名人艳照和昔日童星对着狗仔队大秀性感已经习以为常，但一提到政客和性丑闻，我们的神经还跟30年前一样敏感，就像当年的众议员威尔伯·米尔斯和他的情妇、“阿根廷火药桶”范妮·福克斯那样。我们不仅期待着那些耸人听闻的细节，还要求他们事业尽毁。哪怕是完全合法的情事，比如伊利诺伊州共和党人杰克·瑞安的例子——他在2004年的参议员竞选中，因前妻、女演员杰丽·瑞安在离婚文件中声称他强迫她陪他去色情俱乐部，而退出了竞选——这样的事情也足以断送政治生涯。

source: First and foremost , kanai means ' calm of the sea . ' Second , ohana hanai is the correct term for adoptive family . And , third , hanai is a very serious and controversial practice , used by Hawai'ians for thousands of years , of giving away one 's children to relatives or friends with no legalities involved . It is offensive that the term has been used in such a cavalier manner to perpetuate a continued and blatant cultural misunderstanding of the Hawai'ian people .
domestication: 首先，kanai 意思是“海的平静”。其次，ohana hanai 才是收养家庭的正确说法。再者，hanai 是夏威夷人传承了几千年的习俗，把孩子送给亲戚或朋友抚养，不涉及任何法律手续，这事儿非常严肃，也有争议。用这个词这么随意，简直就是在继续和明显地误解夏威夷人的文化，太不尊重人了。
foreignization: 首先，kanai 意思是“大海的平静”。其次，ohana hanai 是收养家庭的正确术语。第三，hanai 是一种非常严肃且有争议的做法，夏威夷人已经使用了数千年，将孩子送给亲戚或朋友，而不涉及任何法律程序。将该术语以如此轻率的方式使用，以延续并明显误解夏威夷人民的文化，这是令人反感的。

source: Duluth 's public courses also have been hurt by increased competition . Since 1984 , six new publicly accessible courses have opened within 30 miles of Duluth , thinning the pool of golfers in what 's already a short season -- five or six months at most . source: Within the Army , many of the officers commissioned through Reserve Officers Training Corps ( ROTC ) have long suspected that the 25 percent or so of the officer corps that consists of West Point graduates is a self-preservation society . West Point leaders deny that this is the case and say they have studies that show West Point grads do n't treat each other more softly on evaluation reports .
domestication: 在军中，很多通过后备军官训练团（ROTC）成为军官的人长期以来一直怀疑，占军官总数约四分之一的西点军校毕业生形成了一个“抱团取暖”的小圈子。西点军校的领导对此予以否认，并表示有研究证明，西点毕业生在评估报告中对彼此并不会手下留情。

source: Last week , as it has every four years since 1980 , the US government handed down a new set of dietary guidelines . Primary purpose : to provide a foundation for federal nutrition programs . They also are meant to nudge foodmakers toward providing choices deemed healthier , and - amid what is often called an obesity " epidemic " - to encourage Americans to pay more attention to the role of food and exercise in their lives .

source: While the vegetables are cooking , add about 3 tablespoons oil to a large skillet , enough to coat the bottom of the pan generously , and heat over medium-high heat . Add some of the diced pork , taking care not to crowd the meat in the pan . Saute the meat until it is no longer pink in the middle . Transfer the meat to a large platter lined with paper towels to drain . Continue cooking the remaining pork in batches , adding additional oil as needed .

source: A. There may well be a generational/historical thing going on where a ... generation of girls/women come through the process and end up with one foot in each world . They retain the best of feminine culture and add on assertiveness in the workplace and become particularly successful . The question is whether the generation coming up is sort of losing track of the feminist foothold and looking more like men in terms of aggression .
domestication: 可能真有一种代际或历史上的变化在发生，就是说有一代女孩或女性经历了某个过程后，一只脚站在传统世界里，另一只脚跨进了新世界。她们保留了女性文化的精华，又在职场上增添了自信和果敢，因此特别成功。问题是，现在这一代年轻人是不是在某种程度上丢掉了女性主义的根基，变得更像男人那样具有攻击性了。
foreignization: A. 可能存在一种代际/历史上的现象，其中一代女性经历了这一过程后，最终一只脚站在两个世界中。她们保留了女性文化的最佳部分，并在职场上增加了自信，从而变得特别成功。问题是，新一代是否正在逐渐失去女权主义的立足点，而在侵略性方面更像男性。

source: Some of the lawns have not been mowed for three months . Weeds and grass are more than waist high . No lawn work has been done since they moved in . Not even leaves from the past fall have been raked . Weeds have been allowed to thrive curbside on a curve , blocking the view of drivers until they have to swerve into an oncoming vehicle to avoid missing a woman and toddler and infant in a carriage . Dogs are not kept in fenced yards or on leashes . Everything from pit bulls to mutts roam free , and at times they chase children and adults .
domestication: 有的草坪已经有三个月没修剪了，杂草都长到腰那么高了。他们搬进来后，连院子都没打理过，连去年的落叶都没扫过。路边拐角处的杂草长得特别茂盛，挡住了司机的视线，司机为了避免撞到推着婴儿车的女人和小孩，不得不往对面车道上躲。家里的狗也不圈在院子里，也不拴绳子，从比特犬到流浪狗，到处乱跑，有时还会追小孩子和大人。
foreignization: 一些草坪已经有三个月没有修剪了。杂草和草比腰还高。自他们搬进来后，就没有做过任何草坪维护工作。甚至去年秋天的树叶都没有被清扫过。杂草在路边的弯道上肆意生长，阻挡了司机的视线，直到他们不得不急转向迎面而来的车辆以避免撞到一个推着婴儿车的女人和小孩。狗没有被关在围栏里或牵着链子。从比特犬到各种混种狗都在自由游荡，有时它们会追逐儿童和成人。

source: In a study that examines the changing nature of jobs as well as their economic value , economists at the University of Michigan Institute for Social Research have found that pay has risen by about 22 percent across the current generation of men and women ages 30 to 55 compared to their parents . This is in large part thanks to women entering the workforce in droves compared to their mothers , and landing in the well-paid fields of science , technology , engineering and math , or STEM . Wochit
domestication: 密歇根大学社会研究所的经济学家们在一项研究中发现，如今30到55岁的这代男女相比他们父母那一代，工资水平大约提高了22%。这个变化很大程度上得益于女性大量进入职场，而且她们纷纷投身科学、技术、工程和数学这些高薪领域。真是时移世易，以前的女性大多待在家里，现在的女性可是撑起了半边天。
foreignization: 在一项研究中，密歇根大学社会研究所的经济学家们考察了工作的性质及其经济价值的变化，发现与他们的父母相比，目前这一代30至55岁的男女的工资上涨了约22%。这在很大程度上要归功于女性比她们的母亲更大量地进入劳动力市场，并且进入了科学、技术、工程和数学（STEM）等高薪领域。Wochit

source: Nextel considering foreign expansion New York -- Nextel Communications Inc. , a U.S. provider of mobile telephone service , is considering expansion in Chile , Uruguay and Indonesia , Chief Executive Timothy Donahue said at a Merrill Lynch &; Co. conference . Outside of North America , the Reston , Va. -based company operates in Brazil , Peru , Argentina , Japan , China and the Philippines .
domestication: 纽约消息——美国移动电话服务提供商Nextel通信公司正在考虑在智利、乌拉圭和印尼扩张业务。这一消息是在美林公司的一次会议上，Nextel的首席执行官蒂莫西·多纳休透露的。除了北美市场，这家总部位于弗吉尼亚州雷斯顿的公司还在巴西、秘鲁、阿根廷、日本、中国和菲律宾开展业务。

source: For Samantha Lucas , the long road began when she was a high school junior . Like other teens expecting babies , she was saddened by her friends ' lack of support . " You say ' pregnant ' when you 're 17 and they gasp , " says Mrs. Lucas , of Easley , S.C . " It 's like you tell someone there 's a fire . After that first second of shock , they 're gone . "
domestication: 对萨曼莎·卢卡斯来说，这条路从她高中的时候就开始了。和别的怀上宝宝的少女一样，她也因为朋友们的不支持而感到难过。“你十七岁说怀孕了，他们就像被雷劈了一样，”来自南卡罗来纳州伊斯利的卢卡斯太太说，“就像告诉人家着火了一样，惊呼一声之后，人就散了。”
foreignization: 对于萨曼莎·卢卡斯来说，漫长的道路始于她高中的三年级。像其他期待宝宝的青少年一样，她为朋友们的缺乏支持而感到悲伤。“当你17岁的时候说‘怀孕了’，他们会倒抽一口气，”来自南卡罗来纳州伊斯利的卢卡斯夫人说。“就像你告诉某人有火灾一样。在最初的震惊之后，他们就走了。”

source: AT FIRST glance , the actor and the role seem poles apart . On the one hand is Gerard Depardieu , a burly French film star who frequently plays lusty slobs . On the other hand is Cyrano de Bergerac , one of literature 's great poetic figures -- a 17th century romantic with a nose the size of a flatbed truck .

source: The casting seems bizarre , but it works remarkably well in " Cyrano de Bergerac , " a lavish film that opens Wednesday at the Bridge Theater . A huge hit in France , where it opened last March , " Cyrano " won two awards at this year 's Cannes Film Festival -- one for Pierre Lhomme 's cinematography , the other for Depardieu 's surprisingly delicate performance .
domestication: 选角看起来很怪，但在《大鼻子情圣》这部华丽的电影里却出奇地合适，该片将于周三在布里奇剧院上映。这部电影在法国大获成功，去年三月上映时就受到了观众的热烈欢迎，《大鼻子情圣》在今年的戛纳电影节上还拿下了两个奖项——一个颁给了皮埃尔·洛姆的摄影，另一个则是德帕迪约出人意料地细腻表演。

source: Because arena seating brings the audience close and raises many viewers above stage level , the floor of the theater is important . A new floor is laid for each show . In scenes where 120 chorus members are on stage , the soloists must be elevated so that the audience in the orchestra seats can see them . Scenic pieces that are more than waist-high must be transparent or someone in the arena will not be able to see part of the action . This can be difficult , as in one scene of " Don Carlo " where three soloists
domestication: 因为剧场的座位让观众靠近舞台，并且许多观众的位置比舞台高，所以剧场的地面很重要。每场演出都会铺设新的地板。在有120位合唱团成员上台的场景中，独唱演员必须被抬高，这样坐在前排的观众才能看到他们。超过腰部高度的布景必须是透明的，否则就会有人看不到部分表演。这可不容易，比如《唐·卡洛》中有一幕就有三位独唱演员。

source: His lack of momentum is strikingly similar to a year ago when he arrived at Pinehurst ( N.C. ) No. 2 beaten down by several missed cuts . He has missed three in a row as a non-member on the PGA Tour , where his scoring average for five tournaments is 73.2 -- which would be third from last among Tour members . He also missed the cut in his last event on the European Tour , where he 's averaging 71.36 strokes , tied for 36th . Putting is the major culprit .
domestication: 他现在的状态和一年前如出一辙，当时他在松树丛（北卡罗来纳州）第二场赛事前，因为几次未能晋级而士气低落。现在，他又连续三次在PGA巡回赛上未能晋级，而且他作为非会员参加了五场比赛，平均成绩仅为73.2杆，如果是在会员中排名，几乎垫底。他在欧洲巡回赛上的表现也不理想，最近一场赛事同样未能晋级，平均成绩71.36杆，排在第36位。问题主要出在推杆上。
foreignization: 他缺乏动力的情况与一年前惊人地相似，当时他在松树丛（北卡罗来纳州）第二号球场参赛时，因多次未能晋级而备受打击。他在PGA巡回赛中以非会员身份连续三次未能晋级，五场比赛的平均成绩为73.2杆——这在巡回赛成员中将排在倒数第三。他在欧洲巡回赛的最后一场比赛中也未能晋级，目前的平均杆数为71.36杆，排名并列第36位。推杆是主要问题。

source: Binding the crabmeat in the Shaw 's recipe is will power with a nudgling of binders . It meets Rob 's prime conditions . With just enough mayonnaise and a dusting of cracker meal to set the bond , the svelte , large cheeks of unbroken meat barely cling to each other . Breathe as you flip the cake , and it splats , but it 's oh so worth the risk .
domestication: 按照肖家的食谱，蟹肉饼的秘诀在于意志力和一点点黏合剂。这正中罗布的下怀。只需足够的蛋黄酱和一层薄薄的碎饼干屑来固定，那些大块完整的蟹肉才勉强粘在一起。翻面时得屏住呼吸，一不小心就会散架，但风险再大也值了。
foreignization: 在肖的食谱中，蟹肉是用一点粘合剂和意志力结合在一起的。它满足了罗布的主要条件。只需足够的蛋黄酱和一层碎饼干屑来固定粘合，那些完整的大块瘦肉几乎只是勉强粘在一起。当你翻动蛋糕时，屏住呼吸，它会啪的一声溅开，但这风险绝对值得。

source: But there are also signals this is not a regular town . There 's a long airstrip , and a hangar holding a private jet and helicopters . Just east , next to an abandoned bingo hall , sits an air conditioned tent housing about 40-plus slot machines . A tourist attraction allows visitors to see alligator wrestling and journey through the Everglades on airboats and swamp buggies .
domestication: 但这里也有一些不寻常的信号。有一条长长的跑道，机库里停着一架私人飞机和几架直升机。东边不远处，紧挨着一个废弃的宾果游戏厅，搭着一个装有空调的大帐篷，里面摆放着40多台老虎机。还有一处旅游景点，游客可以观看鳄鱼摔跤，还可以乘坐气垫船和沼泽越野车穿梭在大沼泽地。
foreignization: 但也有信号表明这并不是一个普通的小镇。有一条很长的跑道，和一个停着私人喷气机和直升机的机库。再往东，紧挨着一座废弃的宾果厅，有一个装有空调的帐篷，里面大约有40多台老虎机。一个旅游景点允许游客观看鳄鱼摔跤，并乘坐气垫船和沼泽越野车穿越大沼泽地。

Just east , next to an abandoned bingo hall , sits an air conditioned tent housing about 40-plus slot machines . A tourist attraction allows visitors to see alligator wrestling and journey through the Everglades on airboats and swamp buggies .
但这里也有一些不寻常的信号。有一条长长的跑道，机库里停着一架私人飞机和几架直升机。东边不远处，紧挨着一个废弃的宾果游戏厅，搭着一个装有空调的大帐篷，里面摆放着40多台老虎机。还有一处旅游景点，游客可以观看鳄鱼摔跤，还可以乘坐气垫船和沼泽越野车穿梭在大沼泽地。

But there are also signals this is not a regular town . There 's a long airstrip , and a hangar holding a private jet and helicopters . Just east , next to an abandoned bingo hall , sits an air conditioned tent housing about 40-plus slot machines . A tourist attraction allows visitors to see alligator wrestling and journey through the Everglades on airboats and swamp buggies .
但也有信号表明这并不是一个普通的小镇。有一条很长的跑道，和一个停着私人喷气机和直升机的机库。再往东，紧挨着一座废弃的宾果厅，有一个装有空调的帐篷，里面大约有40多台老虎机。一个旅游景点允许游客观看鳄鱼摔跤，并乘坐气垫船和沼泽越野车穿越大沼泽地。

source: But how , given the kaleidoscopic nature of contemporary world affairs , are we to distinguish the important from the ephemeral ? It might help to consider an earlier time in this century when hopes of a new world order were also being overshadowed by economic fears , ethnic jealousies and political paralysis .
domestication: 但在这个当代世界事务纷繁复杂、变化莫测的情况下，我们该怎么区分重要的和短暂的呢？不妨回望本世纪初的一个时期，那时人们对于新世界秩序的希望也正被经济担忧、民族嫉妒和政治瘫痪所掩盖。
foreignization: 但是，鉴于当代世界事务的万花筒性质，我们如何区分重要的和短暂的呢？考虑本世纪早些时候的一个时期可能会有所帮助，当时对新世界秩序的希望也因经济恐惧、种族嫉妒和政治瘫痪而黯然失色。

source: Over 25 years , Johnston 's visual and aural work has certainly attracted those naturally drawn to the art of a tormented soul . source: Of particular interest are the comments made by voter Christopher Cherney of Oakland . Deriding term limits as another coat of paint on a crusty old house , he peers deeper into the morass ( " We need to restructure the way money flows into campaigns . . . ) and sets his sights on the bigger picture : special-interest money in politics . By having candidates , and ultimately representatives , more beholden to special interests than to the simple voter , how can we be assured that our voices are being heard ?
domestication: 特别引人关注的是奥克兰选民克里斯托弗·切尼的评论。他讽刺任期限制只是在破旧的老房上再刷一层漆，深入探讨了问题的根源（“我们需要重组竞选资金的流动方式……”），并着眼于更大的图景：政治中的特殊利益资金。如果候选人和最终的代表更依赖于特殊利益集团，而不是普通的选民，我们又怎么能确保自己的声音被听到呢？

source: As always , these questions are secondary to this one : Which group of people and which interests are served by attacking the cultural studies that go on in universities ? Chavez should remember that the rhetoric she defends has always had much more institutional power than the jargon she attempts to translate . If it were true that the feminists hiding under the bed owned things like banks and mining corporations , then Chavez 's argument might have a foundation . As it is , the essay is - to eliminate jargon from this letter - stupid in the most straightforward sense of the word .
domestication: 照旧，这些问题都比不上这个问题重要：攻击大学里的文化研究，究竟服务了哪些人群和利益？查韦斯应该记住，她维护的那些言论一直比她试图翻译的术语拥有更多的制度权力。如果那些躲在床下的女权主义者真的掌控了银行和矿业公司，那查韦斯的论点或许还有点站脚之地。但事实上，这篇文章——为了不使用术语来说——就是个十足的蠢货。

source: Landowners like himself could get by , Mills says . But tenant farmers - confronted with low yields , mechanization and eviction by profit-seeking landlords - tied their mattresses to their cars and trucks , loaded them with family and drove west . " I admired them , " he says . " They were going someplace where they could get something to do . "

source: Not initially though . My theory goes that infants change everything by reconnecting us to forgotten feelings of our own early childhood . But those birth-and-being impulses attached to the beginning of life 's continuum are opposite from death and dying at its other end . Only when babies grow into walking , talking , thinking little mortals do we painfully envision fleeting images of them without yours truly in the family portrait .
domestication: 起初可不是这样。我的看法是，婴儿的到来唤醒了我们对自己童年早期的遗忘感受，仿佛把我们拉回到那个纯真的时光。但生命之初的那些本能冲动，与生命终点的死亡和消逝截然相反。只有当这些孩子渐渐长大，学会走路、说话、思考，变成一个个有自我意识的小大人时，我们才会痛苦地想象有一天家庭照片中没有了自己。
foreignization: 不过最初并非如此。我的理论是，婴儿通过重新连接我们自己早年被遗忘的感觉而改变了一切。但是，这些与生命开端相关的出生和存在的冲动，与生命另一端的死亡和垂死是相反的。只有当婴儿成长为会走路、会说话、会思考的小 mortal 时，我们才会痛苦地想象没有自己在家庭肖像中的他们。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Not initially though . My theory goes that infants change everything by reconnecting us to forgotten feelings of our own early childhood . But those birth-and-being impulses attached to the beginning of life 's continuum are opposite from death and dying at its other end . Only when babies grow into walking , talking , thinking little mortals do we painfully envision fleeting images of them without yours truly in the family portrait .

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Not initially though . My theory goes that infants change everything by reconnecting us to forgotten feelings of our own early childhood . But those birth-and-being impulses attached to the beginning of life 's continuum are opposite from death and dying at its other end . Only when babies grow into walking , talking , thinking little mortals do we painfully envision fleeting images of them without yours truly in the family portrait .
不过最初并非如此。我的理论是，婴儿通过重新连接我们自己早年被遗忘的感觉而改变了一切。但是，这些与生命开端相关的出生和存在的冲动，与生命另一端的死亡和垂死是相反的。只有当婴儿成长为会走路、会说话、会思考的小 mortal 时，我们才会痛苦地想象没有自己在家庭肖像中的他们。

source: Also last fall , the Navy ( in an operation called " Project Ugly Baby " ) dispatched several hundred sailors to check for spent ordnance on public lands around its aircraft bombing targets at Fallon , Nev . Among the findings : 1,389 live bombs , 2,230 duds , 28,136 rounds of ammunition , and 123,375 pounds of ordnance scrap metal .

source: This was not the fabled Simplon Orient Express of Agatha Christie fame , just the routinely shabby rail line that links Western Europe to the East , changing little beyond conductors ' uniforms and preferred currency as it clicks across the landscape . Nor was Roger himself an obvious candidate for intrigue . Middle-aged , looking a bit harassed and confused , he joined the train one golden midafternoon at the Westbahnhof in Vienna .

foreignization: 这并不是阿加莎·克里斯蒂笔下著名的辛普朗东方快车，而只是连接西欧和东欧的普通破旧铁路线，在穿过风景时除了列车员的制服和首选货币之外几乎没有太大的变化。罗杰本人也不是一个明显的神秘人物。中年，看起来有点焦虑和困惑，他在一个金色的午后在维也纳西站加入了列车。

source: I do not see very much evidence of compassion or the slightest consideration for other people in this state . When I go home to Montana it 's an entirely different story . People do n't drive like maniacs ( the open speed limit on highways was abolished ) . They are kind and say hello when they pass you on the street .

source: The Lincoln Home , just a block away from the National Park Service Visitor Center , makes an ideal starting point for a circuit of the so-called Lincoln Shrines . The humanity that echoes from everyday objects such as his shaving mirror and lap desk offers a bracing antidote to any notion that following the Lincoln trail must be a dutiful chore rather than a stimulating pleasure .
domestication: 林肯故居离国家公园服务游客中心只有一街之隔，是游览所谓“林肯圣地”的绝佳起点。这里陈列的日常用品，比如他用过的剃须镜和写字台，透出的人情味儿，让人顿感亲切，彻底打消了追随林肯足迹可能只是个乏味任务而非愉悦体验的想法。

source: There is no " we " with our current obsession with cultural diversity and ethnic correctness . San Francisco is a good example of the out-and-out factionalism that is the flip side of the cultural coin . Remember the great Roberta Achtenberg replacement debauch ? Her successor on the Board of Supervisors had to be a female , a Latina and a lesbian . How many cultures , ethnic groups and political entities did that eliminate ? As long as separate groups continue to compete against each other for the " scarce resources " of power , money and status , there will never be a " we " in this country .
domestication: 现在大家这么热衷于文化多样性和民族正确，根本就没有“我们”这个概念了。旧金山就是个好例子，这种文化多样性背后其实是一种完全的派系分裂。还记得罗伯塔·阿亨伯格被替换的那场闹剧吗？她的继任者必须是个女性，还得是拉丁裔和同性恋。这得排除了多少不同的文化、族裔和政治团体啊？只要各个群体继续为了权力、金钱和地位这些“稀缺资源”相互竞争，这个国家就永远不会有真正的“我们”。
foreignization: 当前我们对文化多样性和种族正确性的痴迷中没有“我们”。旧金山就是这种彻头彻尾的宗派主义的一个好例子，这是文化硬币的另一面。还记得罗伯塔·阿赫滕伯格接替丑闻吗？她的继任者必须是女性、拉丁裔和女同性恋者。这排除了多少文化、族裔群体和政治实体？只要各个群体继续相互竞争，争夺权力、金钱和地位这些“稀缺资源”，这个国家就永远不会有一个“我们”。

As long as separate groups continue to compete against each other for the " scarce resources " of power , money and status , there will never be a " we " in this country .

source: After the Baltimore Orioles turned a $ 45 million player payroll into a 71-73 record last season , majority owner Peter Angelos wanted a better return on his investment and cleaned house . Phil Regan was fired after his rookie year as a major league manager . Roland Hemond resigned under pressure after eight seasons as the club 's general manager .

After the Baltimore Orioles turned a $ 45 million player payroll into a 71-73 record last season , majority owner Peter Angelos wanted a better return on his investment and cleaned house . Phil Regan was fired after his rookie year as a major league manager . Roland Hemond resigned under pressure after eight seasons as the club 's general manager .

source: At Wolf , which opened in June , customers can stroll through kitchen vignettes from some of the city 's top designers , take classes and cook on pro-style appliances . The ladies ' bathroom glitters with crystal chandeliers and $2,000 faucets . The lobby floors are marble and granite . One model kitchen has cork flooring . Another has lava countertops with a glazed , crackled top that looks like crazed earthenware and sells for $300 a square foot .
domestication: 狼之家在六月开业了，顾客可以在这里漫步，欣赏城市顶级设计师打造的厨房场景，还能参加课程，在专业级别的厨具上大显身手。女洗手间里璀璨夺目，挂着水晶吊灯，水龙头价值两千美元。大堂的地板是大理石和花岗岩铺成的。一个示范厨房里铺着软木地砖。另一个厨房则用上了熔岩台面，表面经过釉处理，裂纹效果如同古朴的陶器，售价每平方英尺三百美元。

source: A gift from businessman L. Dennis Kozlowski during the 1990s enabled Seton Hall University 's business school in New Jersey to build a new building . Now the former Tyco International chief executive is charged with tax evasion ( he has pleaded not guilty ) and is being investigated by the company for possibly using corporate funds for personal use .
domestication: 90年代时，商人L. 丹尼斯·科兹洛夫斯基送了一份礼，新泽西的塞顿霍尔大学商学院因此建起了一座新楼。如今，这位泰科国际的前首席执行官被控逃税（他拒不认罪），公司也在调查他可能挪用公款用于个人用途的事。
foreignization: 商人L.丹尼斯·科兹洛夫斯基在1990年代赠送的礼物使新泽西州的塞顿霍尔大学商学院能够建造一座新大楼。现在，这位前泰科国际首席执行官被指控逃税（他已经表示不认罪），并因可能使用公司资金用于个人用途而受到公司的调查。

source: Desiring a varied experience , Dr. Holland was mulling a mix of a standard urban pediatric practice and shifts in an emergency room . Two weeks a year would be reserved for something special : working at a small hospital in rural Brazil set up by the grandfather of a good friend from medical school .
domestication: 荷兰医生渴望多样化的经历，正考虑将城市儿科常规工作和急诊室轮班结合起来。他打算每年留出两周时间做点特别的事情：去巴西农村的一家小医院工作。这家医院是他在医学院的好友的爷爷建的。
foreignization: 希望获得多样化的体验，荷兰博士正在考虑将标准的城市儿科实践与急诊室的轮班结合起来。每年有两周时间将用于特别的事情：在医学院一位好朋友的祖父在巴西农村建立的一家小医院工作。

source: " There is a convergence between tsunami recovery and conflict recovery ... ( Without ) a sustainable peace in Aceh , if you consider the aid as an investment in its future , you will not get a good return on your investment . It 's also a question of equity , having some balance . There are victims of both tragedies , " says Eric Morris , the UN 's recovery coordinator for Aceh .
domestication: 海啸救援和冲突后重建正逐渐交汇……如果亚齐没有持久和平，你把援助当作对其未来的投资，那这笔投资恐怕难有好的回报。这还涉及到公平问题，要有个平衡。无论是海啸还是冲突的受害者，都值得我们关注。联合国亚齐重建协调员埃里克·莫里斯如是说。
foreignization: “海啸恢复和冲突恢复之间存在交汇……（没有）亚齐的可持续和平，如果你将援助视为对其未来的一种投资，你将无法获得良好的回报。这也涉及到公平问题，需要有一些平衡。这两个悲剧都有受害者，”联合国亚齐恢复协调员埃里克·莫里斯说。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" There is a convergence between tsunami recovery and conflict recovery ... ( Without ) a sustainable peace in Aceh , if you consider the aid as an investment in its future , you will not get a good return on your investment . It 's also a question of equity , having some balance . There are victims of both tragedies , " says Eric Morris , the UN 's recovery coordinator for Aceh .
海啸救援和冲突后重建正逐渐交汇……如果亚齐没有持久和平，你把援助当作对其未来的投资，那这笔投资恐怕难有好的回报。这还涉及到公平问题，要有个平衡。无论是海啸还是冲突的受害者，都值得我们关注。联合国亚齐重建协调员埃里克·莫里斯如是说。

" There is a convergence between tsunami recovery and conflict recovery ... ( Without ) a sustainable peace in Aceh , if you consider the aid as an investment in its future , you will not get a good return on your investment . It 's also a question of equity , having some balance . There are victims of both tragedies , " says Eric Morris , the UN 's recovery coordinator for Aceh .
“海啸恢复和冲突恢复之间存在交汇……（没有）亚齐的可持续和平，如果你将援助视为对其未来的一种投资，你将无法获得良好的回报。这也涉及到公平问题，需要有一些平衡。这两个悲剧都有受害者，”联合国亚齐恢复协调员埃里克·莫里斯说。

source: I take none of this any more personally than any citizen who wonders whether their government is honest and acting in the national interest . In response to my saying that there are questions to be answered , the senator said of me , " He 's an ( expletive ) . He does n't know what he 's talking about . "
domestication: 这些事我看得开，就像普通老百姓质疑政府是否诚实、是否在为国家利益着想一样。我说了还有些问题需要澄清，结果那参议员就骂我：“他他妈的，根本不知道自己在说什么。”
foreignization: 我对此并不比任何一位质疑政府是否诚实并为国家利益行事的公民更加个人化。对于我说有需要回答的问题，参议员对我说：“他是个（脏话）。他不知道自己在说什么。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I take none of this any more personally than any citizen who wonders whether their government is honest and acting in the national interest . In response to my saying that there are questions to be answered , the senator said of me , " He 's an ( expletive ) . He does n't know what he 's talking about . "
这些事我看得开，就像普通老百姓质疑政府是否诚实、是否在为国家利益着想一样。我说了还有些问题需要澄清，结果那参议员就骂我：“他他妈的，根本不知道自己在说什么。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I take none of this any more personally than any citizen who wonders whether their government is honest and acting in the national interest . In response to my saying that there are questions to be answered , the senator said of me , " He 's an ( expletive ) . He does n't know what he 's talking about . "
我对此并不比任何一位质疑政府是否诚实并为国家利益行事的公民更加个人化。对于我说有需要回答的问题，参议员对我说：“他是个（脏话）。他不知道自己在说什么。”

source: But they 're here in Philadelphia , which is easier to get to from the big Eastern cities , has more places to stay , and , probably most importantly , has Bernie Sanders . source: But that was when France 's socialists , newly voted into power , were talking nationalizations and the evils of money . Since then these same socialists had turned off the state-run highway for the wilds of the free market . The country has prospered , and the Gaullist anti-American tendencies have been relegated to the political fringes . Even that apotheosis of American culture , the Magic Kingdom , has been lured with a Napoleanic red carpet , and now Euro-Disneyland is preparing for its inauguration at the gates of Paris in 1992 .
domestication: 那时候，法国的社会党刚刚上台，大谈国有化和金钱的罪恶。可没过多久，这些社会党人就从国家控制的高速公路上拐进了自由市场的荒野。国家因此繁荣起来，戴高乐主义反美的那一套也退到了政治边缘。就连美国文化的代表——迪士尼乐园，都被铺上了拿破仑式的红地毯，眼瞅着1992年欧迪尼乐园就要在巴黎城外盛大开业了。
foreignization: 但那时，法国的社会党刚刚当选上台，正在谈论国有化和金钱的罪恶。从那以后，这些社会党人已经离开了国家经营的高速公路，进入了自由市场的荒野。国家繁荣了，戴高乐主义的反美倾向已被推到政治边缘。即使是美国文化的化身——魔法王国，也被铺设了拿破仑式的红地毯，现在欧洲迪士尼乐园正在准备于1992年在巴黎城门外举行开幕式。

source: And , statistically , you have a much better chance of reaching 100 if you 're a woman . Four out of five centenarians are women . source: The lessons Disney learns on each film always are factored into the next . source: During the latest Iraq conflict Abrams tanks , Bradley fighting vehicles and A-10 Warthog aircraft , among other military platforms , all fired the DU bullets from desert war zones to the heart of Baghdad . No other armor-piercing round is as effective against enemy tanks . While the Pentagon says there 's no risk to Baghdad residents , US soldiers are taking their own precautions in Iraq , and in some cases have handed out warning leaflets and put up signs .

以前的英国报纸从业者以一种保守行业不习惯的速度行动，任命了新的市场总监、新的副出版人、新的执行编辑、新的创意总监和新的执行美术总监。一些人已被悄然解雇。埃文斯先生，一个对现状不太感兴趣的人，还承诺扩大兰登书屋在商业、科学、艺术和时事领域的出版。

source: The United Kingdom is staggering through its second year of contraction , and growth rates in both Germany and Japan are trailing the U.S. rate . source: " Psychologically , as you get older , you 're capable of making more subtle distinctions , " says Goldstein , 45 , psychologist and author of Fortysomething ( Tarcher , $ 18.95 ) . Along with other boomers , Goldstein says , " Early on in our political evolution we took an anti-military position , and now we find ourselves in a pro-military position . That 's new ground for us . "
domestication: 戈德斯坦，今年45岁，是位心理学家，也是《四十岁左右》一书的作者。他说：“随着年龄的增长，心理上你更能分辨出细微的差别。”他还提到，和许多同龄人一样，“在政治观念的早期，我们反对军队，现在却支持军队，这对我们来说是个全新的领域。”
foreignization: “从心理上讲，随着年龄的增长，你有能力做出更微妙的区分，”45岁的心理学家兼《四十岁左右》（Tarcher，18.95美元）一书的作者戈德斯坦说。戈德斯坦与其他婴儿潮一代人一起表示，“在我们政治演变的早期，我们采取了反军事的立场，而现在我们发现自己站在了支持军事的立场上。这是对我们来说的新领域。”

source: The article dealing with racial disparity in prisons is so flawed in its assertions and the conclusions reached that it borders on journalistic malpractice . The implied suggestion that blacks in prison should equal 3.8 percent and Hispanics 17 percent because that 's their percentage of the Colorado population and that we need another ' racial bias ' study is absurd .
domestication: 这篇文章在讨论监狱中的种族差异时，观点和结论漏洞百出，简直可以说是新闻行业的失职。文中暗示黑人和拉丁裔在监狱中的比例应该和他们在科罗拉多州的人口比例一样，分别是3.8%和17%，还说我们需要再搞一个“种族偏见”研究，这简直是无稽之谈。
foreignization: 处理监狱中种族差异的文章在其断言和得出的结论上存在如此多的问题，以至于近乎构成新闻业的不当行为。暗示黑人囚犯应占3.8%，拉丁裔囚犯应占17%，因为这是他们在科罗拉多州人口中的比例，而且我们需要另一项“种族偏见”研究的观点是荒谬的。

source: Perhaps we can not come to terms with this paradox intellectually . source: But it 's the food that matters . Goncalves ' seafood dishes are particularly memorable . A high , satin-smooth square of Columbia River sturgeon , perfectly crisped on its edges , comes to life in a vividly tart shallot beurre blanc applied as a translucent wash across part of the plate . Its provocative companion : a molded potato cake flavored with briny caviar .
domestication: 但最重要的还是食物。 Goncalves 的海鲜料理特别让人难忘。一道哥伦比亚河鲟鱼，方方正正，表面光滑如绸，边缘煎得恰到好处，盘中一抹透明的酸味浅葱白奶油酱，让整道菜活灵活现。旁边还有一块形状规整的土豆饼，里面藏着咸香的鱼子，真是绝配。

source: " This is a modern version of the first line of the Hippocratic Oath : Do no harm , " said William Schaffner , chairman of preventive medicine at Vanderbilt University Medical Center . The hospital board 's decision not to vaccinate employees was heavily influenced by concern that immunized workers could accidentally spread live virus to patients , many of them with already weakened immune systems , he said .
domestication: 威廉·沙夫纳说：“这是希波克拉底誓言第一句话的现代版：不伤害。”沙夫纳是范德比尔特大学医学中心预防医学系的主任。他说，医院董事会决定不给员工接种疫苗，很大程度上是因为担心接种后的工作人员可能会无意中将活病毒传播给病人，而这些病人的免疫系统本身就很脆弱。

source: Take Cold Warrior Henry Kissinger , who brought a distinguished delegation to Johannesburg last week to broker an agreement among the warring Inkatha Freedom Party ( IFP ) , the African National Congress ( ANC ) and Fredrik W. de Klerk 's lame-duck government . Within 48 hours of arriving , Kissinger was out of here , out of Africa and out of touch . He had done what he could , which was nothing in this intractable situation .
domestication: 冷战老将基辛格上周带着一个显赫的代表团前往约翰内斯堡，想在交战的因卡塔自由党（IFP）、非国大（ANC）和弗雷德里克·德克勒克的看守政府之间斡旋达成协议。可他来了不到48小时，就灰溜溜地离开了非洲大陆，彻底没了消息。他算是尽力了，但在这种棘手的情况下，他也无能为力。
foreignization: 以冷战时期的亨利·基辛格为例，他上周带领一个杰出的代表团前往约翰内斯堡，试图在交战中的因卡塔自由党（IFP）、非洲人国民大会（ANC）和弗雷德里克·W·德克勒克的看守政府之间斡旋达成协议。基辛格抵达后48小时内就离开了这里，离开了非洲，失去了联系。他已经尽了最大努力，但在这一棘手的情况下却无能为力。

Take Cold Warrior Henry Kissinger , who brought a distinguished delegation to Johannesburg last week to broker an agreement among the warring Inkatha Freedom Party ( IFP ) , the African National Congress ( ANC ) and Fredrik W. de Klerk 's lame-duck government . 以冷战时期的亨利·基辛格为例，他上周带领一个杰出的代表团前往约翰内斯堡，试图在交战中的因卡塔自由党（IFP）、非洲人国民大会（ANC）和弗雷德里克·W·德克勒克的看守政府之间斡旋达成协议。基辛格抵达后48小时内就离开了这里，离开了非洲，失去了联系。他已经尽了最大努力，但在这一棘手的情况下却无能为力。

source: A line later , he is asking , regrettably , if we know why the Jews own all the property in America . His phrasing perpetuates one stereotype to emphasize another about black people and capital -- that , compared with white people , they have none . His pointing this out at 47 requires you to know what he was like when he was 27 , when the gentleman at the club was him .
domestication: 接下来他就遗憾地问我们知不知道为什么犹太人掌握了美国所有的房产。他这么说，无非是想强调另一个关于黑人和资本的刻板印象——跟白人比起来，黑人一无所有。他在47岁时提出这个问题，你就得知道他27岁时是什么样子，那时俱乐部里的那个公子哥就是他本人。
foreignization: 几行之后，他遗憾地问我们是否知道为什么犹太人拥有美国所有的财产。他的措辞延续了一种刻板印象，以强调另一种关于黑人和资本的刻板印象——与白人相比，他们一无所有。他在47岁时指出这一点，要求你知道他27岁时的样子，那时俱乐部里的那个人就是他。

His pointing this out at 47 requires you to know what he was like when he was 27 , when the gentleman at the club was him .

source: Start with the presidential election itself . Seldom has there been more contrast in approach and temperament than this year ; never before has there been an opportunity to make gender history or nix it . Even if voters detest both candidates , the wise thing is for them to think hard about who would damage America least and cast ballots accordingly .
domestication: 从总统选举本身说起。今年的两位候选人无论是在处理方式还是性格上，对比都极为鲜明；而且这是第一次有机会通过选举改变性别历史，或者让它功亏一篑。即便选民对两位候选人都不感冒，明智的做法还是得好好想想，谁当选对美国的危害最小，然后投出自己的一票。
foreignization: 从总统选举本身开始。很少有像今年这样在方法和性情上形成如此鲜明对比的情况；以前从未有过一个机会可以创造性别历史或否决它。即使选民对两位候选人都厌恶，明智的做法是仔细考虑谁对美国的损害最小，并据此投票。

source: The lion 's share of active Countering Violent Extremism programs is already fixated on stopping Islamist extremism and recruitment into terrorist groups such as the Islamic State , while similar efforts targeting the white-power movement are few and far between , said Oren Segal , director of the Anti-Defamation League 's Center on Extremism .
domestication: 反恐极端主义项目的大头都集中在阻止伊斯兰极端主义和招募人员加入像伊斯兰国这样的恐怖组织，而针对白人至上主义的类似努力却少之又少，反诽谤联盟极端主义中心的主任奥伦·塞加尔如是说。

source: The previous season , on the other hand , had four equally worthy potential winners for best musical , led by " Guys and Dolls . " In fact , the fluky flourish of good shows in the final months of that season ( " Broadway 's Back " was the premature exclamation of many headlines ) , added on top of such long-runners as " The Phantom of the Opera " and " Miss Saigon , " continued to sell so well during the past 12 months that they boosted the 1992-93 attendance well above the 1991-92 mark of 6.5 million - in effect , masking the box-office weakness of this season 's shows .
domestication: 上个季度呢，有四部音乐剧实力相当，都是最佳音乐剧的有力竞争者，其中《郎心似铁》更是领跑。说起来，那个季度末尾好戏连连，一时间“百老汇强势回归”成了各大头条的口头禅。再加上像《歌剧魅影》和《西贡小姐》这样的长青剧目，过去一年里依然票房火热，结果1992-1993年的观众人数比1991-1992年的650万多了不少，这下子就把今年这些新剧的票房不佳给掩盖过去了。
foreignization: 上个赛季，另一方面，有四个同样值得赢得最佳音乐剧的候选作品，以《赌城风情画》为首。事实上，那个赛季最后几个月里好剧目的意外繁荣（许多标题过早地宣称“百老汇回归了”），加上诸如《歌剧魅影》和《西贡小姐》这样的长期上演剧目，在过去12个月里继续销售得如此之好，以至于将1992-93年的观众人数远远推高至1991-92年的650万——实际上，掩盖了本季剧目票房的疲软。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The previous season , on the other hand , had four equally worthy potential winners for best musical , led by " Guys and Dolls . " In fact , the fluky flourish of good shows in the final months of that season ( " Broadway 's Back " was the premature exclamation of many headlines ) , added on top of such long-runners as " The Phantom of the Opera " and " Miss Saigon , " continued to sell so well during the past 12 months that they boosted the 1992-93 attendance well above the 1991-92 mark of 6.5 million - in effect , masking the box-office weakness of this season 's shows .
上个季度呢，有四部音乐剧实力相当，都是最佳音乐剧的有力竞争者，其中《郎心似铁》更是领跑。说起来，那个季度末尾好戏连连，一时间“百老汇强势回归”成了各大头条的口头禅。再加上像《歌剧魅影》和《西贡小姐》这样的长青剧目，过去一年里依然票房火热，结果1992-1993年的观众人数比1991-1992年的650万多了不少，这下子就把今年这些新剧的票房不佳给掩盖过去了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The previous season , on the other hand , had four equally worthy potential winners for best musical , led by " Guys and Dolls . " In fact , the fluky flourish of good shows in the final months of that season ( " Broadway 's Back " was the premature exclamation of many headlines ) , added on top of such long-runners as " The Phantom of the Opera " and " Miss Saigon , " continued to sell so well during the past 12 months that they boosted the 1992-93 attendance well above the 1991-92 mark of 6.5 million - in effect , masking the box-office weakness of this season 's shows .
上个赛季，另一方面，有四个同样值得赢得最佳音乐剧的候选作品，以《赌城风情画》为首。事实上，那个赛季最后几个月里好剧目的意外繁荣（许多标题过早地宣称“百老汇回归了”），加上诸如《歌剧魅影》和《西贡小姐》这样的长期上演剧目，在过去12个月里继续销售得如此之好，以至于将1992-93年的观众人数远远推高至1991-92年的650万——实际上，掩盖了本季剧目票房的疲软。

source: Head coach Ron Rivera and wife Stephanie contribute to animal causes . Over the years , majority owner Jerry Richardson has given generously to both Carolinas , including grants to build synthetic football fields in poor counties . Last year , the franchise helped South Carolina flood victims , and Richardson donated $100,000 to the families of the nine victims murdered at a Charleston church .
domestication: 主教练罗恩·里维拉和妻子斯蒂芬妮热衷于动物慈善事业。多年来，球队的大老板杰里·理查森对南北卡罗来纳州慷慨解囊，包括资助在贫困县修建人造草皮足球场。去年，球队帮助了南卡罗来纳州的洪水受灾群众，理查森还向在查尔斯顿教堂枪击案中遇难的九名受害者家属捐赠了10万元。

主教练罗恩·里维拉和他的妻子斯蒂芬妮为动物事业做出了贡献。多年来，大股东杰里·理查森慷慨地捐赠给卡罗莱纳州的两个州，包括拨款在贫困县建造人造草皮足球场。去年，球队帮助了南卡罗来纳州的洪水灾民，理查森向在查尔斯顿教堂被谋杀的九名受害者的家属捐赠了10万美元。

source: The first shot was fired in 1990 when Derrick Bell Jr. , Harvard Law 's most senior black faculty member , made national headlines by taking a leave of absence from the school to protest the fact that no " woman of color " had been granted tenure . No black woman has been added to the school 's permanent faculty since his protest , however , and - after unsuccessfully seeking an exemption from the law school 's policy limiting leaves of absence to two years - Professor Bell quit for good last year .
domestication: 1990年，德里克·贝尔小弟，哈佛法律系最资深的黑人教授，率先发难，因学校未授予任何“有色女性”终身教职而愤然休假，此事轰动全国。然而，自他抗议以来，学校永久教职名单上仍未添上任何黑人女性的名字。贝尔教授试图申请延长休假的特例，但未能如愿，最终在去年彻底辞职，拂袖而去。
foreignization: 第一枪是在1990年打响的，当时哈佛法律系最资深的黑人教师德里克·贝尔 Jr. 因抗议学校未授予任何“有色女性”终身教职而请假，这一事件在全国引起了轰动。然而，自他抗议以来，学校永久教员中仍未增加任何黑人女性，而且在未能成功申请到法学院关于请假不超过两年政策的豁免后，贝尔教授去年终于辞职。

source: At the same time , new technologies -- completely automated assembly plants , biotech farming and food processing , 24-hour-a-day futures trading -- make traditional jobs redundant , even in developed economies , while further eroding the economic sovereignty of countries . In sum , we again face a " series of jolts and jars and smashes in the social life of humanity , " with every likelihood that such shocks will continue .

source: Two bills now being considered by Washington legislators offer an important opportunity to begin to fix those oversights . HB 1077 , introduced by state Rep. Joe Fitzgibbon , D-Seattle , would create important safeguards in environmentally sensitive areas to protect salmon and water quality . HB 1106 , introduced by Rep. Gael Tarleton , D-Seattle , would require miners to comply with the Clean Water Act to reduce pollution when mining .

source: Accountants exploited loopholes to curry favor with companies that paid their fees . Executives collected more than $400 million in salary and bonuses but denied knowing about fraud on their watch . Investment bankers engaged in sham deals to help clients meet quarterly profit targets . Boards of directors waived conflicts-of-interest policies and turned a blind eye to overly aggressive business practices . And overwhelmed regulators failed to devote enough resources to combat fraud .
domestication: 会计师钻空子，讨好那些给他们开单的公司。高管们领了四亿多美元的薪水和奖金，却说自己对眼皮底下的欺诈一无所知。投资银行家搞虚假交易，帮客户达到季度盈利目标。董事会放宽利益冲突政策，对过于激进的商业手段视而不见。监管机构资源不足，对付不了这么多的欺诈行为。
foreignization: 会计师利用漏洞来讨好支付他们费用的公司。高管们领取了超过4亿美元的工资和奖金，但否认知道任期内的欺诈行为。投资银行家参与虚假交易以帮助客户达到季度盈利目标。董事会放弃利益冲突政策，对过于激进的商业行为视而不见。而资源不足的监管机构未能投入足够的资源来打击欺诈。

source: As I drove once again on the familiar wide brick streets , it felt as though something that had once left me re-entered , silently . Before long I found my aunt 's house , where I had been invited to stay . Aunt Mildred was in her 70s , but with her trim figure , brown hair , and smooth skin , she looked much younger . Maybe time really had stood still for me , I thought for an instant .

source: John Lynch , a veteran patent attorney in Menlo Park , said the reason was simple : The federal courts basically were unfriendly to patent-infringement cases . Trials were argued before federal judges , who made stingy damage awards . Even worse , appellate courts across the nation routinely reduced awards or dismissed infringement cases -- making patents into paper tigers .
domestication: 门洛帕克的老牌专利律师约翰·林奇说，原因很简单：联邦法院基本上对专利侵权案件不友好。庭审是由联邦法官主持的，他们给出的赔偿往往很吝啬。更糟糕的是，全国各地的上诉法院经常减少赔偿金额，甚至驳回侵权案，让专利成了“一纸空文”。

source: There 's an interesting added strand in the weaving of the cultures . She found it on the Caribbean island of Haiti .

source: Sports was seen as the one place where a black man was allowed dominance over a white man , the one place that was a true meritocracy . Prejudice had no power over a stopwatch or a home run . It was not a natural ability that earned blacks a disproportionate number of athletic honors in the United States , Morgan and others say , but a lack of other choices and an institutional channeling toward that single pursuit .
domestication: 体育被认为是黑人男子能够超越白人男子的唯一领域，是真正按能力论英雄的地方。偏见在秒表和本垒打面前无能为力。摩根和其他人认为，黑人在美国体育界获得的荣誉不成比例，并不是因为天生的能力，而是因为缺少其他选择，以及社会制度引导他们走上了这条路。

source: In Virginia , for example , the state health department runs a small pharmacy in the basement of a state office building in Richmond . source: A number of experienced reserves have been selected for the U.S. Olympic team . Two of the 10 are 1992 Olympians - Jim Neil and Chris Swan . They rowed together during the 1995 World Championships but did n't win a medal . Chris Kerber was a world champion in the lightweight men 's four in 1993 . Olympic reserves will not stay in the Olympic Village because the rowing team is the second largest for the U.S. in the Games and officials are trying to limit the number in the village .
domestication: 美国奥运队选了一批有经验的替补队员。其中两位是1992年的老将——吉姆·尼尔和克里斯·斯万。他们俩在1995年世界锦标赛上搭档过，但没拿到奖牌。克里斯·科尔伯在1993年轻量级男子四人赛中拿过世界冠军。由于赛艇队是美国奥运会第二大队伍，官员们为了控制村内的人数，决定不让替补队员住在奥运村。
foreignization: 一些有经验的候补选手已经被选入美国奥运队。10名候补选手中有两名是1992年的奥运会选手——吉姆·尼尔和克里斯·斯万。他们在1995年世界锦标赛上一起参赛但没有赢得奖牌。克里斯·克伯在1993年轻量级男子四人赛中获得世界冠军。奥运候补选手将不会住在奥运村，因为划船队是美国在本届奥运会上第二大队伍，官员们正试图限制村内的人数。

source: Being bumped from a Northwest Airlines flight is getting more rewarding . source: My responsibility as president is to the national security of this country . This is one of my most fundamental responsibilities . I went to the Joint Chiefs , and the chairman , Colin Powell , and the secretary , and said " We 've got to cut defense . Now let 's do it in a prudent way . " And we 've come up with $ 50 billion . And if we had to go to $ 100 billion or $ 150 billion I think we would have knocked the muscle out of our defense and I as president would not be able to certify to the American people that their national security was guaranteed .
domestication: 我作为总统，首要职责就是保障国家安全，这可是我的头等大事。我去跟参谋长联席会议的主席科林·鲍威尔和国防部长商量，说：“咱们得削减军费了，但要精打细算地来。”我们最后定下了500亿美元的削减额度。要是砍到1000亿或1500亿美元，那国防就变成空架子了，我也无法向美国人民保证他们的安全无忧。
foreignization: 作为总统，我的责任是这个国家的国家安全。这是我最基本的责任之一。我去找了参谋长联席会议、主席科林·鲍威尔以及国防部长，说“我们必须削减国防开支。现在让我们以审慎的方式来做这件事。”我们提出了500亿美元的削减计划。如果我们不得不削减到1000亿或1500亿美元，我认为这将使我们的国防实力大打折扣，而作为总统，我将无法向美国人民保证他们的国家安全是有保障的。

And if we had to go to $ 100 billion or $ 150 billion I think we would have knocked the muscle out of our defense and I as president would not be able to certify to the American people that their national security was guaranteed .

source: The airlines are wrestling with their own steep decline in business . At Delta , revenue from May to July was 15 percent below what it was during the corresponding period of last year , and passenger volume is down 5 percent this year . Delta has deferred $3.7 billion in capital spending , including deliveries of new planes from Boeing . It took voluntary leaves or retirements from about 11,300 workers and is still in the process of laying off 1,400 pilots .
domestication: 航空公司正面临着业务的大幅下滑。达美航空从5月到7月的收入比去年同期减少了15%，今年的乘客量也下降了5%。为了应对这一局面，达美推迟了37亿美元的资本支出，包括波音新飞机的交付。公司还让大约11300名员工自愿休假或退休，目前还在裁掉1400名飞行员的过程中。

source: Every time a school system supporter refers to our school system , it 's always described as " the best school system in the state of Georgia . " There 's no question that the Gwinnett school system is a good school system , but what facts exist to support the oft repeated " best in Georgia " claim ? If the new superintendent wants citizen support , he/she needs to give us some hard data as opposed to just parroting the " best in Georgia " theme .
domestication: 每次提到我们学校的系统，支持者总是说这是“佐治亚州最好的学校系统”。毫无疑问，格温内特的学校系统是不错的，但有什么事实能支撑这句常挂在嘴边的“佐治亚州最佳”呢？如果新上任的校长想得到大家的支持，就不能光说不练，只重复那句“佐治亚州第一”的口号了，得拿出点硬数据来说服我们。

source: But in the longer run , the survival of the garment industry in Bangladesh and other developing countries depends upon how well governments respond to the demands of the global market . That will be affected , in part , by how much they invest in roads , ports and electricity grids ; in the past , such infrastructure has been starved of investment here and elsewhere .
domestication: 但从长远来看，孟加拉国和其他发展中国家的服装业能否生存下去，关键还得看政府对全球市场需求的反应如何。这在很大程度上取决于他们对道路、港口和电网等基础设施的投资力度。过去这些地方的基础设施投资一直不足，其他地方也差不多。
foreignization: 但是从长远来看，孟加拉国和其他发展中国家的服装业生存取决于政府对全球市场需求的响应程度。这在一定程度上将受到他们在道路、港口和电力网等基础设施投资的影响；在过去，这些基础设施在这里和其他地方一直缺乏投资。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But in the longer run , the survival of the garment industry in Bangladesh and other developing countries depends upon how well governments respond to the demands of the global market . That will be affected , in part , by how much they invest in roads , ports and electricity grids ; in the past , such infrastructure has been starved of investment here and elsewhere .
但从长远来看，孟加拉国和其他发展中国家的服装业能否生存下去，关键还得看政府对全球市场需求的反应如何。这在很大程度上取决于他们对道路、港口和电网等基础设施的投资力度。过去这些地方的基础设施投资一直不足，其他地方也差不多。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But in the longer run , the survival of the garment industry in Bangladesh and other developing countries depends upon how well governments respond to the demands of the global market . That will be affected , in part , by how much they invest in roads , ports and electricity grids ; in the past , such infrastructure has been starved of investment here and elsewhere .
但是从长远来看，孟加拉国和其他发展中国家的服装业生存取决于政府对全球市场需求的响应程度。这在一定程度上将受到他们在道路、港口和电力网等基础设施投资的影响；在过去，这些基础设施在这里和其他地方一直缺乏投资。

source: By any measure , on any level , Donnan 's success at Marshall was dynastic . His six-year record : 64-21 , despite a 6-5 debut . He won 12 games three times , made five consecutive I-AA playoff appearances , won the ' 92 national championship and thrice was runner-up . Marshall won the last two Southern Conference titles outright and perennially led the conference in all major statistical categories . Donnan 's 64 victories leave him one shy of Youngstown State 's Jim Tressel , college football 's winningest coach in the ' 90s .
domestication: 无论从哪个角度看，唐南在马歇尔的成就都堪称王朝级别的。他在六年的执教生涯中取得了64胜21负的战绩，尽管首秀只赢了6场输了5场。他三次带队赢得12场比赛，连续五年闯入I-AA季后赛，1992年更是夺得全国冠军，还三次获得亚军。马歇尔连续两年独揽南方联盟冠军，并常年在各项主要统计上领先联盟。唐南的64场胜利让他距离扬斯敦州立大学的吉姆·特雷斯尔仅一步之遥，后者是90年代全美大学足球胜场最多的教练。

source: Monroe spends his idle time wherever home is at that particular moment . He is hooked on his gadgets -- computer , video games , iPhone . During his freshman year at Virginia , Monroe camped out overnight outside a local electronics store to purchase an Xbox 360 , earning the nickname " Best Buy " from his teammates .

source: Kwan arrived here full of hope that she could compete for the gold medal that was missing from her Olympic career . A previous groin injury had put that in doubt , forcing her to withdraw from the national championships in January . She was named to the Olympic team after petitioning for a spot , then proving that she was healthy by performing for skating officials about two weeks ago .
domestication: 关来到了这里，满怀希望，想在她的奥运生涯中争夺那块缺失的金牌。之前的腹股沟伤病让她心里没底，迫使她在一月份退出了全国锦标赛。她后来向奥委会请愿，争取到了参赛名额，大约两周前，她向滑冰官员展示了恢复健康的状态，证明自己可以参赛。
foreignization: 关在这里满怀希望，希望能争夺对她而言缺失的奥运金牌。之前的腹股沟受伤使这一点变得可疑，迫使她在一月份退出了全国锦标赛。她在请愿获得名额后被选入奥运团队，然后在大约两周前通过为滑冰官员表演证明了自己的健康状况。

source: The prime minister 's grasp on power has appeared so unshakeable that she has been able to dispel almost all doubts about her staying power . Her ruthlessness in removing opponents would make Lucrezia Borgia blush . Not one member of her original 1979 cabinet remains in place today ; the last survivor , Sir Geoffrey Howe , resigned this month on the issue of Britain 's future in Europe , precipitating the current crisis .
domestication: 首相的权力如此稳固，几乎打消了所有对她能否继续掌权的疑虑。她在铲除政敌时的狠辣手段，连博尔吉亚家族的卢克雷齐娅见了都会脸红。她1979年上台时的内阁成员，如今已无一人留任；最后一位元老，杰弗里·豪爵士，也在本月因为英国在欧洲未来的立场问题辞职，从而引发了当前的这场危机。
foreignization: 首相对权力的掌控显得如此不可动摇，以至于她几乎消除了所有关于她执政能力的疑虑。她在消除对手方面的无情会让卢克丽霞·博尔吉亚都脸红。她1979年的原始内阁中没有一位成员今天还在位；最后的幸存者，杰弗里·豪爵士，本月因英国在欧洲未来的立场问题辞职，引发了当前的危机。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: In his book , " Underdevelopment is a State of Mind - the Latin American Case , " published in Spanish in 1989 ( in English 1985 ) , Harrision asks why an area of the world that entered the industrial age with resources and a development level comparable to North America 's early British colonies has fallen so far behind . He blames an authoritarian , Old World Spanish heritage for shaping values that handicapped this part of the New World .
domestication: 哈里森在他的书《心态决定发展——拉丁美洲案例》中问道，为什么一个在工业时代初期拥有与北美英属殖民地相当资源和发展水平的地区，如今却落后如此之多。这本书最早于1985年以英文出版，1989年又出了西班牙文版。他认为，造成这种局面的罪魁祸首是来自旧世界的西班牙专制传统，这股力量塑造了拉丁美洲的价值观，成了这片新大陆发展的绊脚石。
foreignization: 在他的书《欠发展是一种心态——拉丁美洲案例》中，该书于1989年用西班牙语出版（英文版1985年），哈里森询问为什么一个在工业时代初期拥有与北美的英属殖民地相似的资源和发展水平的世界区域会落后如此之远。他将此归咎于权威的、旧世界的西班牙遗产塑造了阻碍新世界这一部分发展的价值观。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In his book , " Underdevelopment is a State of Mind - the Latin American Case , " published in Spanish in 1989 ( in English 1985 ) , Harrision asks why an area of the world that entered the industrial age with resources and a development level comparable to North America 's early British colonies has fallen so far behind . He blames an authoritarian , Old World Spanish heritage for shaping values that handicapped this part of the New World .
哈里森在他的书《心态决定发展——拉丁美洲案例》中问道，为什么一个在工业时代初期拥有与北美英属殖民地相当资源和发展水平的地区，如今却落后如此之多。这本书最早于1985年以英文出版，1989年又出了西班牙文版。他认为，造成这种局面的罪魁祸首是来自旧世界的西班牙专制传统，这股力量塑造了拉丁美洲的价值观，成了这片新大陆发展的绊脚石。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He blames an authoritarian , Old World Spanish heritage for shaping values that handicapped this part of the New World .
在他的书《欠发展是一种心态——拉丁美洲案例》中，该书于1989年用西班牙语出版（英文版1985年），哈里森询问为什么一个在工业时代初期拥有与北美的英属殖民地相似的资源和发展水平的世界区域会落后如此之远。他将此归咎于权威的、旧世界的西班牙遗产塑造了阻碍新世界这一部分发展的价值观。

source: After being laid off by an insurance company in Westchester County , he was unemployed for four years , and earned money by working as a temp . source: Negative attitudes toward Mexicans in the United States are gaining momentum . I am constantly reminded of the Armenians in Turkey , of the pogroms in Germany , of Japanese-Americans being led to internment camps during World War II . Walls are being built to keep Mexicans out ; laws are being passed to keep people from speaking Spanish . We need a scapegoat to keep from reminding us that democracy is dead in the United States ; the corpse has transformed into something my white friend calls " corprocracy " ( aka " corprocrazy " ) .
domestication: 对墨西哥人的负面态度在美国愈演愈烈。我总想起土耳其的亚美尼亚人，想起德国的屠杀，还有二战期间被送往集中营的日裔美国人。现在，筑墙挡墨西哥人，立法禁止讲西班牙语。我们需要一个替罪羊，好让我们不去想美国的民主已经死了；这具尸体已经变成了我的白人朋友所谓的“公司统治”（也就是“公司疯癫”）。
foreignization: 对墨西哥人的负面态度在美国愈演愈烈。我时常被提醒起土耳其的亚美尼亚人，德国的 pogroms（种族清洗），以及二战期间被送往集中营的日裔美国人。正在修建围墙以阻止墨西哥人进入；法律正在通过以禁止人们说西班牙语。我们需要一个替罪羊，以免被提醒到民主在美国已经死亡；这具尸体已经变成了我的白人朋友称之为“corprocracy”（又称“corprocrazy”）的东西。

source: But James understands that his already larger-than-life persona -- he is featured attempting a dunk on a 10-story billboard in downtown Cleveland with the caption , " We 're All Witnesses " -- can elevate only in the postseason . " That 's a road you have to follow if you want to be considered among the great ones , " said NBA Commissioner David Stern , who will surely enjoy the ratings boost James 's presence in the playoffs will provide . " The campaign last year about the Finals was ' where legends are born , ' and I think you could have said that for the playoffs . . . . Clearly in order to write yourself large in NBA history , you 've got to be in the playoffs . "
domestication: 但詹姆斯明白，他那已经够出彩的形象——在克利夫兰市中心的一块十层楼高的广告牌上，他被拍到试图完成一记扣篮，旁边写着“我们都是见证者”——只有在季后赛中才能更上一层楼。“如果你想被认为是伟大的球员之一，这是一条必经之路，”NBA总裁大卫·斯特恩说道。詹姆斯参加季后赛肯定会给收视率带来提升，斯特恩肯定乐见其成。“去年总决赛的宣传语是‘传奇在此诞生’，我觉得这句话用在季后赛也是一样……很明显，要想在NBA历史上留下浓墨重彩的一笔，就必须得打季后赛。”

source: ROGERS GRAY ITALIAN COUNTRY COOKBOOK , by Rose Gray and Ruth Rogers ( Random House , $ 40 ) . An elegant book full of recipes for country soups , pastas , polentas and risottos , seafood , meats , poultry and desserts , with wonderful photographs and illustrations . Most important , the recipe for their incredible flourless cake , Chocolate Nemesis , is included .
domestication: 《罗杰斯格雷意大利乡村烹饪书》由罗斯·格雷和露丝·罗杰斯编写（兰登书屋出版，售价40美元）。这是一本充满乡村风味的汤、面食、玉米粥和 Risotto、海鲜、肉类、家禽及甜点食谱的精美书籍，配以绝美的照片和插图。最重要的是，书中还收录了他们那款令人难以忘怀的无面粉巧克力蛋糕——“巧克力克星”的制作方法。
foreignization: 《罗杰斯格雷意大利乡村烹饪书》（作者：罗斯·格雷和露丝·罗杰斯，出版社：兰登书屋，价格：40美元）。这是一本优雅的书籍，充满了乡村汤、面食、玉米粥和烩饭、海鲜、肉类、家禽和甜点的食谱，配有精美的照片和插图。最重要的是，书中包含了他们令人难以置信的无面粉蛋糕“巧克力宿敌”的食谱。

source: Asked if she 's seen the movie " Lady Bird , " Bockel raises her eyebrows . The Oscar contender is about a knotty mother-daughter relationship , in which the daughter attends a Catholic school where a theater director decides to stage Stephen Sondheim 's " Merrily We Roll Along , " a Broadway dud , cult favorite and an ambitious selection for drama club .
domestication: 当被问到是否看过《伯德小姐》这部电影时，博克尔挑了挑眉毛。这部奥斯卡提名作品讲述了一段棘手的母女关系，女儿就读于一所天主教学校，学校的戏剧导演决定排演斯蒂芬·桑德海姆的《我们愉快地前行》，这出百老汇戏剧虽然票房不佳，却成了cult经典，对戏剧社来说是个大胆的选择。

source: The union says Comair 's size , route structure , jet equipment and financial performance justify the basic perks and protections given to major-airline pilots : higher pay , a company-paid pension and a shorter workday , which lets pilots get more rest . Six to seven trips a day are n't unusual for a Comair pilot .

foreignization: 工会表示，Comair的规模、航线结构、喷气式飞机设备和财务表现证明了给予大型航空公司飞行员的基本福利和保护是合理的：更高的薪酬、公司支付的养老金和更短的工作日，这使得飞行员能够获得更多的休息。Comair的飞行员每天飞行六到七次并不罕见。

source: Now , at-home industrial piecework has taken on a more legitimate patina . But the work still takes place mostly within a close-knit , word-of-mouth community that crisscrosses the low-tech end of high tech . An assembly worker takes a job home , invites a relative to help , who brings along a friend and so forth .
domestication: 如今，在家做工业零活已经变得更为正当了。不过，这类工作大多还是在紧密相连的、靠口口相传的小圈子里进行，这个圈子贯穿了高技术产业的低技术一端。一个组装工人把活儿带回家，叫上亲戚帮忙，亲戚又带上朋友，如此这般。
foreignization: 现在，在家从事工业计件工作已经带上了更为合法的外衣。但这种工作仍然主要在一个紧密联系、靠口碑传播的社区中进行，这个社区横跨高科技领域的低技术一端。一名装配工人把工作带回家，邀请亲戚帮忙，后者又带来一个朋友，以此类推。

source: Though western heroes are often thought of as throwbacks hostile to newfangled technological developments ( preferring spurs and canteens ) , photography is actually the cowboy 's most loyal sidekick . From daguerreotypes to cigarette ads , the rugged folk of the West have rarely declined to sit for portraits . And just as the conservationist PBS series " Nature " relentlessly pushes Canon 's digital cameras -- with their easily uploadable and e-mailable photos and colors that suspiciously " pop " -- so the western film suggests that you might holster your camera , take off for photogenic lands and not forfeit your credibility on the trails .
domestication: 虽然西方英雄常被看作是反对新奇技术发展的老古董（更喜欢马刺和水壶），但摄影其实是牛仔最忠诚的伙伴。从达盖尔银版摄影到香烟广告，西部的硬汉们很少拒绝坐下来拍照。就像环保主义者PBS的《自然》系列节目拼命推销佳能的数码相机——照片上传、发送电子邮件方便，色彩也出奇地“鲜艳”——西部电影也在暗示，你可以收起相机，前往风景如画的地方，而不必担心在野外失去信誉。
foreignization: 虽然西方英雄常被看作是反对新奇技术发展的守旧者（更喜欢马刺和水壶），摄影实际上是牛仔最忠诚的助手。从达盖尔银版法到香烟广告，西部的粗犷人们很少拒绝坐下来拍摄肖像。正如保护主义的PBS系列节目“自然”不断推销佳能的数码相机——这些相机的照片易于上传和发送电子邮件，色彩可疑地“鲜艳”——西部电影也暗示你可以收起你的相机，前往风景如画的土地，而不会丧失在旅途中的可信度。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Though western heroes are often thought of as throwbacks hostile to newfangled technological developments ( preferring spurs and canteens ) , photography is actually the cowboy 's most loyal sidekick . From daguerreotypes to cigarette ads , the rugged folk of the West have rarely declined to sit for portraits . And just as the conservationist PBS series " Nature " relentlessly pushes Canon 's digital cameras -- with their easily uploadable and e-mailable photos and colors that suspiciously " pop " -- so the western film suggests that you might holster your camera , take off for photogenic lands and not forfeit your credibility on the trails .

source: Dominick 's parent company , Safeway , is investing $80 million to $100 million to renovate profitable stores and build new ones in the " Lifestyle " format , featuring hardwood floors , hearth-fired pizza , Starbucks cafes , olive bars , organic foods and expanded wine selections to better compete with rivals as diverse as Jewel-Osco , Whole Foods , Trader Joe 's and Wal-Mart .
domestication: 多米尼克的母公司萨菲韦计划投资8000万到1亿美元，用来翻新盈利的门店，并按照“生活方式”模式建造新店。这种模式下的店铺会有硬木地板、石炉烤比萨、星巴克咖啡馆、橄榄吧、有机食品和扩大的葡萄酒区，以此来更好地与乔尔-奥斯科、全食超市、特拉杰乔和沃尔玛等不同类型的对手竞争。

source: Transportation German carmaker considers selling unit Munich , Germany -- Bayerische Motoren Werke AG is considering the sale of its Rover car unit to end a six-year , money-losing investment in Britain , Germany 's third-biggest carmaker said . Munich-based BMW said its supervisory board will meet Thursday to consider the sale as " one of the possible " options to stem losses .
domestication: 德国汽车制造商考虑出售罗孚部门。慕尼黑消息——宝马公司正在考虑将其罗孚汽车部门出售，以结束在英国长达六年的亏损投资。作为德国第三大汽车制造商，宝马表示，其监事会将于周四召开会议，讨论出售事宜，这仅是“可能的选项之一”，旨在止住亏损。宝马总部位于慕尼黑，公司高层将探讨如何扭亏为盈，毕竟这六年来罗孚部门一直是烧钱的无底洞。
foreignization: 交通 德国汽车制造商考虑出售部门 慕尼黑，德国 -- 巴伐利亚发动机制造公司正在考虑将其罗孚汽车部门出售，以结束其在英国长达六年的亏损投资，这家德国第三大汽车制造商表示。总部位于慕尼黑的宝马表示，其监事会将于周四开会，考虑将出售作为“可能的”选项之一来遏制亏损。

source: In the years after the war in Southeast Asia , she spoke out against human rights violations by the Socialist Republic of Vietnam . source: There is no battle with the inner dirtbag for Sampson . While with the Sooners , he had been busted by the NCAA for making phone calls to recruits when rules prohibited it . How many calls ? foreignization: 桑普森并没有与内心的污点作斗争。在担任俄克拉荷马大学教练期间，他曾因违反NCAA规定向招募对象打电话而被查。打了多少电话？不是五次。不是十次。二百三十三次。他通过作弊建立了自己的球队——以及自己的名声。他在俄克拉荷马的成功使他获得了印第安纳大学的职位，这是真正的一流职位。

source: Bush : Well , it could have been there , because the speech was a little shorter and we left out the defense segment and all of that but it is not a new theme with me . It is something I feel very strongly about and that we have tried to emulate in various ways . For example , I strongly believe in school choice . That , I think , is a family strengthening principle . Our whole child-care approach . . . was based on choice strengthening the family , letting grandmothers who stay home do some of the child-care work . So it 's a theme I have campaigned on and feel strongly about and still do . But I noticed the coverage on it and perhaps I do n't have any problem with it because I liked what I saw in terms of the points they emphasize .
domestication: 布什：嗯，可能是这样，因为演讲稿确实短了一些，我们删掉了国防部分的内容，但这个主题对我来说并不新鲜。我对此感到非常强烈，并且我们以各种方式努力体现这一点。比如，我坚信学校选择权的重要性。我认为这是增强家庭的一个原则。我们的整个儿童保育方法……也是基于选择来加强家庭，让留在家里的祖母可以承担一些儿童保育工作。所以这一直是我竞选时的主题，我对此感觉非常强烈，现在依然如此。不过，我也注意到了媒体报道，或许我对这些报道没有异议，因为我对他们强调的那些要点感到满意。

source: Knopfler 's fans are legion , as witnessed by the tally in the online voting , but the Cars had a better , more extensive catalog , at least in my judgment . Plus , as I said before , the ceremonies will be in Cleveland , and the late Cars bassist and singer Benjamin Orzechowski was born in Lakewood . It 'll come down to one or the other , with the Cars in the driver 's seat , so to speak .
domestication: 诺普勒的粉丝众多，从网上投票的结果就可见一斑，但“汽车人”乐队的曲目更丰富、质量更高，至少我是这么认为的。再说，典礼在克利夫兰举行，而“汽车人”乐队已故的贝斯手兼主唱本杰明·奥热科夫斯基就是在拉克伍德出生的。所以，最后恐怕就是二选一了，不过“汽车人”乐队胜出的可能性更大些，可以说是占了“主场优势”。
foreignization: 诺普勒的粉丝众多，这从在线投票的数量就可以看出，但根据我的判断，汽车人乐队拥有更好的、更广泛的曲目。此外，正如我之前所说，仪式将在克利夫兰举行，而已故的汽车人乐队贝斯手和歌手本杰明·奥热科夫斯基出生于拉克伍德。最终将归结为两者之一，可以说，汽车人乐队占据了优势。

It 'll come down to one or the other , with the Cars in the driver 's seat , so to speak .

source: After that first viewing last month , we began a two-week investigation to determine the contents of the container - a pressurized cylinder about the size of a phone booth - and what the Iraqis did with it . source: The second leg across the hazardous Southern Ocean from Cape Town to Sydney , Australia , is considered the most grueling . Kostecki 's boat had a rough start . Heading south past the Cape of Good Hope , the Illbruck Challenge became sluggish and the bow dipped dangerously below the waves . Water had poured into the bright green hull from a small inspection hatch that was left open . By the time the problem was fixed , the boat had fallen behind 20 miles .
domestication: 从开普敦到澳大利亚悉尼的第二段航程横跨危险的南大洋，被认为是整个比赛中最艰苦的一段。科斯特克的船一开始就碰上了麻烦。当船驶过好望角向南行进时，"Illbruck Challenge"号突然变得笨重起来，船头危险地扎进了波涛中。原来，一个小检查舱口没关好，海水涌进了那艘鲜绿色的船体。等到问题解决，船已经落后了20海里。

source: But eventually that sense of superiority came to sound like an exercise . Rap is a language art , and no matter your age , you need something to say . The problem with " Magna Carta " was n't that Jay-Z was too old . It is that he sounded bored . The music was disconnected from life , and his materialism sounded pass ? even for hip-hop . Fashion , art , love , even philanthropy were spiked with a testy self-consciousness . The whole thing reeked of midlife crisis .
domestication: 但最终，那种优越感听起来就像是一种练习。说唱是一种语言艺术，不管你多大年纪，总得有东西可说。《Magna Carta》的问题不在于Jay-Z年纪太大，而是他显得无精打采。音乐脱离了生活，他的物质主义听起来都过时了，即使在嘻哈圈里也是如此。时尚、艺术、爱情，甚至慈善事业，都透着一股焦躁的自我意识。整张专辑散发着中年危机的味道。
foreignization: 但最终，那种优越感听起来像是一种练习。说唱是一种语言艺术，无论你多大年纪，都需要有东西可说。《Magna Carta》的问题不在于杰斯年纪太大。而是他听起来很无聊。音乐与生活脱节，他的物质主义听起来过时了——即使在嘻哈音乐中也是如此。时尚、艺术、爱情，甚至是慈善事业都充满了烦躁的自我意识。整件事散发出一种中年危机的味道。

source: Indeed , as one travail passes the other , her book becomes a rolling dismissal of her mother 's dictum about keeping the hubby happy . This , though subtly and humorously delivered , is nevertheless fairly startling for the time . It is not too much to say that The Egg and I is a book-length example of the psychologist 's notion that a joke is a disguised form of aggression .
domestication: 果然，随着一个麻烦过去，另一个麻烦接踵而至，她的书成了一本对她母亲关于如何讨好丈夫的教条的持续否定。虽然这种否定是以微妙和幽默的方式呈现的，但在当时仍然相当令人震惊。毫不夸张地说，《鸡蛋与我》这本书就是心理学家所说的“笑话是一种隐蔽的攻击形式”的长篇例证。
foreignization: 确实，随着一个麻烦过去另一个到来，她的书成为了对她母亲关于让丈夫开心的教条的一种连续的否定。尽管是以微妙和幽默的方式表达的，但这在当时还是相当令人震惊的。说《鸡蛋与我》是一本长篇的心理学家观点的例子，即笑话是一种伪装的攻击形式，也并不过分。

source: For the next 20 minutes , no one made a sound beyond the occasional snapping of a twig . One woman took off her sandals and trod barefoot through the grass . A man in a red bandanna faced a tree and locked eyes with its trunk . Another man climbed a nearby picnic table , lay down on his back and stared up into the green canopy , unblinking .

source: Comedies continue to be overrun by achingly cute kids , including Redd Foxx 's much-touted return in CBS ' The Royal Family , and ABC 's Home Improvement , a favorite of advertisers that stars comic Tim Allen as a TV fix- it personality whose macho front ca n't redeem him at home . A one-joke show , albeit a funny joke .

source: Separate about one-third of the fried bacon-ginger mixture and crush with a mortar and pestle or chop finely with a knife . ( Reserve the remainder for garnish . ) Mix with vinegar in bowl . Add sugar and mustard and whisk well . Slowly add olive oil in a thin stream , whisking constantly . The vinaigrette should thicken and emulsify slightly . Season to taste with salt , pepper and optional chile flakes .
domestication: 取出大约三分之一炒好的培根姜末混合物，用研钵捣碎或刀切细。（剩下的留作装饰用。）将切好的混合物放入碗中，加入醋。再加糖和芥末，充分搅拌均匀。慢慢倒入橄榄油，一边倒一边不停搅拌。调味汁应该会稍微变稠并乳化。最后根据个人口味加盐、胡椒粉，还可以加点辣椒片。

source: Today , Mr. Harrison , whose struggles with cancer have made news in recent weeks , is embarrassed about the record 's immodesty . " It was difficult to resist re-mixing every track , " he admits in the new liner notes . " I would like to liberate some of the songs from the big production that seemed appropriate at the time , but now seem a bit over the top with the reverb in the wall of sound . "
domestication: 哈里森先生最近因与癌症斗争的消息上了新闻，今天他对自己这张唱片的张扬感到有些不好意思。“当时真难抗拒重新混音每一首歌的冲动，”他在新的唱片内页文字中承认，“我想让一些歌曲从当初觉得合适的宏大制作中解脱出来，现在听起来，那些回声堆砌的音响效果有点过分了。”
foreignization: 今天，哈里森先生，最近几周因与癌症抗争而成为新闻焦点，对自己的唱片的不谦虚感到尴尬。“很难抵制重新混音每首歌的冲动，”他在新的唱片内页说明中承认。“我想让一些歌曲从当时似乎合适的大型制作中解放出来，但现在看来，声音墙中的混响有点过头了。”

Today , Mr. Harrison , whose struggles with cancer have made news in recent weeks , is embarrassed about the record 's immodesty . " I would like to liberate some of the songs from the big production that seemed appropriate at the time , but now seem a bit over the top with the reverb in the wall of sound . "
