source: Black South Africans have always fought the system . They 're also fighting each other these days too . " Tribal warfare " is often the simple explanation cited for such suicidal divisiveness on the eve of South Africa 's first democratic elections next week and amid such hope for national unity . But the simple answer is nearly always the wrong one in this land .
domestication: 黑人南非人一直都在与体制作斗争，如今他们也开始相互争斗。在南非下周即将举行首次民主选举，全国人民都满怀希望团结一心之际，这种自杀式的分裂常被简单地归咎为“部落战争”。但在这个国家，简单的答案往往都是错误的。

source: The Road Runner requested red-light camera intersection collision data for two nearly year-long periods before and after the vote . Additionally , a TPD officer provided a spreadsheet with speeding and red-light running violation data -- not actual police citations -- for the two months after the ban and the same period the year before .

The Road Runner requested red-light camera intersection collision data for two nearly year-long periods before and after the vote . source: Gone are the days of good will after the Sept. 11 attacks , when passengers , airlines and airports were willing to put up with all kinds of intrusive and time-consuming security measures . Gone , too , are the months when carriers desperately wooed frightened travelers by catering to their needs and when well-intentioned federal officials optimistically laid out new safety plans .

foreignization: 9月11日恐怖袭击后的好意时光已经一去不复返了，当时乘客、航空公司和机场都愿意忍受各种侵入性和耗时的安全措施。同样一去不复返的还有那些航空公司拼命迎合害怕旅行的旅客需求的几个月，以及联邦官员怀着良好意图乐观地制定新安全计划的时期。

source: Most of the schools follow programs similar to those used by courts as alternatives to litigation . Students in conflict may not be forced into mediation , but rather have to be willing participants . The mediators promise to hold everything they hear in confidence and to remain neutral . The goal is to get adversaries to come up with their own solutions and to sign an agreement stating what they will do to avoid future conflicts .
domestication: 大多数学校都采用了类似于法院用来替代诉讼的项目。学生们发生冲突时，不会被强迫进行调解，而是必须自愿参与。调解员承诺对听到的一切保密，并保持中立。目的是让对立双方自己找出解决办法，并签署协议，明确他们将采取什么措施来避免未来的冲突。
foreignization: 大多数学校采用的项目与法院作为诉讼替代方案所使用的类似。冲突中的学生不会被强迫进行调解，而必须是自愿参与者。调解员承诺对听到的一切保密，并保持中立。目标是让对立双方提出自己的解决方案，并签署一份协议，声明他们将采取什么行动以避免未来冲突。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Most of the schools follow programs similar to those used by courts as alternatives to litigation . Students in conflict may not be forced into mediation , but rather have to be willing participants . The mediators promise to hold everything they hear in confidence and to remain neutral . The goal is to get adversaries to come up with their own solutions and to sign an agreement stating what they will do to avoid future conflicts .

source: Of course , his big hits were the big winners on Sunday . source: Joe Cascarella , then 27 , went home to Philadelphia and took an offseason job singing on the radio . That winter , he drew the notice of a young socialite , Gertrude " Jerry " Shapiro of Baltimore . They eloped during the 1936 All-Star break over the objections of Jerry 's father , who was certain , as Joe remembers it , that " ballplayers never amounted to anything . "

source: What could be different next time ? Dialogues between police and Cinco de Mayo planners should take place in the weeks beforehand . Police could be encouraged to wear sombreros as an indication that they are culturally sensitive . They could mingle in pairs or groups of three , stopping to chat with individuals as much as possible . Cinco de Mayo planners might encourage people to plan parties at home after the Sunday festivities . A Sunday night curfew might be set for 10 p.m. for anyone under 18 .
domestication: 下次有什么不同呢？警察和“五月五日节”组织者应该提前几周就开始沟通。警察们可以戴上宽边帽，表明他们尊重文化差异。他们可以两三个一组，尽量多地停下来和人聊天。组织者也可以鼓励大家在周日的庆祝活动后，在家里举办聚会。周日晚上可以对18岁以下的人实行10点宵禁。
foreignization: 下次可能会有什么不同？警察和五月五日节策划者之间的对话应该在活动前几周进行。可以鼓励警察戴上宽边帽，以此表明他们具有文化敏感性。他们可以两人或三人一组混入人群中，尽可能多地停下来与个人交谈。五月五日节的策划者可能会鼓励人们在周日的庆祝活动后在家举办派对。可以为18岁以下的人设定周日晚上10点的宵禁。

source: At a second hearing 12 days later , Mr. Marabh 's lawyer persuaded the officer to release his client to an uncle , noting that the uncle was an imam who had preached on , among other topics , " How to Protect Your Family From Satan . " The lawyer did not mention that the uncle also worked at the school headed by Mahmoud Jaballah , who Canadian intelligence officials had long suspected was a member of the terrorist group Al Jihad ; in August , when Mr. Jaballah was jailed on charges of terrorism , the uncle took over as principal .
domestication: 12天后的第二次听证会上，马拉布先生的律师说服了官员，让他的客户被交给了他的一位叔叔照顾。律师提到，这位叔叔是一位伊玛目，曾讲过《如何保护家庭免受恶魔侵害》等话题。但律师没有提的是，这位叔叔还在马哈茂德·贾巴勒领导的学校工作，而加拿大情报部门早就怀疑贾巴勒是恐怖组织“圣战”的成员；8月，贾巴勒因涉嫌恐怖活动被捕入狱后，这位叔叔接替了校长的位置。
foreignization: 在12天后的第二次听证会上，马拉布先生的律师说服了官员将他的当事人释放给一位叔叔，指出这位叔叔是一位曾在多个话题上布道的伊玛目，其中包括“如何保护你的家庭免受撒旦的侵害”。律师没有提到这位叔叔也在马哈茂德·贾巴勒领导的学校工作，而加拿大情报官员长期以来一直怀疑马哈茂德·贾巴勒是恐怖组织“圣战”的成员；8月，当贾巴勒因涉嫌恐怖主义被关押时，这位叔叔接任了校长一职。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

At a second hearing 12 days later , Mr. Marabh 's lawyer persuaded the officer to release his client to an uncle , noting that the uncle was an imam who had preached on , among other topics , " How to Protect Your Family From Satan . " The lawyer did not mention that the uncle also worked at the school headed by Mahmoud Jaballah , who Canadian intelligence officials had long suspected was a member of the terrorist group Al Jihad ; in August , when Mr. Jaballah was jailed on charges of terrorism , the uncle took over as principal .

source: Jameel Jaffer , director of the ACLU 's national security program , said yesterday evening that it is " grim " and " troubling " for the Obama administration to say that information about purported abuses should be withheld because it might fuel anti-American propaganda . He said that amounts to an assertion that " the greater the abuse , the more important it is that it should remain secret . " Jaffer said the ACLU is convinced that the public should have " access to the complete record of what took place in the CIA 's prisons and on whose authority . "
domestication: Jameel Jaffer，美国公民自由联盟国家安全项目的负责人，昨晚表示，奥巴马政府声称应隐瞒所谓的虐待信息，以防这些信息被用来煽动反美宣传，这让人感到“沮丧”和“不安”。他说，这种说法等同于“虐待越严重，就越应该保密”。Jaffer强调，美国公民自由联盟坚信公众有权“了解中情局监狱里发生的一切，以及是谁授意的”。
foreignization: 贾迈尔·贾弗，美国公民自由联盟国家安全项目的主任，昨天晚上说，奥巴马政府表示有关所谓虐待的信息应该被扣留，因为这可能会助长反美的宣传，这是“严峻”和“令人不安”的。他说，这相当于宣称“虐待越严重，就越重要的是它应该保密。” 贾弗说，美国公民自由联盟确信公众应该“获得在中情局监狱里发生的事情以及是在谁的授权下发生的完整记录的访问权。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Jameel Jaffer , director of the ACLU 's national security program , said yesterday evening that it is " grim " and " troubling " for the Obama administration to say that information about purported abuses should be withheld because it might fuel anti-American propaganda . He said that amounts to an assertion that " the greater the abuse , the more important it is that it should remain secret . " Jaffer said the ACLU is convinced that the public should have " access to the complete record of what took place in the CIA 's prisons and on whose authority . "

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Jameel Jaffer , director of the ACLU 's national security program , said yesterday evening that it is " grim " and " troubling " for the Obama administration to say that information about purported abuses should be withheld because it might fuel anti-American propaganda . He said that amounts to an assertion that " the greater the abuse , the more important it is that it should remain secret . " Jaffer said the ACLU is convinced that the public should have " access to the complete record of what took place in the CIA 's prisons and on whose authority . "
贾迈尔·贾弗，美国公民自由联盟国家安全项目的主任，昨天晚上说，奥巴马政府表示有关所谓虐待的信息应该被扣留，因为这可能会助长反美的宣传，这是“严峻”和“令人不安”的。他说，这相当于宣称“虐待越严重，就越重要的是它应该保密。” 贾弗说，美国公民自由联盟确信公众应该“获得在中情局监狱里发生的事情以及是在谁的授权下发生的完整记录的访问权。”

source: Somehow , though , the objective has often gotten lost in translation as Kreider , notorious for internalizing , has been prone to overthinking matters . source: Hence , would you put your trust in Owens and developers whose only god is money and power - with a total lack of common sense or concern for our children and future generations ? Or , would you put your trust in Albert Einstein or anyone with common sense ? The only logical , reasonable , rational , realistic and responsible vote for more dams in Colorado which will give us millions of added people is to vote ' no ' on Referendum A.
domestication: 所以，你是要相信那些只把金钱和权力当上帝的欧文斯和他的开发者们，他们根本不懂常识，也不关心我们的子孙后代？还是要相信阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦或任何一个有常识的人？对于在科罗拉多建更多水坝，让数百万人口涌入的问题，唯一合乎逻辑、理智、理性、现实且负责任的选择，就是在公投A中投“反对”票。
foreignization: 因此，你是会选择信任欧文斯和那些唯一信仰是金钱和权力、完全缺乏常识或对我们的孩子和未来世代的关心的开发者们？还是会选择信任阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦或任何一个有常识的人？对于在科罗拉多州建设更多水坝以容纳数百万新增人口的唯一合乎逻辑、合理、理性、现实和负责任的投票方式是在公投A中投“反对”票。

Hence , would you put your trust in Owens and developers whose only god is money and power - with a total lack of common sense or concern for our children and future generations ? Or , would you put your trust in Albert Einstein or anyone with common sense ? The only logical , reasonable , rational , realistic and responsible vote for more dams in Colorado which will give us millions of added people is to vote ' no ' on Referendum A.
因此，你是会选择信任欧文斯和那些唯一信仰是金钱和权力、完全缺乏常识或对我们的孩子和未来世代的关心的开发者们？还是会选择信任阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦或任何一个有常识的人？对于在科罗拉多州建设更多水坝以容纳数百万新增人口的唯一合乎逻辑、合理、理性、现实和负责任的投票方式是在公投A中投“反对”票。

source: Once complete in 2023 -- according to current estimates -- the massive six-phase project will provide six lanes of travel , as well as bike lanes and pedestrian safety features , from North Oracle to Swan roads at a cost of about $100 million in 2008 dollars . The engineering estimate for Phase 2 was a little over $17 million , but Phoenix contractor Markham won with a bid of $14.5 million , the money for which will come from the sales-tax-funded Regional Transportation Authority .
domestication: 据目前估计，这个庞大的六阶段项目将于2023年完工，从北奥拉克尔到天鹅路将提供六条行车道，还有自行车道和人行安全设施，按2008年的美元计算，成本约为1亿美元。第二阶段的工程估算费用略超1700万美元，但菲尼克斯的马克汉姆公司以1450万美元的报价中标，这笔资金将来自销售税资助的区域交通管理局。

source: Fast forward to 1989 . Li , working as a translator for the Shanghai sports institute , presented the long-hidden ball to a visiting American coach with instructions to take it to the Hall of Fame . source: " As a woman becomes more vulnerable in the relationship , then quite naturally her feelings tend to rise and fall . For many weeks she may feel loving and happy , but then suddenly , after the wave reaches its peak , the wave crashes and she hits bottom . When the wave crashes , a woman needs a man 's love the most . "
domestication: 女人在感情里越脆弱，心情就越容易起伏不定。有时候她可能会连续几周都感到爱意满满、幸福洋溢，但突然间，当这种幸福感达到顶峰时，一切又会瞬间崩塌，她的心情跌至谷底。当这股情感的浪花落下时，女人最需要的就是男人的关爱和支持。

source: At a time when we are at war with terrorist groups that have long-term and deeply imbedded cells in the United States , Canada and territory of virtually all of our Western allies , one would think that we could see beyond the spotlight shining on one man to the very real danger that lurks just beyond our view .
domestication: 在这个时候，我们正与那些在美国、加拿大以及几乎所有西方盟友领土上长期潜伏的恐怖组织作战，本该看得远一些，不要只盯着某一个人，而忽视了隐藏在视线之外的真正危险。
foreignization: 在我们与在美国、加拿大以及几乎所有西方盟友领土上长期存在并深深嵌入的恐怖组织作战的时候，人们本应能够超越聚焦在一个人身上的聚光灯，看到隐藏在我们视线之外的真正危险。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

At a time when we are at war with terrorist groups that have long-term and deeply imbedded cells in the United States , Canada and territory of virtually all of our Western allies , one would think that we could see beyond the spotlight shining on one man to the very real danger that lurks just beyond our view .

source: I do n't understand why she would like female firefighters to be called firemen . They are n't men . Jobs that use gender-specific terms to describe the people who work there are going to attract more people of the gender used in the job title . Maybe she does n't think women belong in certain fields , and that 's why she 'd like the unnecessary term " man " left in the title .
domestication: 我不明白她为什么希望称呼女性消防员为“消防员”。她们又不是男人。用性别特定的词来描述某个职业，只会吸引更多对应性别的从业者。可能她觉得有些领域就不适合女人，所以才想在职称里保留这个多余的“男”字。
foreignization: 我不明白为什么她希望女性消防员被称为消防员。她们不是男性。使用性别特定术语来描述从业人员的工作将会吸引更多该性别的人。也许她认为女性不应该属于某些领域，这就是为什么她希望在职称中保留不必要的“man”这个词。

source: The garment industry has drawn literally millions of women out of villages into large cities in poor countries around the world . For deeply traditional countries like Bangladesh , where girls who leave their villages are seldom welcomed back , the globalization of trade in apparel and textiles has helped transform a way of life unchanged for generations .
domestication: 服装行业已经把数百万妇女从乡村带进了世界各地的贫困大城市的工厂里。对于像孟加拉国这样传统根深蒂固的地方，一旦女孩离开村子就很难再回去了。服装和纺织品贸易的全球化，帮助改变了延续了几代人的生活方式。
foreignization: 服装业已经将数以百万计的妇女从村庄吸引到世界各地贫困国家的大城市中。对于像孟加拉国这样传统根深蒂固的国家来说，离开村庄的女孩很少被欢迎回来，服装和纺织品贸易的全球化帮助改变了延续了几代人生活方式。

source: First , that the United States was massively attacked via cyber/media warfare by the government of Russia . And they continue to attack our political system and our way of life . Second , immediate and significant action must be taken to root out this insidious virus . I would consider much stronger actions against Russian President Vladimir Putin , the GRU and the Russian government .
domestication: 首先，美国遭到了俄罗斯政府的大规模网络和媒体攻击。他们一直在侵扰我们的政治体系，破坏我们的生活方式。其次，我们必须立即采取重大行动，彻底铲除这个阴险的病毒。对于俄罗斯总统普京、俄联邦安全局（GRU）和俄罗斯政府，我考虑采取更加强硬的措施。
foreignization: 首先，美国受到了俄罗斯政府通过网络/媒体战争的大规模攻击。他们继续攻击我们的政治制度和生活方式。其次，必须立即采取重大行动来根除这一隐秘的病毒。我会考虑对俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京、格鲁乌（俄联邦安全局）和俄罗斯政府采取更强硬的行动。

source: Stockton , a boom-and-bust town hit early and hard by the nation 's foreclosure crisis , is digging out of the financial excesses of its past . Here , two hours from the San Francisco Bay Area , more than 7,500 homes and condominiums have been lost to foreclosure since the end of 2006 , says real estate researcher MDA DataQuick . The glut has cut median home prices by more than half , spurring multiple offers on foreclosed homes and record sales .
domestication: 斯托克顿，这个曾经兴盛一时如今却因全国抵押贷款危机而早早遭受重创的小镇，正在努力摆脱过去的财务困境。这里，距离旧金山湾区不过两小时车程，自2006年底以来，已经有超过7500套住房和公寓因无法偿还贷款而被银行收回。房地产研究公司MDA DataQuick的数据显示，住房供应过剩使得中位房价跌去了一大半，导致法拍房出现多个买家竞购，销售记录屡创新高。
foreignization: 受全国止赎危机早期和严重打击的盛衰之城斯托克顿正在摆脱过去金融过度的困境。据房地产研究公司MDA DataQuick称，在距离旧金山湾区两小时车程的地方，自2006年底以来，已有超过7,500套住房和公寓因止赎而丧失。过剩导致中位房价下跌超过一半，刺激了多个对止赎房屋的报价和创纪录的销售。

轻轨对经济发展的作用比人们想象的要大得多，主街联盟主席埃德·沃尔夫说。实际上，在轻轨开通前，市中心就已经开始了大量的开发活动，大家都是冲着轻轨来的，比如改建的阁楼公寓、新开的餐馆，还有各种楼宇的翻新重建。

source: When our blood drive got canceled , we thought , " Well , that 's it for the day . " But already at 8 a.m. in the morning , people were gathering , wanting to help . They were n't doing it because it was the cool place to be or because this is fun , but because they wanted to do something . I was so inspired . Instead of saying , " Woe is me , " or something negative , they were thinking , " What can I do that is positive ? "
domestication: 我们的献血活动被取消了，本来以为这一天就算泡汤了。可是才早上八点，就有人开始聚集，想要帮忙。他们可不是为了赶时髦或者图个乐子，而是真的想做点什么。我深受鼓舞。大家没有唉声叹气，反而在想：我能做些什么有意义的事？

source: So many people are paralyzed by this ( perfectionist ) vision . Very gifted people , they win and they win , and they are told that they win because they are a winner . That seems like a positive thing to tell children , but ultimately , what that means is when they lose , it must make them a loser . I think that kind of fixed view of intelligence makes you brittle . It makes you unable to deal with inevitable setbacks .
domestication: 这么多人被这种（完美主义）的观念束缚住了。很多有天赋的人，他们赢了又赢，还被告知是因为他们是赢家才赢的。这听起来像是对孩子说的好话，但最终这意味着，一旦他们输了，就成了输家。我觉得这种对智力的固定看法让人变得脆弱。它让你无法应对不可避免的挫折。
foreignization: 如此多的人被这种（完美主义）的愿景所麻痹。非常有天赋的人，他们赢了又赢，被告知之所以赢是因为他们是赢家。这看起来像是告诉孩子的一件正面的事情，但最终，这意味着当他们失败时，必须让他们成为失败者。我认为这种对智力的固定看法使你变得脆弱。它使你无法应对不可避免的挫折。

I think that kind of fixed view of intelligence makes you brittle . It makes you unable to deal with inevitable setbacks .

source: But revenue does n't necessarily mean profit . Because so much of its revenue simply goes through its hands straight from traveler to airline or tour operator , Omega 's profit is only about 0.25 percent of revenue , Dan Bohan said . While Omega has consistently made between $ 1 million and $ 2 million a year , the company will lose money for the first time in a decade in 1998 if it ca n't renegotiate some multiyear contracts signed before the airline commission cuts .
domestication: 但收入并不等于利润。由于大量收入只是从旅客手中直接转给了航空公司或旅游运营商，所以欧米茄的利润只占收入的约0.25%，丹·博汉说。虽然欧米茄每年的利润一直保持在100万到200万美元之间，但如果不能重新谈判一些在航空佣金削减前签订的多年合同，公司将在1998年首次出现十年来的亏损。

source: Appearing before centrist Democrats late last year , he reminded them of the themes on which he had first run for President : " This era requires a Government that neither attempts to solve problems for people , nor leaves them alone to fend for themselves . Instead we envision a Government that gives people the tools to solve their own problems and make the most of their own lives . "
domestication: 去年年底，他向中间派民主党人发表讲话时，重提了自己首次竞选总统时的主题：“这个时代需要的政府，既不是试图替人民解决问题，也不是放任不管让人民自生自灭。我们要的是给人民提供工具，让他们自己解决问题，发挥自己的潜力。”
foreignization: 去年年底出现在中间派民主党人面前时，他提醒他们自己首次竞选总统时的主题：“这个时代需要一个既不试图为人民解决问题，也不放任人民自生自灭的政府。相反，我们设想的政府是给予人民解决问题和充分利用自己生活的工具。”

messages_domestication.content:

Appearing before centrist Democrats late last year , he reminded them of the themes on which he had first run for President : " This era requires a Government that neither attempts to solve problems for people , nor leaves them alone to fend for themselves . Instead we envision a Government that gives people the tools to solve their own problems and make the most of their own lives . "
去年年底，他向中间派民主党人发表讲话时，重提了自己首次竞选总统时的主题：“这个时代需要的政府，既不是试图替人民解决问题，也不是放任不管让人民自生自灭。我们要的是给人民提供工具，让他们自己解决问题，发挥自己的潜力。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Appearing before centrist Democrats late last year , he reminded them of the themes on which he had first run for President : " This era requires a Government that neither attempts to solve problems for people , nor leaves them alone to fend for themselves . Instead we envision a Government that gives people the tools to solve their own problems and make the most of their own lives . "
去年年底出现在中间派民主党人面前时，他提醒他们自己首次竞选总统时的主题：“这个时代需要一个既不试图为人民解决问题，也不放任人民自生自灭的政府。相反，我们设想的政府是给予人民解决问题和充分利用自己生活的工具。”

source: Still , the end to decades of textile and clothing quotas on Jan. 1 is beginning to spin the economics of the developing world around and around . The expiration of the quotas is intended to allow for free-flowing trade in garment making . It used to be that by guaranteeing a certain level of clothing production from just about every poor country in the world , quotas became a classic engine for nations with cheap labor and low skills to connect effectively with the global economy .
domestication: 不过，1月1日纺织品和服装配额制度的结束，已经开始让发展中国家的经济形势发生翻天覆地的变化。配额制度到期的初衷是让服装制造业的贸易自由流动。过去，通过确保几乎所有贫困国家都能有一定水平的服装生产，这些配额成了低技能劳动力廉价国家有效接入全球经济的经典引擎。
foreignization: 仍然，1月1日结束的数十年的纺织品和服装配额开始使发展中国家的经济发生翻天覆地的变化。配额的到期旨在允许服装制造的自由贸易。过去，通过确保来自世界上几乎每个贫穷国家的一定水平的服装生产，配额成为了那些劳动力廉价、技能低下的国家有效接入全球经济的经典引擎。

不过，1月1日纺织品和服装配额制度的结束，已经开始让发展中国家的经济形势发生翻天覆地的变化。配额制度到期的初衷是让服装制造业的贸易自由流动。过去，通过确保几乎所有贫困国家都能有一定水平的服装生产，这些配额成了低技能劳动力廉价国家有效接入全球经济的经典引擎。

source: Simmons reached the state tourney by finishing second at the Region III tourney to Paloma Escobedo of Westside . Escobedo reached the 5A state final to face Francis , but the Wolves ' freshman lost in three sets 4-6 , 6-3 , 7-6 ( 7-5 ) . Simmons and Escobedo should provide some thrilling head-to-head matchups in the coming years .
domestication: 西蒙斯在区域三锦标赛中屈居帕洛玛·埃斯科贝多之后，获得了州锦标赛的入场券。这位来自西区的选手埃斯科贝多一路杀入了5A级州决赛，与弗朗西斯对决，但这位狼队的新手在三盘大战中以4-6、6-3、7-6（7-5）败下阵来。未来几年，西蒙斯和埃斯科贝多之间的较量定会精彩纷呈，让人拭目以待。
foreignization: 西蒙斯通过在第三区锦标赛中以第二名的成绩（仅次于西区的帕洛玛·埃斯科贝多）晋级州锦标赛。埃斯科贝多进入5A州决赛，对阵弗朗西斯，但这位狼队的新秀在三盘比赛中以4-6、6-3、7-6（7-5）告负。西蒙斯和埃斯科贝多在未来几年应该会提供一些激动人心的对决。

source: IN her home here the other day , Roseanne Barr was drinking warm hazelnut coffee and talking with her son Jake Pentland about the reality of a man named Ted . This man , Ted , whose last name is Jessup , is a producer Ms. Barr hired to help her create a cooking show . This might seem to qualify Ted as real , if less than cautious in his choice of employers .
domestication: 前几天，罗珊·巴尔在家中喝着温热的榛子咖啡，和儿子杰克·彭特兰聊起一个叫泰德的人。这泰德，全名泰德·杰斯普，是巴尔女士找来帮忙制作烹饪节目的制片人。这事儿听起来，泰德倒像是个真人，只是选老板的眼光欠佳了些。

source: Sometimes seniors can buy cheaper tickets during an airfare war . But to take advantage of a fare war , you have to keep alert to the sales , buy quickly before the cheap seats are sold out and travel during specified time periods . By buying booklets you can fly on a discount at any time and you spare yourself the hassle of keeping track of the ups and downs of ticket prices . And you already have the discount if an emergency requires an immediate trip .
domestication: 有时候，老一辈的人能在机票价格战中买到更便宜的票。但要抓住这种优惠，得时刻留意特价信息，眼明手快地抢在低价位座位售罄前下单，还得在指定的时间段出行。买机票手册就方便多了，随时都能享受折扣价，省去了跟踪票价涨跌的麻烦。要是突然有急事需要立即出行，你已经提前有了折扣，心里也有底。
foreignization: 有时老年人可以在机票价格战中买到更便宜的票。但要利用票价战，您必须对促销活动保持警惕，在便宜的座位售罄前迅速购买，并在指定的时间段内出行。通过购买机票册，您可以随时以折扣价飞行，并且免去了跟踪票价涨跌的麻烦。如果突发情况需要立即出行，您已经享有折扣。

source: Nichols , 29 , pleaded guilty to a multi-million dollar bank fraud while working as the office manager of the Marana Stockyards and Livestock Market , owned by Clay Parsons and his family . While Nichols serves a five-year prison sentence and pays back $3 million in restitution , his parents now face 11 felony counts for their alleged role in the theft , according to an updated indictment filed Jan. 23 in U.S. District Court in Tucson .
domestication: 29岁的尼科尔斯认罪了，他在担任马拉纳牲畜市场和交易所办公室经理期间，犯下了数百万美元的银行欺诈案，这个市场是克莱·帕森斯和他的家人经营的。尼科尔斯现在要服五年刑期，还得还300万美元的赔偿金。据1月23日在美国亚利桑那州图森市联邦法院提交的更新起诉书显示，他的父母也因涉嫌参与盗窃，面临11项重罪指控。

source: " The Rodriguez government has achieved 20 percent of what it promised . Its worst error is that the process of democratization has n't been planned , " says Euclides Acevedo , head of the opposition social-democratic February Revolutionary Party . " The protagonists of the democratic process , the popular movement and social organizations , have not been asked to take part . Everything remains in the hands of the government and the Colorado Party . "

罗德里格斯政府兑现的承诺只有两成。反对党社会民主二月革命党的领袖欧克利德斯·阿塞韦多说：“最糟糕的是，民主化进程压根儿就没有规划好。”他还指出，“民主进程的主角，即群众运动和社会组织，都没被邀请参与其中。所有事情都掌握在政府和科罗拉多党的手里。”

" The Rodriguez government has achieved 20 percent of what it promised . Its worst error is that the process of democratization has n't been planned , " says Euclides Acevedo , head of the opposition social-democratic February Revolutionary Party . " The protagonists of the democratic process , the popular movement and social organizations , have not been asked to take part . Everything remains in the hands of the government and the Colorado Party . "
“罗德里格斯政府只实现了其所承诺的20%。它最严重的错误是民主化进程没有被规划，”反对党社会民主党二月革命党的领导人尤克利德斯·阿塞韦多说。“民主进程的主角，民众运动和社会组织，没有被要求参与。一切都掌握在政府和科罗拉多党手中。”

source: The mom-and-pop motels of our childhoods are mostly a thing of the past . They 're being torn down one by one to make way for more than 20 high-rise developments under construction or slated to begin work this year . Property values are way too high for modest two- or three-story motels . Opening this spring are the Legacy by the Sea , Sterling Beach and En Soleil ( you ca n't miss its mango and turquoise twin towers ) .
domestication: 我们小时候常见的家庭式小旅馆，如今大多成了回忆。这些旅馆一个接一个地被拆掉，取而代之的是今年正在建设或即将开工的二十多个高层项目。现在的地价太高了，建个两层或三层的小旅馆根本划不来。今年春天，海边将有几家新酒店开业，比如海边的遗产酒店、斯特林海滩酒店，还有恩索莱尔酒店，它的两座芒果色和青绿色的双塔你一眼就能认出来。
foreignization: 我们童年时的夫妻店汽车旅馆大多已成为过去。它们一座接一座地被拆除，以腾出空间建设20多个高层开发项目，这些项目要么正在建设中，要么计划在今年开工。对于简陋的两层或三层汽车旅馆来说，房产价值太高了。今年春天开业的有海边遗产酒店、斯特林海滩酒店和恩索莱尔酒店（你不会错过它的芒果色和蓝绿色双塔）。

source: The 32,700-nautical mile Volvo Ocean Race is the ultimate test for skipper and crew . It includes nine oceangoing legs , with ports of call on five continents . There are two major crossings of the Southern Ocean , which has the Earth 's biggest waves , howling gale-force winds , freezing temperatures and icebergs . It 's not uncommon for these lightweight sleds with huge sails to surf down the face of 40-foot waves .
domestication: 沃尔沃环球帆船赛全长32700海里，是对船长和船员的终极考验。比赛分九段跨洋航行，沿途停靠五大洲的港口。其中有两次横跨南大洋的航程，那里有地球上最大的海浪、呼啸的强风、刺骨的寒冷和漂浮的冰山。这些轻盈的大帆船常常在40英尺高的巨浪上冲浪，这样的场景屡见不鲜。
foreignization: 32,700海里的沃尔沃环球帆船赛是对船长和船员的终极考验。它包括九个远洋赛段，在五大洲设有停靠港。有两次穿越南大洋的重大航程，那里有地球上最大的海浪、呼啸的强风、冰冻的温度和冰山。这些轻量级的帆船带着巨大的帆在40英尺高的海浪面上冲浪并不少见。

source: Prototypes of the needle-nose bird were shown publicly in 1967 , and British Airways and Air France began passenger flights in 1976 . The aircraft inspired awe : It flew at twice the speed of sound , about 1,300 miles per hour , at an altitude of up to 60,000 feet . Six flight attendants lavished luxurious service on a maximum of 100 passengers .

source: The only thing Nelson will admit to regretting is associating his name with a cigarette company back in 1936 . A devout man who to this day attends prayer meetings and church at the Hilltop Church of Christ , he never smoked , drank , chased women or stayed out late , something Snead still ribs him about . But he needed the money , and he took a $500 fee for endorsing a cigarette called 20 Grand . When the ads came out , the letters came in .
domestication: 纳尔逊唯一承认后悔的事就是1936年和一家香烟公司扯上了关系。他是个虔诚的人，至今还定期参加山顶基督教会的祈祷会和礼拜活动，从不抽烟、喝酒、追女人或深夜在外闲逛，这些事斯尼德到现在还经常拿他打趣。但当时他确实需要钱，就收了500美元代言了一种叫“20 Grand”的香烟。广告一出来，信件就像雪花一样飞来了。
foreignization: 纳尔逊唯一承认感到后悔的是在1936年将自己的名字与一家香烟公司联系在一起。作为一个至今仍参加祈祷会和在基督山山顶教堂做礼拜的虔诚人士，他从未吸烟、饮酒、追逐女性或深夜外出，斯尼德至今仍会拿这些事情取笑他。但他当时需要钱，因此接受了500美元的费用，为一种名为“20 Grand”的香烟做代言。当广告发布后，信件也随之而来。

A devout man who to this day attends prayer meetings and church at the Hilltop Church of Christ , he never smoked , drank , chased women or stayed out late , something Snead still ribs him about . But he needed the money , and he took a $500 fee for endorsing a cigarette called 20 Grand . When the ads came out , the letters came in .
纳尔逊唯一承认感到后悔的是在1936年将自己的名字与一家香烟公司联系在一起。作为一个至今仍参加祈祷会和在基督山山顶教堂做礼拜的虔诚人士，他从未吸烟、饮酒、追逐女性或深夜外出，斯尼德至今仍会拿这些事情取笑他。但他当时需要钱，因此接受了500美元的费用，为一种名为“20 Grand”的香烟做代言。当广告发布后，信件也随之而来。

source: I 'm glad we 're getting a new superintendent . He needs to lean toward academics . I think all of the candidates will qualify education-wise . He needs to be strong . It 's a high position and it will take a special person to do the job . The Gwinnett County School System needs improvements and this is a start . He needs to be able to say : " Whether you like it or not , this is what we are going to do . " I really think OBE took a lot of time and energy .
domestication: 我很高兴我们能迎来一位新的督学。他得重视学术。我想所有候选人都会在教育方面合格的。他必须要有魄力。这是个高职位，需要一个特别的人来胜任。格威内特县的学校系统需要改进，这是一次好的开始。他得敢说：“不管你们喜不喜欢，这就是我们要做的。”我真的觉得OBE（基于成果的教育）耗费了太多时间和精力。

source: While everything is done to make every seat in the house a visually satisfying one , the fact is , the spectator on the side or in back will miss some of the larger compositions . Still , the greater naturalism and theatricality of the productions in the round , plus the glories of the huge chorus and orchestra , more than recompense the viewer .
domestication: 为了确保每个座位都有良好的视觉体验，剧场确实下了不少功夫。不过说实话，坐在边上的或后面的观众还是会错过一些大场面。话又说回来，四面舞台的自然和戏剧性更强，加上宏大的合唱团和管弦乐队的精彩表演，这些都能让观众觉得值回票价。
foreignization: 虽然一切努力都是为了让每个座位都能获得视觉上的满足，但事实是，坐在侧面或后面的观众会错过一些较大的构图。然而，四面舞台演出的更大自然主义和戏剧性，加上庞大的合唱团和乐队的辉煌，足以弥补观众的损失。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

While everything is done to make every seat in the house a visually satisfying one , the fact is , the spectator on the side or in back will miss some of the larger compositions . Still , the greater naturalism and theatricality of the productions in the round , plus the glories of the huge chorus and orchestra , more than recompense the viewer .

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

While everything is done to make every seat in the house a visually satisfying one , the fact is , the spectator on the side or in back will miss some of the larger compositions . Still , the greater naturalism and theatricality of the productions in the round , plus the glories of the huge chorus and orchestra , more than recompense the viewer .
虽然一切努力都是为了让每个座位都能获得视觉上的满足，但事实是，坐在侧面或后面的观众会错过一些较大的构图。然而，四面舞台演出的更大自然主义和戏剧性，加上庞大的合唱团和乐队的辉煌，足以弥补观众的损失。

source: I thought , no matter what , this doctor had done a good thing -- he was saving people . The Chinese government had done something bad , but the doctor had n't . I was a little confused -- could I do this documentary ? I also know that performing transplants is a special skill . For China 's medical schools to develop these skills , why would I want to hurt them ? I asked BBC not to air the documentary right away .
domestication: 我觉得，不管怎样，这位医生做的是好事——他在救人。中国政府做了不好的事，但医生没做。我有点儿犯糊涂了——我能不能拍这部纪录片呢？我也知道，做移植手术是一门特殊的技艺。中国医学界好不容易才掌握了这些技能，我为什么要伤害他们呢？于是我请求BBC暂时不要播这部纪录片。
foreignization: 我想，不管怎样，这位医生做了一件好事——他在救人。中国政府做了坏事，但医生没有。我有点困惑——我能做这个纪录片吗？我还知道，进行移植手术是一项特殊的技能。为了让中国的医学院校发展这些技能，我为什么要伤害他们呢？我要求BBC不要立即播出这部纪录片。

source: Given their shattering grief , it 's understandable they would confuse healing with revenge . But they will never find true healing by calling for one more murder . Murder victims ' families face a challenge most of us are mercifully spared . While hatred threatens their own humanity , and consumed by bitterness and sorrow , their only hope for true peace and healing lies in what must seem to them the impossibility of forgiveness .

source: Much of what Mr. Clinton provided for his party in the campaign was a new symbolism . He used small-scale family-based proposals to show middle-class America that he shared its values on issues like crime , education and welfare and that Democrats did not stand simply for redistribution of middle-class tax dollars to the poor and for 60 's counterculture values .
domestication: 克林顿先生在这次竞选中为他的政党带来了新的象征意义。他提出了以家庭为基础的小规模计划，向中产阶级美国人展示，他在犯罪、教育和福利等问题上与他们的价值观是一致的。他还表明，民主党并不仅仅代表将中产阶级的税款重新分配给穷人和支持六十年代的反主流文化价值观。

source: " I have had occasion to point out that the law must apply to all of us , even the rich and famous , " Lelling said , in a reference to his prosecution of the college admissions scandal . " Today , I would add that it must apply to the powerful . In certain quarters , I have heard the occasional gasp of dismay or outrage at the notion of holding a judge accountable for violating federal law . If this were a man or woman on the street , you would n't be hearing any of those gasps , and neither would I. "
domestication: 莱林说：“我曾多次指出，法律必须适用于所有人，包括那些有钱有势的人。”他这是在提到自己处理大学招生丑闻时的情况。“今天，我要补充一点，法律也必须适用于有权有势的人。有些地方，我听到有人对追究法官违反联邦法律的责任感到惊讶或愤怒。如果这是一般平民百姓，你们听不到这些声音，我也听不到。”
foreignization: “我曾指出，法律必须适用于我们所有人，即使是对富人和名人也是如此，”Lelling说，这是在提及他对大学入学丑闻的起诉。“今天，我要补充的是，它也必须适用于有权势的人。在某些圈子里，我偶尔会听到对将法官追究违反联邦法律的责任感到惊讶或愤怒的声音。如果这是一个普通的男女，你们不会听到这些惊讶声，我也不会。”

source: In July 1994 Westbrook accepted a six-month deferred sentence for the third-degree assault charge , which was expunged earlier this year after Westbrook did n't get in any additional trouble after six months . Nonetheless , then-Colorado coach Bill McCartney , keeping with previously established team policy , suspended Westbrook from the Buffaloes ' season opener last September .

source: Outlook : Losing Player of the Year Lisa Norris -- now at North Carolina after posting a 0.11 ERA and striking out 389 last year -- and a slew of other starters evens the playing field for the rest of the region . Still , Brookwood has built the kind of program that wo n't suddenly fall apart . " After graduating 18 people in two years , I think people have written us off , " Batchelor said . source: After creating a prototype , the guys ( they are almost always men ) enter start-up boot camps like Y Combinator , recruit a group of early investors , and perhaps launch a Kickstarter with a slick video . If the initial plan succeeds , the founders go into heedless expansion mode , which usually means selling off huge chunks of their company in exchange for gobs of money from venture capitalists . Then , after a few years , if all goes according to plan , they hit the big time -- an initial public offering and a chance to be the next face of the future .
domestication: 做出个原型后，这几个小伙子（几乎总是男的）就进了像Y Combinator这样的创业训练营，拉拢一群早期投资者，再搞个漂亮的视频，发起个Kickstarter众筹。如果初期计划顺利，创始人们就开始盲目扩张，通常就是把自己公司的大部分股份卖给风险投资人，换来一大笔钱。几年后，如果一切按计划进行，他们就能大展宏图——首次公开募股，成为未来的下一个明星。

source: UPS has hired almost 300 former welfare recipients in Georgia in full- and part-time positions . Even part-time employees receive full benefits , including medical , dental , prescriptions , retirement and stock purchase options , said Kerry Benedetto , UPS community relations manager . And UPS has approached MARTA about changing bus schedules and routes to accommodate its new employees .
domestication: UPS在乔治亚州雇用了近300名以前的福利领取者，有全职的，也有兼职的。即使是兼职员工也能享受到全套福利，包括医疗、牙科、处方药、退休金和股票购买计划，UPS社区关系经理凯里·贝内代托这么说道。为了方便新员工上下班，UPS还跟MARTA商讨调整公交时刻表和路线的事宜。

source: Foreign Minister Qian Qichen declared last week that Jiang 's speech still represents government policy . source: Many of these students are severely handicapped and are unable to write or even communicate verbally . To ask them to take a comprehensive , multiple-choice ( federal and state-mandated ) exam is lunacy . I taught in Cupertino for years . One of my severely autistic students actually attempted to eat the answer sheet -- yet he was included in the federal and state database .
domestication: 这些学生大多身体严重残疾，连写和说话都成问题。让他们去参加那种全面的、选择题式的（联邦和州规定的）考试，简直是胡闹。我在库比蒂诺教书好多年了，有个自闭症非常严重的学生，竟然试图吃掉答题卡——可他还是被算进了联邦和州的数据库里。
foreignization: 这些学生中的许多人都有严重的残疾，无法书写甚至不能口头交流。要求他们参加综合性的、多项选择（联邦和州规定的）考试是疯狂的。我在库比蒂诺教书多年。我的一个严重自闭症学生实际上试图吃掉答题纸——然而他被包含在联邦和州的数据库中。

Many of these students are severely handicapped and are unable to write or even communicate verbally . 这些学生大多身体严重残疾，连写和说话都成问题。让他们去参加那种全面的、选择题式的（联邦和州规定的）考试，简直是胡闹。我在库比蒂诺教书好多年了，有个自闭症非常严重的学生，竟然试图吃掉答题卡——可他还是被算进了联邦和州的数据库里。

source: How the 7 million people in the Kashmir Valley were reacting was unclear , because the Indian government shut off most communication with it , including internet , cellphone and landline networks . Thousands of additional troops were deployed to the already heavily militarized region out of fear the government 's steps could spark unrest . Kashmir is India 's only Muslim-majority state and most people there oppose Indian rule .
domestication: 克什米尔河谷里700万人的反应如何，还不清楚，因为印度政府切断了与该地区的大部分通信，包括互联网、手机和固定电话网络。政府担心这些措施可能会引发动荡，所以向这个本就军事重兵驻守的地区增派了数千名士兵。克什米尔是印度唯一穆斯林占多数的邦，大多数人反对印度的统治。
foreignization: 克什米尔山谷中的700万人如何反应尚不清楚，因为印度政府切断了与该地区的大部分通讯，包括互联网、手机和固定电话网络。由于担心政府的措施可能引发动荡，已经在高度军事化的地区部署了数千名额外的部队。克什米尔是印度唯一穆斯林占多数的邦，那里的大多数人反对印度统治。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

How the 7 million people in the Kashmir Valley were reacting was unclear , because the Indian government shut off most communication with it , including internet , cellphone and landline networks . Thousands of additional troops were deployed to the already heavily militarized region out of fear the government 's steps could spark unrest . Kashmir is India 's only Muslim-majority state and most people there oppose Indian rule .

source: As a private company , MailChimp has long kept its business metrics secret , but Mr. Chestnut wants to publicize its numbers now to show the road less traveled : If you want to run a successful tech company , you do n't have to follow the path of " Silicon Valley . " You can simply start a business , run it to serve your customers , and forget about outside investors and growth at any cost .

SKI CAPTAIN 马鞍布 NO. 15 赔率：12-1(1) 骑师：武豊。此前曾骑乘这匹公马参加过四场比赛，全部在日本。这是他首次参加肯塔基德比。训练师：森英幸。1993年取得训练师执照。1994年，获得日本赛马协会颁发的两项杰出训练师奖。马主：Shadai Racehorse Co. 兄弟三人田中辉也、吉田晴也和吉田克美拥有该公司。该牧场位于日本札幌西南方向20英里处，占地500英亩，有350匹母马。其中种马包括1989年的德比冠军“周日宁静”。父系：Storm Bird（由Northern Dancer所生） 母系：Ski Goggle（由Royal Ski所生） 战绩：4次出赛：3胜，1个第二名；奖金849,587美元 最后一战：赢得Kisaragi Sho 评论：谁知道呢？从未在日本以外的地方比赛过。

source: Human-rights crusader Harry Wu became an international cause celebre last summer , when he was detained by Chinese officials at a remote crossing on China 's border with Kazakhstan . The detention and subsequent arrest of Wu , an American citizen , became the subject of a diplomatic stand-off between the United States and China , with China insisting he had broken Chinese laws and U.S. officials calling for his immediate release .
domestication: 人权活动家哈里·吴去年夏天成了国际关注的焦点，当时他在中哈边境的一个偏远口岸被中国官员扣留。这位美国公民的被捕引发了中美之间的外交对峙，中国坚称他违反了中国法律，而美方则要求立即释放他。

source: Mr. Clinton was not able to carry Democrats back into control of Congress . He built much of his political comeback on distancing himself equally from both parties in Congress . Now as he prepares to take his second oath of office on Monday , the question is whether this ever-fluid leader stands as a party of one or whether he can redefine the Democrats and keep peace among factions that submerged their differences in 1996 in the interest of preventing the Republicans from winning both Congress and the White House .
domestication: 克林顿先生没能带领民主党重掌国会。他东山再起很大程度上靠的是与国会两党保持等距。现在，他准备周一进行第二次就职宣誓，大家关注的问题是：这位变化莫测的领导人究竟是孤身一人另立门户，还是能够重新定义民主党，并在各派别间维持和平，这些派别在1996年为了阻止共和党同时掌控国会和白宫，暂时搁置了分歧。
foreignization: 克林顿先生无法使民主党重新控制国会。他大部分的政治东山再起是基于与国会中的两党保持同等距离。现在，当他准备在周一进行第二次就职宣誓时，问题在于这位始终多变的领导人是否仍然作为一个独立派别存在，或者他能否重新定义民主党并在各派系之间维持和平，这些派系在1996年为了阻止共和党同时赢得国会和白宫而暂时搁置了分歧。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Mr. Clinton was not able to carry Democrats back into control of Congress . He built much of his political comeback on distancing himself equally from both parties in Congress . Now as he prepares to take his second oath of office on Monday , the question is whether this ever-fluid leader stands as a party of one or whether he can redefine the Democrats and keep peace among factions that submerged their differences in 1996 in the interest of preventing the Republicans from winning both Congress and the White House .

source: David Milch 's abortive masterwork , " Deadwood , " which ran for three seasons on HBO before being abruptly canceled last year , is better than all of the above put together . Every episode is on DVD and available in HD . In place of the old aphorisms and violin-heavy scores of the classic westerns , Milch substitutes barks , grunts , yawps , grandiloquence , the odd sequence spoken in Cornish and noises too obscene to name . It 's a glorious cacophony .
domestication: 大卫·米尔奇的未竟杰作《淘金者》，这部在HBO播了三季的剧去年突然被砍了，但它比上述所有作品加起来还要好。每集都有DVD，还能找到高清版。米尔奇没有用老掉牙的格言和经典的西部片里那种弦乐滥情的配乐，而是用上了咆哮、咕哝、嚎叫、华丽的辞藻，偶尔还有一段康沃尔语的对白，还有些不堪入目的声音。这简直就是一场辉煌的喧嚣。
foreignization: 大卫·米尔奇的未完成杰作《淘金帝》（Deadwood），在HBO播出了三季后于去年被突然取消，比上述所有作品加起来还要好。每一集都有DVD和高清版本。米尔奇用咆哮、咕哝、吼叫、华丽辞藻、偶尔用康沃尔语进行的对话和无法命名的过于淫秽的声音，取代了经典西部片中的老生常谈和小提琴声重的配乐。这是一个辉煌的喧嚣。

source: Some of us will soon be voting for officials to represent us in government . Constitutions and statutes require that anyone can be elected to office , with certain very limited restrictions , mostly dealing with age . There are no restrictions as to mental capacity , learning or experience . Yet , elected individuals have to deal with a gamut of complicated financial , legal , judicial , administrative , economic , personnel , social and other issues . As we have seen , from the experience of some school districts , relying on the ' expertise ' of appointed administrators is not a substitute for knowledgeable oversight by elected officials .
domestication: 我们有些人很快就要投票选出代表我们的人去政府任职了。宪法和法律要求，除了年龄等极少数限制外，任何人都可以当选为公职人员。对于智力、学识或经验，并没有特别的要求。然而，当选的官员们需要处理各种复杂的财务、法律、司法、行政、经济、人事、社会等问题。正如我们从一些学区的经验中看到的那样，仅靠任命的管理人员的“专业”知识，是不能替代民选官员的监督作用的。
foreignization: 我们中的一些人很快将投票选举代表我们在政府任职的官员。宪法和法律要求任何人都可以当选为公职人员，有一些非常有限的限制，主要涉及年龄问题。对于智力能力、学识或经验没有限制。然而，当选的个人必须处理一系列复杂的财务、法律、司法、行政、经济、人事、社会及其他问题。正如我们从某些学区的经验中所看到的，依赖任命的管理人员的“专业”知识不能替代由当选官员进行的知识性监督。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Some of us will soon be voting for officials to represent us in government . Constitutions and statutes require that anyone can be elected to office , with certain very limited restrictions , mostly dealing with age . There are no restrictions as to mental capacity , learning or experience . Yet , elected individuals have to deal with a gamut of complicated financial , legal , judicial , administrative , economic , personnel , social and other issues . As we have seen , from the experience of some school districts , relying on the ' expertise ' of appointed administrators is not a substitute for knowledgeable oversight by elected officials .

source: I can understand the various last ditch attempts to save Bonin 's life , from the absurd bid for clemency , to the offensive suggestion that he be understood for his crimes -- given his pathetic childhood . But Bonin 's defense lawyers are hiding the true nature of the killer . I corresponded with Bill for a period of two years . He is openly hostile , paranoid , and , despite the imaginative utterences of Miss Skriloff , completely devoid of intelligence . As for his supposedly " caring nature , " Bonin is known to speak openly of his sexual fantasies , which , to this day , involve the rape and murder of young boys .
domestication: 我能理解为了救博宁一命而做的各种最后的努力，从荒唐的求情到让人愤慨地试图以他悲惨的童年为由宽恕他的罪行。但博宁的辩护律师却在掩盖这个杀人犯的真实面目。我曾和比尔通信两年，他表现得公开敌对，多疑，尽管斯克里洛夫小姐说得天花乱坠，实际上他一点智力都没有。至于所谓的“关爱之心”，博宁可是 openly 谈论他的性幻想，直到今天，这些幻想依然涉及对小男孩的强暴和谋杀。
foreignization: 我可以理解为了挽救邦宁的生命而进行的各种最后的努力，从荒谬的求情请求，到冒犯性的建议认为他的罪行应被理解——鉴于他悲惨的童年。但邦宁的辩护律师们隐瞒了杀人犯的真实本质。我与比尔有过两年的通信。他公开表现出敌意，偏执，而且，尽管斯克里洛夫小姐做出了富有想象力的陈述，他完全缺乏智慧。至于他所谓的“关怀本性”，邦宁公开谈论他的性幻想，这些幻想至今仍涉及对小男孩的强奸和谋杀。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I can understand the various last ditch attempts to save Bonin 's life , from the absurd bid for clemency , to the offensive suggestion that he be understood for his crimes -- given his pathetic childhood . But Bonin 's defense lawyers are hiding the true nature of the killer . I corresponded with Bill for a period of two years . He is openly hostile , paranoid , and , despite the imaginative utterences of Miss Skriloff , completely devoid of intelligence . As for his supposedly " caring nature , " Bonin is known to speak openly of his sexual fantasies , which , to this day , involve the rape and murder of young boys .

source: Re : Apathy : I 'm in my mid-20s and work with undergrads . The ideal of college is so set on " being an adult " immediately out of high school , finding yourself , experiencing new things , getting a great education , and having fun all at once , that at times I find the whole thing paralyzing and I 'm not even a student .
domestication: 关于“冷漠”：我二十出头，和大学生一起工作。大学的理想就是高中一毕业立马变成大人，找到自我，体验新事物，接受优质教育，同时还要玩得开心。这些压力有时让我感到无所适从，而我还不是学生呢。

source: In a hopeful sign for the future , two-thirds of the Top 100 firms said they planned to increase employment in the Washington area this year . Many did so in 1995 . The jobs expansion came from all sorts of firms -- burgeoning communications firms like America Online Inc. in Vienna , the on-line computer information provider ; government contractors that bagged new business ; and successful retail and service firms that are running in front of the competition , like Giant Food and Mid Atlantic Medical .

source: " Our biggest mistake was not doing a better job of keeping it out of the papers . source: But a previous owner and the next door neighbor split an empty lot between them . So the lot expanded a little and allowed a long , slim addition down the side of the house . Now much of the house is 35 feet wide . That extra space let owners add a new main entrance , butler 's pantry , den-office and back porch .

source: " If you have the full amount of money following the student , the check and balance becomes the parent , " Brenner said . " If they are in a low-performing school and it 's not making the right changes , they move the kid and the full ( amount ) follows the student . So if I 'm running that school , I probably want to make better decisions to retain that student . "
domestication: 布伦纳说：“如果学生带足了全额资金，那家长就成了监督者。如果学校表现差，又不作出正确的改变，家长就会带着孩子和全额资金转学。所以，要是我管理这所学校，我肯定要想办法留住学生。”
foreignization: “如果你有跟随学生的全部资金，那么制衡的角色就是家长，”布伦纳说。“如果他们在一个表现不佳的学校，而学校没有做出正确的改变，他们会转学，而全部（资金）跟随学生走。所以如果我管理那所学校，我大概会想做出更好的决定来留住那个学生。”

source: For reasons apparently unrelated to next weekend 's national election , students rioted in Dakar and St. Louis , Senegal - the nation 's two largest cities . Police dispersed the rioters in Dakar , the capital , with tear gas after they 'd burned government vehicles , disrupted traffic , ransacked the home of a Cabinet minister , and attacked the state radio-TV building . The rampages were blamed on excessive use of force to quell a student protest in St. Louis May 5 .
domestication: 据说与下周末的全国选举无关，塞内加尔最大的两座城市达喀尔和圣路易斯的学生们发生了骚乱。在首都达喀尔，警察用催泪瓦斯驱散了闹事者，因为这些学生焚烧了政府车辆，扰乱了交通，还洗劫了一位内阁部长的家，并袭击了国家广播电视台大楼。这次暴乱被归咎于5月5日在圣路易斯镇压学生示威时使用了过度武力。
foreignization: 出于显然与下周末全国选举无关的原因，学生们在塞内加尔的两个最大城市达喀尔和圣路易斯发生了暴乱。警方在首都达喀尔使用催泪瓦斯驱散了暴乱者，此前他们焚烧了政府车辆，扰乱了交通，洗劫了一名内阁部长的住宅，并袭击了国家广播电视台大楼。这些暴行被归咎于5月5日在圣路易斯平息学生抗议时过度使用武力。

For reasons apparently unrelated to next weekend 's national election , students rioted in Dakar and St. Louis , Senegal - the nation 's two largest cities . Police dispersed the rioters in Dakar , the capital , with tear gas after they 'd burned government vehicles , disrupted traffic , ransacked the home of a Cabinet minister , and attacked the state radio-TV building . The rampages were blamed on excessive use of force to quell a student protest in St. Louis May 5 .

source: But skittish U.S. investors dumped shares of Citigroup , Bank of America and other banks out of fear the companies could be infected by the Japanese financial crisis . And the sell-off quickly spread throughout the market as Wall Street got hit with another wave of profit warnings . source: Tyco establishes venture capital arm Exeter , N.H. -- Tyco International Ltd. , the world 's biggest maker of electronic connectors , formed a venture capital arm to invest in communications , health care and emerging technologies . The unit , called Tyco Ventures , expects to invest about $ 200 million in the next year in technologies that augment Tyco 's main businesses . Most investments will be $ 5 million to $ 10 million , though Tyco is n't ruling out larger ones , said Tyco Ventures President Richard Kashnow .
domestication: 泰科在新罕布什尔州埃克塞特成立风投部门。世界最大的电子连接器制造商——泰科国际有限公司，宣布成立了名为“泰科创投”的风险投资部门，旨在投资通信、医疗保健和新兴技术领域。泰科创投计划在未来一年内投资约2亿美元，用于支持能增强泰科主营业务的技术项目。大多数投资金额将在500万到1000万美元之间，但也不排除更大的投资，泰科创投总裁理查德·卡什诺表示。

source: District 21-5A -- Youth is carrying the load for 9-11 Aldine . Since moving up to the varsity , 6-6 freshman Gerald Brown has been averaging 14 points and 11 rebounds , and 6-5 sophomore Carvis Rogers is averaging nine points . Brown is having to play some post , but coach Richard Delgado has 6-8 , 295-pound junior Derrick Fletcher playing on the junior varsity as he gets back in shape after football season .
domestication: 21区5A区——青春的肩膀挑起了9胜11负的奥尔丁队的重担。自从升入主力阵容后，身高6英尺6英寸的新生杰拉尔德·布朗场均贡献14分和11个篮板，而6英尺5英寸的二年级生卡维斯·罗杰斯则场均拿下9分。布朗得打点内线，不过主教练理查德·德尔加多手下还有个身高6英尺8英寸、体重295磅的大块头——三年级生德里克·弗莱彻，他正在从橄榄球赛季后的恢复期中逐渐找回状态，在青年队效力。

source: Liability is a key issue , as is money . The homeowners association has allocated $3,000 for the tree 's removal . If it decided to place support cables on the tree and periodically trim and prune it , the cost would swell to between $4,000 and $7,000 . On January 27 , the homeowners association will vote on whether to charge each member a onetime $125 fee to brace the tree .
domestication: 责任和钱都是大问题。业主委员会已经拨了3000美元来砍树。如果决定给树装上支撑缆绳，并定期修剪枝叶，那费用就会涨到4000到7000美元。1月27日，业主委员会将投票决定是否让每个成员一次性交125美元来加固这棵树。

source: Even though the " Vaccines for Children " program was signed into law a year ago , no vaccine has arrived in doctors ' offices locally , or in half the states . Neither federal officials nor those in 24 states have worked out a system for shipping the vaccines to tens of thousands of physicians . And throughout the Washington area , the networks of doctors willing to administer the vaccines do not yet exist .
domestication: 虽说“儿童疫苗”计划一年前就已签署成法，可至今连本地的医生诊所，甚至连一半的州都还没见到疫苗的影子。联邦官员和24个州的官员都没能敲定一套向数以万计的医生配送疫苗的系统。在整个华盛顿地区，愿意提供疫苗接种服务的医生网络也尚未建立起来。
foreignization: 尽管“儿童疫苗”计划在一年前就已经签署成为法律，但至今当地医生的诊所或一半的州都还没有收到任何疫苗。联邦官员和24个州的官员都尚未制定出向成千上万的医生分发疫苗的系统。在整个华盛顿地区，愿意提供疫苗接种服务的医生网络也尚未建立。

Even though the " Vaccines for Children " program was signed into law a year ago , no vaccine has arrived in doctors ' offices locally , or in half the states . Neither federal officials nor those in 24 states have worked out a system for shipping the vaccines to tens of thousands of physicians . And throughout the Washington area , the networks of doctors willing to administer the vaccines do not yet exist .

Neither federal officials nor those in 24 states have worked out a system for shipping the vaccines to tens of thousands of physicians . And throughout the Washington area , the networks of doctors willing to administer the vaccines do not yet exist .
尽管“儿童疫苗”计划在一年前就已经签署成为法律，但至今当地医生的诊所或一半的州都还没有收到任何疫苗。联邦官员和24个州的官员都尚未制定出向成千上万的医生分发疫苗的系统。在整个华盛顿地区，愿意提供疫苗接种服务的医生网络也尚未建立。

source: Even as stardom has become as comfortable a fit as a favorite chair for Houston , even as the label of captain that Van Gundy asked him to wear on the team plane trip to training camp in Charleston , S.C. , seems to suit him now , Houston is just as unselfish as before . source: " We used to be very oriented toward pleasing our boss , our government , our party . The pyramid hierarchy is starting to crumble . source: Separated at birth . That 's long been the motto of this wickedly surreal place . This rich land where life is cheaper than labor , where evil hangs thick and palpable in the air , multicolored and infinitely dimensioned . Sometimes it whispers , sometimes it shouts . There are so many forces , so many uniforms , so many weapons , so many rifts .
domestication: 一出生就分离。这一直是这个荒诞之地的座右铭。在这片富饶的土地上，生命比劳力还便宜，邪恶就像空气一样弥漫，五彩斑斓，无边无际。有时候它轻声细语，有时候它大声咆哮。这里有太多的势力，太多的制服，太多的武器，太多的裂痕。

source: Today 's film fanatics , the ones who buy DVDs of high-definition directors ' cuts and study all the extras , are sticklers for vividness , crisp borders and high color . In this way , these aesthetes may have something in common with the rugged heroes of Hollywood 's great westerns , those austere individualists who also prize clarity . This should n't be surprising . Film and frontier have always gone together . Formally , they 're kin .

source: For almost an hour now , hundreds of pro-Sanders protesters ( and possibly more , I ca n't even see the back of the crowd ) have been parading -- slowly -- from City Hall toward the heart of the convention events in south Philadelphia . source: Rose and other industry experts largely blame wholesale power markets dominated by a handful of large suppliers . In some cases , these giants have been accused of manipulating prices in ways that echo complaints during the 2000 California energy crisis . Some economists say electricity is n't suited to competition because it 's needed 24 hours a day and ca n't be stored , giving sellers too much leverage .
domestication: 罗斯和其他业内专家大都认为，问题出在电力批发市场被少数几家大供应商垄断。有时候，这些巨头被指控操纵价格，手法和2000年加州能源危机期间的投诉如出一辙。有些经济学家表示，电力这种东西不适合市场竞争，因为它需要全天候供应，又无法储存，这给了卖方太多话语权。

source: DeAngelo is charged with eight counts of murder in three counties but is believed by authorities to be responsible for another four , along with more than 46 rapes and 100 burglaries . All those crimes occurred between 1976 and 1986 , many while he was a police officer in rural California cities . Books have been written about the manhunt , the FBI dedicated an entire website to the case , and many of the detectives who worked on the investigation retired or died long before a suspect was apprehended .
domestication: 德安杰洛被控在三个县犯下八起谋杀案，但警方认为他还涉及另外四起谋杀案，外加超过46起强奸案和100起入室盗窃案。这些罪行都发生在1976年到1986年间，当时他还是加州农村城市的一名警察。关于追捕他的书籍已经写了不少，FBI甚至为此专门建立了一个网站，许多参与调查的侦探要么退休了，要么去世了，直到多年后才终于抓住了嫌疑人。
foreignization: 德安吉洛被控在三个县犯有八项谋杀罪，但据当局相信，他还应对另外四起谋杀案负责，此外还有超过46起强奸案和100起入室盗窃案。所有这些犯罪都发生在1976年至1986年间，其中许多是在他担任加州乡村城市警察期间发生的。有关追捕的书籍已经出版，FBI专门为这个案件建立了一个网站，许多参与调查的侦探在嫌疑人被捕前就已经退休或去世。

source: Salvation came in tourism . They pour in from all over the United States and from Europe and Japan . They photograph Angel Delgadillo , Seligman 's man-about-town , in his old-time barber 's chair , rummage through his Route 66 memorabilia , climb into his brother 's clown-car jalopy for a free trip honking and lurching down 66 .

source: Um Ali 's son , Bakr , was 3 years old , cute , and spoiled rotten . He 'd jump in my lap , and we 'd play a little game : He 'd put his nose against mine , his head against my head , and we would whisper really quietly together , him in Arabic , me in English . In the early days of my captivity , we 'd do it often , and I 'd look in his little eyes , and it really comforted me . It felt so good just to hug somebody .
domestication: 阿里的儿子巴克尔，三岁，长得可爱，被宠得不像话。他常扑到我怀里，我们玩个小游戏：他把鼻子贴着我的鼻子，脑袋靠着我的脑袋，然后我们俩轻声细语地说话，他用阿拉伯语，我用英语。刚被俘的那阵子，我们常这么玩，我望着他那双水灵灵的小眼睛，心里真是舒服极了。抱抱他，感觉真好。
foreignization: 乌姆·阿里 的儿子 巴克尔 ，3 岁，很可爱，而且被宠坏了。他会跳到我的腿上，我们会玩一个小游戏：他会把鼻子贴在我的鼻子上，头靠在我的头上，我们会非常轻声地一起说话，他用阿拉伯语，我用英语。在我被俘虏的早期，我们经常这样做，我会看着他那双小眼睛，这真的让我感到安慰。仅仅是能拥抱一个人就感觉很好。

乌姆·阿里 的儿子 巴克尔 ，3 岁，很可爱，而且被宠坏了。他会跳到我的腿上，我们会玩一个小游戏：他会把鼻子贴在我的鼻子上，头靠在我的头上，我们会非常轻声地一起说话，他用阿拉伯语，我用英语。在我被俘虏的早期，我们经常这样做，我会看着他那双小眼睛，这真的让我感到安慰。仅仅是能拥抱一个人就感觉很好。

source: When Barnard performed the first heart transplant nearly 30 years ago , it was a terrific feat for this backwater nation that aspired desperately to First World status . source: 2nd District : New York , northern New Jersey , Fairfield County , Conn . Activity expanded strongly , and the labor market tightened , especially for experienced office workers . Retail sales and prices were steady . Manufacturing improved moderately . The housing market perked up a bit in and around New York City . Manhattan 's office rental market was exceptionally tight , while suburban markets were somewhat slack . A big New York City employment agency said hiring was strong in May , but it was getting harder to fill jobs , and firms are " very reluctant " to give up seasoned employees . New York manufacturing picked up some in May .
domestication: 第二区：纽约、新泽西北部、康涅狄格的费尔菲尔德县。活动显著增强，劳动力市场趋紧，尤其是有经验的办公室职员更难找。零售销售和价格保持稳定。制造业有所改善。纽约市及周边地区的房地产市场也稍有回暖。曼哈顿的办公租赁市场特别紧张，而郊区市场则相对疲软。一家大型的纽约招聘公司表示，5月份的招聘势头强劲，但找人越来越难了，公司对老员工“非常舍不得”。5月份，纽约的制造业也有所回升。

source: -- The Democratic and Republican parties are likely to feel freer to spend unregulated " soft money " next year on so-called issue ads that have the effect of boosting their candidates in the general election . source: Two nights later , Papelbon made his final appearance as Washington 's closer in San Francisco and was pulled after facing three batters . Now the Nationals have Mark Melancon in the role and the ninth inning is no longer a cardiovascular stress test . On Sunday , Baker complimented Melancon for taking care of the ninth inning " without any drama or anything . " Melancon 's thrown four scoreless innings in a Nationals uniform . So far , no drama .
domestication: 两天后，帕佩尔邦在旧金山作为华盛顿队的终结者最后一次出场，面对了三个打者后就被换下。现在，国民队有了马克·梅兰康来担任这个角色，第九局的比赛再也不是心脏承受考验了。周日，贝克还夸奖梅兰康说他处理第九局“一点 drama 都没有。”梅兰康穿上国民队的球衣后，已经连续投了四局零失分。到目前为止，一切风平浪静。

source: This unusual game is the brainchild of legendary game developers , Shigeru Miyamoto . He dreamt it up while watching his garden through the window . You play a spaceman stranded on an odd , but dangerous world . The little gumdrop characters called Pikmin will help you find your missing ship parts so you can return home . The universe you navigate is colorful and lush with a range of puzzles that are just enough fun to be both challenging and satisfying . Rated E.
domestication: 这个不寻常的游戏出自传奇游戏开发者宫本茂之手。他看着窗外的花园时，灵感就来了。你扮演的是一个被困在奇异而危险星球上的太空人。一群名叫皮克敏的小圆点角色会帮助你找回飞船的失散部件，让你能够重返家园。你所探索的宇宙色彩斑斓、生机勃勃，充满各种趣味横生的谜题，既富有挑战性又让人感到满足。适合所有年龄段的玩家。

source: That 's something few college football players have been able to do . And Westbrook , the Buffaloes ' 22-year-old wide receiver and all-time leader in receptions , yards and touchdowns , is considered by just about all NFL scouts and front-office personnel to be the top wide receiver available in next weekend 's draft . As the Washington Redskins just happen to be in the market for a receiver , he 's their number one choice at the moment if they keep the fourth pick in the first round .

source: " This needs to be seen as a national problem because it could be in other cities already , " says E. Richard Hoebeke , assistant curator of the insect collection at Cornell University , who in 1996 first conclusively identified the invading beetle , which has since infested thousands of trees in urban areas including New York City , Jersey City , Chicago , and Toronto . " The danger is that by the time it 's a visible problem and attention is paid , it 's become a major problem . "
domestication: “这得被视为一个全国性的问题，因为它可能已经蔓延到其他城市了。”康奈尔大学昆虫馆的助理策展人E. 理查德·霍贝克说。他在1996年首次确定了这种入侵甲虫的身份，这种甲虫自那以后已经在纽约市、泽西市、芝加哥和多伦多等城市侵扰了数千棵树。“危险在于，等到问题明显、引起注意时，它已经变成了大问题。”

source: To be sure , the United States is also facing a demographic crisis for which it is not fully prepared . But some reforms have been implemented : The retirement age for Social Security is being raised from 65 to 67 over the next 22 years , for instance , and a higher rate of immigration means the U.S. population is growing and is younger than Europe 's .
domestication: 美国同样也面临着人口危机，而且准备得还不够充分。不过，一些改革措施已经实施，比如社保的退休年龄将从65岁逐步提高到67岁，这个过程会在未来22年内完成。此外，更高的移民率使得美国人口不仅在增长，还比欧洲年轻得多。
foreignization: 当然，美国也面临着一个人口危机，对此它尚未完全做好准备。但已经实施了一些改革：例如，社会保障的退休年龄将在未来22年内从65岁提高到67岁，而且更高的移民率意味着美国人口正在增长，并且比欧洲年轻。

To be sure , the United States is also facing a demographic crisis for which it is not fully prepared . source: Now free to implement their salary cap ( although some technical hurdles remain ) , the owners seem to think the players will fold , welcoming the new system and gamboling into spring training like a bunch of puppy dogs . That would be crucial to the game 's stability , the only deterrent to utter chaos . But it is also highly unlikely , and if you 're like me , you do n't care a lick for either side now . It is time for judgment day .

source: 3 The unification of Germany means that the division of Europe is also being overcome . A united Germany in the Atlantic Alliance of free democracies and part of the growing political and economic integration of the European Community will be an indispensable factor of stability , which is needed in the heart of Europe . The move within the European Community toward political union , including the development of a European identity in the domain of security , will also contribute to Atlantic solidarity and to the establishment of a just and lasting order of peace throughout the whole of Europe .
domestication: 德国的统一意味着欧洲的分裂也在逐步消解。一个统一的德国，既融入了大西洋沿岸的自由民主国家联盟，又参与了欧洲共同体日益加深的政治和经济一体化，将成为欧洲心脏地带不可或缺的稳定因素。欧洲共同体朝着政治联盟迈进，包括在安全领域塑造欧洲认同，也将有助于增强大西洋两岸的团结，推动整个欧洲建立一个公正而持久的和平秩序。
foreignization: 德国的统一意味着欧洲的分裂也在被克服。一个在大西洋联盟中的自由民主国家联合体内的统一的德国，以及作为欧洲共同体日益增长的政治和经济一体化的一部分，将是稳定不可或缺的因素，这是欧洲心脏地区所需要的。欧洲共同体向政治联盟的推进，包括在安全领域发展欧洲认同，也将有助于大西洋团结和在整个欧洲建立公正和持久的和平秩序。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

3 The unification of Germany means that the division of Europe is also being overcome . A united Germany in the Atlantic Alliance of free democracies and part of the growing political and economic integration of the European Community will be an indispensable factor of stability , which is needed in the heart of Europe . The move within the European Community toward political union , including the development of a European identity in the domain of security , will also contribute to Atlantic solidarity and to the establishment of a just and lasting order of peace throughout the whole of Europe .

A united Germany in the Atlantic Alliance of free democracies and part of the growing political and economic integration of the European Community will be an indispensable factor of stability , which is needed in the heart of Europe . The move within the European Community toward political union , including the development of a European identity in the domain of security , will also contribute to Atlantic solidarity and to the establishment of a just and lasting order of peace throughout the whole of Europe .
德国的统一意味着欧洲的分裂也在被克服。一个在大西洋联盟中的自由民主国家联合体内的统一的德国，以及作为欧洲共同体日益增长的政治和经济一体化的一部分，将是稳定不可或缺的因素，这是欧洲心脏地区所需要的。欧洲共同体向政治联盟的推进，包括在安全领域发展欧洲认同，也将有助于大西洋团结和在整个欧洲建立公正和持久的和平秩序。

source: The 2015 kidnapping , robbery and murder of David Doyle presses on after trials this month against two of his accused killers ended with deadlocked juries . Doyle , a wealthy retired car dealer , was found dead in his Charlotte home . The three suspects were said to have broken into the house in search of gold Doyle was supposedly stockpiling . Jeff Siner/The Observer  He was found dead , bound with parachute chord . Juries could n't decide if these men did it .
domestication: 2015年，戴维·多伊尔被绑架、抢劫并杀害的案件至今悬而未决。本月，对两名涉嫌凶手的审判以陪审团无法达成一致意见告终。多伊尔是一位富有的退休汽车经销商，他的尸体在夏洛特的家中被发现。据称，三名嫌疑人闯入他家，目的是寻找多伊尔藏匿的金子。杰夫·辛纳/《观察家报》报道，他被发现时已经死亡，身上绑着降落伞绳。陪审团没能决定这些人是否就是真凶。

source: Following advice from consultants , the airport created a single serpentine line that winds back on itself more than a dozen times , and the number of screening gates at the main checkpoint will be expanded to 20 from 18 . Ben DeCosta , general manager of the airport , said waiting times were down to 10 minutes in slack periods , but waits of up to 20 minutes still occur at very busy times .
domestication: 听取了顾问的建议后，机场设计了一条蜿蜒曲折的队伍，这条队伍来回绕了十多次，而且主要安检口的检查通道也从18个增加到了20个。机场总经理本·德科斯塔说，在人少的时候，排队时间已经缩短到10分钟，但在高峰期，最长还是得等20分钟。

source: After 10 seasons -- it 's the longest-running sitcom on the air -- even the characters ' outrageousness has become predictable . The few jokes that do n't refer to the sexual habits of the characters ( a sexually frustrated mother , a prematurely ejaculating father , a slutty daughter , a sleazy son ) revolve around their bad personal hygiene . " It 's pretty much lowest common denominator with an edge , " Mr. Leavitt admits .

Translate the following text to Chinese.

After 10 seasons -- it 's the longest-running sitcom on the air -- even the characters ' outrageousness has become predictable . The few jokes that do n't refer to the sexual habits of the characters ( a sexually frustrated mother , a prematurely ejaculating father , a slutty daughter , a sleazy son ) revolve around their bad personal hygiene . " It 's pretty much lowest common denominator with an edge , " Mr. Leavitt admits .
在播出了10季之后——它是目前最长寿的情景喜剧——甚至角色的荒诞也变得可以预测了。少数不涉及角色性行为习惯（一位性欲受挫的母亲，一位早泄的父亲，一位滥交的女儿，一位猥琐的儿子）的笑话也围绕着他们糟糕的个人卫生。“这基本上是带点边缘色彩的最低共同标准，”利维特先生承认。

source: Lawrence Jeffries needs to realize that by sitting at a table and pointing fingers at other cultures , accusing them of oppressing his people , he is not helping black America . source: At the same time , in the face of an F.C.C. edict that will terminate all analog broadcasting in 2009 -- the so-called " analog sunset " -- a wild bunch of television fans are also insisting on a retro aesthetic : old color shows on old color sets . Those who appreciated the turquoise and lipstick red of the early sets , which used different phosphors than later color televisions , have clustered online . On YouTube , a poster called TeslaMaster has gone so far as to upload a video of a restored 1956 RCA television showing an episode of " Bonanza . " One catch : the online video is , of course , digitized ; to catch " Gunsmoke " or " Bonanza " as they would have appeared in the 1950s , you 'll need to restore an old RCA set yourself .
domestication: 同时，面对联邦通信委员会将在2009年终止所有模拟广播的命令——所谓的“模拟日落”——一群电视迷也坚持复古风格：老彩色节目用老彩色电视机看。那些喜欢早期电视机特有的青绿色和口红红的人，在网上聚到了一起。在YouTube上，有个叫TeslaMaster的用户甚至上传了一段1956年的RCA电视机修复后播放《大淘金》的视频。不过，有个问题：网上的视频当然是数字化的；要想像1950年代那样看《荒野大镖客》或《大淘金》，你得自己恢复一台旧RCA电视机才行。
foreignization: 同时，面对联邦通信委员会（F.C.C.）将于2009年终止所有模拟广播的命令——所谓“模拟日落”——一群狂热的电视迷也在坚持复古美学：在老式彩色电视机上观看老式彩色节目。那些欣赏早期电视机使用的不同荧光粉带来的青绿色和口红色彩的人们，在网上聚集了起来。在YouTube上，一位名叫TeslaMaster的用户甚至上传了一段修复的1956年RCA电视机播放《大淘金》（Bonanza）剧集的视频。但有一个问题：在线视频当然是数字化的；若要像1950年代那样观看《荒野大镖客》（Gunsmoke）或《大淘金》（Bonanza），你需要自己修复一台老式RCA电视机。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

At the same time , in the face of an F.C.C. edict that will terminate all analog broadcasting in 2009 -- the so-called " analog sunset " -- a wild bunch of television fans are also insisting on a retro aesthetic : old color shows on old color sets . Those who appreciated the turquoise and lipstick red of the early sets , which used different phosphors than later color televisions , have clustered online . On YouTube , a poster called TeslaMaster has gone so far as to upload a video of a restored 1956 RCA television showing an episode of " Bonanza . " One catch : the online video is , of course , digitized ; to catch " Gunsmoke " or " Bonanza " as they would have appeared in the 1950s , you 'll need to restore an old RCA set yourself .

source: A. Someone once asked David Mamet . . . I hate to quote him without his approval . But he said such a beautiful thing , so I 'm going out on a limb . Someone said , " David , you write all the time . You must be so ambitious . " David said , " No . It just beats thinking . " I kind of agree . I act a lot . It beats thinking .
domestication: 有人曾经问过大卫·马梅特……我本不想没经过他同意就引用他的话，但他当时说得真是太好了，我就斗胆说一说了。那人问他：“大卫，你总是写作，一定很有雄心吧。”大卫回答说：“不是的，我只是觉得这比胡思乱想要好。”我挺赞同这句话的。我演戏也是这样，总比瞎想强。

source: - Leisure activities cost less . Whatever leisure activities you have in mind for your vacation , you 'll likely pay less during the low season . If getting a relaxing massage or rejuvenating facial make your short list , book during the offseason to get more for your money . In fact , in July and August , Miami 's low season , the city 's premier spas ( under the auspices of " Spa Month " ) drop their prices by up to 50 percent .
domestication: 休闲活动更划算。不管你想在假期里干啥，淡季时价格都低得多。要是按摩放松或焕肤护理在你的愿望清单上，那在淡季预约可省不少钱。比如说，在迈阿密的淡季——七月和八月，各大顶级水疗中心借着“水疗月”的名义，价格能降五成呢。
foreignization: 休闲活动费用更低。无论你计划在假期进行什么休闲活动，淡季时你可能支付的费用会更少。如果你打算做一个放松的按摩或恢复活力的面部护理，淡季预订可以获得更高的性价比。事实上，在迈阿密的淡季——7月和8月，该市的主要水疗中心（在“水疗月”的名义下）会将价格降低至多50％。

source: " Pakistan 's military strategy can not afford a hostile government in Afghanistan that will force us to make crucial realignments in troop deployments , " said retired Lt. Gen. Salahuddin Tirmizi , a former corps commander . " Even a semblance of the Northern Alliance 's dominance over Afghanistan would make us uncomfortable . "
domestication: 巴基斯坦退役中将萨拉胡丁·特里米齐，曾任军区司令，说：“巴基斯坦的军事战略承受不起阿富汗有个敌对政府，这会迫使我们不得不在部队部署上做出重大调整。北方联盟哪怕只是表面上控制了阿富汗，也会让我们感到不安。”
foreignization: “巴基斯坦的军事战略无法承受一个敌对的阿富汗政府，这将迫使我们在部队部署上做出关键调整，”已退休的中将萨拉胡丁·蒂尔米齐说，他曾是军团指挥官。“即使是北方联盟在阿富汗占主导地位的表面现象也会让我们感到不安。”

source: We can not protect children from facing the situational world each of us must negotiate . While we educators have the duty to assist in instilling lasting values such as social responsibility in children , we would be woefully remiss in failing to prepare them to weigh pros and cons of choices . We have all painfully learned that just saying , " No " just does n't work .
domestication: 我们无法保护孩子们不受这个复杂世界的冲击，每个人都要面对和处理这些情况。作为教育者，我们有责任帮助孩子们树立持久的价值观，比如社会责任感，但如果我们不教会他们如何权衡选择的利弊，那就是我们的失职了。我们都经历过，光说“不行”是行不通的。
foreignization: 我们不能保护孩子们免于面对每个人必须应对的现实世界。虽然我们教育工作者有责任帮助孩子们树立持久的价值观，如社会责任感，但如果未能准备他们权衡选择的利弊，我们将严重失职。我们所有人都痛苦地了解到，仅仅说“不”是行不通的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

We can not protect children from facing the situational world each of us must negotiate . While we educators have the duty to assist in instilling lasting values such as social responsibility in children , we would be woefully remiss in failing to prepare them to weigh pros and cons of choices . We have all painfully learned that just saying , " No " just does n't work .
我们无法保护孩子们不受这个复杂世界的冲击，每个人都要面对和处理这些情况。作为教育者，我们有责任帮助孩子们树立持久的价值观，比如社会责任感，但如果我们不教会他们如何权衡选择的利弊，那就是我们的失职了。我们都经历过，光说“不行”是行不通的。

While we educators have the duty to assist in instilling lasting values such as social responsibility in children , we would be woefully remiss in failing to prepare them to weigh pros and cons of choices . We have all painfully learned that just saying , " No " just does n't work .
我们不能保护孩子们免于面对每个人必须应对的现实世界。虽然我们教育工作者有责任帮助孩子们树立持久的价值观，如社会责任感，但如果未能准备他们权衡选择的利弊，我们将严重失职。我们所有人都痛苦地了解到，仅仅说“不”是行不通的。

source: Thompson is a gifted writer and has a knack for finding intriguing stories . But rather than dwelling on any one in particular , or taking the time to fully unpack it , he often flits to the next sexy example . This quickly gets overwhelming . It makes it hard to remember what the main point is or how it relates to the overall theme .

source: Chad Reuter , nfl.com : " Teez Tabor is a first-round player with a third-round 40-yard dash , so picking him up in the second round made a lot of sense . Kenny Golladay is an interesting receiver , but was probably selected a round early , maybe two . The Lions were desperate for an upgrade at linebacker , and they got a very good one in Davis . His athleticism and toughness are evident . If he can stay healthy and be an instinctive leader in the middle , Detroit is set at the position for a while . "  Day 2 grade : C
domestication: 查德·雷特，nfl.com：“蒂兹·塔博是个首轮球员，但40码冲刺成绩只有第三轮的水平，所以第二轮选他很划算。肯尼·戈拉戴是个有趣的接球手，但可能选得早了点，甚至早了两轮。底特律雄狮队急需加强线卫位置，他们选到了一个非常出色的球员——戴维斯。他的运动能力和韧性都很明显。如果他能保持健康，并且在中场成为直觉型领袖，底特律在这个位置上就能稳定一段时间。”第二天评价：C

source: A three-nation consortium said yesterday that it 's launching a luxury steam-train service between Singapore and the historic port of Malacca in western Malaysia . The Peninsular Line will run a 126-seat train along a 175-mile route starting in March , using old-fashioned coaches and Malaysia 's last steam locomotive .

source: The World India 's nuclear tests are over , were never intended to cause fear , and violated no international treaties , senior government officials said . After a second day of underground explosions , Vice President Krishna Kant said India now was prepared to " consider " signing some parts of the Comprehensive Test Ban Treaty . He dismissed sanctions ordered by US President Clinton , saying : " We 'll be able to bear it . "
domestication: 世界印度的核试验已经结束，根本不是为了制造恐慌，也没有违反任何国际条约，政府高级官员表示。在连续第二天进行地下爆炸后，副总统克里希纳·坎特说，印度现在愿意“考虑”签署《全面禁止核试验条约》的部分内容。他驳回了美国总统克林顿下达的制裁令，说道：“我们能扛得住。”

source: Preheat oven to 400 degrees . Wash and dry the vegetables well . Pour a little olive oil in your hands and rub it all over the vegetables . source: Carey Foster , 51 , a middle-school gym teacher in Roanoke Rapids , N.C. , looks to his waistline in these troubled times . Says Foster : " I compare a growth fund to my weight . Eventually I keep growing larger . Sometimes I may go on a diet and lose a little weight , but I always get it back . My growth funds are on a diet now . "
domestication: 卡瑞·福斯特，51岁，是北卡罗来纳州罗阿诺克拉皮兹市的一名中学体育老师。在这个充满挑战的时期，他关注起了自己的腰围。福斯特说：“我把成长型基金比作我的体重，时间久了，我总是越来越胖。有时候我会节食减肥，减轻一点体重，但最后还是会反弹回来。现在我的成长型基金也在‘节食’。”

source: The need for improvement in Washington ca n't be overstated : To this point , even state restrictions put in place to limit suction dredging during spawning and hatching seasons are routinely sidestepped . Virtually all of the hundreds of requests from miners for exceptions to the common-sense seasonal mining limitations to protect fish eggs and fingerlings have been approved .
domestication: 华盛顿的改进需求怎么说都不为过：到现在为止，即使是在鱼类繁殖和孵化季节限制吸沙淘金的规定，也常常被绕过。矿工们几乎每次要求在保护鱼卵和幼鱼的合理季节限制下破例，都得到了批准。这种种情况，简直数不胜数。
foreignization: 华盛顿需要改进的地方不容小觑：到目前为止，即使是在繁殖和孵化季节限制吸沙淘金的州级限制也经常被规避。几乎所有的矿工提出的数百个例外请求，要求免除这些保护鱼卵和鱼苗的常识性季节性采矿限制，都得到了批准。

华盛顿需要改进的地方不容小觑：到目前为止，即使是在繁殖和孵化季节限制吸沙淘金的州级限制也经常被规避。几乎所有的矿工提出的数百个例外请求，要求免除这些保护鱼卵和鱼苗的常识性季节性采矿限制，都得到了批准。

source: The trend toward a traveling road show of national media following players who are nearing indelible records ratcheted up in 1985 , when Pete Rose closed in on Ty Cobb 's all-time hits record . Rose mostly enjoyed the attention . But it was a career record , so he was going to get there eventually . It is different for McGwire , Sosa and Griffey . They are chasing the record for home runs in a season ; there is no inevitability to breaking it until it is done .
domestication: 1985年，当彼特·罗斯逼近泰·柯布的生涯安打纪录时，全国媒体跟风报道的趋势愈发激烈。罗斯大多乐在其中。毕竟，那是他的生涯纪录，迟早会达成的。但对麦圭尔、索萨和格里菲来说就不同了。他们追的是单季本垒打纪录，不到最后打破它，谁也不知道能不能成功。
foreignization: 追随接近不可磨灭记录的球员的全国性媒体巡回报道的趋势在1985年加剧，当时皮特·罗斯逼近了泰·柯布的生涯安打记录。罗斯大多享受这种关注。但那是一个职业生涯记录，所以他最终会达到。而麦奎尔、索萨和格里菲的情况不同。他们追逐的是单季全垒打记录；在打破之前，没有什么是必然的。

source: She brought in her next patient . He was new , a little turned-inward , a little bellicose . He believed he had sprained his ankle on a crack in the sidewalk . He said the emergency room had told him he needed new shoes , not medical care . He walked a lot . He was homeless . He wanted an X-ray . She said that was unnecessary . His ankles were swollen . She told him that meant something might be going on with his heart ; she wanted other tests done .

He said the emergency room had told him he needed new shoes , not medical care . He walked a lot . He was homeless . He wanted an X-ray . She said that was unnecessary . His ankles were swollen . She told him that meant something might be going on with his heart ; she wanted other tests done .
她迎来了下一位病人。他是新来的，有点内向，还有点好斗。他认为自己在人行道的裂缝上扭伤了脚踝。他说急诊室的人告诉他需要换双新鞋，而不是医疗护理。他经常走路，是个无家可归的人。他想要拍个X光片。她说没必要。他的脚踝肿了。她告诉他这可能是心脏有问题的表现，需要做其他检查。

She brought in her next patient . He was new , a little turned-inward , a little bellicose . He believed he had sprained his ankle on a crack in the sidewalk . She told him that meant something might be going on with his heart ; she wanted other tests done .

source: In a mere tune-up for the playoffs , Peachtree Ridge put up five touchdowns and nearly 300 yards of offense in the first half and cruised to a 46-14 victory over Duluth . source: The study of two groups of patients , one with 70 and one with 55 research subjects , found that people who used paresthesia therapy reported average reductions in baseline pain scores from 7.2 to 2.5 , while patients who preferred subperception therapy reported average baseline pain score reductions from 7.1 to 3.8 .

foreignization: 对两组患者的研究，一组有70名，另一组有55名研究对象，发现使用感觉异常疗法的患者报告基线疼痛评分平均从7.2降至2.5，而偏好次知觉疗法的患者报告基线疼痛评分平均从7.1降至3.8。

source: Today , nearly a century later , " Cyrano " enjoys unabated popularity on both sides of the Atlantic : frequent revivals in campus and regional theaters ; required reading for thousand of students ; even a 1987 comic homage , " Roxanne , " that starred Steve Martin and Daryl Hannah in a Pacific Northwest locale . But when Rappeneau returned to his youthful passion , he did n't find the magic he 'd known as a child -- only a musty , unwieldy , five-act " forest of words . "
domestication: 如今，将近一个世纪过去了，《西拉诺》在大西洋两岸依然备受追捧：校园和地方剧院频繁上演；成千上万的学生必读；甚至还有一部1987年的喜剧致敬之作《罗珊》，由史蒂夫·马丁和达丽尔·汉娜主演，背景设在美国西北太平洋地区。然而，当拉佩诺回到他年轻时的激情时，他没有找到儿时的那种魔力——只看到一部冗长笨拙、五幕的“词海森林”。

But when Rappeneau returned to his youthful passion , he did n't find the magic he 'd known as a child -- only a musty , unwieldy , five-act " forest of words . "

source: *The skinny : Has eight top-10 finishes in 20 Daytona 500s , including career-best third in 2001 . Was 18th last year . source: Outlook : After barely missing sectionals last year , the Falcons have a good chance to make it this season . source: Her parents , Ann and John " " Jinx " Jenks , are mystified but not entirely surprised . But they do not dwell on what provoked her . source: The actual ceremony lasted much longer than the earlier one in honor of Mr. Dylan . First , because Minister Lang gave a windy , effusive speech ; which , by the way , offered the honoree plenty of time to raise his eyebrows - sending the jostling photographers into photo-op heaven - and to wave prankishly to uncharacteristically giddy Parisiennes ( " Bonjour , Jacques ! " called out one , standing on her stylishly shod tiptoes ) .
domestication: 实际上，这次典礼比之前为迪伦先生举办的要长得多。首先是因为郎部长发表了一篇冗长而充满激情的演讲。这倒也好，给了受奖者足够的时间扬眉吐气——那些挤来挤去的摄影师们乐开了花——还调皮地向那些难得兴奋的巴黎女士挥手（“早上好，雅克！”其中一个站在时髦的高跟鞋尖上喊道）。

source: If one were to write lyrics about Ahrens , they would tell about her birth in New York City and an early move to New Jersey , where her father is still a photographer . She grew up with a love of theater . She could sing , dance and play the piano . She is a graduate of the Newhouse School of Journalism at Syracuse University , and worked as an advertising and jingle writer . It was during that phase of her career that she met her husband , Neil Costa , an advertising art director .

source: The Faustian bargain for fame and fortune just got a whole lot nastier . And more dangerous . source: Those who do n't think it 's our place to control the political pockets of our government probably do n't realize that large campaign contributions are considered investments by special interests , because they make huge profits via relaxed restrictions , favorable legislation and a multitude of other " thank yous " that cost the state and Californians millions in paid-out or uncollected tax dollars .
domestication: 那些觉得我们没资格管政府政治口袋的人，可能还没意识到，大额竞选捐款在特殊利益集团眼里是投资，因为通过放松限制、有利的立法和各种各样的“感谢”，他们能赚得盆满钵满，而这些却让加州和加州人民付出了数百万的真金白银，要么是掏了钱，要么是税没收上来。
foreignization: 那些认为我们无权控制政府的政治口袋的人可能没有意识到，大额竞选捐款被特殊利益团体视为投资，因为它们通过放宽限制、有利的立法和多种其他的“感谢”方式，使这些团体获得了巨额利润，而这些方式使国家和加州人民在支付的或未征收的税款中损失了数百万美元。

source: Here 's an example for the " do n't bother " file : Smith &; Hawken 's Instant Garden Seed Tape collections . Not because they do n't work . The ' French Breakfast ' radish , ' Merveille des Quatre Saisons ' lettuce , ' Nantes Primo ' carrot and chervil tapes in the French Market Culinary Collection were easy to sow ( all you do is lay one of the biodegradeable , seed-impregnated paper tapes in a prepared row and cover it with soil and water ) and germinated well ( although more slowly than plain seeds of the same variety sowed nearby ) . They 're growing fine .
domestication: 这儿有个“不用折腾”的例子：史密斯和霍肯的即时花园种子带系列。并不是因为它们不起作用。法国市场的烹饪系列里的“法式早餐”小萝卜、“四季奇迹”生菜、“纳特普利莫”胡萝卜和香芹的种子带都很容易播种（你只需要把一条条生物可降解的、含有种子的纸带放在准备好的沟里，然后盖上土浇上水就行了），而且发芽情况也不错（虽然比旁边直接种的同品种裸种要慢一些）。它们长势良好。
foreignization: 这里有一个“不用麻烦”的例子：Smith & Hawken 的即时花园种子带系列。并不是因为它们不起作用。“法国早餐”萝卜、“Merveille des Quatre Saisons”生菜、“Nantes Primo”胡萝卜和香荽种子带在法国市场美食系列中很容易播种（你所要做的就是将一条生物降解的、嵌入种子的纸带放在准备好的行中，然后覆盖上土壤并浇水），并且发芽良好（尽管比附近种植的相同品种的普通种子发芽得慢一些）。它们长得很好。

这里有一个“不用麻烦”的例子：Smith & Hawken 的即时花园种子带系列。并不是因为它们不起作用。“法国早餐”萝卜、“Merveille des Quatre Saisons”生菜、“Nantes Primo”胡萝卜和香荽种子带在法国市场美食系列中很容易播种（你所要做的就是将一条生物降解的、嵌入种子的纸带放在准备好的行中，然后覆盖上土壤并浇水），并且发芽良好（尽管比附近种植的相同品种的普通种子发芽得慢一些）。它们长得很好。

source: This is not to imply that another Hitler is lurking around the corner but to suggest that those " antithetical tendencies " noted by the Economist are as much , or even more , in evidence today . With the Western colonial empires gone , the Soviet Union disintegrated and Yugoslavia torn apart , almost three times as many states exist as in the 1930 's . All confront the task of reconciling technological change and economic integration with traditional political structures , national consciousness , socio-economic needs and habitual ways of doing things .
domestication: 这并不是说又有一个希特勒在暗处窥视，而是说《经济学人》提到的那些“对立倾向”如今可能更加明显。随着西方殖民帝国的瓦解、苏联的解体和南斯拉夫的分裂，现在国家的数量几乎是20世纪30年代的三倍。所有这些国家都面临着一个共同的任务：如何将技术变革和经济一体化与传统的政治结构、民族意识、社会经济需求以及惯有的做事方式相协调。
foreignization: 这并不是暗示另一个希特勒正潜伏在角落里，而是指出《经济学人》所注意到的那些“对立趋势”如今同样存在，甚至更加明显。随着西方殖民帝国的消失、苏联的解体以及南斯拉夫的分裂，现在存在的国家数量几乎是1930年代的三倍。所有这些国家都面临着将技术变革和经济一体化与传统政治结构、民族意识、社会经济需求以及惯常的行为方式相协调的任务。

source: Many teams have plush office space , with connecting conference rooms for coaches . Playbook diagrams once drawn by hand are done by computer . Video cut-ups also can be called upon at the touch of a finger . But coaches still watch reams of tape . After losing at Green Bay , for instance , 49ers coaches requested 18 half-hour beta cassettes to study last Tuesday .
