source: The transition to clean energy and greater efficiency in appliances , cars and elsewhere would be costly , but would be an investment offset by even greater savings in fuel costs , according to a study by Union of Concerned Scientists . This transition would reduce dependence on foreign oil and the need for a costly military presence in the Middle East .
domestication: 转向清洁能源并提高家电、汽车等的能效虽然花钱，但这笔投资会通过节省更多的燃料费用得到补偿，这是美国忧思科学家联盟的一项研究得出的结论。这一转型还能减少对外国石油的依赖，也就不必在中东维持一支昂贵的军事力量了。

source: The most aggressive form of zone in college basketball is the matchup zone that John Chaney has made famous at Temple . With Lange 's Villanova background , he was very familiar with the matchup and had already seen it in the Patriot League because Lafayette 's Fran O'Hanlon plays an almost identical defense . The matchup has a lot of man-to-man principles in it -- following cutters to the basket rather than simply handing a cutter off to another defender coming to help on the inside . What Evans was suggesting was more of a pure zone -- let the cutters go , but with the notion of getting out on shooters so as not to turn passive playing a more standard 2-3 zone .
domestication: 大学篮球中最激烈的区域防守是约翰·钱尼在天普大学发扬光大的联防。朗格有维拉诺瓦的背景，对这种联防非常熟悉，而且在爱国者联盟里也见过，因为拉法耶特的弗兰·奥汉隆几乎用的是同样的防守策略。这种联防有很多人盯人的原则——比如跟进切入篮下的球员，而不是简单地交给内线过来协防的队友。而埃文斯建议的则是一种更纯粹的区域防守——让那些切入的球员去，但要扑出去防射手，以免在打标准的2-3联防时变得被动。
foreignization: 大学篮球中最具有侵略性的区域防守形式是约翰·钱尼在天普大学成名的匹配区域防守。由于兰格有维拉诺瓦的背景，他对这种防守非常熟悉，并且已经在爱国者联盟中见过，因为拉法耶特的弗兰·奥哈农几乎使用了相同的防守。匹配区域防守中有许多盯人防守的原则——跟随切入篮下的球员，而不是简单地将切入者交给前来内线协助的其他防守者。埃文斯建议的则更倾向于纯区域防守——让切入者自由行动，但要确保防住射手，以免在执行更标准的2-3区域防守时变得被动。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The most aggressive form of zone in college basketball is the matchup zone that John Chaney has made famous at Temple . With Lange 's Villanova background , he was very familiar with the matchup and had already seen it in the Patriot League because Lafayette 's Fran O'Hanlon plays an almost identical defense . The matchup has a lot of man-to-man principles in it -- following cutters to the basket rather than simply handing a cutter off to another defender coming to help on the inside . What Evans was suggesting was more of a pure zone -- let the cutters go , but with the notion of getting out on shooters so as not to turn passive playing a more standard 2-3 zone .

The matchup has a lot of man-to-man principles in it -- following cutters to the basket rather than simply handing a cutter off to another defender coming to help on the inside . What Evans was suggesting was more of a pure zone -- let the cutters go , but with the notion of getting out on shooters so as not to turn passive playing a more standard 2-3 zone .

source: In the 1980s , Mace began writing a book about his World War II experiences , which he eventually self-published under the title : " The Story of Wake Island : Before , During and After Life as a Prisoner of War of the Japanese for 44 Months . " He has distributed dozens of copies of the book to VA hospitals , and he relishes telling lengthy , elaborate tales of his time in captivity .
domestication: 20世纪80年代，梅斯开始动笔写一本关于他在二战期间经历的书，最终自费出版，书名为《威克岛的故事：战前、战中及战后，在日本战俘营44个月的生活》。他给退伍军人医院送去了几十本，还特别喜欢讲述自己在战俘营里的那些长篇大论、细节满满的故事。

source: Shrimp pathia , about eight tasty shrimp in a thick lentil sauce , makes a good foil for the kati chicken . ( At $ 12.25 , it 's also on the expensive side . ) Mottor ponir - fried Indian cheese ( which looks deliciously like fatback ) cooked with green peas and flavored with fresh cilantro - and alu mottor gobi - potatoes , peas and cauliflower cooked in spices - are among the best vegetable dishes , both excellent .
domestication: 虾帕蒂亚，八只鲜美的大虾在浓郁的扁豆酱里烹制，和烤鸡肉卷搭配得刚刚好。（这道菜12.25美元，价格有点小贵。）莫特尔干酪——看起来像五花肉一样诱人的印度煎奶酪，搭配青豆，撒上新鲜香菜提味——还有土豆、豌豆和花椰菜混合香料烹制的阿卢莫托尔戈比，都是蔬菜菜品中的佼佼者，味道都非常棒。

source: Nike Corp . bowed to criticism of poor working conditions in its Asian shoe factories . Chairman Philip Knight said the minimum age for workers would be raised from 16 to 18 , air quality would be improved , more independent monitoring would be allowed , and free education classes would be offered to employees .
domestication: 耐克公司屈服于对其亚洲鞋厂恶劣工作环境的批评。董事长菲利普·奈特表示，会将工人最低年龄从16岁提高到18岁，改善空气质量，允许更多独立监督，并为员工提供免费教育课程。

source: These politicians are little-known in the United States , to say the least . Major and Hurd are mere blips on the horizon . Heseltine looms a little larger , but only because of the attention paid by press and television to his blond mane , his handsome looks and his suspect temperament . Such coverage fails to prepare the American public for political alternatives .

source: There is a new , open look at the football stadium , just east of the building where the baseball field is being developed on Sixth Street , on September 11 , 1966 . The new look for the entire school is part of a decade of planning to provide as much open space as possible . Moving the baseball field from Bear Down Gym is helping to create the open mall look that will be extended all the way to North Cherry Avenue . The university 's aggressive building program amounted to about $8 million which includes the new administration building , the Space Sciences building and a new women 's dorm .
domestication: 9月11日，1966年，第六街东边的棒球场建设工地旁，足球场有了新的开放面貌。学校整体的新面貌是十年规划的成果，旨在尽可能提供更多的开放空间。将棒球场从Bear Down体育馆移出，有助于打造延伸至北樱桃大道的开阔广场风格。大学积极的建筑项目耗资约800万美元，其中包括新的行政楼、太空科学大楼和女生宿舍。

source: The number of Chinese residents and visitors has fallen off sharply in recent years , as the local and federal authorities tighten up passport and visa controls . For a border region , the presence of Chinese does not strike a visitor as overwhelming , and the frontier is obviously far less porous than the one , say , between Mexico and Texas . But many residents here speak darkly about an illegal migration of Chinese that they say is hidden , and uncounted .
domestication: 近年来，来往的中国人和游客数量锐减，因为地方政府和中央政府对护照和签证的管控越来越严。对于一个边境地区来说，中国人在这里并不显得特别多，边界显然也比墨西哥和德克萨斯之间的要严密得多。但这里的许多居民私下里谈论着一种他们认为是隐藏且未被统计的非法中国移民。
foreignization: 近年来，中国居民和游客的数量急剧下降，因为地方和联邦当局加强了护照和签证的管控。对于一个边境地区来说，中国人存在感并不强烈，边境显然比墨西哥和德克萨斯州之间的边境要严密得多。但这里许多居民暗中谈论着他们所说的隐藏且未被统计的非法中国移民。

source: The rest of the interior , however , became a problem when two very strong opinions competed for finite space . " What can you do , we both have got to live there , " asks Simon-Fernandez . Which is why , she adds , art deco was a good blend for them -- " it brings us from contemporary , which is me , to the mod ' 60s , which is him . "
domestication: 不过，室内其余部分成了问题，因为两人的强烈偏好在有限的空间里产生了冲突。“我们俩都得住这儿，还能怎么办？”西蒙-费尔南德斯问道。正因为如此，她补充说，装饰艺术风格对他们来说是个不错的选择——“它能从现代风格，也就是我的喜好，过渡到60年代的摩登风格，也就是他的喜好。”
foreignization: 然而，室内其余部分成了一个问题，当两种非常强烈的意见争夺有限的空间时。“我们都能做些什么，我们俩都得住在那里，”西蒙-费尔南德斯问道。这就是为什么，她补充说，艺术装饰风格对他们来说是一个很好的融合——“它让我们从当代，也就是我，过渡到60年代的现代主义，也就是他。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The rest of the interior , however , became a problem when two very strong opinions competed for finite space . " What can you do , we both have got to live there , " asks Simon-Fernandez . Which is why , she adds , art deco was a good blend for them -- " it brings us from contemporary , which is me , to the mod ' 60s , which is him . "
不过，室内其余部分成了问题，因为两人的强烈偏好在有限的空间里产生了冲突。“我们俩都得住这儿，还能怎么办？”西蒙-费尔南德斯问道。正因为如此，她补充说，装饰艺术风格对他们来说是个不错的选择——“它能从现代风格，也就是我的喜好，过渡到60年代的摩登风格，也就是他的喜好。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The rest of the interior , however , became a problem when two very strong opinions competed for finite space . " What can you do , we both have got to live there , " asks Simon-Fernandez . Which is why , she adds , art deco was a good blend for them -- " it brings us from contemporary , which is me , to the mod ' 60s , which is him . "
然而，室内其余部分成了一个问题，当两种非常强烈的意见争夺有限的空间时。“我们都能做些什么，我们俩都得住在那里，”西蒙-费尔南德斯问道。这就是为什么，她补充说，艺术装饰风格对他们来说是一个很好的融合——“它让我们从当代，也就是我，过渡到60年代的现代主义，也就是他。”

source: 12 . BUFFALO GROVE : The Mid Suburban favorites are experienced and deep . Forwards Cherise Compobasso , the MSL North player of the year in 1995 , Kate Harker and point guard Stacy Kondziolka are returning starters . The top three reserves from last season 's Elite Eight qualifier , Tanisha Brewer , Anne Sudlow and Diana Wendell , are back . Top newcomers are coach Tom Dineen 's daughter Jaime and Compobasso 's sister Christy .

source: But why was Channel 2 News immediately telling me that Israel felt " sorrow and solidarity , " while the Palestinians were dancing in the streets ? This coverage not only exploited the dead victims in New York , but also portrayed Arabs as heartless people . Arabs in Palestine are also dying as a result of U.S. policies .

source: Business travelers who like to do everything themselves should like this . Thomas Cook Travel has introduced a do-it-yourself reservations system for corporate clients . Its Express Planner helps you plan your itinerary and book airline flights without talking to a travel agent . " It 's another step forward in the automation of the travel process , " says corporate travel consultant Harold Seligman . Unlike some services that require a personal computer , all you need to use Express Planner is a touch-tone phone and a facsimile machine .
domestication: 喜欢亲力亲为的商务旅客有福了。托马斯库克旅行社推出了自助预订系统，专为企业客户设计。这个“快速规划师”能帮你规划行程，预订机票，无需和旅行社打交道。“这标志着旅游过程自动化又迈进了一步。”企业旅行顾问哈罗德·塞利格曼如是说。不像有些服务需要个人电脑，使用“快速规划师”只需一部触音电话和传真机就行。
foreignization: 喜欢自己动手的商务旅客应该会喜欢这个。Thomas Cook Travel 为公司客户推出了一种自助预订系统。其 Express Planner 可帮助您规划行程并预订航班，而无需与旅行代理交谈。“这是旅行过程自动化的一个新进展，”公司旅行顾问 Harold Seligman 说。与一些需要个人电脑的服务不同，使用 Express Planner 您只需要一台触控电话和一台传真机。

source: EdgeGuard contains a landscape protection shield that keeps fertilizer and other nutrients on the lawn . The shield prevents fertilizer from invading unintended areas and from spreading backward onto the shoes and pants of the operator . The EdgeGuard has an extra-large hopper that holds enough fertilizer to cover up to 15,000 square feet . It also features one-touch activation of the landscape shield . EdgeGuard is available at home centers , hardware stores and nurseries . Suggested retail price is $74.99 .
domestication: EdgeGuard 配备了景观保护罩，能将肥料和其他养分牢牢锁在草坪上。这个保护罩能防止肥料侵入不该去的地方，也能避免肥料倒退到操作者的鞋和裤子上。EdgeGuard 的料斗特别大，装的肥料足够覆盖15,000平方英尺的面积。只需轻轻一按，就能启动保护罩。EdgeGuard 在家居中心、五金店和苗圃都有售，建议零售价为74.99美元。

source: Johnson , Gillick and assistant GM Kevin Malone have spent the year trying to perform a next-to-impossible task -- winning at the major league level with an aging nucleus of players while , at the same time , rebuilding a depleted minor league system . By the July 31 deadline for completing trades without players having to clear waivers , the trio seemingly was ready to begin adding young players and retooling . Gillick and Malone had shopped Bonilla and Wells for weeks .
domestication: 约翰逊、吉尔里克和助理总经理凯文·马龙这一年一直在努力完成几乎不可能的任务——既要让一群老将球员在大联盟中赢得比赛，同时又要重建空虚的 Minor League 系统。到了7月31日交易截止日，他们似乎准备开始引进年轻球员，进行阵容调整了。吉尔里克和马龙已经为博尼拉和威尔斯寻找买家好几个星期了。
foreignization: 约翰逊、吉尔里克和助理总经理凯文·马龙今年一直在努力完成一项几乎不可能的任务——在大联盟层面用一批老将球员赢得比赛的同时，重建一个枯竭的小联盟系统。到7月31日交易截止日期前，三人组似乎已经准备好开始引进年轻球员并进行重组。吉尔里克和马龙已经数周来一直在兜售博尼拉和威尔斯。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Johnson , Gillick and assistant GM Kevin Malone have spent the year trying to perform a next-to-impossible task -- winning at the major league level with an aging nucleus of players while , at the same time , rebuilding a depleted minor league system . By the July 31 deadline for completing trades without players having to clear waivers , the trio seemingly was ready to begin adding young players and retooling . Gillick and Malone had shopped Bonilla and Wells for weeks .
约翰逊、吉尔里克和助理总经理凯文·马龙这一年一直在努力完成几乎不可能的任务——既要让一群老将球员在大联盟中赢得比赛，同时又要重建空虚的 Minor League 系统。到了7月31日交易截止日，他们似乎准备开始引进年轻球员，进行阵容调整了。吉尔里克和马龙已经为博尼拉和威尔斯寻找买家好几个星期了。

source: Texas passed a law requiring private prisons to meet the requirements of public ones after an escape of two sex offenders from Oregon from a Corrections Corporation institution in 1996 . The institution was intended to house illegal immigrants and the corporation never told Texas officials that more than 200 Oregon sex offenders were held there .
domestication: 1996年，两个来自俄勒冈州的性犯罪者从一家由惩教公司管理的私人监狱逃脱后，得克萨斯州通过了一项法律，要求私人监狱必须达到公立监狱的标准。这家监狱本来是用来关押非法移民的，但这家公司一直没告诉得克萨斯州官员，里面有200多名来自俄勒冈州的性犯罪者。
foreignization: 德克萨斯州在1996年发生两名性犯罪者从俄勒冈州的惩教公司机构逃脱后，通过了一项法律，要求私营监狱满足公立监狱的要求。该机构原本计划收容非法移民，而该公司从未告知德克萨斯州官员有超过200名俄勒冈州的性犯罪者被关押在那里。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Texas passed a law requiring private prisons to meet the requirements of public ones after an escape of two sex offenders from Oregon from a Corrections Corporation institution in 1996 . The institution was intended to house illegal immigrants and the corporation never told Texas officials that more than 200 Oregon sex offenders were held there .

source: With the clock ticking toward the end of the tax year , households can use the next few weeks to reduce this year 's income and position themselves to get the best education tax benefits possible in 2001 and 2002 . Thinking about next year takes on extra significance because that 's when enhanced tax advantages kick in .
domestication: 随着税年接近尾声，各家各户可以利用接下来的几周时间，减少今年的收入，为自己争取在2001年和2002年获得最佳的教育税收优惠做好准备。想想明年特别重要，因为那时会有更多的税收优惠政策生效。
foreignization: 随着税务年度的结束时间逐渐临近，家庭可以在接下来的几周内减少今年的收入，并使自己处于能够获得2001年和2002年最佳教育税收优惠的位置。考虑明年尤为重要，因为那时增强的税收优势将开始生效。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

With the clock ticking toward the end of the tax year , households can use the next few weeks to reduce this year 's income and position themselves to get the best education tax benefits possible in 2001 and 2002 . Thinking about next year takes on extra significance because that 's when enhanced tax advantages kick in .

source: If Houston does not rival New York or Los Angeles as a source of political dollars , it is still considered a big pot of riches , and one where nearly all the major corporations play the game . One prominent fund-raiser , Sue Walden , who in the last eight years has raised nearly $50 million from Enron and other energy companies , said elected officials often courted the companies to play host to $1,000-a-plate dinners at the Four Seasons Hotel . No one was in greater demand than Mr. Lay .

source: Mr. Sulzberger said yesterday that he believed analysts who predicted the death of the newspaper business were wrong . He said that The Boston Globe could become an attractive part of the company 's offerings to advertisers and that there could be joint advertising sales . Even if newsprint is eventually replaced by electronic delivery of information , Mr. Sulzberger said , businesses like The Times and The Globe will remain viable because of their information-gathering abilities .
domestication: 苏尔茨伯格先生昨天表示，他认为那些预测报业将走向末路的分析师们错了。他说，《波士顿环球报》可能会成为公司向广告商提供服务中极具吸引力的一部分，而且有可能实现联合广告销售。即使新闻纸最终被电子信息发布方式取代，苏尔茨伯格先生说，像《纽约时报》和《波士顿环球报》这样的企业依然能站稳脚跟，因为它们拥有强大的信息收集能力。
foreignization: 苏尔茨伯格先生昨天说，他认为预测报纸业务将消亡的分析人士是错误的。他说，《波士顿环球报》可以成为公司向广告商提供服务中的一个有吸引力的部分，并且可能会有联合广告销售。即使新闻纸最终被电子信息传递所取代，苏尔茨伯格先生说，像《时代报》和《环球报》这样的企业仍将因为其信息收集能力而保持生存能力。

source: Warren Christopher , the former Secretary of State , said that we have to remember not to repeat our history -- where in 1941 , we targeted one racial group . That , to me , was a critical comment , because it rings true for me and for our communities . We have to be particularly vigilant that during this time of tenseness that we do n't allow our civil liberities to be disregarded . In spite of the attack , on our own soil , we still are a nation of laws , we have a Constitution .
domestication: 前国务卿沃伦·克里斯托弗说，我们必须记住不要重蹈历史的覆辙——1941年，我们曾经针对一个种族群体。这句话对我来说至关重要，因为这话说到了我的心坎里，也说到了我们社区的心坎里。在这个紧张的时期，我们必须格外警惕，不能让我们的公民自由被忽视。尽管遭受了本土攻击，我们仍然是一个法治国家，我们有宪法。
foreignization: 前任国务卿沃伦·克里斯托弗说，我们必须记住不要重蹈历史覆辙——在1941年，我们针对了一个种族群体。对我来说，这是一个关键的评论，因为这对我来说是真实的，对于我们社区也是真实的。我们必须特别警惕，在这个紧张的时期，不要让我们的公民自由被忽视。尽管遭受了在我国领土上的袭击，我们仍然是一个法治国家，我们有宪法。

In spite of the attack , on our own soil , we still are a nation of laws , we have a Constitution .

source: The white woman enters . She is monied and matronly . Her features are as coarse as her skin is pale and powdered . She is also beefy , as are many Afrikaner women here . She browses briefly through a rack of drastically marked-down Parisian designs before realizing they are much too small for her frame . Then she heads for a display of Fendi handbags that are also reduced . She chooses one and heads for the cash register , where the manager is installed . There , the matron opens her new bag to examine its insides and shrieks when she discovers it has no organizing pockets , snaps or zippers .
domestication: 这白女人进来了。她有钱又上了年纪。她的五官粗糙，皮肤却白皙粉嫩。人也壮实，和这里的许多阿非利卡女人一样。她在打折的巴黎设计款衣架前匆匆扫了一眼，发现这些衣服对她来说太小了。接着，她转向了同样降价的芬迪手袋展示区。挑了一个，就往收银台走去，经理正坐在那里。到了柜台，这位太太打开新包检查里面，一见没有分隔口袋、扣子或拉链，立刻尖叫起来。
foreignization: 白人女子走进来。她有钱且有贵妇气质。她的五官粗犷，皮肤苍白而扑了粉。她也很壮实，就像这里许多布尔族妇女一样。她在一排大幅降价的巴黎设计服装前匆匆浏览了一下，很快意识到这些衣服对她来说太小了。然后她走向一个展示芬迪手袋的展台，这些手袋也打了折。她选了一个，然后走向收银台，经理就在那里。在那里，这位贵妇打开她的新包检查内部，当发现包里没有分隔口袋、扣环或拉链时，她尖叫起来。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Then she heads for a display of Fendi handbags that are also reduced . She chooses one and heads for the cash register , where the manager is installed . messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The white woman enters . She is monied and matronly . Her features are as coarse as her skin is pale and powdered . She is also beefy , as are many Afrikaner women here . She browses briefly through a rack of drastically marked-down Parisian designs before realizing they are much too small for her frame . Then she heads for a display of Fendi handbags that are also reduced . She chooses one and heads for the cash register , where the manager is installed . There , the matron opens her new bag to examine its insides and shrieks when she discovers it has no organizing pockets , snaps or zippers .
白人女子走进来。她有钱且有贵妇气质。她的五官粗犷，皮肤苍白而扑了粉。她也很壮实，就像这里许多布尔族妇女一样。她在一排大幅降价的巴黎设计服装前匆匆浏览了一下，很快意识到这些衣服对她来说太小了。然后她走向一个展示芬迪手袋的展台，这些手袋也打了折。她选了一个，然后走向收银台，经理就在那里。在那里，这位贵妇打开她的新包检查内部，当发现包里没有分隔口袋、扣环或拉链时，她尖叫起来。

source: Eric Tannenbaum , the president of Columbia Tri-Star , the studio that developed " Mad About You " for NBC and " The Nanny " for CBS , says that there simply are n't enough talented writers to insure that sex will be handled with aplomb . " With all the new outlets -- the WB , UPN and cable -- there are too many shows and not enough originality , " he says .
domestication: 埃里克·坦嫩鲍姆，哥伦比亚三星影业的总裁，曾为NBC开发了《爱你疯狂》和为CBS打造了《保姆》，他说现在根本没有足够的才华横溢的编剧来保证性话题能处理得游刃有余。他说：“如今新的播出平台如雨后春笋般涌现——WB、UPN还有有线电视，节目多了去了，但创意却没跟上。”
foreignization: 埃里克·坦嫩鲍姆，哥伦比亚三星公司的总裁，该工作室为NBC开发了《疯狂关于你》和为CBS开发了《保姆》，表示根本没有足够的有才华的编剧来保证性内容能够处理得游刃有余。“随着所有新的播出渠道——WB、UPN和有线电视——有太多的节目而缺乏原创性，”他说。

source: In some years , various Metro schools have not participated in certain league sports , feeling overmatched and usually citing DeMatha as a chief reason . The most recent examples were Ireton , which does not compete in the football league , and O'Connell , which stayed out of basketball competition for several seasons before rejoining five years ago .

source: The two contenders raced ahead of an approaching storm front . For eight days , it looked like Dalton 's Amer Sports One would run away with the race , but he was never able to shake Kostecki from his stern . As the wind increased , Kostecki 's well-tuned boat ate away at Dalton 's lead . With 36 hours of sailing left , the Illbruck Challenge recaptured the lead and held fast during a 500-mile sprint to Cape Town .
domestication: 两位选手在暴风雨来临前拼命加速。达顿的“美国体育一号”一度看似要一路领先，连续八天都跑在前面，但科斯特基始终紧紧咬住不放。随着风力加大，科斯特基那调校得当的船开始缩小与达顿的差距。在离终点还有36小时航程时，“伊利布鲁克挑战号”重新夺回了领先地位，并在最后500英里的冲刺中牢牢守住优势，直奔开普敦。
foreignization: 两名竞争者在即将到来的风暴前锋前疾驰。八天来，看起来达顿的“Amer Sports One”将一马当先赢得比赛，但他始终无法摆脱科斯特基从他船尾的紧追。随着风力的增强，科斯特基调校精良的船只逐渐缩小了与达顿的差距。在剩下36小时的航程中，“Illbruck Challenge”重新夺回了领先地位，并在500英里的冲刺中牢牢保持到开普敦。

source: As the winners and losers have increased , so have the legal and political pressures on the Bureau of the Census , the agency that keeps the score . It has forced politicians , the bureau and professional statisticians around the country to re-examine basic questions : What demographic information should the Government gather ? How should it be gathered ? And to what end ?
domestication: 赢家和输家越来越多，对人口普查局的法律和政治压力也越来越大。这局子本来就是记分员，现在却让政客们、局里的工作人员和全国各地的专业统计学家不得不重新审视一些基本问题：政府应该收集哪些人口信息？该怎么收集？目的又是什么？
foreignization: 随着赢家和输家的增多，对人口普查局的法律和政治压力也在增加，该机构负责记分。这迫使全国各地的政治家、人口普查局和专业统计人员重新审视一些基本问题：政府应该收集哪些人口统计数据？应该如何收集？以及为了什么目的？

source: These ads talk about " marijuana and cocaine " as if these drugs are on the same level . I 've heard ads by The Partnership for a Drug-Free America make claims about pot that are totally baseless . Most kids , by the time they graduate high school , have tried pot and know it is almost harmless . So when they see ads that depict pot as a dangerous drug , they know they are n't being told the truth .
domestication: 这些广告把“大麻和可卡因”并列起来，好像这两种毒品是一回事似的。我听过的那些由美国无毒伙伴关系组织制作的广告，对大麻的指责根本站不住脚。多数孩子高中毕业之前都试过大麻，也知道这东西几乎没什么害处。所以，当他们看到广告里把大麻描绘成危险毒品时，心里清楚这根本不是事实。
foreignization: 这些广告将“大麻和可卡因”相提并论，仿佛这些毒品处于同一水平。我曾听到美国禁毒联盟的广告对大麻做出完全无根据的声称。大多数孩子在高中毕业前都尝试过大麻，并知道它几乎无害。所以当他们看到将大麻描绘成危险毒品的广告时，他们知道这些广告没有告诉他们真相。

So when they see ads that depict pot as a dangerous drug , they know they are n't being told the truth .

source: Add the chili powder , cumin and red pepper flakes to the onions and peppers and cook for 2 to 3 minutes . Add the beef broth , tomato puree , cooked beef and enough water to cover the meat and vegetables . Stir to combine . Add salt to taste . Bring the mixture to a boil , then immediately reduce the heat so the liquid just simmers . Simmer the chili until the flavors have blended , about 25 minutes .
domestication: 加入辣椒粉、孜然和红辣椒片，和洋葱、彩椒一起翻炒2到3分钟。然后加入牛肉汤、番茄酱、煮熟的牛肉，再加足够的水没过肉和蔬菜。拌匀后，根据口味加盐调味。先大火烧开，然后立刻转小火，让汤汁微微沸腾。慢炖25分钟左右，直到各种味道充分融合。
foreignization: 加入辣椒粉、孜然和红辣椒片到洋葱和辣椒中，煮2到3分钟。加入牛肉汤、番茄酱、煮熟的牛肉和足够的水以覆盖肉和蔬菜。搅拌混合。根据口味加盐。将混合物煮沸，然后立即减小火候，使液体仅微沸。慢炖 chili 直至各种味道融合，大约25分钟。

source: She 's just written what promises to be a best-selling book , " " A Return to Love : Reflections on the Principles of A Course in Miracles " ( HarperCollins , $ 20 ) , she appears on cable TV on both coasts ; there even are inspirational Williamson tapes . In addition to her teaching and preaching , she has a myriad of projects that help hundreds of critically ill AIDS and cancer patients daily .

source: The American military operation to reduce the sectarian killings in Baghdad and avert a full-fledged civil war has focused on about a dozen neighborhoods where the bodies of tortured victims have been found in sewage-filled lots , civilians have been killed in drive-by shootings and sectarian-inspired kidnappings have soared .
domestication: 美军在巴格达的行动旨在减少教派暴力，防止全面内战，主要集中在大约十几个街区。这些地方发现了很多受虐致死的尸体被丢弃在污水横流的空地上，平民也经常成为开车枪击的目标，教派仇杀引发的绑架案件更是屡见不鲜。
foreignization: 美国军事行动旨在减少巴格达的宗派杀戮并避免全面内战，该行动集中在大约十几个街区，这些地方发现了遭受酷刑的受害者的尸体被丢弃在污水横流的空地，平民在驾车射击中丧生，宗派动机的绑架案件激增。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The American military operation to reduce the sectarian killings in Baghdad and avert a full-fledged civil war has focused on about a dozen neighborhoods where the bodies of tortured victims have been found in sewage-filled lots , civilians have been killed in drive-by shootings and sectarian-inspired kidnappings have soared .

source: It was n't shaping up to be a good compartment . Fast on Roger 's heels came two 50-ish schoolteacher sisters from Connecticut ; the sixth seat remained empty . Roger himself , who looked like 10,000 rumpled polyglot businessmen my husband and I had seen in the last few months , was saying little in an unidentifiable accent . We could n't place him ; we did n't recognize the passport . All in all , not the companions of choice for a first foray into communism .
domestication: 这车厢从一开始就显得不太吉利。紧随罗杰之后进来的是两位五十来岁的康涅狄格州女教师姐妹，第六个座位一直空着。罗杰本人看起来就像我和丈夫在过去几个月里见过的一万个皱巴巴的多语言商人，他说话不多，口音也搞不清。我们认不出他是哪儿的，护照也没见过。总而言之，初次接触共产主义，这些旅伴实在不是我们的首选。

source: Many say the ministry can not ignore the blunder it made a year ago when it declared that the economy was recovering and insisted on increasing a national sales tax last April . The tax increase sent the Japanese economy tumbling over a cliff , plunging at an annual rate of 11 percent in the second quarter of 1997 .

source: Casts sit in semicircles around the director , producer and playwright , reading new scripts in T-shirts with the name of the show emblazoned on the front , clutching iced coffee in Styrofoam cups and munching tepid pizza . Nothing is set now , frozen or blocked . Nobody is screaming at anyone yet . No creative differences have been declared . Director , producer , star and playwright are atwitter , all " thrilled " to be working with each other . Reality and rewrites and tantrums and billing and jealousies and cast romances and agents have not yet set in .
domestication: 演员们围坐在导演、制片人和编剧周围，半圆形地坐着，穿着印有节目名字的T恤，手里拿着泡沫杯里的冰咖啡，啃着温热的比萨。现在一切都还没定型，没有定死或卡住。还没人开始大喊大叫，也没有人宣布创作分歧。导演、制片人、主演和编剧都兴奋不已，一个个都说“能一起工作真是太高兴了”。现实的改动、脾气爆发、署名问题、嫉妒心理、演员之间的恋情和经纪人的问题都还没冒头。

source: I want a politician who will make decisions based upon his or her beliefs and character . Where is a politician who will fight for our Constitution , a politician with a backbone , one who , right or wrong , will make a decision and stand by it ? source: He points to Yurok artist Rick Bartow 's " The Fisherman 's Dream " ( 1991 ) as an example of a strategy for survival . As a Vietnam vet , Bartow had difficulty making the transition back to civilian life . But expressing himself through art helped him . Spang says that in " Dream , " Bartow is telling Yuroks and other Indians that if they embrace who they are and carry forward the history and culture of their people , that affirmation of culture can help them to survive in a difficult dominant culture . There are still lessons to be learned from the old stories .
domestication: 他指着尤罗克艺术家里克·巴托的《渔夫之梦》（1991年），说这是生存策略的一个例子。巴托是越战退伍军人，回国后很难适应平民生活。但通过艺术表达自己，对他帮助很大。斯潘格说，在《梦》中，巴托告诉尤罗克人和其他印第安人，如果他们接受自己的身份，传承民族的历史和文化，这种文化的认同感可以帮助他们在艰难的主流社会中生存下去。老故事里还有很多值得学习的东西。
foreignization: 他指出了尤罗克艺术家Rick Bartow的“渔夫之梦”（1991）作为生存策略的一个例子。作为一名越南老兵，Bartow很难重新适应平民生活。但通过艺术表达自己帮助了他。Spang说，在“梦”中，Bartow是在告诉尤罗克人和其他印第安人，如果他们认同自己的身份，并传承他们人民的历史和文化，这种文化的肯定可以帮助他们在困难的主流文化中生存下去。从旧故事中仍有许多可以学习的东西。

source: But a lot has changed over the past year . The number of satellite players has shrunk from four to two : DirecTV and Echostar . They 're doing surprisingly well in rounding up new subscribers and revenue since the federal government gave them the right to retransmit local stations , which they do for an extra fee .
domestication: 但是，这一年里情况发生了不少变化。卫星电视服务商从四个减少到了两个：DirecTV和Echostar。自从联邦政府赋予它们重播本地电视台的权利后，它们靠着这项额外收费的服务，出人意料地吸引了大量新用户，收入也水涨船高。
foreignization: 但是过去一年里发生了很多变化。卫星电视供应商的数量从四个减少到了两个：DirecTV和Echostar。自联邦政府赋予他们重新传输地方电视台的权利以来，他们以额外费用提供这项服务，并且在吸引新用户和增加收入方面表现出了惊人的成绩。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But a lot has changed over the past year . The number of satellite players has shrunk from four to two : DirecTV and Echostar . They 're doing surprisingly well in rounding up new subscribers and revenue since the federal government gave them the right to retransmit local stations , which they do for an extra fee .
但是，这一年里情况发生了不少变化。卫星电视服务商从四个减少到了两个：DirecTV和Echostar。自从联邦政府赋予它们重播本地电视台的权利后，它们靠着这项额外收费的服务，出人意料地吸引了大量新用户，收入也水涨船高。

source: That question lies at the heart of Thompson 's book . Mixing anecdotes and science , he explains the famous psychological principle of mere exposure , or the fact that the more you see something , the more you like it . He began pondering Monet 's success after seeing his famous painting " The Japanese Footbridge " at the National Gallery of Art .
domestication: 这个问题正是汤普森书中的核心。他结合轶事和科学，解释了著名的“单纯曝光效应”这个心理学原理，也就是说，你越频繁地接触某样东西，就越可能喜欢它。汤普森是在国家美术馆看到莫奈的名画《日本小桥》后，开始思考莫奈成功的原因。
foreignization: 那个问题构成了汤普森书的核心。他将轶事和科学结合起来，解释了著名的心理学原理——单纯曝光效应，即你看到某样东西的次数越多，你就越喜欢它。他在国家艺术博物馆看到莫奈的名画《日本小桥》后，开始思考莫奈的成功原因。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: I always think about what I want a place to be like when I walk through a space , what I want those interactive moments to be . It 's what we experience as users . I 'm always thinking about the end-user because we 're all end-users . We may not have designed it , but we know what makes a great place or neighborhood environment .
domestication: 每次走过一个地方，我总会想这个地方应该是怎样的，那些互动的瞬间该是怎样的。这就是我们作为使用者的体验。我总是从最终用户的视角去思考问题，因为我们每个人都是最终用户。虽然我们可能没有设计过这些地方，但我们知道什么样的地方或社区环境才是好的。
foreignization: 我总是思考当我穿过一个空间时我希望这个地方是什么样的，我希望那些互动时刻是怎样的。这是我们作为用户所经历的。我总是思考最终用户，因为我们都是最终用户。我们可能没有设计它，但我们知道什么能造就一个伟大的地方或社区环境。

source: Still , the cultural expression of quarterlife crisis is gaining momentum . Another QLC book , " Conquering Your Quarterlife Crisis " by Alexandra Robbins ( Perigee Books , $14.95 ) , landed on bookshelves across the country in October . Musician John Mayer croons about what " might be a quarterlife crisis or just the stirring in my soul " and asks , " Am I living it right ? " in his song " Why Georgia . "
domestication: 不过，四分之一生命危机的文化表达越来越火了。另一本关于四分之一生命危机的书，《战胜你的四分之一生命危机》，作者是亚历山德拉·罗宾斯，于十月在全国各地的书店上架，售价14.95美元。歌手约翰·梅尔在他的歌曲《为什么是乔治亚》中唱道：“这可能是四分之一生命危机，也可能是灵魂深处的呼唤”，还问道：“我这样活着对吗？”
foreignization: 仍然，四分之一生危机的文化表达正在获得势头。另一本关于QLC的书，《战胜你的四分之一生危机》由亚历山德拉·罗宾斯所著（Perigee Books，14.95美元），于十月在全国各地的书店上架。音乐家约翰·梅尔在他的歌曲《为什么是乔治亚》中吟唱着“可能是四分之一生危机，或是我灵魂的觉醒”，并问道，“我过得正确吗？”

source: Deregulation was supposed to do for the power industry what it did in the airline and telecommunications industries : bring consumers lower prices and more competition . Instead , utility bills are rising sharply for residents in many states that unshackled their power markets as rate caps , the final remnants of regulation , expire .
domestication: 去监管本来是想在电力行业里复制航空和电信行业的成功，让消费者享受到更低的价格和更多的竞争。结果呢，很多放开电力市场的州，随着最后的监管措施——价格上限的取消，居民的电费却急剧上涨。
foreignization: 取消管制本应像在航空和电信行业那样为电力行业带来更低的价格和更多的竞争。然而，随着管制的最后残余——费率上限到期，许多解除电力市场限制的州的居民电费却急剧上涨。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Deregulation was supposed to do for the power industry what it did in the airline and telecommunications industries : bring consumers lower prices and more competition . Instead , utility bills are rising sharply for residents in many states that unshackled their power markets as rate caps , the final remnants of regulation , expire .
去监管本来是想在电力行业里复制航空和电信行业的成功，让消费者享受到更低的价格和更多的竞争。结果呢，很多放开电力市场的州，随着最后的监管措施——价格上限的取消，居民的电费却急剧上涨。

Deregulation was supposed to do for the power industry what it did in the airline and telecommunications industries : bring consumers lower prices and more competition . Instead , utility bills are rising sharply for residents in many states that unshackled their power markets as rate caps , the final remnants of regulation , expire .
取消管制本应像在航空和电信行业那样为电力行业带来更低的价格和更多的竞争。然而，随着管制的最后残余——费率上限到期，许多解除电力市场限制的州的居民电费却急剧上涨。

source: His daughter does not smoke . But some research has shown a direct connection between working in tobacco farms and youth smoking , making the question of school tobacco farms all the more nettlesome . Children are more likely to smoke -- boys 10 times as likely , girls 51/2 times as likely -- if they work on tobacco farms and have a parent who smokes , a University of Kentucky study shows . Melody Noland , the researcher who conducted the study , recalled one mother packing a single cigarette in her third-grader 's lunch every day . One of her survey forms asked students when they started smoking . The earliest date on the form was first grade . A boy raised his hand and asked : " What if you started in kindergarten ? "
domestication: 他女儿不抽烟。但有些研究显示，在烟草农场工作和青少年吸烟之间存在直接联系，这让学校里的烟草农场问题变得更加棘手。孩子们如果在烟草农场工作，而且父母也抽烟的话，他们吸烟的可能性会大大增加——男孩的几率是原来的十倍，女孩则是五倍半。肯塔基大学的一项研究表明了这一点。进行这项研究的研究员梅洛迪·诺兰回忆说，有一位母亲每天都会在她上三年级的孩子午餐盒里放一根烟。调查问卷中问到学生是从什么时候开始吸烟的，表格上最早的记录是一年级。有个男孩举手问：“要是我从幼儿园就开始抽呢？”

source: NEW YORK -- The wind whistles loudly through slightly open French doors in the palatial ninth-floor apartment of millionaire investor Steven Rattner and his wife , Maureen White . source: When Napoleon started conquering Europe , he attacked from the right flank in violation of principles of combat that had been in place since Richard the Lionhearted . By the time Napoleon was idling on St. Helena , only Britain and Sweden - the two countries he did n't reach in western Europe - were still driving on the left . In most of the nations of eastern Europe , the rule of the left prevailed until the Nazis imposed their will during World War II .
domestication: 拿破仑刚开始征服欧洲时，他的进攻是从右翼发起的，这违反了自狮心王理查时代以来的作战原则。等拿破仑在圣赫勒拿岛上消磨时光时，只有英国和瑞典——他未能征服的西欧两个国家——还在靠左行驶。东欧大部分国家原本也都是靠左行驶的，直到二战期间纳粹的铁蹄踏过，才改变了这一局面。
foreignization: 当拿破仑开始征服欧洲时，他从右翼发动攻击，违反了自狮心王理查时代以来就存在的作战原则。到拿破仑在圣赫勒拿岛闲居时，只有英国和瑞典——他在西欧未能到达的两个国家——仍然在左侧驾驶。在东欧大多数国家，左侧行驶规则一直占主导地位，直到纳粹在第二次世界大战期间强加了自己的意志。

When Napoleon started conquering Europe , he attacked from the right flank in violation of principles of combat that had been in place since Richard the Lionhearted . By the time Napoleon was idling on St. Helena , only Britain and Sweden - the two countries he did n't reach in western Europe - were still driving on the left . In most of the nations of eastern Europe , the rule of the left prevailed until the Nazis imposed their will during World War II .

source: As part of his chaplain 's duties while a prisoner in Japan , Mace said he was put in charge of cremating and storing the ashes of his compatriots who died in the camps . Many of the small boxes were packed with personal possessions and affixed with identification labels with the goal of delivering them to surviving family members after the war .
domestication: 在被囚禁于日本期间，马斯作为随军牧师，负责焚烧并保存死于战俘营的同胞们的骨灰。他说，很多装骨灰的小盒子都塞满了个人物品，并贴上了身份标签，目的是战争结束后把这些遗物送到幸存的家属手中。
foreignization: 作为在日本被囚期间担任随军牧师职责的一部分，梅斯说他被指派负责火化并保存在战俘营中去世的同胞的骨灰。许多小盒子装有个人物品，并贴上了身份标签，目的是在战争结束后将它们交给幸存的家属。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As part of his chaplain 's duties while a prisoner in Japan , Mace said he was put in charge of cremating and storing the ashes of his compatriots who died in the camps . Many of the small boxes were packed with personal possessions and affixed with identification labels with the goal of delivering them to surviving family members after the war .

source: Sen. Jim DeMint , R-S.C. , plans to introduce a bill to use the surplus to fund individual accounts , with investments limited only to Treasury bonds . The idea was first proposed in April by Alex Pollack , a scholar at the American Enterprise Institute , who argued that it " will deliver all of the benefits of personal accounts with none of the costs or risks cited by opponents . "
domestication: 来自南卡罗来纳州的共和党参议员吉姆·德明特计划提出一项法案，打算利用盈余资金设立个人账户，投资仅限于国债。这个想法最早是由美国企业研究所的学者亚历克斯·波拉克在四月份提出的，他认为这样做“可以带来个人账户的所有好处，而不会带来反对者所提到的成本或风险”。
foreignization: 南卡罗来纳州共和党参议员吉姆·德明特计划提出一项法案，利用盈余为个人账户提供资金，投资仅限于国债。这一想法最早由美国企业研究所的学者亚历克斯·波拉克于4月提出，他认为这“将带来个人账户的所有好处，而不会带来反对者所称的成本或风险。”

source: The most expensive kitchens can cost $400,000 or more , with two of everything from islands to dishwashers . The cabinetry alone can cost $250,000 , more than the average home in metro Atlanta . Smaller kitchens tucked into butler 's pantries may do most of the real work , so the showcase kitchen 's crystal chandeliers , porous countertops and furniture-grade cabinetry stay pristine .
domestication: 最贵的厨房可以花到400万人民币甚至更多，双岛台、双洗碗机，一应俱全。光是橱柜就能要价250万，比亚特兰大市区的平均房价还要高。真正的烹饪重担可能落在那些藏在管家储藏室的小厨房里，这样展示用的大厨房就能保持原样，水晶吊灯闪闪发光，石英台面光洁如新，家具级的橱柜也始终一尘不染。
foreignization: 最昂贵的厨房可能要花费400,000美元或更多，配备两个从岛台到洗碗机的所有设施。仅橱柜本身就可以花费250,000美元，超过了亚特兰大都会区的平均房价。较小的厨房隐藏在管家储藏室中可能承担了大部分实际工作，因此展示用厨房的水晶吊灯、多孔台面和家具级别的橱柜保持如新。

source: Call it iSilly , a growing number of products in which fun is emphasized over function , and cute or irreverent often trumps wow . All of these items , some costing as little as $10 , have been created to plug into an iPod -- or , in many cases , any audio source that has a standard 3.5-millimeter headphone jack .
domestication: 这东西叫iSilly，越来越火了，主打的就是个乐呵，功能倒是次要的，萌态或是不拘一格的设计常常比惊艳更重要。这些玩意儿，有些才卖十块钱，设计出来就是往iPod上一插就能用，当然了，只要有标准的3.5毫米耳机插孔，别的音频设备也一样能用。
foreignization: 称之为iSilly，越来越多的产品强调趣味而非功能，可爱或不敬常常胜过惊艳。所有这些物品，有些价格低至10美元，都是为了连接到iPod——或者在许多情况下，任何具有标准3.5毫米耳机插孔的音频源。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: " We 've got new laws , new technology , heightened partisanship and a growing involvement of lawyers in the voting process , " said Tova Wang , who studies elections for the Century Foundation , a nonpartisan research group . " We also have the greatest potential for problems in more places next month than in any voting season before . "

" We 've got new laws , new technology , heightened partisanship and a growing involvement of lawyers in the voting process , " said Tova Wang , who studies elections for the Century Foundation , a nonpartisan research group . " We also have the greatest potential for problems in more places next month than in any voting season before . "
托瓦·王说：“我们有了新法律，新技术，党派之争愈发激烈，律师在选举过程中的参与也越来越多。”托瓦·王是世纪基金会的研究员，该基金会是一个无党派的研究机构。他还表示，“下个月的选举可能出现问题的地方比以往任何时候都多，潜在的问题也更大。”

“我们有了新的法律，新技术，党派对立加剧以及律师在投票过程中的越来越多的参与，”研究选举的世纪基金会（一个无党派研究团体）的托瓦·王说。“我们还面临着下个月比以往任何时候的投票季节在更多地方出现问题的最大潜力。”

source: According to the shelter 's own figures they took in 2,455 live dogs last year . After just 14 percent of those were returned to the owners , leaving 2,106 , the shelter euthanized 1,338 . That is 64 percent . It does n't matter whether an animal can be tested and graded and defined as " unadaptable . " They are all living creatures whose killing should concern us all .
domestication: 根据收容所自己的统计，去年他们收留了2455只活狗。其中有14%的狗找到了主人，剩下的2106只里，有1338只被实施了安乐死，占到了64%。不管这些动物能不能通过测试、评估，被定义为“不适应”，它们毕竟都是有生命的生灵，杀害它们应该让我们所有人都感到不安。

source: We all survive and scamper up a hill , through someone 's vegetable garden and over a barbed-wire fence to get back to the Jeep . source: Many whites were offended when he told blacks in January that New Orleans would be a " chocolate city " again . There 's a don't-be-so-sure attitude among many , who sense that the black majority may have disintegrated : Some have dubbed Nagin " Mayor Wonka , " and boutique owners in the mostly white Uptown area are selling out of " Uptown White Chocolate " T-shirts .

source: First . . . adding Internet support to Windows can not violate the antitrust laws , no matter what Microsoft 's " intent " was in doing so . source: Hurrah for the National Basketball Association . It 's about time some restraint be placed on players who make millions passing a ball around and thus think they have privileges and rights far above that of the average citizen . Sprewell simply overstepped the bounds which have been approached by too many players . It is well known that coaches are often outspoken , but no player is forced to play . Let him quit and try to find a job - I suspect he could n't hold a regular one .
domestication: 为国家篮球协会欢呼！是时候对那些拿着天价工资传球的球员们管管了，他们自以为比普通市民高人一等。斯普雷维尔这回算是越界了，这种事已经有不少球员做过头了。教练们嘴上不饶人是出了名的，但没人逼着球员非得打球不可。他要是不想打了，就出去找份工作试试——我估摸着他连个正经工作都干不长。
foreignization: 为国家篮球协会欢呼。是时候对那些赚取数百万美元传球的球员进行一些约束了，这些球员因此认为自己享有远高于普通公民的特权和权利。斯普雷维尔只是越过了许多球员已经接近的界限。众所周知，教练们经常直言不讳，但没有球员被强迫去打球。让他辞职，去找个工作——我怀疑他根本找不到一份正常的工作。

Let him quit and try to find a job - I suspect he could n't hold a regular one .

Sprewell simply overstepped the bounds which have been approached by too many players . It is well known that coaches are often outspoken , but no player is forced to play . Let him quit and try to find a job - I suspect he could n't hold a regular one .
为国家篮球协会欢呼。是时候对那些赚取数百万美元传球的球员进行一些约束了，这些球员因此认为自己享有远高于普通公民的特权和权利。斯普雷维尔只是越过了许多球员已经接近的界限。众所周知，教练们经常直言不讳，但没有球员被强迫去打球。让他辞职，去找个工作——我怀疑他根本找不到一份正常的工作。

source: It took Bill Romanowski more than three hours to finally catch up with Kansas City tight end Tony Gonzalez . By then , it was too late . source: Therefore , let us be careful not to leave one another alone , but affirm faith wherever we hear of it and see it in action . At the same time , in light of recent tragic events , we must be just as careful not to affirm any fanatical faith that crosses the line from love to hatred -- of oneself or others . WALTRAUT STEIN , Decatur
domestication: 因此，我们要小心，不要彼此孤立，而要在任何地方听到或看到信仰时给予肯定和支持。同时，鉴于最近发生的悲剧，我们必须同样警惕，不要去肯定那些越过爱的边界，变成对自己或他人的仇恨的狂热信仰。瓦尔特劳·斯坦，德凯特

source: The resulting fast-paced games , and big victories , have electrified the town and set off a frenzy of ticket buying . Saturday 's game has been declared a sellout at 24,535-seat Thompson-Boling Arena -- the first time in Lady Vols history that a game there has been sold out in advance . The crowd may become the largest to see a women 's college basketball game . The mark was set here Jan. 3 , when Tennessee met Connecticut and drew 24,597 , with standing-room tickets sold .
domestication: 比赛节奏快，胜利连连，整个小镇都沸腾了，大家疯狂地抢购门票。周六的比赛，能容纳24535人的汤普森-博林体育馆的票已经全部售罄，这是田纳西女子篮球队历史上第一次提前卖光门票。这场比赛的观众人数可能会创下女性大学篮球赛的新纪录。1月3日，当田纳西队和康涅狄格队在这里交手时，到场观众达到了24597人，连站票都卖光了。
foreignization: 由此产生的快节奏比赛和大胜已经使这个城镇为之振奋，并引发了一股购票热潮。周六的比赛在可容纳24,535人的汤普森-博林体育馆被宣布售罄——这是女子志愿军队历史上第一次在这个场地的提前售票比赛中售罄。观众人数可能会成为观看女子大学篮球比赛最多的记录。这项记录是在1月3日在这里创下的，当时田纳西队对阵康涅狄格队，吸引了24,597人，包括站票。

source: The official opening ribbon cutting ceremony at Angel Park , a community-sponsored $1.5 million all-inclusive playground conceived and designed in memory of Kelli and Andy Szczybor 's son Ryan who died of leukemia at age one , 19 years ago . The playground and amphitheater is one of the largest and most accessible playground for children with special needs in the Baltimore region .

source: One of the best things you can do on a Saturday or Sunday is get a few friends together , install yourselves under El Huarache Azteca 's murals and spend some quality time with the platillo de barbacoa -- smoky , roasted lamb , by the plate or the pound -- and the cold beverage of your choice . Otherwise , corn is the thing here , in a dozen shapes with many fillings : Mmsa patted into thick sopes and grilled ; tortillas wrapped around chicken stewed with tomato and onion ; fried cornmeal pouches with pressed , deep-fried pork rind ; and the signature huaraches , extra-thick tortillas topped with meat , cactus or huitlacoche .
domestication: 周末最好的事情之一就是叫上几个朋友，一起坐在埃尔华拉切阿兹特卡的壁画下，享受一盘烤羊肉——烟熏味十足，可以按盘或按斤购买——再配上你爱的冷饮。不然就来点玉米做的美食吧，这儿有十几种形状各异、馅料丰富的玉米食品：厚实的索普斯用手拍成，再放到烤架上烤；用玉米饼包裹炖鸡，里面还有番茄和洋葱；油炸的玉米面口袋，里面夹着压平的炸猪皮；当然还有这里的招牌——瓦拉切，这是一种特别厚的玉米饼，上面铺满了肉、仙人掌或是玉米黑穗菌。
foreignization: 你可以在周六或周日做的最好的事情之一就是叫上几个朋友，坐在埃尔华拉切阿兹特卡的壁画下，花些时间享受他们的烤羊肉盘——烟熏、烤制的羊肉，按盘或按磅出售——和你选择的冷饮。否则，这里的主要食材是玉米，有十几种形状，多种馅料：Mmsa被拍成厚的索佩斯并烤制；玉米饼包裹着用番茄和洋葱炖煮的鸡肉；油炸的玉米面小袋子里装有压平的油炸猪皮；以及招牌的瓦拉切，特别厚的玉米饼上面放有肉、仙人掌或玉米菌。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

One of the best things you can do on a Saturday or Sunday is get a few friends together , install yourselves under El Huarache Azteca 's murals and spend some quality time with the platillo de barbacoa -- smoky , roasted lamb , by the plate or the pound -- and the cold beverage of your choice . Otherwise , corn is the thing here , in a dozen shapes with many fillings : Mmsa patted into thick sopes and grilled ; tortillas wrapped around chicken stewed with tomato and onion ; fried cornmeal pouches with pressed , deep-fried pork rind ; and the signature huaraches , extra-thick tortillas topped with meat , cactus or huitlacoche .

周末最好的事情之一就是叫上几个朋友，一起坐在埃尔华拉切阿兹特卡的壁画下，享受一盘烤羊肉——烟熏味十足，可以按盘或按斤购买——再配上你爱的冷饮。不然就来点玉米做的美食吧，这儿有十几种形状各异、馅料丰富的玉米食品：厚实的索普斯用手拍成，再放到烤架上烤；用玉米饼包裹炖鸡，里面还有番茄和洋葱；油炸的玉米面口袋，里面夹着压平的炸猪皮；当然还有这里的招牌——瓦拉切，这是一种特别厚的玉米饼，上面铺满了肉、仙人掌或是玉米黑穗菌。

Otherwise , corn is the thing here , in a dozen shapes with many fillings : Mmsa patted into thick sopes and grilled ; tortillas wrapped around chicken stewed with tomato and onion ; fried cornmeal pouches with pressed , deep-fried pork rind ; and the signature huaraches , extra-thick tortillas topped with meat , cactus or huitlacoche .

source: Gaylord Perry is in the Hall of Fame , and he is famous for throwing a spit ball , which is an illegal pitch . If one cheater is in the Hall of Fame , the rest of the " cheaters " should be there , too . Barry Bonds , Mark McGwire , Roger Clemens , Rafael Palmeiro and Alex Rodriguez should all be in the Hall of Fame . Are their numbers inflated ? Probably so , but their numbers are so astronomical they would still have Hall of Fame numbers if stats were taken away from them .
domestication: 盖尔罗德·佩里进了名人堂，他出名是因为投“抹油球”，这是一种违规的投球方式。如果一个作弊的人都能进名人堂，那其他“作弊”的人也该进去。巴里·邦兹、马克·麦奎尔、罗杰·克雷门斯、拉斐尔·帕梅罗和亚历克斯·罗德里格斯都应该进名人堂。他们的成绩水分大吗？可能吧，但即使去掉这些水分，他们的成绩还是牛到不行，名人堂级别的。
foreignization: 盖尔德·佩里在名人堂中，他以投掷非法的“湿球”而闻名。如果一个作弊者能进入名人堂，那么其他“作弊者”也应该在其中。巴里·邦兹、马克·麦奎尔、罗杰·克莱门斯、拉斐尔·帕尔梅罗和亚历克斯·罗德里格斯都应该进入名人堂。他们的数据被夸大了吗？可能是这样，但即使从他们身上拿走这些统计数据，他们的数据仍然足以让他们进入名人堂。

source: Run-of-the-mill hazing also remains an overriding feature of plebe life . For the benefit of a visitor to a mess-hall table , one plebe ( his name withheld to protect his own dignity ) was run through a routine that appeared to involve balancing bits of dessert on his upper lip . He ended by shouting , " Sir ! That 's expletive good Jell-O ! "
domestication: 新兵的生活依然充满了常见的欺侮。为了给参观者在食堂的餐桌上助兴，一位新兵（为了保护他的尊严，这里不透露名字）被要求表演了一套程序，看起来像是要把甜点放在上唇上保持平衡。最后他大声喊道：“长官！这该死的好吃果冻！”
foreignization: 普通的欺侮仍然是新生生活的主要特征。为了给餐厅桌旁的访客演示，一名新生（为了保护他的尊严而没有透露姓名）被要求完成一个似乎涉及将甜点碎片放在上唇的例行程序。他最后大声喊道：“长官！这该死的果冻真好吃！”

source: The artist went by the same name . Jim Willoughby was known around town . He was a successful cartoonist whose work appeared twice-weekly in The Daily Courier newspaper , usually lampooning the mayor or the town council 's latest pet project . Years before , he 'd worked at Hanna-Barbera and Walt Disney , helping give life to Scooby Doo , Yogi Bear , Darkwing Duck .
domestication: 这位艺术家也叫吉姆·威洛比，在镇上挺出名的。他是位成功的漫画家，每周两次在《每日信使报》上发表作品，经常拿市长或镇议会的新项目开涮。多年前，他还在汉纳-巴伯拉和迪士尼公司工作过，参与创作了史酷比、瑜伽熊和暗翼鸭这些角色。
foreignization: 艺术家使用的是同一个名字。吉姆·威洛比在镇上很有名。他是一位成功的漫画家，作品每周两次出现在《每日信使报》上，通常讽刺市长或镇议会最新的宠项目。多年前，他曾就职于汉纳-巴伯拉和沃尔特·迪士尼公司，帮助赋予斯库比杜、尤吉熊、暗翼鸭生命。

source: The service capped eight days of grieving for the 87-year-old nun , who earned the nickname " Saint of the Gutters " for her devotion to the destitute and dying . About 500,000 viewed her body during the week at St. Thomas ' Church ; when the doors to the small church were finally closed to the public , Mother Teresa 's religious community prayed there through the night , with back-to-back Masses .
domestication: 这场追思会为这位87岁修女的八天哀悼期画上了句号。她因为对穷困和垂死者的无私奉献，赢得了“贫民窟的圣人”这一美誉。整整一周的时间里，大约有50万人在圣托马斯教堂瞻仰了她的遗体；直到小教堂的大门最终向公众关闭，姆姆特蕾莎的宗教团体还在里面彻夜祷告，一连串的弥撒从未间断。
foreignization: 该仪式为这位87岁的修女的八天哀悼期画上了句号，她因致力于帮助贫民和垂死者而获得了“贫民窟的圣人”这一绰号。在圣托马斯教堂的一周时间里，大约有50万人瞻仰了她的遗体；当这座小教堂最终对公众关闭时，特蕾莎修女的宗教团体整夜在那里祈祷，连续不断地举行弥撒。

source: Lightly oil a large bowl . Place the dough in the bowl and lightly spray or rub the top of the dough with additional oil . Cover tightly with plastic wrap and place in a warm spot . Set aside to rise until the dough has doubled in size , about 1 hour . ( Gently stick a finger into the center of the dough ; if the indentation remains once you 've removed your finger , it should be ready . )
domestication: 大碗里抹一层薄油，把面团放进去，再在面团表面轻轻喷点油或者抹点油。然后用保鲜膜封好，放在温暖的地方。让面团醒发到两倍大，大概需要1小时。可以轻轻用手指戳一下面团中间，如果戳的坑没弹回去，就表示面团发好了。
foreignization: 在大碗里轻轻涂上一层油。将面团放入碗中，并在面团顶部轻轻喷洒或涂抹额外的油。用保鲜膜紧紧盖住，放在温暖的地方。让其静置发酵，直到面团体积翻倍，大约需要1小时。（轻轻将手指戳入面团中心；如果你的手指移开后凹陷仍然保持不变，说明面团已准备好。）

source: The Cubs enter the offseason with almost $96 million in guaranteed base salaries committed to 13 players for next season -- representing $21.7 million in combined raises for those players . Considering the uncertainty over team ownership and a 2007 payroll of about $100million , one of the biggest questions this winter will be how much room that payroll has to grow .
domestication: 小熊队进入休赛期时，已经给13名球员保证了将近9600万美元的基本工资——这意味着这些球员的总薪资涨幅达到了2170万美元。考虑到球队所有权的不确定性，以及2007年的薪资总额大约为1亿美元，这个冬天最大的疑问就是薪资空间还能不能扩大。
foreignization: 小熊队进入休赛期时，已经向13名球员承诺了近9600万美元的保证底薪——这些球员的总加薪为2170万美元。考虑到球队所有权的不确定性以及2007年约1亿美元的工资总额，今年冬天最大的问题之一将是这个工资总额还有多少增长空间。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The Cubs enter the offseason with almost $96 million in guaranteed base salaries committed to 13 players for next season -- representing $21.7 million in combined raises for those players . Considering the uncertainty over team ownership and a 2007 payroll of about $100million , one of the biggest questions this winter will be how much room that payroll has to grow .
小熊队进入休赛期时，已经给13名球员保证了将近9600万美元的基本工资——这意味着这些球员的总薪资涨幅达到了2170万美元。考虑到球队所有权的不确定性，以及2007年的薪资总额大约为1亿美元，这个冬天最大的疑问就是薪资空间还能不能扩大。

小熊队进入休赛期时，已经向13名球员承诺了近9600万美元的保证底薪——这些球员的总加薪为2170万美元。考虑到球队所有权的不确定性以及2007年约1亿美元的工资总额，今年冬天最大的问题之一将是这个工资总额还有多少增长空间。

source: We ask around Baghdad for Ezzis , and ask them if they know of a Majed who was arrested by - or a Walid who worked for - the intelligence service . After several days , we have nothing . At times , our plan seems like driving around Germany just after World War II and asking people to help us find relatives who had been in the Gestapo . Increasingly disheartened , we drive an hour outside of Baghdad to a village called Tarmiya - the seat of the Ezzi tribe .
domestication: 我们在巴格达四处打听艾兹家族的人，问他们是否知道一个叫马吉德的被情报部门抓了，或者一个叫瓦利德的在情报部门工作过。几天下来，一无所获。有时候，我们的计划就像二战刚结束时在德国开车转悠，问人能不能帮我们找到曾在盖世太保工作的亲戚一样荒谬。越来越灰心丧气的我们，开车出了巴格达，往北开了一个多小时，来到一个叫塔尔米亚的小村庄，这里是艾兹部落的大本营。
foreignization: 我们在巴格达四处打听艾兹家族的人，并问他们是否知道有一个人叫马杰德被情报部门逮捕，或者一个叫瓦利德在情报部门工作。经过几天的努力，我们一无所获。有时，我们的计划就像是在二战刚结束后的德国开车四处询问，寻找曾在盖世太保工作过的亲戚。我们越来越灰心，于是开车离开巴格达，前往一个小时车程外的一个名叫塔尔米亚的村庄——艾兹部落的中心。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

We ask around Baghdad for Ezzis , and ask them if they know of a Majed who was arrested by - or a Walid who worked for - the intelligence service . After several days , we have nothing . At times , our plan seems like driving around Germany just after World War II and asking people to help us find relatives who had been in the Gestapo . Increasingly disheartened , we drive an hour outside of Baghdad to a village called Tarmiya - the seat of the Ezzi tribe .
我们在巴格达四处打听艾兹家族的人，问他们是否知道一个叫马吉德的被情报部门抓了，或者一个叫瓦利德的在情报部门工作过。几天下来，一无所获。有时候，我们的计划就像二战刚结束时在德国开车转悠，问人能不能帮我们找到曾在盖世太保工作的亲戚一样荒谬。越来越灰心丧气的我们，开车出了巴格达，往北开了一个多小时，来到一个叫塔尔米亚的小村庄，这里是艾兹部落的大本营。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

We ask around Baghdad for Ezzis , and ask them if they know of a Majed who was arrested by - or a Walid who worked for - the intelligence service . After several days , we have nothing . At times , our plan seems like driving around Germany just after World War II and asking people to help us find relatives who had been in the Gestapo . Increasingly disheartened , we drive an hour outside of Baghdad to a village called Tarmiya - the seat of the Ezzi tribe .
我们在巴格达四处打听艾兹家族的人，并问他们是否知道有一个人叫马杰德被情报部门逮捕，或者一个叫瓦利德在情报部门工作。经过几天的努力，我们一无所获。有时，我们的计划就像是在二战刚结束后的德国开车四处询问，寻找曾在盖世太保工作过的亲戚。我们越来越灰心，于是开车离开巴格达，前往一个小时车程外的一个名叫塔尔米亚的村庄——艾兹部落的中心。

source: Her push to be a Tony Blair-style reformer inside the Socialist party , and to move the party toward the center , was attacked by the intellectual left . Sources who know Royal say that by taking over the Socialist party with her domestic partner Francois Hollande , by introducing reforms , and by creating an innovative Internet registration rule last fall that gave her the nomination - she is a proven political heavyweight .
domestication: 罗雅尔在党内推动托尼·布莱尔式的改革，试图让党向中间靠拢，却遭到了左翼知识分子的猛烈批评。熟悉罗雅尔的人说，她和伴侣弗朗索瓦·奥朗德一起掌控了社会党，推行了一系列改革，去年秋天还创新地推出了网上注册规则，最终成功获得了提名，证明了她在政坛上的分量。
foreignization: 她推动在社会党内成为像托尼·布莱尔那样的改革者，并将政党向中间靠拢，遭到了左翼知识分子的攻击。熟悉罗亚尔的消息人士称，通过与她的生活伴侣弗朗索瓦·奥朗德一起掌控社会党，引入改革，并在去年秋季创建了一项创新性的互联网注册规则使她获得了提名——她证明了自己是一位资深的政治重量级人物。

source: " He planted thousands of Rambo apple trees in Pennsylvania , Ohio and Indiana in the 1800s , " said Joe Besecker , director emeritus of the Johnny Appleseed Museum . " The Rambo apple is a tart , cooking apple . It 's large and matures in August . The trees are tenacious , very hard to kill . source: The sea change came in about 1970 , largely prompted by two men : Mr. Lear and James L. Brooks . True products of their era 's new cultural explicitness , they were the first to champion sitcoms as realistic , albeit deeply ironic , reflections of the human condition . In 1971 , Mr. Lear created " All in the Family , " which , in addition to attacking bigotry , limned topics like abortion , breast cancer and sexual fantasy . Although Mary Richards , the heroine Mr. Brooks created for " The Mary Tyler Moore Show , " was never shown puffing on a post-coital cigarette , it was understood that she sometimes had sex with the men she dated .
domestication: 变化发生在大约1970年，这主要是因为两个人：Lear先生和James L. Brooks。他们俩是那个时代新文化坦诚的真正代表，首次将情景喜剧推崇为现实生活的反映，尽管带着深刻的讽刺意味。1971年，Lear先生推出了《全家福》，这部剧不仅抨击了种族主义，还涉及了堕胎、乳腺癌和性幻想等话题。虽然Brooks先生在《玛丽·泰勒·摩尔秀》中塑造的女主角玛丽·理查兹从未被拍到过在性行为后抽烟，但观众心知肚明，她有时会与约会的对象发生关系。
foreignization: 大约在1970年，发生了巨大的变化，这主要归功于两个人：Lear先生和James L. Brooks。作为他们时代新文化明确性的真正产物，他们是第一批倡导情景喜剧作为现实的、尽管是深刻讽刺的、人类状况反映的人。1971年，Lear先生创作了《全家福》，除了抨击种族主义外，还探讨了堕胎、乳腺癌和性幻想等话题。虽然Mary Richards，Brooks先生为《玛丽·泰勒·摩尔秀》创造的女主角，从未被描绘成在性行为后吸烟，但人们理解她有时会与约会的男性发生性关系。

source: Chris Cofty , a former vice president with MediaOne Inc. , has been hired as a $ 55,000-a-year assistant to County Administrator Billy Beckett . Cofty will be handling special project projects initially , such as negotiating the county 's franchise agreements with cable television companies and overseeing a community relations program , but will be given direct control of some departments eventually , Beckett said .
domestication: 前MediaOne公司副总裁克里斯·科夫蒂被聘为比利·贝克特县行政长官的助理，年薪55000美元。科夫蒂一开始会负责一些特别项目，比如和有线电视公司谈判县里的特许经营协议，监督社区关系项目。不过，贝克特说，将来他会直接管理一些部门。

source: At least a dozen electronics contract manufacturers - ranging from small firms like Compass to multibillion-dollar giants such as Solectron Corp . of Milpitas , Calif. - have been involved in piecework arrangements in the past year , a San Jose Mercury News investigation shows . Contract manufacturers build parts and systems for companies such as Hewlett-Packard Co. , Sun Microsystems Inc. and Cisco Systems Inc .
domestication: 至少有十几家电子合约制造商，从小公司Compass到像加州米尔皮塔斯的Solectron这样的大型企业，在过去一年里都参与了这种分包工作，这是《圣何塞水星报》的一项调查所显示的结果。这些合约制造商为惠普、Sun微系统和思科系统等大公司生产零部件和系统。
foreignization: 至少有十几家电子产品合约制造商——从小型公司如Compass到加利福尼亚州米尔皮塔斯的数十亿美元巨头Solectron Corp.——在过去一年中都参与了分包安排，圣何塞水星报的调查表明。合约制造商为惠普公司、Sun Microsystems Inc.和Cisco Systems Inc.等公司制造零部件和系统。

source: On Sunday , the Raptors ' Butch Carter and Sonics ' Paul Westphal refused to be miked , and both teams Monday were fined $ 100,000 . Jerry Sloan of the Jazz and Pat Riley of the Heat have moaned about the intrusion into their inner sanctum as if they were CIA operatives . The Manhattan Project did not merit the secrecy some league geniuses believe they deserve .
domestication: 周日，猛龙的布奇·卡特和超音速的保罗·韦斯特法尔拒绝了佩戴麦克风的要求，结果两队在周一都被罚款10万美元。爵士的杰里·斯隆和热火的帕特·莱利抱怨说，这种侵入他们的“圣地”就像他们变成了中情局特工一样。曼哈顿计划都没他们这些联盟高手觉得需要的保密程度高。

source: Delta has been one of the most outspoken airlines about scrapping certain security procedures , like searching carry-on bags at the boarding gate . The chief executive , Leo F. Mullin , made several trips to Washington over the summer to talk with federal officials about overhauling parts of the system . He is pushing for the government to drop , among other things , a security tax of $2.50 a flight leg that was added to tickets in February .
domestication: 达美航空一直是取消某些安检程序的最直言不讳的航空公司之一，比如在登机口检查随身行李。首席执行官莱奥·F·穆林夏天多次跑到华盛顿，和联邦官员商讨改革部分安检系统的事。他极力主张政府取消二月份起在机票上加收的每段航班2.5美元的安全税。
foreignization: 达美航空公司一直是取消某些安全程序（如在登机口检查随身行李）方面最直言不讳的航空公司之一。首席执行官利奥·F·穆林在今年夏天多次前往华盛顿，与联邦官员就改革系统的一部分进行交谈。他推动政府取消自2月份起在机票中增加的每段航班2.5美元的安全税等措施。

source: Retailers that target consumers with more moderate incomes are selling pieces of the dream , too . Wal-Mart stocks stainless steel appliances , Sears markets Bosch dishwashers , Home Depot displays granite slabs in its parking lots , and Expo Design Center recently added laminate countertops in granite , concrete and limestone patterns .

source: Memphis was the first major city to answer President Bush 's call to become an " America 2000 " community by drawing up a plan to fix its schools . Slowly and laboriously , parents , educators , business leaders and civil rights advocates are working to build sturdy coalitions for change . To win agreement , they have already had to jettison one of Mr. Bush 's key planks -- public money for private schools -- and add several different goals to make Mr. Bush 's plan their own .
domestication: 孟菲斯是第一个响应布什总统号召，成为“2000年美国”社区的主要城市，它制定了改善学校教育的计划。家长、教育工作者、商界领袖和民权倡导者们慢慢而艰难地建立起了稳固的改革联盟。为了达成共识，他们不得不放弃布什总统的一个核心主张——用公款资助私立学校，同时增加了几个不同的目标，使布什的计划更加符合自身的需求。
foreignization: 孟菲斯是第一个响应布什总统号召，成为“美国2000”社区的主要城市，它制定了修复其学校的计划。缓慢而艰难地，家长们、教育工作者、商界领袖和民权倡导者正在努力建立稳固的变革联盟。为了赢得同意，他们已经不得不放弃布什先生的一个关键主张——公立资金资助私立学校——并增加几个不同的目标，以使布什先生的计划成为他们自己的计划。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Memphis was the first major city to answer President Bush 's call to become an " America 2000 " community by drawing up a plan to fix its schools . Slowly and laboriously , parents , educators , business leaders and civil rights advocates are working to build sturdy coalitions for change . To win agreement , they have already had to jettison one of Mr. Bush 's key planks -- public money for private schools -- and add several different goals to make Mr. Bush 's plan their own .
孟菲斯是第一个响应布什总统号召，成为“2000年美国”社区的主要城市，它制定了改善学校教育的计划。家长、教育工作者、商界领袖和民权倡导者们慢慢而艰难地建立起了稳固的改革联盟。为了达成共识，他们不得不放弃布什总统的一个核心主张——用公款资助私立学校，同时增加了几个不同的目标，使布什的计划更加符合自身的需求。

source: Dwares also has developed a training manual on Social Security cases and trains other lawyers . He sits on Whitman-Walker 's legal services committee , and according to staff lawyer Philip Fornaci , Dwares 's " enthusiasm has attracted other firms " to tackle this dry , thankless work . Fornaci also commended Dwares 's habit , one he has passed on to others , to visit each client at his home . " These attorneys make six-figure incomes , " said Fornaci . " They are not used to going to areas like Southeast or dealing with a really sick person . " But , said Fornaci , Dwares insists a home visit is vital to gain the client 's trust and to present each case more effectively to a judge .
domestication: 杜瓦雷斯不仅编写了一本关于社保案件的培训手册，还培训了其他律师。他还是惠特曼-沃克法律服务委员会的成员。据工作人员律师菲利普·福尔纳西说，杜瓦雷斯的“热情吸引了很多律所来接手这些枯燥且费力不讨好的工作”。福尔纳西还称赞了杜瓦雷斯的一个习惯，这个习惯也被他传给了其他人——亲自上门拜访每位客户。“这些律师年薪六位数，”福尔纳西说，“他们通常不会去东南区这样的地方，也不会接触那些病得很重的人。”但是，福尔纳西说，杜瓦雷斯坚持认为，上门拜访对于赢得客户的信任和更有效地向法官陈述案件至关重要。

" They are not used to going to areas like Southeast or dealing with a really sick person . " But , said Fornaci , Dwares insists a home visit is vital to gain the client 's trust and to present each case more effectively to a judge .

source: The Chronicle 's Food department compared four recipes and found that if we played with the proportions of body to claw or leg meat , we got a lump-kind of texture . Picked crabmeat is available in three mixtures -- all leg meat ; 60 percent body meat and 40 percent leg meat ; or 45 percent body , 45 percent broken leg meat and 10 percent leg meat . We found that a mix of straight leg meat with mixed meat created a whole-meat texture .
domestication: 《纪事报》的美食部门比较了四种食谱，发现如果调整身体肉和爪子或腿肉的比例，就能得到一种块状的口感。挑好的蟹肉有三种混合方式：全腿肉；60%的身体肉加40%的腿肉；或者45%的身体肉、45%的碎腿肉和10%的腿肉。我们发现，直接用腿肉和混合肉搭配，能做出整块肉的感觉。

source: Fitzgibbons , 51 , left the AFL-CIO in 1988 to become the committee 's communications director , then jumped to deputy staff director from 1992 to 2000 , before joining DaimlerChrysler 's Washington office as director of public policy . In his days on the committee , Fitzgibbons helped map out Dingell 's myriad investigations , especially on defense and energy issues .

source: As we lie there , I often fall asleep wondering what he 'll really remember of all this , how he 'll remember his father after all the secrets we 've shared , his secrets and mine - about my fears , my disappointments , my doubts and dreams , all the things I 've always wanted to do but never have and , maybe never will . And I wonder what kind of man he 'll be .
domestication: 躺在床上时，我常常带着满脑子的思绪入睡，想着他长大后会记得这些吗？他会怎么回忆起他的父亲？毕竟我们之间分享了那么多秘密，有他的，也有我的——关于我的恐惧、失落、怀疑和梦想，那些我一直想做却从未付诸行动，也许永远也实现不了的事情。我在想，他将来会成为什么样的人呢？
foreignization: 当我们躺在那里时，我常常在睡着前想他究竟能记住这一切中的哪些，他会在我们分享了所有秘密之后如何记住他的父亲——他的秘密和我的——关于我的恐惧、我的失望、我的疑虑和梦想，所有那些我一直想做但从未做过、也许永远不会去做的事情。我想知道他会成为一个怎样的男人。

source: I 'm still no opera lover -- but that voice . . . The force of that voice was something else . It soothed and caressed , but it haunted , and it seemed to have limitless power . Someone said that upon hearing Barbara Jordan address the Democratic National Convention recently , they thought they were hearing the voice of God . These folks apparently never heard Marian Anderson . That deep , passionate voice had to be like the voice Moses heard on that mountain .
domestication: 我还是不喜欢歌剧，但那个声音啊……那声音的力度真是与众不同。它既温柔又抚慰，却也令人难忘，仿佛拥有无尽的力量。有人说，最近听到芭芭拉·乔丹在民主党全国代表大会上的讲话，觉得就像是听到了上帝的声音。这些人恐怕没听过玛丽安·安德森唱歌吧。那低沉而充满激情的声音，简直就像摩西在山上听到的天籁之音。
foreignization: 我仍然不是歌剧爱好者——但那声音……那声音的力量是另一回事。它抚慰和爱抚，但它也萦绕不去，似乎拥有无尽的力量。有人说过，最近听到巴贝拉·乔丹在民主党全国代表大会上的讲话时，他们觉得自己听到了上帝的声音。这些人显然从未听过玛丽安·安德森的声音。那个深沉、热情的声音一定就像摩西在山上听到的声音一样。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I 'm still no opera lover -- but that voice . . . The force of that voice was something else . It soothed and caressed , but it haunted , and it seemed to have limitless power . Someone said that upon hearing Barbara Jordan address the Democratic National Convention recently , they thought they were hearing the voice of God . These folks apparently never heard Marian Anderson . That deep , passionate voice had to be like the voice Moses heard on that mountain .
我仍然不是歌剧爱好者——但那声音……那声音的力量是另一回事。它抚慰和爱抚，但它也萦绕不去，似乎拥有无尽的力量。有人说过，最近听到巴贝拉·乔丹在民主党全国代表大会上的讲话时，他们觉得自己听到了上帝的声音。这些人显然从未听过玛丽安·安德森的声音。那个深沉、热情的声音一定就像摩西在山上听到的声音一样。

source: There are still others . There 's still the possibility of Quentin Kopp , who keeps talking about it . There 's a possibility of ( City Attorney ) Louise Renne running ; they 're out there testing the water . Of course I have concerns about Louise because of the people she 's hired in the past six months . She has a tremendous number of people ( in her office ) who are politically astute but not so much city attorneys . She 's building a team in there that is much more ( prepared ) for a campaign than it is for settling law cases .
domestication: 还有其他人呢。昆廷·科普一直在念叨这件事，有可能他会参选。还有市检察官露易丝·雷内，她也在试探风向。当然，我对露易丝有些顾虑，因为她最近六个月招了好些人。她的办公室里政治手腕高明的人不少，但真正懂城市法律的不多。她组建的团队更像是为了竞选准备，而不是为了处理法律案件。
foreignization: 还有其他人。还有昆廷·科普的可能性，他一直在谈论这件事。还有（市检察官）路易丝·雷恩参选的可能性；他们在外面试探水域。当然，我对路易丝有所担忧，因为她在过去六个月里雇佣的人。她办公室里有很多人政治上非常精明，但并不是特别出色的市检察官。她在那里建立了一个团队，这个团队更擅长竞选活动而不是解决法律案件。

source: Ms. Lampkin 's principal complaint was reflex sympathetic dystrophy -- pain without underlying cause , the sort of phantom limb pain amputees sometimes suffer . She had broken her neck in a motorcycle accident when she was 23 , but it did not affect her until she was 47 , and since then she had had several surgeries . Now , at 53 , she felt numbness along her right cheek down to her first two toes . " I feel a burning sensation and a tingling , " she said . " I feel like I 've been electrocuted . "
domestication: Lampkin女士的主要问题是反射性交感神经营养不良——就是那种没有明显原因的疼痛，就像截肢者有时会经历的幻肢痛。她23岁时在一次摩托车事故中摔断了脖子，但直到47岁才开始受到影响，之后又做了好几次手术。现在53岁的她，感觉右边脸颊到前两个脚趾都麻木了。“我感到灼烧和刺痛，”她说，“像是被电击了一样。”
foreignization: Lampkin女士的主要抱怨是反射性交感神经营养不良——没有基础病因的疼痛，类似于截肢者有时会经历的幻肢痛。她在23岁时发生了一次摩托车事故，导致颈部骨折，但直到47岁才受到影响，此后她进行了几次手术。现在，53岁的她感到右脸颊到前两个脚趾有麻木感。“我感到灼烧感和刺痛，”她说。“我觉得自己被电击了。”

source: TWO ACCUSED OF TRICKING IMMIGRANTS : A father and son were accused of tricking Eastern European immigrants into investing their life 's savings in a high-risk mortgage lending business . The Securities and Exchange Commission alleges they collected $ 34 million , keeping one-fifth of it for themselves .
domestication: 父子俩被控骗移民：一对父子涉嫌诱骗东欧移民将毕生积蓄投入高风险房贷业务。证券交易委员会指控他们共敛财3400万美元，自己却独吞了五分之一。
foreignization: 两人被控欺骗移民：一名父亲和儿子被指控欺骗东欧移民将其毕生积蓄投资于一项高风险的抵押贷款业务。证券交易委员会指控他们收集了3400万美元，其中五分之一归自己所有。

source: Market turbulence puts new pressure on the Federal Reserve to produce a major interest rate cut when it meets Tuesday . For now , most Fed-watchers say , policymakers are likely to produce another half-point cut -- substantial compared with the Fed 's preferred quarter-point moves , but no bigger than the two half-point cuts the Fed made in January , which have yet to deliver measurable benefits .
domestication: 市场波动给美联储带来了新的压力，要求其在周二的会议上大幅降息。眼下，大多数关注美联储的人士认为，决策者可能会再次降息半个百分点——这比美联储惯常的四分之一点的调整幅度大得多，但也不超过今年一月两次半个百分点的降息幅度，而这些降息至今尚未显现出明显的成效。
foreignization: 市场动荡给联邦储备委员会在周二会议上出台大幅降息带来了新的压力。目前，大多数美联储观察人士认为，政策制定者可能会再次降息半个百分点——与美联储偏好的四分之一点的调整相比，这一幅度已经很大，但并不比美联储在1月份进行的两次半个百分点的降息更大，而这两次降息尚未带来可衡量的好处。

source: Charles Johnson , a blogger in Los Angeles with an expertise in typography , suspected forgery : The documents looked too contemporary . He typed one of the memos into a Microsoft Word document - using the program 's default settings - and found that the CBS documents were an exact match . He sent Power Line a link to his findings at LittleGreenFootballs.com .
domestication: 查尔斯·约翰逊是洛杉矶的一位博主，专长是字体设计。他怀疑这些文件是伪造的：文件看起来太现代了。他用微软Word默认设置把其中一份备忘录输入到文档中，发现和CBS的文件一模一样。于是他在自己的博客LittleGreenFootballs.com上发布了这个发现，并给Power Line发了一个链接。
foreignization: 查尔斯·约翰逊，一位在洛杉矶的博主，专长于字体排印，怀疑伪造：这些文件看起来太现代了。他将其中一份备忘录输入到一个使用默认设置的微软Word文档中，发现CBS的文件完全匹配。他向Power Line发送了一个链接，链接指向他在LittleGreenFootballs.com上的发现。

source: Graham uses several brands of chocolate , Valrhona and Callebaut among them . For the tempering demonstration , he poured melted chocolate onto a marble-topped table . It oozed freely onto the surface and spread into a puddle . Using an 8-inch stainless steel scraper available at hardware stores , he pushed the chocolate over the marble to lower the temperature of the lovely goo .
domestication: 格雷厄姆用好几个品牌的巧克力，比如瓦赫纳和卡莱博。演示调温时，他把融化的巧克力倒在一个大理石台面上。巧克力顺畅地流到台面上，摊开成一片。他用了一块从五金店买来的8英寸不锈钢刮刀，把巧克力在大理石上推开，给这美妙的黏糊糊降温。
foreignization: 格雷厄姆使用多个品牌的巧克力，其中包括瓦荷娜和卡莱博。在调温演示中，他将融化的巧克力倒在了大理石台面上。巧克力自由地流到表面，扩散成一滩。他使用了一个在五金店可以买到的8英寸不锈钢刮刀，将巧克力推过大理石以降低这种美妙黏糊的温度。

source: Mr. Clinton 's partisans say the President reminded Americans at the height of the Republican Revolution of what they value in Government . Noting that the Republicans have moderated their tone on issues like education and the environment , Vice President Al Gore said , " It 's a measure of how far President Clinton has come in defining not only the Democratic Party but also the center of gravity in our country . "
domestication: 克林顿的拥护者说，在共和党革命最鼎盛的时候，总统提醒了美国人政府的价值所在。副总统戈尔提到，共和党在教育和环境等问题上已经缓和了态度，他说：“这证明了克林顿总统不仅在定义民主党方面取得了多大的进展，也重新确立了国家的核心立场。”
foreignization: 克林顿先生的支持者说，总统在共和党革命的高潮时期提醒了美国人他们对政府所珍视的价值。注意到共和党在教育和环境等问题上的语气已经缓和，副总统阿尔·戈尔说：“这是衡量克林顿总统不仅在定义民主党而且也在定义我们国家的重心方面取得了多大进展的一个标志。”

source: As for the pirate skiffs themselves , they are usually kept for evidence in potential prosecution . The only time when they are destroyed is when there is insufficient evidence to prosecute but enough suspicious paraphernalia like ladders , weapons or hooks to warrant dumping the occupants back on land and destroying the boat .
domestication: 至于那些海盗的小船，通常都会保留下来作为可能起诉的证据。只有在证据不足无法起诉，但船上又有足够的可疑物品，比如梯子、武器或钩子时，才会把人扔回陆地，小船也一并销毁。
foreignization: 至于海盗的小艇，通常会保留作为潜在起诉的证据。只有在没有足够的证据进行起诉但有足够可疑的工具如梯子、武器或钩子时，才会将船上人员送回陆地并销毁船只。

As for the pirate skiffs themselves , they are usually kept for evidence in potential prosecution . The only time when they are destroyed is when there is insufficient evidence to prosecute but enough suspicious paraphernalia like ladders , weapons or hooks to warrant dumping the occupants back on land and destroying the boat .

source: Blumenfeld was born in Berlin on the eve of the birthday of the Kaiser , whom he described as a " mustachioed Majesty ( Court barber Haby marketed his patent mustache-trainer under the name ' Mission Accomplished ' ) with the permanent expression of a child in a huff . In those days the whole world was in a permanent huff . A ham with a passion for dressing up , a partial cripple with the historic mission of brandishing his gilded field marshal 's baton and leading the world toward the glorious days of Herr Hitler : mission accomplished ! "
domestication: 布卢门费尔德出生在柏林，正好赶在凯撒生日的前一天。他形容这位“留着八字胡的陛下”（宫廷理发师哈比曾推销过一种专利八字胡定型器，取名“大功告成”）“总是摆出一副赌气小孩的模样”。当时，整个世界都跟这孩子似的，整天不高兴。这位爱穿奇装异服的大戏精，半残的身子却肩负着历史使命，挥舞着镀金的元帅权杖，引领世界走向希特勒的辉煌时代：大功告成！
foreignization: 布卢门费尔德出生在柏林，正值皇帝生日的前夜，他描述这位皇帝为“留着小胡子的陛下（宫廷理发师哈比以‘大功告成’之名推销他的专利小胡子训练器），脸上总是带着一个生气的孩子般的表情。当时，整个世界都一直处于生气的状态。一个热衷于打扮的火腿演员，一个部分残疾的人，却肩负着挥舞镀金元帅权杖、引领世界走向希特勒先生辉煌日子的历史使命：大功告成！”

source: " I thought they would get me , instead of the president , " he told his Justice Department press aide , Edwin Guthman , as they walked back and forth on the backyard lawn at Hickory Hill on the afternoon of Nov. 22 . Guthman and others around Bobby that day thought " they " might be coming for the younger Kennedy next . So apparently did Bobby . Normally opposed to tight security measures -- " Kennedys do n't need bodyguards , " he had said with typical brashness -- he allowed his aides to summon federal marshals , who quickly surrounded his estate .
domestication: 他跟司法部的新闻助手埃德温·古斯曼说：“我以为他们会抓我，而不是总统。”当时是11月22日下午，他们俩在希科里山的后院草坪上来回踱步。那天在鲍比身边的人，包括古斯曼，都担心“他们”下一个会找上年轻的肯尼迪。鲍比显然也有同感。平日里，鲍比一向反对严密的安全措施，他曾豪言壮语地说：“肯尼迪家不需要保镖。”但这次，他却让手下召来了联邦法警，很快他的庄园就被团团包围了。
foreignization: “我以为他们会抓我，而不是总统，”他在11月22日下午与司法部新闻助理埃德温·古斯曼在希科里山的后院草坪上走来走去时告诉古斯曼。那天在鲍比身边的人认为“他们”可能会下一个找上年轻的肯尼迪。鲍比显然也有这种想法。通常反对严密的安全措施——他曾以典型的直率说“肯尼迪不需要保镖”——他却允许自己的助手召唤联邦法警，这些法警很快包围了他的庄园。

source: Not everyone on the battlefield may be as well versed in handling DU , Dr. Kilpatrick said , noting that his greater concern is DU 's chemical toxicity , not its radioactivity : " What we worry about like lead in paint in housing areas - children picking it up and eating it or licking it - getting it on their hands and ingesting it . "
domestication: 战场上的每个人可能都不擅长处理贫铀弹，基尔帕特里克博士说。他更担心的是贫铀的化学毒性，而不是放射性：“我们担心的情况就像是住房区里的铅漆——孩子们捡起来吃或舔，手上沾到了这些东西，然后摄入体内。”

source: Whether or not they are thirsty for blood is irrelevant , because their positioning automatically raises the level of tension in the atmosphere . Why , I wonder , are n't they walking around in the crowds in pairs , protecting people from pickpockets ? So I am not surprised , only disgusted , when I open The Denver Post the next day to find that the inevitable has happened . The police have panicked over a gridlock on Federal , donned riot gear and broken up the party .
domestication: 他们是否嗜血其实无所谓，因为他们一出现，气氛立刻就紧张起来。我纳闷，他们为什么不三五成群地在人群中巡逻，帮大家防小偷呢？所以，当我第二天翻开《丹佛邮报》，看到预料之中的事情发生了，我并不惊讶，只有恶心的感觉。警方因为联邦大道的交通堵塞而慌了神，穿上了防暴装备，把聚会给驱散了。
foreignization: 他们是否嗜血无关紧要，因为他们的位置自动提高了气氛中的紧张程度。我纳闷，为什么他们没有成双成对地在人群中走动，保护人们免遭扒手的侵害？所以当第二天打开《丹佛邮报》看到不可避免的事情发生了时，我并不感到惊讶，只有厌恶。警方因为联邦大道的交通堵塞而惊慌失措，穿上了防暴装备并驱散了聚会。

source: Both Mrs. Clinton and Mr. Trump helped accentuate each other 's best and worst arguments . If you were running as a battering-ram outsider like Mr. Trump , it would be hard to invent a better contrast than the Secretary of Same ; if you were running as a safe and familiar grown-up like Mrs. Clinton , who better than Mr. Trump to embody the volatile opposite ?
domestication: 克林顿夫人和特朗普先生彼此放大了对方最有力和最无力的论点。如果你像特朗普那样以一个破局者的身份参选，恐怕很难找到比“墨守成规”的国务卿更好的对比；而如果你像克林顿夫人那样以一个稳重熟悉的成年人形象出战，还有谁能比特朗普更能体现那种不可预测的对立面呢？
foreignization: 克林顿夫人和特朗普先生都帮助突出了对方最好和最坏的论点。如果你像特朗普先生那样以破釜沉舟的局外人身份参选，很难想象比“同一”的国务卿更好的对比；如果你像克林顿夫人那样以安全、熟悉的成年人身份参选，还有谁比特朗普先生更能体现波动的对立面？

source: It will break no news and spoil nobody 's fun to note that McKay is not a fan of his protagonist . His argument is essentially that much of what critics of the current president fear most -- the erosion of democratic norms ; the manufacture of " alternative facts " ; the rise of an authoritarian executive branch -- already came to pass when George W. Bush was in office . But " Vice " offers more than Yuletide rage-bait for liberal moviegoers , who already have plenty to be mad about . Revulsion and admiration lie as close together as the red and white stripes on the American flag , and if this is in some respects a real-life monster movie , it 's one that takes a lively and at times surprisingly sympathetic interest in its chosen demon .
domestication: 提到麦凯不喜欢他的主角，这也不算什么新闻，不会扫了谁的兴。他的观点基本上是，现在批评现任总统最害怕的那些事——民主规范的侵蚀、制造“另类事实”、行政分支的独裁倾向——在小布什任内就已经发生过了。但《副总统》不仅仅是一部让自由派影迷发泄怒火的圣诞节影片，他们已经有够多的理由生气了。厌恶和钦佩在美国国旗的红白条纹间近在咫尺，如果这部电影某种程度上是一部真人版怪兽片，它却对它选定的恶魔表现出生动甚至出人意料的同情。
foreignization: 指出麦凯并不是他主人公的粉丝不会泄露任何新闻也不会破坏任何人的乐趣。他的论点基本上是，当前总统的批评者最担心的许多问题——民主规范的侵蚀；“另类事实”的制造；专制行政分支的崛起——在乔治·W·布什任内就已经发生了。但《副总统》不仅仅是为自由派电影观众提供的一份节日怒火诱饵，他们已经有很多可以愤怒的事情了。厌恶和钦佩就像美国国旗上的红白条纹一样紧密相连，而如果这在某种程度上是一部现实生活的怪物电影，那么它是一部对其选定的恶魔表现出生动且有时令人惊讶的同情兴趣的电影。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It will break no news and spoil nobody 's fun to note that McKay is not a fan of his protagonist . His argument is essentially that much of what critics of the current president fear most -- the erosion of democratic norms ; the manufacture of " alternative facts " ; the rise of an authoritarian executive branch -- already came to pass when George W. Bush was in office . But " Vice " offers more than Yuletide rage-bait for liberal moviegoers , who already have plenty to be mad about . Revulsion and admiration lie as close together as the red and white stripes on the American flag , and if this is in some respects a real-life monster movie , it 's one that takes a lively and at times surprisingly sympathetic interest in its chosen demon .

指出麦凯并不是他主人公的粉丝不会泄露任何新闻也不会破坏任何人的乐趣。他的论点基本上是，当前总统的批评者最担心的许多问题——民主规范的侵蚀；“另类事实”的制造；专制行政分支的崛起——在乔治·W·布什任内就已经发生了。但《副总统》不仅仅是为自由派电影观众提供的一份节日怒火诱饵，他们已经有很多可以愤怒的事情了。厌恶和钦佩就像美国国旗上的红白条纹一样紧密相连，而如果这在某种程度上是一部现实生活的怪物电影，那么它是一部对其选定的恶魔表现出生动且有时令人惊讶的同情兴趣的电影。

source: But his sauerkraut tout made me a fan . Any Houston waiter bold enough to proselytize for snapper on a bed of pickled cabbage and fennel - a maritime riff on Alsatian choucroute - was a man after my own heart . So , I hoped , was a chef who would dare to serve it in a town where the bankable bet would be a lemon-butter treatment with crab or shrimp on top .
domestication: 但他那酸菜让我成了粉丝。休斯顿有位服务员居然大胆推荐酸菜配鱼和茴香——这可是阿尔萨斯酸菜的海洋版，真是个懂我的人。我也希望那位厨师也是如此，他在一个本该用柠檬黄油搭配蟹肉或虾仁就能稳赚的地方，竟敢端出这样的菜。
foreignization: 但是他的酸菜推销让我成为了粉丝。任何一位休斯顿的服务员，如果大胆到能为放在泡菜和茴香上的鲷鱼——这是一种对阿尔萨斯酸菜的海洋风格演绎——布道，都是我心中的同道中人。因此，我也希望那位敢于在这样一个小镇上供应这道菜的厨师也是如此，在这里，稳赚不赔的选择应该是柠檬黄油汁配上顶上的蟹肉或虾仁。

source: " Privatization and free-market policies are simply a result of economic necessity , " says Rodolfo De la Torre , assistant director of the Center of Economic Research and Analysis in Mexico City . " The huge debt loads , unemployment , and inflationary instability created by past policies forced a fundamental change in practices . "

foreignization: “私有化和自由市场政策仅仅是经济必要性的结果，”墨西哥城经济研究与分析中心副主任罗多尔福·德·拉·托雷说。“过去政策造成的巨大债务负担、失业和通货膨胀不稳定迫使实践发生了根本性变化。”

source: If insurers expected a teaching hospital like St. Luke's-Roosevelt to groom a generation of doctors willing to obey the managed-care mantra , that did not seem to be happening . In the course of their year , all three of the interns , while appreciating some of the waste excised from medicine , had become of a piece in their increasing resistance to cost pressures and managed care .

source: Despite the decades of distance , the worst part still was watching the assassination . She was in the Audubon Ballroom that day in 1965 with her daughters . When the first of 16 bullets hit Malcolm X , she threw her four children on the wooden floor and covered them with her body . " It was the realization that I could n't take him home , " she says of the replay of that finality . " Mentally you do understand realistically that he is dead , dead for 27 years and not coming back . Instinctually your wish to take him home is stronger than reality . "
domestication: 尽管相隔了几十年，最让人难以承受的还是目睹那场暗杀。1965年的那天，她和她的女儿们就在奥杜邦舞厅里。当第一颗子弹击中马尔科姆·X时，她立刻扑倒在地上，用身体护住了自己的四个孩子。“那一刻我才意识到，我再也不能带他回家了。”她回忆起那个最终的时刻，“理智上你明白他已经去世，去世了27年，再也回不来了。但本能上，你多希望可以把他带回家，这种愿望比现实还要强烈。”
foreignization: 尽管相隔数十年，最糟糕的部分仍然是目睹暗杀。1965年的那天，她和她的女儿们在奥杜邦舞厅。当第一颗子弹击中马尔科姆·X时，她把四个孩子扑倒在木地板上，用身体覆盖住他们。“这是意识到我不能带他回家，”她谈到那一刻的最终性。“从心理上你确实现实地理解他已经死了，已经死了27年，不会回来了。本能上你希望带他回家的愿望比现实更强烈。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Despite the decades of distance , the worst part still was watching the assassination . She was in the Audubon Ballroom that day in 1965 with her daughters . When the first of 16 bullets hit Malcolm X , she threw her four children on the wooden floor and covered them with her body . " It was the realization that I could n't take him home , " she says of the replay of that finality . " Mentally you do understand realistically that he is dead , dead for 27 years and not coming back . Instinctually your wish to take him home is stronger than reality . "
尽管相隔了几十年，最让人难以承受的还是目睹那场暗杀。1965年的那天，她和她的女儿们就在奥杜邦舞厅里。当第一颗子弹击中马尔科姆·X时，她立刻扑倒在地上，用身体护住了自己的四个孩子。“那一刻我才意识到，我再也不能带他回家了。”她回忆起那个最终的时刻，“理智上你明白他已经去世，去世了27年，再也回不来了。但本能上，你多希望可以把他带回家，这种愿望比现实还要强烈。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Despite the decades of distance , the worst part still was watching the assassination . She was in the Audubon Ballroom that day in 1965 with her daughters . When the first of 16 bullets hit Malcolm X , she threw her four children on the wooden floor and covered them with her body . " It was the realization that I could n't take him home , " she says of the replay of that finality . " Mentally you do understand realistically that he is dead , dead for 27 years and not coming back . Instinctually your wish to take him home is stronger than reality . "
尽管相隔数十年，最糟糕的部分仍然是目睹暗杀。1965年的那天，她和她的女儿们在奥杜邦舞厅。当第一颗子弹击中马尔科姆·X时，她把四个孩子扑倒在木地板上，用身体覆盖住他们。“这是意识到我不能带他回家，”她谈到那一刻的最终性。“从心理上你确实现实地理解他已经死了，已经死了27年，不会回来了。本能上你希望带他回家的愿望比现实更强烈。”

source: Whisk the dissolved gelatin mixture into the syrup . Whisking continuously , gradually pour this mixture onto the stiffly beaten egg whites . source: This rift can be easily amended if we come together and continue to focus on what is the real issue - racism and prejudice in this country . We have too many things in common ; blacks and Jews have suffered too many atrocities in this country and abroad . We are going down the wrong road if we do not show an alliance . Our survival is based on each other 's strength .
domestication: 这个裂痕要是我们团结起来，集中精力对付真正的问题——国内的种族主义和偏见，就能很容易地弥合。我们有太多共同点；黑人和犹太人在这个国家和海外都遭受过太多的苦难。如果我们不表现出团结，就走错了路。我们的生存相互依存，彼此的力量是我们的依靠。
foreignization: 这个裂痕如果我们团结起来并继续关注真正的问题——这个国家的种族主义和偏见——是可以很容易得到弥补的。我们有太多共同点；黑人和犹太人在国内外遭受了太多的暴行。如果我们不表现出联盟，我们正在走上错误的道路。我们的生存基于彼此的力量。

source: Canada May Have Found Cold War ' Lost Nuke ' : A Canadian diver off British Columbia spotted a metal object underwater so bizarre he thought it might be a UFO -- until an old-timer said , " Oh , you might have found that bomb . " He was referring to a Mark IV bomb dumped by a US jet in 1950 when it crashed while on a simulated nuclear bombing run . The Canadian Navy is checking it out , but this " nuke " is likely harmless .
domestication: 加拿大可能找到了冷战时期“遗失的核弹”：一位加拿大潜水员在不列颠哥伦比亚省海域潜水时，发现了一个奇怪的金属物体，他当时还以为是不明飞行物呢。直到一个老前辈告诉他：“哦，你可能找到那颗炸弹了。”原来，这是一枚1950年美国战机在模拟核轰炸训练中失事时丢下的Mark IV炸弹。加拿大海军正在调查此事，不过这枚“核弹”大概率是安全的。

source: The closest thing to a ranking of business schools ' ethics programs is a semiannual survey by the Aspen Institute and the World Resources Institute , both nonprofits . The survey , Beyond Grey Pinstripes , ranks schools based on their commitment to social responsibility and environmental protection .
