source: Single women who are financially stable enough to buy their own homes are attracted to Woodland Park . For them , it offers gated security , limited access points , guards and managers on duty and a maintenance and landscaping staff . Single women in their late 30s and early 40s are buying enough that Northern Realty is focusing significant advertising on that target group . " Women professionals with steady careers are no longer waiting until they have families to buy homes , " Tobin explained . " Security is a primary concern for them . "

source: There is also a lot of doomsday stuff out there . Because of my background , I have a propensity to believe things like that . It 's easy to start reading things from the Bible and start believing it 's World War III or the end of the world . But it also puts things into perspective . Recently , I 've been annoyed because people are writing all this gossip about my life and it 's not true . But then you realize there are bigger , more important things in the world than writing gossip about people 's lives .

source: One of the most intriguing mysteries about the assassination of John F. Kennedy , that darkest of American labyrinths , is why his brother Robert F. Kennedy apparently did nothing to investigate the crime . Bobby Kennedy was , after all , not just the attorney general of the United States at the time of the assassination -- he was his brother 's devoted partner , the man who took on the administration 's most grueling assignments , from civil rights to organized crime to Cuba , the hottest Cold War flash point of its day . But after the burst of gunfire in downtown Dallas on Nov. 22 , 1963 , ended this unique partnership , Bobby Kennedy seemed lost in a fog of grief , refusing to discuss the assassination with the Warren Commission and telling friends he had no heart for an aggressive investigation . " What difference does it make ? " he would say . " It wo n't bring him back . "
domestication: 关于约翰·肯尼迪遇刺，这美国最黑暗的谜团之一，最让人费解的是，他的弟弟罗伯特·肯尼迪为何对此案似乎毫无作为。毕竟，鲍比·肯尼迪不仅是遇刺时的美国司法部长，更是他哥哥的得力搭档，从民权运动到有组织犯罪再到古巴问题，这些当时最棘手的任务都是由他来负责的。但1963年11月22日，达拉斯市中心的那几声枪响，终结了这对兄弟的非凡合作后，鲍比·肯尼迪仿佛陷入了悲痛的迷雾中，对沃伦委员会的调查闭口不谈，还告诉朋友说他没有心情去追查真相。“查了又怎么样？”他会说，“又不能让他死而复生。”
foreignization: 关于约翰·F·肯尼迪遇刺案，这最黑暗的美国迷宫之一，最引人入胜的谜团之一是为什么他的弟弟罗伯特·F·肯尼迪似乎没有对这起犯罪进行调查。毕竟，鲍比·肯尼迪不仅在肯尼迪遇刺时担任美国司法部长——他还是他兄弟的忠实伙伴，承担了政府最艰巨的任务，从民权到有组织犯罪再到古巴，当时最热的冷战热点。但在1963年11月22日达拉斯市中心的枪声结束这段独特的合作关系后，鲍比·肯尼迪似乎陷入了悲伤的迷雾中，拒绝与沃伦委员会讨论这起遇刺案，并告诉朋友他没有心情进行积极的调查。“这有什么区别？”他会说。“这不会让他回来。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

One of the most intriguing mysteries about the assassination of John F. Kennedy , that darkest of American labyrinths , is why his brother Robert F. Kennedy apparently did nothing to investigate the crime . Bobby Kennedy was , after all , not just the attorney general of the United States at the time of the assassination -- he was his brother 's devoted partner , the man who took on the administration 's most grueling assignments , from civil rights to organized crime to Cuba , the hottest Cold War flash point of its day . But after the burst of gunfire in downtown Dallas on Nov. 22 , 1963 , ended this unique partnership , Bobby Kennedy seemed lost in a fog of grief , refusing to discuss the assassination with the Warren Commission and telling friends he had no heart for an aggressive investigation . " What difference does it make ? " he would say . " It wo n't bring him back . "

source: Ironically , " Roselily 's " very examination of issues related to a middle-age first marriage of a mother of four to a man of a different religion must have been as threatening to traditionalists as the issues over which she ruminated . Purportedly a simple woman , the persona could not hold back conflicting , complex strands of considerations as she prepared to recite her marriage vows to a man who loved her and would care for her , but at the price of much of her freedom .
domestication: 说来讽刺，“罗塞莉莉”对一个四孩母亲在中年时与一位不同宗教的男子首次结婚问题的探讨，可能对传统主义者来说，就像她思考的问题本身一样具有威胁性。尽管表面上是一个简单的女人，但这个角色在准备对一个爱她、会照顾她的男人宣誓结婚时，却无法抑制心中那些复杂且矛盾的想法，毕竟这意味着她要付出很多自由作为代价。

source: It matters little that light heavyweight Antonio Tarver did not look sharp in an exhibition win over German Thomas Ulrich last week in Portland , Ore . But Olympic assistant coach Jesse Ravelo did n't hide his feelings . " He fought a tough guy but he needs to be more aggressive and not so timid with his punches , " Ravelo said . " He needs some work , but he is capable . He 'll be OK . " . . . Twelve Olympic team members and 12 alternates open their second stage of training camp today at Northern Michigan University . The Red and Blue squads will spend two weeks at NMU ( the home base of Olympic coach Al Mitchell ) , then split up again for two exhibitions against Russia ( June 14 in Portland , Ore. ; June 17 in Miami ) . The Olympians will open their final two-week camp June 25 in Augusta .
domestication:
上周，在俄勒冈州波特兰，轻重量级拳手安东尼奥·塔弗在与德国选手托马斯·乌尔里希的友谊赛中表现不佳，这倒没什么大不了的。不过，奥运助理教练杰西·拉维洛可没藏着掖着他的想法。“他打的对手很硬朗，但他得更主动点，出拳不能这么畏畏缩缩。”拉维洛说，“他需要再打磨一下，但他有能力，没问题的。”

今天，十二名奥运队员和十二名候补队员将在密歇根北方大学开启第二阶段的训练营。红队和蓝队将在那里（奥运会教练艾尔·米切尔的大本营）待两周，之后各自分开，分别与俄罗斯队进行两场友谊赛（6月14日在俄勒冈州波特兰；6月17日在迈阿密）。奥运会队员们将于6月25日在奥古斯塔开始他们最后为期两周的训练营。
foreignization: 轻重量级选手安东尼奥·塔弗在上周于俄勒冈州波特兰与德国选手托马斯·乌尔里希的表演赛中表现不佳并不重要。但奥运会助理教练杰西·拉韦洛并没有隐瞒他的感受。“他对抗了一个难缠的对手，但他需要更加积极主动，不要在出拳时如此犹豫，”拉韦洛说。“他需要一些训练，但他有能力。他会没事的。”……十二名奥运队成员和十二名替补今天将在北密歇根大学开始他们的第二阶段训练营。红队和蓝队将在北密歇根大学（奥运会教练阿尔·米切尔的大本营）待两周，然后再次分开，与俄罗斯进行两场表演赛（6月14日在俄勒冈州波特兰；6月17日在迈阿密）。奥运选手们将于6月25日在奥古斯塔开始他们最后为期两周的训练营。

The Olympians will open their final two-week camp June 25 in Augusta .

source: In a two-story brick duplex where he lived , the police would arrive after the Sept. 11 attacks and find his name still on the mailbox , as well as a drawer full of forged identification and immigration documents , including several using the Social Security number of a Massachusetts man whose wallet had been lost in Boston .

source: Nineteen ninety-one is going to be our most difficult year . The high-point of servicing our foreign loans will be in 1991 . In 1992 , the payments will decrease by 50 percent . Negotiations have been held with leaders of some countries on opening credit . ... But everyone realizes that however important foreign aid may be , the credit itself wo n't solve our problems . We must count on our forces and organization and determination in transition to the market , as well as the toughest austerity regime . ...
domestication: 一九九一年将是咱们最艰难的一年。这一年，偿还外债将达到顶峰。到了一九九二年，还款额能减少一半。我们已经和一些国家的领导人就信贷问题进行了谈判。……但大伙都明白，外援虽重要，光靠贷款解决不了根本问题。我们必须依靠自己的力量和组织，下定决心向市场经济过渡，还要实行最严格的紧缩政策。……
foreignization: 一九九一年将是我们的最困难的一年。偿还外债的高峰将在一九九一年。一九九二年，偿付额将减少百分之五十。已与一些国家的领导人就开放信贷问题举行了谈判。……但每个人都意识到，无论外援多么重要，信贷本身并不能解决我们的问题。我们必须依靠自己的力量和组织以及在向市场经济过渡中的决心，实行最严格的紧缩政策。……

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nineteen ninety-one is going to be our most difficult year . The high-point of servicing our foreign loans will be in 1991 . In 1992 , the payments will decrease by 50 percent . Negotiations have been held with leaders of some countries on opening credit . ... But everyone realizes that however important foreign aid may be , the credit itself wo n't solve our problems . We must count on our forces and organization and determination in transition to the market , as well as the toughest austerity regime . ...

source: In her first appearance , Mary Beth took a few questions , and in answering one said that Jill was a good " ambassador " for Iraq , since she 'd reported the struggles of Iraqis ' daily lives . But later someone told her that the word " ambassador , " in Arabic , translates as " government official , " not " general emissary . " And the last thing the family wanted to imply was that Jill worked for any government .
domestication: 玛丽·贝丝第一次亮相时，回答了几个问题。说到吉尔是伊拉克的好“大使”，因为她报道了伊拉克人民日常生活的艰辛。但后来有人告诉她，“大使”在阿拉伯语里指的是“政府官员”，而不是“一般使者”。这家人最不想让人误会的就是吉尔为任何政府工作。

source: NEW YORK -- Until recently , few would have included Eddy Hartenstein in a list of the media world 's most-sought-after dealmakers . source: Watching the Okies roll down their main street , children in Seligman , Ariz. , made cruel jokes . How do you tell a rich Okie from a poor Okie ? A rich Okie has TWO mattresses tied to his car . Four decades later it was Seligman 's turn to experience a sudden reversal of fortune . In 1978 , I-40 opened a mile away and traffic on 66 stopped .
domestication: 看着那些俄克拉荷马人开着车驶过主街，亚利桑那州塞利格曼镇的孩子们开起了残忍的玩笑。怎么区分富有的俄克拉荷马人和贫穷的俄克拉荷马人呢？富有的俄克拉荷马人车后面绑着两张床垫。四十年后，轮到塞利格曼镇时来运转了。1978年，40号州际公路在距离小镇一英里处开通，66号公路上的车流一下子消失了。
